authors_text: Mert Yuksekgonul,Federico Bianchi,Pratyusha Kalluri,Dan Jurafsky,James Zou
title: When and why vision-language models behave like bags-of-words, and what to do about it?
title_zh: 视觉语言模型何时以及为何表现得像词袋，以及该怎么办？
abstract: Despite the success of large vision and language models (VLMs) in many downstream applications, it is unclear how well they encode compositional information. Here, we create the Attribution, Relation, and Order (ARO) benchmark to systematically evaluate the ability of VLMs to understand different types of relationships, attributes, and order. ARO consists of Visual Genome Attribution, to test the understanding of objects' properties; Visual Genome Relation, to test for relational understanding; and COCO & Flickr30k-Order, to test for order sensitivity. ARO is orders of magnitude larger than previous benchmarks of compositionality, with more than 50,000 test cases. We show where state-of-the-art VLMs have poor relational understanding, can blunder when linking objects to their attributes, and demonstrate a severe lack of order sensitivity. VLMs are predominantly trained and evaluated on large datasets with rich compositional structure in the images and captions. Yet, training on these datasets has not been enough to address the lack of compositional understanding, and evaluating on these datasets has failed to surface this deficiency. To understand why these limitations emerge and are not represented in the standard tests, we zoom into the evaluation and training procedures. We demonstrate that it is possible to perform well on retrieval over existing datasets without using the composition and order information. Given that contrastive pretraining optimizes for retrieval on datasets with similar shortcuts, we hypothesize that this can explain why the models do not need to learn to represent compositional information. This finding suggests a natural solution: composition-aware hard negative mining. We show that a simple-to-implement modification of contrastive learning significantly improves the performance on tasks requiring understanding of order and compositionality.

ARO consists of Visual Genome Attribution, to test the understanding of objects' properties; Visual Genome Relation, to test for relational understanding; and COCO & Flickr30k-Order, to test for order sensitivity. ARO is orders of magnitude larger than previous benchmarks of compositionality, with more than 50,000 test cases. We show where state-of-the-art VLMs have poor relational understanding, can blunder when linking objects to their attributes, and demonstrate a severe lack of order sensitivity. VLMs are predominantly trained and evaluated on large datasets with rich compositional structure in the images and captions. Yet, training on these datasets has not been enough to address the lack of compositional understanding, and evaluating on these datasets has failed to surface this deficiency. To understand why these limitations emerge and are not represented in the standard tests, we zoom into the evaluation and training procedures. We demonstrate that it is possible to perform well on retrieval over existing datasets without using the composition and order information. Given that contrastive pretraining optimizes for retrieval on datasets with similar shortcuts, we hypothesize that this can explain why the models do not need to learn to represent compositional information. abstract_zh: 尽管大型视觉和语言模型（VLM）在许多下游应用中取得了成功，但尚不清楚它们对组合信息的编码效果如何。在这里，我们创建了归因、关系和顺序 (ARO) 基准，以系统地评估 VLM 理解不同类型的关系、属性和顺序的能力。 ARO由视觉基因组归因组成，测试对物体属性的理解；视觉基因组关系，测试关系理解；以及 COCO & Flickr30k-Order，用于测试订单敏感性。 ARO 比之前的组合性基准大几个数量级，有超过 50,000 个测试用例。我们展示了最先进的 VLM 的关系理解能力较差，在将对象与其属性链接时可能会出错，并且严重缺乏顺序敏感性。 VLM 主要在图像和标题中具有丰富组成结构的大型数据集上进行训练和评估。然而，对这些数据集的训练还不足以解决组合理解的缺乏，并且对这些数据集的评估也未能揭示这一缺陷。为了理解为什么会出现这些限制并且在标准测试中没有体现出来，我们深入研究了评估和培训程序。我们证明，在不使用组成和顺序信息的情况下，可以在现有数据集的检索上表现良好。鉴于对比预训练可以优化具有相似快捷方式的数据集的检索，我们假设这可以解释为什么模型不需要学习表示组成信息。这一发现提出了一个自然的解决方案：成分感知的硬负挖掘。我们表明，对比学习的易于实现的修改显着提高了需要理解顺序和组合性的任务的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文创建了ARO基准测试以评估视觉-语言模型（VLMs）对组合信息的理解能力，并提出通过组合感知的硬负样本挖掘改进模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLMs在许多应用中表现优异，但其对组合信息（如关系、属性、顺序）的编码能力不足，现有数据集和评估方法未能揭示这一缺陷。
AI.method: 构建包含视觉属性、关系和顺序敏感性的ARO基准（超5万测试案例），分析模型在组合任务中的不足，并提出基于对比学习的组合感知硬负样本挖掘方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有SOTA模型在ARO上表现不佳，尤其在关系理解与顺序敏感性方面存在严重缺陷；所提方法显著提升了组合性任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs因依赖数据集中的捷径（如对比预训练的检索优化）而未学习组合表征，需通过组合感知的训练策略（如硬负样本挖掘）来增强其组合理解能力。

authors_text: Shadi Haddad,Abhishek Halder
title: Convex and Nonconvex Sublinear Regression with Application to Data-driven Learning of Reach Sets
title_zh: 凸和非凸次线性回归及其在数据驱动的触及范围学习中的应用
abstract: We consider estimating a compact set from finite data by approximating the support function of that set via sublinear regression. Support functions uniquely characterize a compact set up to closure of convexification, and are sublinear (convex as well as positive homogeneous of degree one). Conversely, any sublinear function is the support function of a compact set. We leverage this property to transcribe the task of learning a compact set to that of learning its support function. We propose two algorithms to perform the sublinear regression, one via convex and another via nonconvex programming. The convex programming approach involves solving a quadratic program (QP). The nonconvex programming approach involves training a input sublinear neural network. We illustrate the proposed methods via numerical examples on learning the reach sets of controlled dynamics subject to set-valued input uncertainties from trajectory data.
summary: We consider estimating a compact set from finite data by approximating the support function of that set via sublinear regression. Support functions uniquely characterize a compact set up to closure of convexification, and are sublinear (convex as well as positive homogeneous of degree one). Conversely, any sublinear function is the support function of a compact set. We leverage this property to transcribe the task of learning a compact set to that of learning its support function. We propose two algorithms to perform the sublinear regression, one via convex and another via nonconvex programming. The convex programming approach involves solving a quadratic program (QP). The nonconvex programming approach involves training a input sublinear neural network. We illustrate the proposed methods via numerical examples on learning the reach sets of controlled dynamics subject to set-valued input uncertainties from trajectory data.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑通过次线性回归逼近该集合的支持函数，从有限数据中估计一个紧致集合。支持函数独特地描述了凸化闭合的紧凑设置，并且是次线性的（凸以及一级正齐次）。相反，任何次线性函数都是紧集的支持函数。我们利用这个属性将学习紧集的任务转录为学习其支持函数的任务。我们提出了两种算法来执行次线性回归，一种通过凸规划，另一种通过非凸规划。凸规划方法涉及求解二次规划 (QP)。非凸规划方法涉及训练输入次线性神经网络。我们通过数值示例来说明所提出的方法，该数值示例学习受控动力学的范围集，受轨迹数据的集值输入不确定性影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过次线性回归估计紧集，将其支持函数的学习转化为凸或非凸优化问题，并应用于数据驱动的可达集学习。
AI.motivation: 支持函数可唯一表征紧集，且次线性函数与紧集存在一一对应关系，因此通过学习支持函数可实现紧集估计，尤其适用于处理控制动力学中的集值输入不确定性。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：基于凸优化的二次规划（QP）方法和基于非凸优化的输入次线性神经网络训练方法，分别用于学习目标紧集的支持函数。
AI.result: 通过数值实验验证了两种方法在学习受控动力学系统可达集中的有效性，能够处理轨迹数据中的集值输入不确定性问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法将紧集学习转化为支持函数学习问题，通过凸/非凸优化实现，为数据驱动的可达集分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tarasha Khurana,Peiyun Hu,Achal Dave,Jason Ziglar,David Held,Deva Ramanan
title: Differentiable Raycasting for Self-supervised Occupancy Forecasting
title_zh: 用于自监督占用预测的可微分光线投射
abstract: Motion planning for safe autonomous driving requires learning how the environment around an ego-vehicle evolves with time. Ego-centric perception of driveable regions in a scene not only changes with the motion of actors in the environment, but also with the movement of the ego-vehicle itself. Self-supervised representations proposed for large-scale planning, such as ego-centric freespace, confound these two motions, making the representation difficult to use for downstream motion planners. In this paper, we use geometric occupancy as a natural alternative to view-dependent representations such as freespace. Occupancy maps naturally disentangle the motion of the environment from the motion of the ego-vehicle. However, one cannot directly observe the full 3D occupancy of a scene (due to occlusion), making it difficult to use as a signal for learning. Our key insight is to use differentiable raycasting to "render" future occupancy predictions into future LiDAR sweep predictions, which can be compared with ground-truth sweeps for self-supervised learning. The use of differentiable raycasting allows occupancy to emerge as an internal representation within the forecasting network. In the absence of groundtruth occupancy, we quantitatively evaluate the forecasting of raycasted LiDAR sweeps and show improvements of upto 15 F1 points. For downstream motion planners, where emergent occupancy can be directly used to guide non-driveable regions, this representation relatively reduces the number of collisions with objects by up to 17% as compared to freespace-centric motion planners.

Our key insight is to use differentiable raycasting to "render" future occupancy predictions into future LiDAR sweep predictions, which can be compared with ground-truth sweeps for self-supervised learning. The use of differentiable raycasting allows occupancy to emerge as an internal representation within the forecasting network. In the absence of groundtruth occupancy, we quantitatively evaluate the forecasting of raycasted LiDAR sweeps and show improvements of upto 15 F1 points. For downstream motion planners, where emergent occupancy can be directly used to guide non-driveable regions, this representation relatively reduces the number of collisions with objects by up to 17% as compared to freespace-centric motion planners.
abstract_zh: 安全自动驾驶的运动规划需要了解自我车辆周围的环境如何随时间变化。对场景中可驾驶区域的以自我为中心的感知不仅随着环境中演员的运动而变化，而且还随着自我车辆本身的运动而变化。为大规模规划提出的自监督表示，例如以自我为中心的自由空间，混淆了这两种运动，使得该表示难以用于下游运动规划者。在本文中，我们使用几何占用作为依赖于视图的表示（例如自由空间）的自然替代方案。占用地图自然地将环境的运动与自我车辆的运动分开。然而，人们无法直接观察场景的完整 3D 占用（由于遮挡），因此很难用作学习信号。我们的主要见解是使用可微分光线投射将未来占用预测“渲染”为未来 LiDAR 扫描预测，这可以与自我监督学习的地面实况扫描进行比较。可微分光线投射的使用允许占用率作为预测网络中的内部表示出现。在没有地面实况占用的情况下，我们定量评估了光线投射 LiDAR 扫描的预测，并显示出最多 15 个 F1 点的改进。对于下游运动规划器，紧急占用可以直接用于引导不可驾驶区域，与以自由空间为中心的运动规划器相比，这种表示相对减少了与物体的碰撞次数高达 17%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分光线投射的自监督占用预测方法，用于改进自动驾驶中的运动规划。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视角的自由空间表示无法区分环境运动与自身车辆运动，导致下游运动规划器性能受限。占用地图虽能解耦两者运动，但因遮挡难以直接观测，需通过其他方式学习。
AI.method: 利用可微分光线投射将未来占用预测渲染为LiDAR点云预测，通过与真实点云对比实现自监督学习，使占用信息成为预测网络的内部表示。
AI.result: 在无真实占用标签情况下，LiDAR预测精度提升15 F1点，运动规划器碰撞率降低17%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦环境与自身运动，提供了更安全有效的占用表示，优于传统自由空间方法。

search_text: Differentiable Raycasting for Self-supervised Occupancy Forecasting 用于自监督占用预测的可微分光线投射 Motion planning for safe autonomous driving requires learning how the environment around an ego-vehicle evolves with time. Ego-centric perception of driveable regions in a scene not only changes with the motion of actors in the environment, but also with the movement of the ego-vehicle itself. Self-supervised representations proposed for large-scale planning, such as ego-centric freespace, confound these two motions, making the representation difficult to use for downstream motion planners. In this paper, we use geometric occupancy as a natural alternative to view-dependent representations such as freespace. Occupancy maps naturally disentangle the motion of the environment from the motion of the ego-vehicle. However, one cannot directly observe the full 3D occupancy of a scene (due to occlusion), making it difficult to use as a signal for learning. Our key insight is to use differentiable raycasting to "render" future occupancy predictions into future LiDAR sweep predictions, which can be compared with ground-truth sweeps for self-supervised learning. The use of differentiable raycasting allows occupancy to emerge as an internal representation within the forecasting network. In the absence of groundtruth occupancy, we quantitatively evaluate the forecasting of raycasted LiDAR sweeps and show improvements of upto 15 F1 points. For downstream motion planners, where emergent occupancy can be directly used to guide non-driveable regions, this representation relatively reduces the number of collisions with objects by up to 17% as compared to freespace-centric motion planners. 安全自动驾驶的运动规划需要了解自我车辆周围的环境如何随时间变化。对场景中可驾驶区域的以自我为中心的感知不仅随着环境中演员的运动而变化，而且还随着自我车辆本身的运动而变化。为大规模规划提出的自监督表示，例如以自我为中心的自由空间，混淆了这两种运动，使得该表示难以用于下游运动规划者。在本文中，我们使用几何占用作为依赖于视图的表示（例如自由空间）的自然替代方案。占用地图自然地将环境的运动与自我车辆的运动分开。然而，人们无法直接观察场景的完整 3D 占用（由于遮挡），因此很难用作学习信号。我们的主要见解是使用可微分光线投射将未来占用预测“渲染”为未来 LiDAR 扫描预测，这可以与自我监督学习的地面实况扫描进行比较。可微分光线投射的使用允许占用率作为预测网络中的内部表示出现。在没有地面实况占用的情况下，我们定量评估了光线投射 LiDAR 扫描的预测，并显示出最多 15 个 F1 点的改进。对于下游运动规划器，紧急占用可以直接用于引导不可驾驶区域，与以自由空间为中心的运动规划器相比，这种表示相对减少了与物体的碰撞次数高达 17%。 本文提出一种基于可微分光线投射的自监督占用预测方法，用于改进自动驾驶中的运动规划。 Tarasha Khurana,Peiyun Hu,Achal Dave,Jason Ziglar,David Held,Deva Ramanan cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Oier Mees,Jessica Borja-Diaz,Wolfram Burgard
title: Grounding Language with Visual Affordances over Unstructured Data
title_zh: 通过非结构化数据的视觉可供性为语言奠定基础
comment: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Project website: http://hulc2.cs.uni-freiburg.de
comments: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Project website: http://hulc2.cs.uni-freiburg.de
abstract: Recent works have shown that Large Language Models (LLMs) can be applied to ground natural language to a wide variety of robot skills. However, in practice, learning multi-task, language-conditioned robotic skills typically requires large-scale data collection and frequent human intervention to reset the environment or help correcting the current policies. In this work, we propose a novel approach to efficiently learn general-purpose language-conditioned robot skills from unstructured, offline and reset-free data in the real world by exploiting a self-supervised visuo-lingual affordance model, which requires annotating as little as 1% of the total data with language. We evaluate our method in extensive experiments both in simulated and real-world robotic tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the challenging CALVIN benchmark and learning over 25 distinct visuomotor manipulation tasks with a single policy in the real world. We find that when paired with LLMs to break down abstract natural language instructions into subgoals via few-shot prompting, our method is capable of completing long-horizon, multi-tier tasks in the real world, while requiring an order of magnitude less data than previous approaches. Code and videos are available at http://hulc2.cs.uni-freiburg.de
summary: Recent works have shown that Large Language Models (LLMs) can be applied to ground natural language to a wide variety of robot skills. However, in practice, learning multi-task, language-conditioned robotic skills typically requires large-scale data collection and frequent human intervention to reset the environment or help correcting the current policies. In this work, we propose a novel approach to efficiently learn general-purpose language-conditioned robot skills from unstructured, offline and reset-free data in the real world by exploiting a self-supervised visuo-lingual affordance model, which requires annotating as little as 1% of the total data with language. We evaluate our method in extensive experiments both in simulated and real-world robotic tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the challenging CALVIN benchmark and learning over 25 distinct visuomotor manipulation tasks with a single policy in the real world. We find that when paired with LLMs to break down abstract natural language instructions into subgoals via few-shot prompting, our method is capable of completing long-horizon, multi-tier tasks in the real world, while requiring an order of magnitude less data than previous approaches. Code and videos are available at http://hulc2.cs.uni-freiburg.de
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，大型语言模型（LLM）可以应用于将自然语言应用于各种机器人技能。然而，在实践中，学习多任务、语言条件的机器人技能通常需要大规模数据收集和频繁的人工干预来重置环境或帮助纠正当前政策。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过利用自我监督的视觉语言可供性模型，从现实世界中的非结构化、离线和免重置数据中有效地学习通用语言条件机器人技能，该模型只需要用语言注释总数据的 1%。我们在模拟和现实世界的机器人任务中进行了广泛的实验来评估我们的方法，在具有挑战性的 CALVIN 基准上实现了最先进的性能，并在现实世界中使用单一策略学习超过 25 种不同的视觉运动操作任务。我们发现，当与法学硕士结合使用，通过几次提示将抽象的自然语言指令分解为子目标时，我们的方法能够完成现实世界中的长期、多层任务，同时需要比以前的方法少一个数量级的数据。代码和视频可在 http://hulc2.cs.uni-freiburg.de 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过自监督视觉-语言可操作性模型，从非结构化离线数据中高效学习语言条件机器人技能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要大量标注数据和人工干预，而本文旨在减少数据需求并实现无需重置环境的真实世界机器人技能学习。
AI.method: 构建自监督的视觉-语言可操作性模型，仅需1%的标注数据，并结合大语言模型分解指令为子目标以完成复杂任务。
AI.result: 在CALVIN基准测试中达到SOTA性能，真实世界中单策略学习25+视觉运动任务，数据量较传统方法减少10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视觉可操作性建模和语言模型协同，显著提升了真实世界机器人技能学习的效率与泛化能力。

authors_text: Christopher Liao,Theodoros Tsiligkaridis,Brian Kulis
title: Supervised Metric Learning to Rank for Retrieval via Contextual Similarity Optimization
title_zh: 通过上下文相似度优化进行有监督的度量学习以进行检索排名
abstract: There is extensive interest in metric learning methods for image retrieval. Many metric learning loss functions focus on learning a correct ranking of training samples, but strongly overfit semantically inconsistent labels and require a large amount of data. To address these shortcomings, we propose a new metric learning method, called contextual loss, which optimizes contextual similarity in addition to cosine similarity. Our contextual loss implicitly enforces semantic consistency among neighbors while converging to the correct ranking. We empirically show that the proposed loss is more robust to label noise, and is less prone to overfitting even when a large portion of train data is withheld. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a new state-of-the-art across four image retrieval benchmarks and multiple different evaluation settings. Code is available at: https://github.com/Chris210634/metric-learning-using-contextual-similarity
summary: There is extensive interest in metric learning methods for image retrieval. Many metric learning loss functions focus on learning a correct ranking of training samples, but strongly overfit semantically inconsistent labels and require a large amount of data. To address these shortcomings, we propose a new metric learning method, called contextual loss, which optimizes contextual similarity in addition to cosine similarity. Our contextual loss implicitly enforces semantic consistency among neighbors while converging to the correct ranking. We empirically show that the proposed loss is more robust to label noise, and is less prone to overfitting even when a large portion of train data is withheld. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a new state-of-the-art across four image retrieval benchmarks and multiple different evaluation settings. Code is available at: https://github.com/Chris210634/metric-learning-using-contextual-similarity
abstract_zh: 人们对图像检索的度量学习方法产生了广泛的兴趣。许多度量学习损失函数专注于学习训练样本的正确排名，但严重过度拟合语义不一致的标签，并且需要大量数据。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一种新的度量学习方法，称为上下文损失，除了余弦相似度之外，它还优化了上下文相似度。我们的上下文损失隐式地强制邻居之间的语义一致性，同时收敛到正确的排名。我们的经验表明，所提出的损失对于标签噪声更加稳健，并且即使在保留大部分训练数据时也不太容易过度拟合。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在四个图像检索基准和多个不同的评估设置中实现了新的最先进技术。代码位于：https://github.com/Chris210634/metric-learning-using-contextual-similarity

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的监督度量学习方法，通过结合上下文相似性优化来改进图像检索中的排序任务。
AI.motivation: 现有度量学习方法在图像检索中存在过度拟合语义不一致标签、依赖大量数据的问题，需更鲁棒的解决方案以减少标签噪声影响和过拟合风险。
AI.method: 设计一种融合上下文相似性与余弦相似性的损失函数（上下文损失），隐式强化邻居间的语义一致性，同时优化正确排序。
AI.result: 在四个图像检索基准数据集上达到新状态-of-the-art性能，且在标签噪声和数据量减少情况下表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 通过上下文相似性优化的度量学习方法能有效提升检索性能，代码已开源验证方法实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新的监督度量学习方法，通过结合上下文相似性优化来改进图像检索中的排序任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有度量学习方法在图像检索中存在过度拟合语义不一致标签、依赖大量数据的问题，需更鲁棒的解决方案以减少标签噪声影响和过拟合风险。
ai_content.method: 设计一种融合上下文相似性与余弦相似性的损失函数（上下文损失），隐式强化邻居间的语义一致性，同时优化正确排序。
ai_content.result: 在四个图像检索基准数据集上达到新状态-of-the-art性能，且在标签噪声和数据量减少情况下表现更稳健。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过上下文相似性优化的度量学习方法能有效提升检索性能，代码已开源验证方法实用性。

search_text: Supervised Metric Learning to Rank for Retrieval via Contextual Similarity Optimization 通过上下文相似度优化进行有监督的度量学习以进行检索排名 There is extensive interest in metric learning methods for image retrieval. Many metric learning loss functions focus on learning a correct ranking of training samples, but strongly overfit semantically inconsistent labels and require a large amount of data. To address these shortcomings, we propose a new metric learning method, called contextual loss, which optimizes contextual similarity in addition to cosine similarity. Our contextual loss implicitly enforces semantic consistency among neighbors while converging to the correct ranking. We empirically show that the proposed loss is more robust to label noise, and is less prone to overfitting even when a large portion of train data is withheld. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a new state-of-the-art across four image retrieval benchmarks and multiple different evaluation settings. Code is available at: https://github.com/Chris210634/metric-learning-using-contextual-similarity 人们对图像检索的度量学习方法产生了广泛的兴趣。许多度量学习损失函数专注于学习训练样本的正确排名，但严重过度拟合语义不一致的标签，并且需要大量数据。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一种新的度量学习方法，称为上下文损失，除了余弦相似度之外，它还优化了上下文相似度。我们的上下文损失隐式地强制邻居之间的语义一致性，同时收敛到正确的排名。我们的经验表明，所提出的损失对于标签噪声更加稳健，并且即使在保留大部分训练数据时也不太容易过度拟合。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在四个图像检索基准和多个不同的评估设置中实现了新的最先进技术。代码位于：https://github.com/Chris210634/metric-learning-using-contextual-similarity 本文提出一种新的监督度量学习方法，通过结合上下文相似性优化来改进图像检索中的排序任务。 Christopher Liao,Theodoros Tsiligkaridis,Brian Kulis cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Xiong,Han Zhong,Chengshuai Shi,Cong Shen,Tong Zhang
title: A Self-Play Posterior Sampling Algorithm for Zero-Sum Markov Games
title_zh: 零和马尔可夫博弈的自博后采样算法
abstract: Existing studies on provably efficient algorithms for Markov games (MGs) almost exclusively build on the "optimism in the face of uncertainty" (OFU) principle. This work focuses on a different approach of posterior sampling, which is celebrated in many bandits and reinforcement learning settings but remains under-explored for MGs. Specifically, for episodic two-player zero-sum MGs, a novel posterior sampling algorithm is developed with general function approximation. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that the posterior sampling algorithm admits a $\sqrt{T}$-regret bound for problems with a low multi-agent decoupling coefficient, which is a new complexity measure for MGs, where $T$ denotes the number of episodes. When specialized to linear MGs, the obtained regret bound matches the state-of-the-art results. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first provably efficient posterior sampling algorithm for MGs with frequentist regret guarantees, which enriches the toolbox for MGs and promotes the broad applicability of posterior sampling.
summary: Existing studies on provably efficient algorithms for Markov games (MGs) almost exclusively build on the "optimism in the face of uncertainty" (OFU) principle. This work focuses on a different approach of posterior sampling, which is celebrated in many bandits and reinforcement learning settings but remains under-explored for MGs. Specifically, for episodic two-player zero-sum MGs, a novel posterior sampling algorithm is developed with general function approximation. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that the posterior sampling algorithm admits a $\sqrt{T}$-regret bound for problems with a low multi-agent decoupling coefficient, which is a new complexity measure for MGs, where $T$ denotes the number of episodes. When specialized to linear MGs, the obtained regret bound matches the state-of-the-art results. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first provably efficient posterior sampling algorithm for MGs with frequentist regret guarantees, which enriches the toolbox for MGs and promotes the broad applicability of posterior sampling.
abstract_zh: 现有的可证明有效的马尔可夫博弈（MG）算法的研究几乎完全建立在“面对不确定性的乐观”（OFU）原则之上。这项工作重点关注一种不同的后验采样方法，这种方法在许多老虎机和强化学习环境中受到欢迎，但对于 MG 仍有待探索。具体来说，对于情景式两人零和 MG，采用通用函数逼近开发了一种新颖的后验采样算法。理论分析表明，后验采样算法对于低多智能体解耦系数的问题承认 $\sqrt{T}$-regret 界限，这是 MG 的一种新的复杂性度量，其中 $T$ 表示情节数量。当专门用于线性 MG 时，获得的后悔界限与最先进的结果相匹配。据我们所知，这是第一个可证明有效的具有频率遗憾保证的MG后验采样算法，丰富了MG的工具箱并促进了后验采样的广泛适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于零和马尔可夫博弈的自博弈后验抽样算法，以提高算法效率并填补该领域的研究空白。
AI.motivation: 现有算法多基于OFU原则，但后验抽样在MGs中应用较少，需探索更高效方法。
AI.method: 设计结合广义函数逼近的后验抽样算法，并通过理论分析证明其 regret 上界。
AI.result: 算法在低多智能体解耦系数问题中实现√T regret界，且在线性MGs中达到最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 首次在频繁主义保证下证明后验抽样算法的有效性，推动其在MGs中的应用。

authors_text: Frank Elavsky,Jennifer Mankoff,Arvind Satyanarayan
title: Increasing Data Equity Through Accessibility
title_zh: 通过可访问性提高数据公平性
abstract: This position statement is a response to the Office of Science and Technology Policy's Request for Information on "Equitable Data Engagement and Accountability." This response considers data equity specifically for people with disabilities. The RFI asks "how Federal agencies can better support collaboration with other levels of government, civil society, and the research community around the production and use of equitable data." We argue that one critically underserved community in the context of data equity is people with disabilities. Today's tools make it extremely difficult for disabled people to (1) interact with data and data visualizations and (2) take jobs that involve working with and visualizing data. Yet access to such data is increasingly critical, and integral, to engaging with government and civil society. We must change the standards and expectations around data practices to include disabled people and support the research necessary to achieve those goals.
summary: This position statement is a response to the Office of Science and Technology Policy's Request for Information on "Equitable Data Engagement and Accountability." This response considers data equity specifically for people with disabilities. The RFI asks "how Federal agencies can better support collaboration with other levels of government, civil society, and the research community around the production and use of equitable data." We argue that one critically underserved community in the context of data equity is people with disabilities. Today's tools make it extremely difficult for disabled people to (1) interact with data and data visualizations and (2) take jobs that involve working with and visualizing data. Yet access to such data is increasingly critical, and integral, to engaging with government and civil society. We must change the standards and expectations around data practices to include disabled people and support the research necessary to achieve those goals.
abstract_zh: 本立场声明是对科学技术政策办公室关于“公平数据参与和问责制”信息请求的回应。此回应专门考虑了针对残疾人的数据公平性。 RFI 询问“联邦机构如何更好地支持与其他级别的政府、民间社会和研究界围绕公平数据的生产和使用进行合作。”我们认为，在数据公平的背景下，服务严重不足的社区之一是残疾人。当今的工具使残疾人很难（1）与数据和数据可视化交互以及（2）从事涉及数据处理和可视化的工作。然而，获取此类数据对于与政府和民间社会合作变得越来越重要和不可或缺。我们必须改变数据实践的标准和期望，将残疾人纳入其中，并支持实现这些目标所需的研究。

AI.tldr: 回应政府关于公平数据参与的请求，强调残疾人在数据公平中的被忽视地位，并提出通过提升数据可访问性来改善这一现状的策略。
AI.motivation: 当前数据工具和标准未能满足残疾人的需求，导致他们在数据互动和相关就业中面临障碍，而数据访问对参与社会事务日益重要，亟需改变现状。
AI.method: 通过分析现有数据工具的不足，结合残疾人需求，提出政策建议和研究方向，以推动数据实践标准的改革。
AI.result: 提出针对残疾人的数据可访问性改进措施，呼吁联邦机构加强跨部门合作，推动包容性数据标准的制定，并支持相关研究。
AI.conclusion: 为实现数据公平，必须调整数据实践标准，确保残疾人能够有效参与数据相关活动，并通过多方合作推进包容性数据政策的实施。

authors_text: Gianfranco Bilardi,Lorenzo De Stefani
title: The DAG Visit approach for Pebbling and I/O Lower Bounds
title_zh: Pebbling 和 I/O 下界的 DAG 访问方法
comment: Extended version of manuscript published in the Proceedings of FSTTCS22
comments: Extended version of manuscript published in the Proceedings of FSTTCS22
abstract: We introduce the notion of an $r$-visit of a Directed Acyclic Graph DAG $G=(V,E)$, a sequence of the vertices of the DAG complying with a given rule $r$. A rule $r$ specifies for each vertex $v\in V$ a family of $r$-enabling sets of (immediate) predecessors: before visiting $v$, at least one of its enabling sets must have been visited. Special cases are the $r^{(top)}$-rule (or, topological rule), for which the only enabling set is the set of all predecessors and the $r^{(sin)}$-rule (or, singleton rule), for which the enabling sets are the singletons containing exactly one predecessor. The $r$-boundary complexity of a DAG $G$, $b_{r}\left(G\right)$, is the minimum integer $b$ such that there is an $r$-visit where, at each stage, for at most $b$ of the vertices yet to be visited an enabling set has already been visited. By a reformulation of known results, it is shown that the boundary complexity of a DAG $G$ is a lower bound to the pebbling number of the reverse DAG, $G^R$. Several known pebbling lower bounds can be cast in terms of the $r^{(sin)}$-boundary complexity. A visit partition technique for I/O lower bounds, which generalizes the $S$-partition I/O technique introduced by Hong and Kung in their classic paper "I/O complexity: The Red-Blue pebble game". The visit partition approach yields tight I/O bounds for some DAGs for which the $S$-partition technique can only yield an $Ω(1)$ lower bound.
summary: We introduce the notion of an $r$-visit of a Directed Acyclic Graph DAG $G=(V,E)$, a sequence of the vertices of the DAG complying with a given rule $r$. A rule $r$ specifies for each vertex $v\in V$ a family of $r$-enabling sets of (immediate) predecessors: before visiting $v$, at least one of its enabling sets must have been visited. Special cases are the $r^{(top)}$-rule (or, topological rule), for which the only enabling set is the set of all predecessors and the $r^{(sin)}$-rule (or, singleton rule), for which the enabling sets are the singletons containing exactly one predecessor. The $r$-boundary complexity of a DAG $G$, $b_{r}\left(G\right)$, is the minimum integer $b$ such that there is an $r$-visit where, at each stage, for at most $b$ of the vertices yet to be visited an enabling set has already been visited. By a reformulation of known results, it is shown that the boundary complexity of a DAG $G$ is a lower bound to the pebbling number of the reverse DAG, $G^R$. Several known pebbling lower bounds can be cast in terms of the $r^{(sin)}$-boundary complexity. A visit partition technique for I/O lower bounds, which generalizes the $S$-partition I/O technique introduced by Hong and Kung in their classic paper "I/O complexity: The Red-Blue pebble game". The visit partition approach yields tight I/O bounds for some DAGs for which the $S$-partition technique can only yield an $Ω(1)$ lower bound.
abstract_zh: 我们引入有向无环图 DAG $G=(V,E)$ 的 $r$ 访问概念，即符合给定规则 $r$ 的 DAG 顶点序列。规则 $r$ 为 V$ 中的每个顶点 $v\in V$ 指定一系列 (直接) 前驱 $r$ 启用集：在访问 $v$ 之前，必须至少访问过其启用集之一。特殊情况是 $r^{(top)}$ 规则（或拓扑规则），其中唯一的使能集是所有前驱的集合，以及 $r^{(sin)}$ 规则（或单例规则），其中使能集是仅包含一个前驱的单例。 DAG $G$ 的 $r$ 边界复杂度，$b_{r}\left(G\right)$ 是最小整数 $b$，使得存在 $r$-访问，其中在每个阶段，对于至多 $b$ 尚未访问的顶点，已访问过启用集。通过对已知结果的重新表述，表明 DAG $G$ 的边界复杂度是反向 DAG $G^R$ 的卵石数的下限。几个已知的卵石下界可以根据 $r^{(sin)}$ 边界复杂度进行转换。 I/O 下界的访问分区技术，概括了 Hong 和 Kung 在其经典论文“I/O 复杂性：红蓝卵石游戏”中介绍的 $S$ 分区 I/O 技术。访问分区方法对某些 DAG 产生严格的 I/O 界限，而 $S$ 分区技术只能产生 $Ω(1)$ 下限。

AI.motivation: 为了寻找更有效的DAG的pebbling下界和I/O复杂度分析方法，传统方法存在局限性，需提出新的理论框架。
AI.method: 定义r-访问规则及r-边界复杂度，结合已知结果证明其与反向DAG的pebbling数的关系；推广Hong和Kung的S-分区技术，提出访问分区方法。
AI.result: 证明了r-边界复杂度是反向DAG的pebbling数的下界，部分已知结果可由此框架推导；对某些DAG的I/O下界提供了更紧的界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分析DAG的pebbling和I/O下界提供了统一且更有效的理论工具，扩展了传统技术的适用范围。

A rule $r$ specifies for each vertex $v\in V$ a family of $r$-enabling sets of (immediate) predecessors: before visiting $v$, at least one of its enabling sets must have been visited. Special cases are the $r^{(top)}$-rule (or, topological rule), for which the only enabling set is the set of all predecessors and the $r^{(sin)}$-rule (or, singleton rule), for which the enabling sets are the singletons containing exactly one predecessor. By a reformulation of known results, it is shown that the boundary complexity of a DAG $G$ is a lower bound to the pebbling number of the reverse DAG, $G^R$. Several known pebbling lower bounds can be cast in terms of the $r^{(sin)}$-boundary complexity. authors_text: Adam Scherlis,Kshitij Sachan,Adam S. Jermyn,Joe Benton,Buck Shlegeris
title: Polysemanticity and Capacity in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络中的多语义性和容量
comment: 22 pages, 7 figures. Improved notation and corrected an error in the description of the most general efficient matrices
comments: 22 pages, 7 figures. Improved notation and corrected an error in the description of the most general efficient matrices
abstract: Individual neurons in neural networks often represent a mixture of unrelated features. This phenomenon, called polysemanticity, can make interpreting neural networks more difficult and so we aim to understand its causes. We propose doing so through the lens of feature \emph{capacity}, which is the fractional dimension each feature consumes in the embedding space. We show that in a toy model the optimal capacity allocation tends to monosemantically represent the most important features, polysemantically represent less important features (in proportion to their impact on the loss), and entirely ignore the least important features. Polysemanticity is more prevalent when the inputs have higher kurtosis or sparsity and more prevalent in some architectures than others. Given an optimal allocation of capacity, we go on to study the geometry of the embedding space. We find a block-semi-orthogonal structure, with differing block sizes in different models, highlighting the impact of model architecture on the interpretability of its neurons.
summary: Individual neurons in neural networks often represent a mixture of unrelated features. This phenomenon, called polysemanticity, can make interpreting neural networks more difficult and so we aim to understand its causes. We propose doing so through the lens of feature \emph{capacity}, which is the fractional dimension each feature consumes in the embedding space. We show that in a toy model the optimal capacity allocation tends to monosemantically represent the most important features, polysemantically represent less important features (in proportion to their impact on the loss), and entirely ignore the least important features. Polysemanticity is more prevalent when the inputs have higher kurtosis or sparsity and more prevalent in some architectures than others. Given an optimal allocation of capacity, we go on to study the geometry of the embedding space. We find a block-semi-orthogonal structure, with differing block sizes in different models, highlighting the impact of model architecture on the interpretability of its neurons.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中的单个神经元通常代表不相关特征的混合。这种现象称为多语义性，会使解释神经网络变得更加困难，因此我们的目标是了解其原因。我们建议通过特征 \emph{capacity} 的视角来实现这一点，它是每个特征在嵌入空间中消耗的分数维度。我们表明，在玩具模型中，最优容量分配倾向于单语义表示最重要的特征，多语义表示不太重要的特征（与它们对损失的影响成比例），并完全忽略最不重要的特征。当输入具有更高的峰度或稀疏性时，多语义性更加普遍，并且在某些架构中比其他架构中更普遍。给定容量的最佳分配，我们继续研究嵌入空间的几何形状。我们发现了一种块半正交结构，不同模型中的块大小不同，突出了模型架构对其神经元可解释性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络中神经元多义性现象的成因，通过特征容量视角分析其与模型架构、输入特性及嵌入空间几何结构的关系。
AI.motivation: 神经网络中神经元常混合表示无关特征（多义性），导致解释困难，需探究其成因以提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 提出特征容量概念（嵌入空间维度占比），在玩具模型中分析最优容量分配规律，并研究输入峰度/稀疏性、模型架构对多义性的影响，结合嵌入空间几何结构分析。
AI.result: 重要特征单义表示，次要特征按损失影响比例多义表示，最不重要特征被忽略；多义性在高峰度/稀疏输入及特定架构中更显著；嵌入空间呈现块半正交结构，块大小因模型而异。
AI.conclusion: 多义性受输入特性、模型架构及容量分配共同影响，嵌入空间几何结构揭示了模型设计对可解释性的关键作用，为优化神经网络提供理论依据。

authors_text: Yijun Dong,Yuege Xie,Rachel Ward
title: Adaptively Weighted Data Augmentation Consistency Regularization for Robust Optimization under Concept Shift
title_zh: 概念转变下稳健优化的自适应加权数据增强一致性正则化
abstract: Concept shift is a prevailing problem in natural tasks like medical image segmentation where samples usually come from different subpopulations with variant correlations between features and labels. One common type of concept shift in medical image segmentation is the "information imbalance" between label-sparse samples with few (if any) segmentation labels and label-dense samples with plentiful labeled pixels. Existing distributionally robust algorithms have focused on adaptively truncating/down-weighting the "less informative" (i.e., label-sparse in our context) samples. To exploit data features of label-sparse samples more efficiently, we propose an adaptively weighted online optimization algorithm -- AdaWAC -- to incorporate data augmentation consistency regularization in sample reweighting. Our method introduces a set of trainable weights to balance the supervised loss and unsupervised consistency regularization of each sample separately. At the saddle point of the underlying objective, the weights assign label-dense samples to the supervised loss and label-sparse samples to the unsupervised consistency regularization. We provide a convergence guarantee by recasting the optimization as online mirror descent on a saddle point problem. Our empirical results demonstrate that AdaWAC not only enhances the segmentation performance and sample efficiency but also improves the robustness to concept shift on various medical image segmentation tasks with different UNet-style backbones.
summary: Concept shift is a prevailing problem in natural tasks like medical image segmentation where samples usually come from different subpopulations with variant correlations between features and labels. One common type of concept shift in medical image segmentation is the "information imbalance" between label-sparse samples with few (if any) segmentation labels and label-dense samples with plentiful labeled pixels. Existing distributionally robust algorithms have focused on adaptively truncating/down-weighting the "less informative" (i.e., label-sparse in our context) samples. To exploit data features of label-sparse samples more efficiently, we propose an adaptively weighted online optimization algorithm -- AdaWAC -- to incorporate data augmentation consistency regularization in sample reweighting. Our method introduces a set of trainable weights to balance the supervised loss and unsupervised consistency regularization of each sample separately. At the saddle point of the underlying objective, the weights assign label-dense samples to the supervised loss and label-sparse samples to the unsupervised consistency regularization. We provide a convergence guarantee by recasting the optimization as online mirror descent on a saddle point problem. Our empirical results demonstrate that AdaWAC not only enhances the segmentation performance and sample efficiency but also improves the robustness to concept shift on various medical image segmentation tasks with different UNet-style backbones.
abstract_zh: 概念转变是医学图像分割等自然任务中的一个普遍问题，其中样本通常来自不同的子群体，特征和标签之间的相关性不同。医学图像分割中一种常见的概念转变是具有很少（如果有）分割标签的标签稀疏样本与具有大量标记像素的标签密集样本之间的“信息不平衡”。现有的分布式鲁棒算法侧重于自适应截断/降低“信息量较少”（即在我们的上下文中标签稀疏）样本的权重。为了更有效地利用标签稀疏样本的数据特征，我们提出了一种自适应加权在线优化算法——AdaWAC——将数据增强一致性正则化纳入样本重新加权中。我们的方法引入了一组可训练的权重来分别平衡每个样本的监督损失和无监督一致性正则化。在基本目标的鞍点，权重将标签密集样本分配给监督损失，将标签稀疏样本分配给无监督一致性正则化。我们通过将优化重新设计为鞍点问题上的在线镜像下降来提供收敛保证。我们的实证结果表明，AdaWAC 不仅提高了分割性能和样本效率，而且还提高了具有不同 UNet 风格主干的各种医学图像分割任务对概念转换的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应加权数据增强一致性正则化方法AdaWAC，用于解决医学图像分割中的概念漂移问题，通过平衡标签密集样本和标签稀疏样本的损失函数提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中存在标签稀疏样本与标签密集样本的信息不平衡问题，现有方法仅通过降低不相关信息样本权重难以有效利用标签稀疏样本特征。
AI.method: 设计自适应加权在线优化算法AdaWAC，在样本重加权中引入可训练权重，分别平衡每个样本的监督损失与无监督一致性正则化，通过鞍点优化理论保证收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明AdaWAC在多种UNet结构的医学图像分割任务中提升了分割性能、样本效率及对概念漂移的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AdaWAC通过自适应平衡监督与无监督学习，有效缓解了概念漂移问题，在医学图像分割中展现出优越的鲁棒性和效率优势。

search_text: Adaptively Weighted Data Augmentation Consistency Regularization for Robust Optimization under Concept Shift 概念转变下稳健优化的自适应加权数据增强一致性正则化 Concept shift is a prevailing problem in natural tasks like medical image segmentation where samples usually come from different subpopulations with variant correlations between features and labels. One common type of concept shift in medical image segmentation is the "information imbalance" between label-sparse samples with few (if any) segmentation labels and label-dense samples with plentiful labeled pixels. Existing distributionally robust algorithms have focused on adaptively truncating/down-weighting the "less informative" (i.e., label-sparse in our context) samples. To exploit data features of label-sparse samples more efficiently, we propose an adaptively weighted online optimization algorithm -- AdaWAC -- to incorporate data augmentation consistency regularization in sample reweighting. Our method introduces a set of trainable weights to balance the supervised loss and unsupervised consistency regularization of each sample separately. At the saddle point of the underlying objective, the weights assign label-dense samples to the supervised loss and label-sparse samples to the unsupervised consistency regularization. We provide a convergence guarantee by recasting the optimization as online mirror descent on a saddle point problem. Our empirical results demonstrate that AdaWAC not only enhances the segmentation performance and sample efficiency but also improves the robustness to concept shift on various medical image segmentation tasks with different UNet-style backbones. 概念转变是医学图像分割等自然任务中的一个普遍问题，其中样本通常来自不同的子群体，特征和标签之间的相关性不同。医学图像分割中一种常见的概念转变是具有很少（如果有）分割标签的标签稀疏样本与具有大量标记像素的标签密集样本之间的“信息不平衡”。现有的分布式鲁棒算法侧重于自适应截断/降低“信息量较少”（即在我们的上下文中标签稀疏）样本的权重。为了更有效地利用标签稀疏样本的数据特征，我们提出了一种自适应加权在线优化算法——AdaWAC——将数据增强一致性正则化纳入样本重新加权中。我们的方法引入了一组可训练的权重来分别平衡每个样本的监督损失和无监督一致性正则化。在基本目标的鞍点，权重将标签密集样本分配给监督损失，将标签稀疏样本分配给无监督一致性正则化。我们通过将优化重新设计为鞍点问题上的在线镜像下降来提供收敛保证。我们的实证结果表明，AdaWAC 不仅提高了分割性能和样本效率，而且还提高了具有不同 UNet 风格主干的各种医学图像分割任务对概念转换的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种自适应加权数据增强一致性正则化方法AdaWAC，用于解决医学图像分割中的概念漂移问题，通过平衡标签密集样本和标签稀疏样本的损失函数提升模型鲁棒性。 Yijun Dong,Yuege Xie,Rachel Ward cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tanvi Bajpai,Chandra Chekuri
title: Bicriteria Approximation Algorithms for Priority Matroid Median
title_zh: 优先级拟阵中值的双准则近似算法
abstract: Fairness considerations have motivated new clustering problems and algorithms in recent years. In this paper we consider the Priority Matroid Median problem which generalizes the Priority $k$-Median problem that has recently been studied. The input consists of a set of facilities $\mathcal{F}$ and a set of clients $\mathcal{C}$ that lie in a metric space $(\mathcal{F} \cup \mathcal{C},d)$, and a matroid $\mathcal{M}=(\mathcal{F},\mathcal{I})$ over the facilities. In addition each client $j$ has a specified radius $r_j \ge 0$ and each facility $i \in \mathcal{F}$ has an opening cost $f_i$. The goal is to choose a subset $S \subseteq \mathcal{F}$ of facilities to minimize the $\sum_{i \in \mathcal{F}} f_i + \sum_{j \in \mathcal{C}} d(j,S)$ subject to two constraints: (i) $S$ is an independent set in $\mathcal{M}$ (that is $S \in \mathcal{I}$) and (ii) for each client $j$, its distance to an open facility is at most $r_j$ (that is, $d(j,S) \le r_j$). For this problem we describe the first bicriteria $(c_1,c_2)$ approximations for fixed constants $c_1,c_2$: the radius constraints of the clients are violated by at most a factor of $c_1$ and the objective cost is at most $c_2$ times the optimum cost. We also improve the previously known bicriteria approximation for the uniform radius setting ($r_j := L$ $\forall j \in \mathcal{C}$).
summary: Fairness considerations have motivated new clustering problems and algorithms in recent years. In this paper we consider the Priority Matroid Median problem which generalizes the Priority $k$-Median problem that has recently been studied. The input consists of a set of facilities $\mathcal{F}$ and a set of clients $\mathcal{C}$ that lie in a metric space $(\mathcal{F} \cup \mathcal{C},d)$, and a matroid $\mathcal{M}=(\mathcal{F},\mathcal{I})$ over the facilities. In addition each client $j$ has a specified radius $r_j \ge 0$ and each facility $i \in \mathcal{F}$ has an opening cost $f_i$. The goal is to choose a subset $S \subseteq \mathcal{F}$ of facilities to minimize the $\sum_{i \in \mathcal{F}} f_i + \sum_{j \in \mathcal{C}} d(j,S)$ subject to two constraints: (i) $S$ is an independent set in $\mathcal{M}$ (that is $S \in \mathcal{I}$) and (ii) for each client $j$, its distance to an open facility is at most $r_j$ (that is, $d(j,S) \le r_j$). For this problem we describe the first bicriteria $(c_1,c_2)$ approximations for fixed constants $c_1,c_2$: the radius constraints of the clients are violated by at most a factor of $c_1$ and the objective cost is at most $c_2$ times the optimum cost. We also improve the previously known bicriteria approximation for the uniform radius setting ($r_j := L$ $\forall j \in \mathcal{C}$).
abstract_zh: 近年来，公平性的考虑激发了新的聚类问题和算法。在本文中，我们考虑优先级拟阵中值问题，该问题概括了最近研究的优先级$k$中值问题。输入由位于度量空间 $(\mathcal{F} \cup \mathcal{C},d)$ 中的一组设施 $\mathcal{F}$ 和一组客户端 $\mathcal{C}$ 以及设施上的拟阵 $\mathcal{M}=(\mathcal{F},\mathcal{I})$ 组成。此外，每个客户 $j$ 都有一个指定的半径 $r_j \ge 0$，每个设施 $i \in \mathcal{F}$ 都有一个开放成本 $f_i$。目标是选择一个子集 $S \subseteq \mathcal{F}$ 来最小化 $\sum_{i \in \mathcal{F}} f_i + \sum_{j \in \mathcal{C}} d(j,S)$，但要遵守两个约束：(i) $S$ 是 $\mathcal{M}$ 中的一个独立集合（即 $S \in \mathcal{I}$）和 (ii) 每个客户端$j$，它到开放设施的距离至多为$r_j$（即$d(j,S)\le r_j$）。对于这个问题，我们描述了固定常量 $c_1,c_2$ 的第一个双标准 $(c_1,c_2)$ 近似：客户端的半径约束最多被违反 $c_1$ 因子，并且目标成本最多为 $c_2$ 乘以最佳成本。我们还改进了先前已知的均匀半径设置的双标准近似（$r_j := L$ $\forall j \in \mathcal{C}$）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了优先级拟阵中位问题的双标准近似算法，旨在同时满足客户半径约束和最小化成本。
AI.motivation: 公平性需求推动了新的聚类问题研究，传统方法难以同时满足半径约束和成本优化，需改进算法设计。
AI.method: 提出首个双标准近似算法，允许客户半径约束放宽常数倍，同时保证成本不超过最优值常数倍，并改进统一半径场景的近似比。
AI.result: 首次实现双标准近似（半径放宽c₁倍，成本c₂倍最优），并优化了统一半径情况下的近似性能。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在公平性约束下平衡了半径与成本目标，为优先级聚类问题提供了更优的理论保证。

authors_text: Nannan Li,Kevin J. Shih,Bryan A. Plummer
title: Collecting The Puzzle Pieces: Disentangled Self-Driven Human Pose Transfer by Permuting Textures
title_zh: 收集拼图：通过排列纹理解开自驱动人体姿势迁移
abstract: Human pose transfer synthesizes new view(s) of a person for a given pose. Recent work achieves this via self-reconstruction, which disentangles a person's pose and texture information by breaking the person down into parts, then recombines them for reconstruction. However, part-level disentanglement preserves some pose information that can create unwanted artifacts. In this paper, we propose Pose Transfer by Permuting Textures (PT$^2$), an approach for self-driven human pose transfer that disentangles pose from texture at the patch-level. Specifically, we remove pose from an input image by permuting image patches so only texture information remains. Then we reconstruct the input image by sampling from the permuted textures for patch-level disentanglement. To reduce noise and recover clothing shape information from the permuted patches, we employ encoders with multiple kernel sizes in a triple branch network. On DeepFashion and Market-1501, PT$^2$ reports significant gains on automatic metrics over other self-driven methods, and even outperforms some fully-supervised methods. A user study also reports images generated by our method are preferred in 68% of cases over self-driven approaches from prior work. Code is available at https://github.com/NannanLi999/pt_square.
summary: Human pose transfer synthesizes new view(s) of a person for a given pose. On DeepFashion and Market-1501, PT$^2$ reports significant gains on automatic metrics over other self-driven methods, and even outperforms some fully-supervised methods. A user study also reports images generated by our method are preferred in 68% of cases over self-driven approaches from prior work. Code is available at https://github.com/NannanLi999/pt_square.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势迁移针对给定姿势合成人的新视图。最近的工作通过自我重建实现了这一目标，通过将人分解成多个部分来解开人的姿势和纹理信息，然后重新组合它们进行重建。然而，零件级解缠会保留一些可能产生不需要的伪影的姿势信息。在本文中，我们提出了通过置换纹理进行姿势转移（PT$^2$），这是一种自驱动的人体姿势转移方法，可以在补丁级别将姿势与纹理分离。具体来说，我们通过排列图像块来从输入图像中删除姿势，以便仅保留纹理信息。然后，我们通过从排列后的纹理中采样来重建输入图像，以进行补丁级解缠结。为了减少噪声并从排列的补丁中恢复服装形状信息，我们在三分支网络中采用具有多个内核大小的编码器。在 DeepFashion 和 Market-1501 上，PT$^2$ 报告自动指标比其他自驱动方法有显着提升，甚至优于一些完全监督的方法。一项用户研究还报告称，在 68% 的情况下，我们的方法生成的图像比之前工作中的自我驱动方法更受青睐。代码可在 https://github.com/NannanLi999/pt_square 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过置换纹理实现人类姿态迁移的方法PT²，旨在在图像块级别分离姿态和纹理信息。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自重建的姿态迁移方法在部件级别分离姿态和纹理时仍会保留部分姿态信息，导致生成图像出现不希望的伪影。本文希望在更细粒度的图像块级别实现更彻底的姿态与纹理分离。
AI.method: 通过置换输入图像的图像块消除姿态信息，仅保留纹理信息。使用包含多核尺寸编码器的三分支网络，从置换后的纹理块中采样进行图像重建，以降低噪声并恢复服装形状信息。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion和Market-1501数据集上，PT²在自动评估指标上显著优于其他自驱动方法，甚至超过部分全监督方法。用户研究显示68%的案例中，PT²生成的图像比先前自驱动方法更受青睐。
AI.conclusion: PT²通过图像块级纹理置换实现了更有效的姿态-纹理解耦，在姿态迁移任务中取得了优于现有方法的定量和定性结果。

search_text: Collecting The Puzzle Pieces: Disentangled Self-Driven Human Pose Transfer by Permuting Textures 收集拼图：通过排列纹理解开自驱动人体姿势迁移 Human pose transfer synthesizes new view(s) of a person for a given pose. Recent work achieves this via self-reconstruction, which disentangles a person's pose and texture information by breaking the person down into parts, then recombines them for reconstruction. However, part-level disentanglement preserves some pose information that can create unwanted artifacts. In this paper, we propose Pose Transfer by Permuting Textures (PT$^2$), an approach for self-driven human pose transfer that disentangles pose from texture at the patch-level. Specifically, we remove pose from an input image by permuting image patches so only texture information remains. Then we reconstruct the input image by sampling from the permuted textures for patch-level disentanglement. To reduce noise and recover clothing shape information from the permuted patches, we employ encoders with multiple kernel sizes in a triple branch network. On DeepFashion and Market-1501, PT$^2$ reports significant gains on automatic metrics over other self-driven methods, and even outperforms some fully-supervised methods. A user study also reports images generated by our method are preferred in 68% of cases over self-driven approaches from prior work. Code is available at https://github.com/NannanLi999/pt_square. 人体姿势迁移针对给定姿势合成人的新视图。最近的工作通过自我重建实现了这一目标，通过将人分解成多个部分来解开人的姿势和纹理信息，然后重新组合它们进行重建。然而，零件级解缠会保留一些可能产生不需要的伪影的姿势信息。在本文中，我们提出了通过置换纹理进行姿势转移（PT$^2$），这是一种自驱动的人体姿势转移方法，可以在补丁级别将姿势与纹理分离。具体来说，我们通过排列图像块来从输入图像中删除姿势，以便仅保留纹理信息。然后，我们通过从排列后的纹理中采样来重建输入图像，以进行补丁级解缠结。为了减少噪声并从排列的补丁中恢复服装形状信息，我们在三分支网络中采用具有多个内核大小的编码器。在 DeepFashion 和 Market-1501 上，PT$^2$ 报告自动指标比其他自驱动方法有显着提升，甚至优于一些完全监督的方法。一项用户研究还报告称，在 68% 的情况下，我们的方法生成的图像比之前工作中的自我驱动方法更受青睐。代码可在 https://github.com/NannanLi999/pt_square 获取。 本文提出了一种通过置换纹理实现人类姿态迁移的方法PT²，旨在在图像块级别分离姿态和纹理信息。 Nannan Li,Kevin J. authors_text: Xiangjian Jiang,Xuecheng Nie,Zitian Wang,Luoqi Liu,Si Liu
title: Multi-view Human Body Mesh Translator
title_zh: 多视角人体网格翻译器
abstract: Existing methods for human mesh recovery mainly focus on single-view frameworks, but they often fail to produce accurate results due to the ill-posed setup. Considering the maturity of the multi-view motion capture system, in this paper, we propose to solve the prior ill-posed problem by leveraging multiple images from different views, thus significantly enhancing the quality of recovered meshes. In particular, we present a novel \textbf{M}ulti-view human body \textbf{M}esh \textbf{T}ranslator (MMT) model for estimating human body mesh with the help of vision transformer. Specifically, MMT takes multi-view images as input and translates them to targeted meshes in a single-forward manner. MMT fuses features of different views in both encoding and decoding phases, leading to representations embedded with global information. Additionally, to ensure the tokens are intensively focused on the human pose and shape, MMT conducts cross-view alignment at the feature level by projecting 3D keypoint positions to each view and enforcing their consistency in geometry constraints. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that MMT outperforms existing single or multi-view models by a large margin for human mesh recovery task, notably, 28.8\% improvement in MPVE over the current state-of-the-art method on the challenging HUMBI dataset. Qualitative evaluation also verifies the effectiveness of MMT in reconstructing high-quality human mesh. Codes will be made available upon acceptance.
summary: Existing methods for human mesh recovery mainly focus on single-view frameworks, but they often fail to produce accurate results due to the ill-posed setup. Considering the maturity of the multi-view motion capture system, in this paper, we propose to solve the prior ill-posed problem by leveraging multiple images from different views, thus significantly enhancing the quality of recovered meshes. In particular, we present a novel \textbf{M}ulti-view human body \textbf{M}esh \textbf{T}ranslator (MMT) model for estimating human body mesh with the help of vision transformer. Specifically, MMT takes multi-view images as input and translates them to targeted meshes in a single-forward manner. MMT fuses features of different views in both encoding and decoding phases, leading to representations embedded with global information. Additionally, to ensure the tokens are intensively focused on the human pose and shape, MMT conducts cross-view alignment at the feature level by projecting 3D keypoint positions to each view and enforcing their consistency in geometry constraints. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that MMT outperforms existing single or multi-view models by a large margin for human mesh recovery task, notably, 28.8\% improvement in MPVE over the current state-of-the-art method on the challenging HUMBI dataset. Qualitative evaluation also verifies the effectiveness of MMT in reconstructing high-quality human mesh. Codes will be made available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 现有的人体网格恢复方法主要集中在单视图框架上，但由于设置不当，它们常常无法产生准确的结果。考虑到多视图运动捕捉系统的成熟，在本文中，我们提出通过利用来自不同视图的多个图像来解决先前的不适定问题，从而显着提高恢复网格的质量。特别是，我们提出了一种新颖的 \textbf{M} 多视图人体 \textbf{M}esh \textbf{T}translator (MMT) 模型，用于在视觉转换器的帮助下估计人体网格。具体来说，MMT 将多视图图像作为输入，并以单向方式将它们转换为目标网格。 MMT 在编码和解码阶段融合了不同视图的特征，从而产生嵌入全局信息的表示。此外，为了确保标记集中关注人体姿势和形状，MMT 通过将 3D 关键点位置投影到每个视图并强制其在几何约束中的一致性，在特征级别进行跨视图对齐。综合实验表明，在人类网格恢复任务中，MMT 大大优于现有的单视图或多视图模型，特别是在具有挑战性的 HUMBI 数据集上，MPVE 比当前最先进的方法提高了 28.8%。定性评估还验证了MMT在重建高质量人体网格方面的有效性。代码将在接受后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多视角图像的人体网格恢复模型MMT，用于提高人体网格重建的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的单视角人体网格恢复方法由于设定不完善，常常无法产生准确的结果。而多视角运动捕捉系统已经较为成熟，因此本文旨在通过利用多视角图像解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为MMT的模型，该模型利用视觉Transformer，将多视角图像作为输入，通过在编码和解码阶段融合不同视角的特征，实现单次前向传播即可生成目标网格。此外，MMT还通过将3D关键点位置投影到每个视角并强制其几何一致性，实现跨视角对齐。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MMT在人体网格恢复任务上优于现有的单视角或多视角模型，特别是在HUMBI数据集上，MPVE指标比当前最先进的方法提高了28.8%。定性评估也验证了MMT在重建高质量人体网格方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MMT模型通过多视角信息融合和跨视角对齐，显著提高了人体网格重建的质量，展示了其在该领域的有效性。

authors_text: Sulabh Shrestha,Yimeng Li,Jana Kosecka
title: Self-supervised Pre-training for Semantic Segmentation in an Indoor Scene
title_zh: 室内场景语义分割的自监督预训练
abstract: The ability to endow maps of indoor scenes with semantic information is an integral part of robotic agents which perform different tasks such as target driven navigation, object search or object rearrangement. The state-of-the-art methods use Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) for predicting semantic segmentation of an image as useful representation for these tasks. The accuracy of semantic segmentation depends on the availability and the amount of labeled data from the target environment or the ability to bridge the domain gap between test and training environment. We propose RegConsist, a method for self-supervised pre-training of a semantic segmentation model, exploiting the ability of the agent to move and register multiple views in the novel environment. Given the spatial and temporal consistency cues used for pixel level data association, we use a variant of contrastive learning to train a DCNN model for predicting semantic segmentation from RGB views in the target environment. The proposed method outperforms models pre-trained on ImageNet and achieves competitive performance when using models that are trained for exactly the same task but on a different dataset. We also perform various ablation studies to analyze and demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method.
summary: The ability to endow maps of indoor scenes with semantic information is an integral part of robotic agents which perform different tasks such as target driven navigation, object search or object rearrangement. The state-of-the-art methods use Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) for predicting semantic segmentation of an image as useful representation for these tasks. The accuracy of semantic segmentation depends on the availability and the amount of labeled data from the target environment or the ability to bridge the domain gap between test and training environment. We propose RegConsist, a method for self-supervised pre-training of a semantic segmentation model, exploiting the ability of the agent to move and register multiple views in the novel environment. Given the spatial and temporal consistency cues used for pixel level data association, we use a variant of contrastive learning to train a DCNN model for predicting semantic segmentation from RGB views in the target environment. The proposed method outperforms models pre-trained on ImageNet and achieves competitive performance when using models that are trained for exactly the same task but on a different dataset. We also perform various ablation studies to analyze and demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 为室内场景地图赋予语义信息的能力是执行不同任务（例如目标驱动导航、对象搜索或对象重新排列）的机器人代理的一个组成部分。最先进的方法使用深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 来预测图像的语义分割，作为这些任务的有用表示。语义分割的准确性取决于目标环境中标记数据的可用性和数量或弥合测试和训练环境之间领域差距的能力。我们提出了 RegConsist，一种语义分割模型的自监督预训练方法，利用代理在新环境中移动和注册多个视图的能力。考虑到用于像素级数据关联的空间和时间一致性线索，我们使用对比学习的变体来训练 DCNN 模型，用于从目标环境中的 RGB 视图预测语义分割。所提出的方法优于在 ImageNet 上预训练的模型，并且在使用针对完全相同的任务但在不同数据集上训练的模型时实现了有竞争力的性能。我们还进行了各种消融研究来分析和证明我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督预训练方法RegConsist，用于室内场景的语义分割，以减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割方法依赖大量标注数据或域适应技术，而获取标注数据成本高昂且域间差异难以桥接。
AI.method: 利用机器人代理在环境中移动产生的多视角时空一致性线索，通过对比学习对DCNN进行自监督预训练，仅使用RGB图像生成语义分割。
AI.result: RegConsist优于ImageNet预训练模型，在不同数据集上表现竞争力，消融实验证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: RegConsist为室内场景语义分割提供了有效的自监督预训练方案，降低了对标注数据的依赖。

search_text: Self-supervised Pre-training for Semantic Segmentation in an Indoor Scene 室内场景语义分割的自监督预训练 The ability to endow maps of indoor scenes with semantic information is an integral part of robotic agents which perform different tasks such as target driven navigation, object search or object rearrangement. The state-of-the-art methods use Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) for predicting semantic segmentation of an image as useful representation for these tasks. The accuracy of semantic segmentation depends on the availability and the amount of labeled data from the target environment or the ability to bridge the domain gap between test and training environment. We propose RegConsist, a method for self-supervised pre-training of a semantic segmentation model, exploiting the ability of the agent to move and register multiple views in the novel environment. Given the spatial and temporal consistency cues used for pixel level data association, we use a variant of contrastive learning to train a DCNN model for predicting semantic segmentation from RGB views in the target environment. The proposed method outperforms models pre-trained on ImageNet and achieves competitive performance when using models that are trained for exactly the same task but on a different dataset. We also perform various ablation studies to analyze and demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed method. 为室内场景地图赋予语义信息的能力是执行不同任务（例如目标驱动导航、对象搜索或对象重新排列）的机器人代理的一个组成部分。最先进的方法使用深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 来预测图像的语义分割，作为这些任务的有用表示。语义分割的准确性取决于目标环境中标记数据的可用性和数量或弥合测试和训练环境之间领域差距的能力。我们提出了 RegConsist，一种语义分割模型的自监督预训练方法，利用代理在新环境中移动和注册多个视图的能力。考虑到用于像素级数据关联的空间和时间一致性线索，我们使用对比学习的变体来训练 DCNN 模型，用于从目标环境中的 RGB 视图预测语义分割。所提出的方法优于在 ImageNet 上预训练的模型，并且在使用针对完全相同的任务但在不同数据集上训练的模型时实现了有竞争力的性能。我们还进行了各种消融研究来分析和证明我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种自监督预训练方法RegConsist，用于室内场景的语义分割，以减少对标注数据的依赖。 Sulabh Shrestha,Yimeng Li,Jana Kosecka cs.CV

authors_text: Young-Jin Park,Cesar Almecija,Apoorva Sharma,Navid Azizan
title: Tractable Uncertainty-Aware Meta-Learning
title_zh: 易于处理的不确定性元学习
abstract: Meta-learning is a popular approach for learning new tasks with limited data by leveraging the commonalities among different tasks. However, meta-learned models can perform poorly when context data is too limited, or when data is drawn from an out-of-distribution (OoD) task. Especially in safety-critical settings, this necessitates an uncertainty-aware approach to meta-learning. In addition, the often multimodal nature of task distributions can pose unique challenges to meta-learning methods. To this end, we present LUMA, a meta-learning method for regression that (1) makes probabilistic predictions on in-distribution tasks efficiently, (2) is capable of detecting OoD context data, and (3) handles heterogeneous, multimodal task distributions effectively. The strength of our framework lies in its solid theoretical basis, enabling analytically tractable Bayesian inference on a linearized model for principled uncertainty estimation and robust generalization. We achieve this by adopting a probabilistic perspective and learning a parametric, tunable task distribution via Bayesian inference on a linearized neural network, leveraging Gaussian process theory. Moreover, we make our approach computationally tractable by leveraging a low-rank prior covariance learning scheme based on the Fisher Information Matrix. Our numerical analysis demonstrates that LUMA quickly adapts to new tasks and remains accurate even in low-data regimes; it effectively detects OoD tasks; and that both of these properties continue to hold for multimodal task distributions.
summary: Meta-learning is a popular approach for learning new tasks with limited data by leveraging the commonalities among different tasks. However, meta-learned models can perform poorly when context data is too limited, or when data is drawn from an out-of-distribution (OoD) task. Especially in safety-critical settings, this necessitates an uncertainty-aware approach to meta-learning. In addition, the often multimodal nature of task distributions can pose unique challenges to meta-learning methods. To this end, we present LUMA, a meta-learning method for regression that (1) makes probabilistic predictions on in-distribution tasks efficiently, (2) is capable of detecting OoD context data, and (3) handles heterogeneous, multimodal task distributions effectively. The strength of our framework lies in its solid theoretical basis, enabling analytically tractable Bayesian inference on a linearized model for principled uncertainty estimation and robust generalization. We achieve this by adopting a probabilistic perspective and learning a parametric, tunable task distribution via Bayesian inference on a linearized neural network, leveraging Gaussian process theory. Moreover, we make our approach computationally tractable by leveraging a low-rank prior covariance learning scheme based on the Fisher Information Matrix. Our numerical analysis demonstrates that LUMA quickly adapts to new tasks and remains accurate even in low-data regimes; it effectively detects OoD tasks; and that both of these properties continue to hold for multimodal task distributions.
abstract_zh: 元学习是一种流行的方法，通过利用不同任务之间的共性，利用有限的数据来学习新任务。然而，当上下文数据过于有限或从分布外 (OoD) 任务中提取数据时，元学习模型可能表现不佳。特别是在安全关键的环境中，这需要一种不确定性感知的元学习方法。此外，任务分配的多模态性质可能给元学习方法带来独特的挑战。为此，我们提出了 LUMA，一种用于回归的元学习方法，它 (1) 有效地对分布内任务进行概率预测，(2) 能够检测 OoD 上下文数据，(3) 有效地处理异构、多模态任务分布。我们框架的优势在于其坚实的理论基础，能够在线性化模型上进行分析易处理的贝叶斯推理，以实现原则性的不确定性估计和稳健的泛化。我们通过采用概率视角并利用高斯过程理论，通过线性化神经网络上的贝叶斯推理来学习参数化、可调的任务分布来实现这一目标。此外，我们通过利用基于费舍尔信息矩阵的低秩先验协方差学习方案，使我们的方法在计算上易于处理。我们的数值分析表明，LUMA 可以快速适应新任务，即使在低数据情况下也能保持准确；它有效地检测OoD任务；并且这两个属性对于多模式任务分布仍然成立。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LUMA的元学习方法，旨在解决在数据有限或分布外任务情况下元学习模型性能下降的问题，并有效处理多模态任务分布。
AI.motivation: 传统元学习模型在面对有限上下文数据或分布外任务时表现不佳，尤其在安全关键场景中需要具备不确定性感知能力以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过概率视角构建线性化神经网络的贝叶斯推断框架，结合高斯过程理论学习可调任务分布，并利用费舍尔信息矩阵的低秩先验协方差方案实现计算可扩展性。
AI.result: LUMA在低数据场景下能快速适应新任务并保持准确性，有效检测分布外任务，且在多模态任务分布中仍保持上述特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论严谨的贝叶斯推断框架，为元学习提供了可解释的不确定性估计和鲁棒泛化能力，有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

authors_text: Qiqi Hou,Abhijay Ghildyal,Feng Liu
title: A Perceptual Quality Metric for Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 视频帧插值的感知质量指标
abstract: Research on video frame interpolation has made significant progress in recent years. However, existing methods mostly use off-the-shelf metrics to measure the quality of interpolation results with the exception of a few methods that employ user studies, which is time-consuming. As video frame interpolation results often exhibit unique artifacts, existing quality metrics sometimes are not consistent with human perception when measuring the interpolation results. Some recent deep learning-based perceptual quality metrics are shown more consistent with human judgments, but their performance on videos is compromised since they do not consider temporal information. In this paper, we present a dedicated perceptual quality metric for measuring video frame interpolation results. Our method learns perceptual features directly from videos instead of individual frames. It compares pyramid features extracted from video frames and employs Swin Transformer blocks-based spatio-temporal modules to extract spatio-temporal information. To train our metric, we collected a new video frame interpolation quality assessment dataset. Our experiments show that our dedicated quality metric outperforms state-of-the-art methods when measuring video frame interpolation results. Our code and model are made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/hqqxyy/VFIPS}.
summary: Research on video frame interpolation has made significant progress in recent years. However, existing methods mostly use off-the-shelf metrics to measure the quality of interpolation results with the exception of a few methods that employ user studies, which is time-consuming. As video frame interpolation results often exhibit unique artifacts, existing quality metrics sometimes are not consistent with human perception when measuring the interpolation results. Some recent deep learning-based perceptual quality metrics are shown more consistent with human judgments, but their performance on videos is compromised since they do not consider temporal information. In this paper, we present a dedicated perceptual quality metric for measuring video frame interpolation results. Our method learns perceptual features directly from videos instead of individual frames. It compares pyramid features extracted from video frames and employs Swin Transformer blocks-based spatio-temporal modules to extract spatio-temporal information. To train our metric, we collected a new video frame interpolation quality assessment dataset. Our experiments show that our dedicated quality metric outperforms state-of-the-art methods when measuring video frame interpolation results. Our code and model are made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/hqqxyy/VFIPS}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视频帧插值的研究取得了重大进展。然而，除了少数采用用户研究的方法之外，现有的方法大多使用现成的指标来衡量插值结果的质量，但这种方法非常耗时。由于视频帧插值结果经常表现出独特的伪影，因此现有的质量指标在测量插值结果时有时与人类的感知不一致。最近一些基于深度学习的感知质量指标显示出与人类判断更加一致，但由于它们不考虑时间信息，因此它们在视频上的性能受到影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于测量视频帧插值结果的专用感知质量指标。我们的方法直接从视频而不是单个帧中学习感知特征。它比较从视频帧中提取的金字塔特征，并采用基于 Swin Transformer 块的时空模块来提取时空信息。为了训练我们的指标，我们收集了一个新的视频帧插值质量评估数据集。我们的实验表明，在测量视频帧插值结果时，我们专用的质量指标优于最先进的方法。我们的代码和模型在 \url{https://github.com/hqqxyy/VFIPS} 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种专门用于视频帧插值结果的感知质量度量方法。
AI.motivation: 现有质量评估指标未能充分考虑视频的时序信息，导致与人类感知不一致，且深度学习感知指标在视频任务上表现不足。
AI.method: 从视频中直接学习感知特征，结合金字塔特征提取与基于Swin Transformer的时空模块，构建专用质量度量模型，并构建新数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该度量方法在视频帧插值质量评估任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过融合时空信息提升了视频帧插值质量评估的准确性，代码和模型已开源。

search_text: A Perceptual Quality Metric for Video Frame Interpolation 视频帧插值的感知质量指标 Research on video frame interpolation has made significant progress in recent years. However, existing methods mostly use off-the-shelf metrics to measure the quality of interpolation results with the exception of a few methods that employ user studies, which is time-consuming. As video frame interpolation results often exhibit unique artifacts, existing quality metrics sometimes are not consistent with human perception when measuring the interpolation results. Some recent deep learning-based perceptual quality metrics are shown more consistent with human judgments, but their performance on videos is compromised since they do not consider temporal information. In this paper, we present a dedicated perceptual quality metric for measuring video frame interpolation results. Our method learns perceptual features directly from videos instead of individual frames. It compares pyramid features extracted from video frames and employs Swin Transformer blocks-based spatio-temporal modules to extract spatio-temporal information. To train our metric, we collected a new video frame interpolation quality assessment dataset. Our experiments show that our dedicated quality metric outperforms state-of-the-art methods when measuring video frame interpolation results. Our code and model are made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/hqqxyy/VFIPS}. 近年来，视频帧插值的研究取得了重大进展。然而，除了少数采用用户研究的方法之外，现有的方法大多使用现成的指标来衡量插值结果的质量，但这种方法非常耗时。由于视频帧插值结果经常表现出独特的伪影，因此现有的质量指标在测量插值结果时有时与人类的感知不一致。最近一些基于深度学习的感知质量指标显示出与人类判断更加一致，但由于它们不考虑时间信息，因此它们在视频上的性能受到影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于测量视频帧插值结果的专用感知质量指标。我们的方法直接从视频而不是单个帧中学习感知特征。它比较从视频帧中提取的金字塔特征，并采用基于 Swin Transformer 块的时空模块来提取时空信息。为了训练我们的指标，我们收集了一个新的视频帧插值质量评估数据集。我们的实验表明，在测量视频帧插值结果时，我们专用的质量指标优于最先进的方法。我们的代码和模型在 \url{https://github.com/hqqxyy/VFIPS} 上公开提供。 本文提出一种专门用于视频帧插值结果的感知质量度量方法。 Qiqi Hou,Abhijay Ghildyal,Feng Liu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Abhishek N. Kulkarni,Jie Fu
title: Opportunistic Qualitative Planning in Stochastic Systems with Incomplete Preferences over Reachability Objectives
title_zh: 不完全偏好可达目标的随机系统中的机会定性规划
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, under review for IEEE ACC 2023
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, under review for IEEE ACC 2023
abstract: Preferences play a key role in determining what goals/constraints to satisfy when not all constraints can be satisfied simultaneously. In this paper, we study how to synthesize preference satisfying plans in stochastic systems, modeled as an MDP, given a (possibly incomplete) combinative preference model over temporally extended goals. We start by introducing new semantics to interpret preferences over infinite plays of the stochastic system. Then, we introduce a new notion of improvement to enable comparison between two prefixes of an infinite play. Based on this, we define two solution concepts called safe and positively improving (SPI) and safe and almost-surely improving (SASI) that enforce improvements with a positive probability and with probability one, respectively. We construct a model called an improvement MDP, in which the synthesis of SPI and SASI strategies that guarantee at least one improvement reduces to computing positive and almost-sure winning strategies in an MDP. We present an algorithm to synthesize the SPI and SASI strategies that induce multiple sequential improvements. We demonstrate the proposed approach using a robot motion planning problem.
summary: Preferences play a key role in determining what goals/constraints to satisfy when not all constraints can be satisfied simultaneously. In this paper, we study how to synthesize preference satisfying plans in stochastic systems, modeled as an MDP, given a (possibly incomplete) combinative preference model over temporally extended goals. We start by introducing new semantics to interpret preferences over infinite plays of the stochastic system. Then, we introduce a new notion of improvement to enable comparison between two prefixes of an infinite play. Based on this, we define two solution concepts called safe and positively improving (SPI) and safe and almost-surely improving (SASI) that enforce improvements with a positive probability and with probability one, respectively. We construct a model called an improvement MDP, in which the synthesis of SPI and SASI strategies that guarantee at least one improvement reduces to computing positive and almost-sure winning strategies in an MDP. We present an algorithm to synthesize the SPI and SASI strategies that induce multiple sequential improvements. We demonstrate the proposed approach using a robot motion planning problem.
abstract_zh: 当不能同时满足所有约束时，偏好在确定要满足哪些目标/约束方面发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们研究如何在随机系统中综合偏好满足计划，建模为 MDP，给定针对时间扩展目标的（可能不完整的）组合偏好模型。我们首先引入新的语义来解释对随机系统无限发挥的偏好。然后，我们引入了一种新的改进概念，以便能够比较无限游戏的两个前缀。基于此，我们定义了两个解决方案概念，称为安全和积极改进（SPI）和安全和几乎肯定改进（SASI），分别以正概率和概率一强制改进。我们构建了一种称为改进 MDP 的模型，其中保证至少一项改进的 SPI 和 SASI 策略的综合减少为在 MDP 中计算积极且几乎肯定获胜的策略。我们提出了一种算法来综合 SPI 和 SASI 策略，从而引发多个连续改进。我们使用机器人运动规划问题演示了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在具有不完全偏好的随机系统中，如何合成满足可达性目标的策略。
AI.motivation: 在无法同时满足所有约束的情况下，如何根据偏好选择最优目标，是规划和决策中的关键问题。
AI.method: 通过引入新的偏好语义和改进概念，构建改进MDP模型，并设计算法合成SPI和SASI策略。
AI.result: 提出了SPI和SASI策略，成功应用于机器人运动规划问题，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理不完全偏好下的随机系统规划问题，为复杂决策提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Omri Raccah,Phoebe Chen,Ted L. Willke,David Poeppel,Vy A. Vo
title: Memory in humans and deep language models: Linking hypotheses for model augmentation
title_zh: 人类记忆和深度语言模型：连接模型增强的假设
abstract: The computational complexity of the self-attention mechanism in Transformer models significantly limits their ability to generalize over long temporal durations. Memory-augmentation, or the explicit storing of past information in external memory for subsequent predictions, has become a constructive avenue for mitigating this limitation. We argue that memory-augmented Transformers can benefit substantially from considering insights from the memory literature in humans. We detail an approach for integrating evidence from the human memory system through the specification of cross-domain linking hypotheses. We then provide an empirical demonstration to evaluate the use of surprisal as a linking hypothesis, and further identify the limitations of this approach to inform future research.
summary: The computational complexity of the self-attention mechanism in Transformer models significantly limits their ability to generalize over long temporal durations. Memory-augmentation, or the explicit storing of past information in external memory for subsequent predictions, has become a constructive avenue for mitigating this limitation. We argue that memory-augmented Transformers can benefit substantially from considering insights from the memory literature in humans. We detail an approach for integrating evidence from the human memory system through the specification of cross-domain linking hypotheses. We then provide an empirical demonstration to evaluate the use of surprisal as a linking hypothesis, and further identify the limitations of this approach to inform future research.
abstract_zh: Transformer 模型中自注意力机制的计算复杂性极大地限制了它们在长时间持续时间内的泛化能力。记忆增强，或者将过去的信息显式存储在外部记忆中以供后续预测，已成为缓解这一限制的建设性途径。我们认为，记忆增强变形金刚可以从人类记忆文献的见解中获益匪浅。我们详细介绍了一种通过跨域链接假设的规范来整合人类记忆系统证据的方法。然后，我们提供实证论证来评估使用惊讶作为联系假设，并进一步确定这种方法的局限性，为未来的研究提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过结合人类记忆理论增强Transformer模型的记忆能力，提出跨领域链接假设并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型的自注意力机制在处理长时序任务时存在计算复杂度限制，而记忆增强技术需借鉴人类记忆研究以提升效果。
AI.method: 提出跨领域链接假设框架，通过指定人类记忆与模型记忆的关联性，并以surprisal作为具体假设进行实证评估。
AI.result: 验证了surprisal作为链接假设的可行性，同时指出现有方法在长时序建模中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 结合人类记忆理论可为模型增强提供新思路，但需进一步优化链接假设以突破当前方法限制。

authors_text: Yao Feng,Jinlong Yang,Marc Pollefeys,Michael J. Black,Timo Bolkart
title: Capturing and Animation of Body and Clothing from Monocular Video
title_zh: 从单目视频中捕捉身体和服装并制作动画
comment: 7 pages main paper, 2 pages supp. mat
comments: 7 pages main paper, 2 pages supp. mat
abstract: While recent work has shown progress on extracting clothed 3D human avatars from a single image, video, or a set of 3D scans, several limitations remain. Most methods use a holistic representation to jointly model the body and clothing, which means that the clothing and body cannot be separated for applications like virtual try-on. Other methods separately model the body and clothing, but they require training from a large set of 3D clothed human meshes obtained from 3D/4D scanners or physics simulations. Our insight is that the body and clothing have different modeling requirements. While the body is well represented by a mesh-based parametric 3D model, implicit representations and neural radiance fields are better suited to capturing the large variety in shape and appearance present in clothing. Building on this insight, we propose SCARF (Segmented Clothed Avatar Radiance Field), a hybrid model combining a mesh-based body with a neural radiance field. Integrating the mesh into the volumetric rendering in combination with a differentiable rasterizer enables us to optimize SCARF directly from monocular videos, without any 3D supervision. The hybrid modeling enables SCARF to (i) animate the clothed body avatar by changing body poses (including hand articulation and facial expressions), (ii) synthesize novel views of the avatar, and (iii) transfer clothing between avatars in virtual try-on applications. We demonstrate that SCARF reconstructs clothing with higher visual quality than existing methods, that the clothing deforms with changing body pose and body shape, and that clothing can be successfully transferred between avatars of different subjects. The code and models are available at https://github.com/YadiraF/SCARF.
summary: While recent work has shown progress on extracting clothed 3D human avatars from a single image, video, or a set of 3D scans, several limitations remain. Most methods use a holistic representation to jointly model the body and clothing, which means that the clothing and body cannot be separated for applications like virtual try-on. Other methods separately model the body and clothing, but they require training from a large set of 3D clothed human meshes obtained from 3D/4D scanners or physics simulations. Our insight is that the body and clothing have different modeling requirements. While the body is well represented by a mesh-based parametric 3D model, implicit representations and neural radiance fields are better suited to capturing the large variety in shape and appearance present in clothing. Building on this insight, we propose SCARF (Segmented Clothed Avatar Radiance Field), a hybrid model combining a mesh-based body with a neural radiance field. Integrating the mesh into the volumetric rendering in combination with a differentiable rasterizer enables us to optimize SCARF directly from monocular videos, without any 3D supervision. The hybrid modeling enables SCARF to (i) animate the clothed body avatar by changing body poses (including hand articulation and facial expressions), (ii) synthesize novel views of the avatar, and (iii) transfer clothing between avatars in virtual try-on applications. We demonstrate that SCARF reconstructs clothing with higher visual quality than existing methods, that the clothing deforms with changing body pose and body shape, and that clothing can be successfully transferred between avatars of different subjects. The code and models are available at https://github.com/YadiraF/SCARF.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近的工作在从单个图像、视频或一组 3D 扫描中提取穿着衣服的 3D 人体头像方面取得了进展，但仍然存在一些局限性。大多数方法使用整体表示来联合建模身体和服装，这意味着在虚拟试穿等应用中不能将服装和身体分开。其他方法分别对身体和衣服进行建模，但它们需要对从 3D/4D 扫描仪或物理模拟获得的大量 3D 穿着人体网格进行训练。我们的洞察是，身体和服装有不同的造型要求。虽然基于网格的参数化 3D 模型可以很好地表示身体，但隐式表示和神经辐射场更适合捕捉服装中存在的各种形状和外观。基于这一见解，我们提出了 SCARF（分段服装头像辐射场），这是一种将基于网格的身体与神经辐射场相结合的混合模型。将网格集成到体积渲染中，并结合可微分光栅器，使我们能够直接从单目视频优化 SCARF，无需任何 3D 监督。混合建模使 SCARF 能够 (i) 通过改变身体姿势（包括手部关节和面部表情）来为穿着衣服的身体虚拟人物制作动画，(ii) 合成虚拟人物的新颖视图，以及 (iii) 在虚拟试穿应用程序中在虚拟人物之间转移衣服。我们证明，SCARF 重建的服装具有比现有方法更高的视觉质量，服装随着身体姿势和体形的变化而变形，并且服装可以在不同主体的化身之间成功转移。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/YadiraF/SCARF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCARF模型，通过单目视频捕捉并动画化人体及其衣物，实现无需3D监督的高质量重建与虚拟试衣应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或无法分离人体与衣物导致虚拟试衣受限，或依赖3D扫描数据难以普及。人体与衣物需不同建模方式：人体适合网格模型，衣物需处理复杂形变与外观变化。
AI.method: 设计SCARF混合模型，结合网格人体与神经辐射场（NeRF），通过体素渲染与可微分光栅化器，直接从单目视频优化模型，无需3D监督。
AI.result: SCARF在衣物重建视觉质量、姿态驱动形变及跨主体衣物迁移任务中优于现有方法，支持新视角合成与虚拟试衣。
AI.conclusion: SCARF通过解耦人体与衣物建模，实现从单目视频高效重建动态着装Avatar，为虚拟试衣等应用提供新解决方案。
