search_text: Capturing and Animation of Body and Clothing from Monocular Video 从单目视频中捕捉身体和服装并制作动画 While recent work has shown progress on extracting clothed 3D human avatars from a single image, video, or a set of 3D scans, several limitations remain. Most methods use a holistic representation to jointly model the body and clothing, which means that the clothing and body cannot be separated for applications like virtual try-on. Other methods separately model the body and clothing, but they require training from a large set of 3D clothed human meshes obtained from 3D/4D scanners or physics simulations. Our insight is that the body and clothing have different modeling requirements. While the body is well represented by a mesh-based parametric 3D model, implicit representations and neural radiance fields are better suited to capturing the large variety in shape and appearance present in clothing. Building on this insight, we propose SCARF (Segmented Clothed Avatar Radiance Field), a hybrid model combining a mesh-based body with a neural radiance field. Integrating the mesh into the volumetric rendering in combination with a differentiable rasterizer enables us to optimize SCARF directly from monocular videos, without any 3D supervision. The hybrid modeling enables SCARF to (i) animate the clothed body avatar by changing body poses (including hand articulation and facial expressions), (ii) synthesize novel views of the avatar, and (iii) transfer clothing between avatars in virtual try-on applications. We demonstrate that SCARF reconstructs clothing with higher visual quality than existing methods, that the clothing deforms with changing body pose and body shape, and that clothing can be successfully transferred between avatars of different subjects. The code and models are available at https://github.com/YadiraF/SCARF. 虽然最近的工作在从单个图像、视频或一组 3D 扫描中提取穿着衣服的 3D 人体头像方面取得了进展，但仍然存在一些局限性。大多数方法使用整体表示来联合建模身体和服装，这意味着在虚拟试穿等应用中不能将服装和身体分开。其他方法分别对身体和衣服进行建模，但它们需要对从 3D/4D 扫描仪或物理模拟获得的大量 3D 穿着人体网格进行训练。我们的洞察是，身体和服装有不同的造型要求。虽然基于网格的参数化 3D 模型可以很好地表示身体，但隐式表示和神经辐射场更适合捕捉服装中存在的各种形状和外观。基于这一见解，我们提出了 SCARF（分段服装头像辐射场），这是一种将基于网格的身体与神经辐射场相结合的混合模型。将网格集成到体积渲染中，并结合可微分光栅器，使我们能够直接从单目视频优化 SCARF，无需任何 3D 监督。混合建模使 SCARF 能够 (i) 通过改变身体姿势（包括手部关节和面部表情）来为穿着衣服的身体虚拟人物制作动画，(ii) 合成虚拟人物的新颖视图，以及 (iii) 在虚拟试穿应用程序中在虚拟人物之间转移衣服。我们证明，SCARF 重建的服装具有比现有方法更高的视觉质量，服装随着身体姿势和体形的变化而变形，并且服装可以在不同主体的化身之间成功转移。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/YadiraF/SCARF 获取。 本文提出SCARF模型，通过单目视频捕捉并动画化人体及其衣物，实现无需3D监督的高质量重建与虚拟试衣应用。 Yao Feng,Jinlong Yang,Marc Pollefeys,Michael J. Black,Timo Bolkart cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Arghya Roy Chaudhuri,Pratik Jawanpuria,Bamdev Mishra
title: ProtoBandit: Efficient Prototype Selection via Multi-Armed Bandits
title_zh: ProtoBandit：通过多臂 Bandits 进行高效原型选择
abstract: In this work, we propose a multi-armed bandit-based framework for identifying a compact set of informative data instances (i.e., the prototypes) from a source dataset $S$ that best represents a given target set $T$. Prototypical examples of a given dataset offer interpretable insights into the underlying data distribution and assist in example-based reasoning, thereby influencing every sphere of human decision-making. Current state-of-the-art prototype selection approaches require $O(|S||T|)$ similarity comparisons between source and target data points, which becomes prohibitively expensive for large-scale settings. We propose to mitigate this limitation by employing stochastic greedy search in the space of prototypical examples and multi-armed bandits for reducing the number of similarity comparisons. Our randomized algorithm, ProtoBandit, identifies a set of $k$ prototypes incurring $O(k^3|S|)$ similarity comparisons, which is independent of the size of the target set. An interesting outcome of our analysis is for the $k$-medoids clustering problem $T = S$ setting) in which we show that our algorithm ProtoBandit approximates the BUILD step solution of the partitioning around medoids (PAM) method in $O(k^3|S|)$ complexity. Empirically, we observe that ProtoBandit reduces the number of similarity computation calls by several orders of magnitudes ($100-1000$ times) while obtaining solutions similar in quality to those from state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: In this work, we propose a multi-armed bandit-based framework for identifying a compact set of informative data instances (i.e., the prototypes) from a source dataset $S$ that best represents a given target set $T$. Prototypical examples of a given dataset offer interpretable insights into the underlying data distribution and assist in example-based reasoning, thereby influencing every sphere of human decision-making. Current state-of-the-art prototype selection approaches require $O(|S||T|)$ similarity comparisons between source and target data points, which becomes prohibitively expensive for large-scale settings. We propose to mitigate this limitation by employing stochastic greedy search in the space of prototypical examples and multi-armed bandits for reducing the number of similarity comparisons. Our randomized algorithm, ProtoBandit, identifies a set of $k$ prototypes incurring $O(k^3|S|)$ similarity comparisons, which is independent of the size of the target set. An interesting outcome of our analysis is for the $k$-medoids clustering problem $T = S$ setting) in which we show that our algorithm ProtoBandit approximates the BUILD step solution of the partitioning around medoids (PAM) method in $O(k^3|S|)$ complexity. Empirically, we observe that ProtoBandit reduces the number of similarity computation calls by several orders of magnitudes ($100-1000$ times) while obtaining solutions similar in quality to those from state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于多臂老虎机的框架，用于从源数据集 $S$ 中识别一组紧凑的信息数据实例（即原型），最能代表给定的目标集 $T$。给定数据集的原型示例提供了对底层数据分布的可解释的见解，并有助于基于示例的推理，从而影响人类决策的各个领域。当前最先进的原型选择方法需要源数据点和目标数据点之间的 $O(|S||T|)$ 相似性比较，这对于大规模设置来说变得极其昂贵。我们建议通过在典型示例和多臂老虎机的空间中采用随机贪婪搜索来减少相似性比较的数量，从而减轻这种限制。我们的随机算法 ProtoBandit 识别一组 $k$ 原型，进行 $O(k^3|S|)$ 相似性比较，这与目标集的大小无关。我们分析的一个有趣结果是针对 $k$-medoids 聚类问题（$T = S$ 设置），其中我们表明我们的算法 ProtoBandit 近似于围绕 medoids 分区 (PAM) 方法的 BUILD 步骤解决方案，复杂度为 $O(k^3|S|)$。根据经验，我们观察到 ProtoBandit 将相似性计算调用的数量减少了几个数量级（100-1000 美元倍），同时获得了与最先进方法质量相似的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多臂老虎机框架的高效原型选择方法ProtoBandit，用于从源数据集中筛选出能最佳表示目标数据集的紧凑信息实例集合。
AI.motivation: 现有原型选择方法在大规模数据场景下需进行O(|S||T|)次相似性计算，计算成本高昂，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过在原型实例空间中引入随机贪心搜索与多臂老虎机算法，将相似性计算复杂度降至O(k³|S|)，且独立于目标集规模。
AI.result: 实验表明ProtoBandit相比现有方法减少数百至千倍的相似性计算量，同时保持相近的解决方案质量。
AI.conclusion: ProtoBandit在保持解决方案质量的前提下显著降低计算复杂度，为大规模原型选择与k-中位数聚类问题提供高效方法。

authors_text: James Mason Inder,Mark Lowell,Andrew J. Maltenfort
title: Centerpoints Are All You Need in Overhead Imagery
title_zh: 俯视图像中您所需要的就是中心点
abstract: Labeling data to use for training object detectors is expensive and time consuming. Publicly available overhead datasets for object detection are labeled with image-aligned bounding boxes, object-aligned bounding boxes, or object masks, but it is not clear whether such detailed labeling is necessary. To test the idea, we developed novel single- and two-stage network architectures that use centerpoints for labeling. In this paper we show that these architectures achieve nearly equivalent performance to approaches using more detailed labeling on three overhead object detection datasets.
summary: Labeling data to use for training object detectors is expensive and time consuming. Publicly available overhead datasets for object detection are labeled with image-aligned bounding boxes, object-aligned bounding boxes, or object masks, but it is not clear whether such detailed labeling is necessary. To test the idea, we developed novel single- and two-stage network architectures that use centerpoints for labeling. In this paper we show that these architectures achieve nearly equivalent performance to approaches using more detailed labeling on three overhead object detection datasets.
abstract_zh: 标记用于训练目标检测器的数据既昂贵又耗时。用于对象检测的公开可用的开销数据集用图像对齐的边界框、对象对齐的边界框或对象掩模进行标记，但尚不清楚是否需要这种详细的标记。为了测试这个想法，我们开发了新颖的单级和两级网络架构，使用中心点进行标记。在本文中，我们表明这些架构实现了与在三个头顶物体检测数据集上使用更详细标记的方法几乎相同的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅使用中心点标注的高效目标检测方法，用于减少遥感图像标注成本。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感目标检测数据集标注成本高昂且标注形式复杂，但尚无明确证据表明需要如此精细的标注。
AI.method: 设计单阶段和双阶段网络架构，仅利用目标中心点坐标作为标注信息进行训练。
AI.result: 在三个遥感目标检测数据集上，中心点标注方法性能接近传统详细标注方法。
AI.conclusion: 中心点标注足以实现有效的遥感目标检测，无需复杂标注形式。

search_text: Centerpoints Are All You Need in Overhead Imagery 俯视图像中您所需要的就是中心点 Labeling data to use for training object detectors is expensive and time consuming. Publicly available overhead datasets for object detection are labeled with image-aligned bounding boxes, object-aligned bounding boxes, or object masks, but it is not clear whether such detailed labeling is necessary. To test the idea, we developed novel single- and two-stage network architectures that use centerpoints for labeling. In this paper we show that these architectures achieve nearly equivalent performance to approaches using more detailed labeling on three overhead object detection datasets. 标记用于训练目标检测器的数据既昂贵又耗时。用于对象检测的公开可用的开销数据集用图像对齐的边界框、对象对齐的边界框或对象掩模进行标记，但尚不清楚是否需要这种详细的标记。为了测试这个想法，我们开发了新颖的单级和两级网络架构，使用中心点进行标记。在本文中，我们表明这些架构实现了与在三个头顶物体检测数据集上使用更详细标记的方法几乎相同的性能。 本文提出了一种仅使用中心点标注的高效目标检测方法，用于减少遥感图像标注成本。 James Mason Inder,Mark Lowell,Andrew J. Maltenfort cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Xinyi Wu,Arnab Sarker,Ali Jadbabaie
title: Link Partitioning on Simplicial Complexes Using Higher-Order Laplacians
title_zh: 使用高阶拉普拉斯算子对单纯复形进行链接划分
comment: Accepted to 22nd IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM 2022). Fixed some typos in v1
comments: Accepted to 22nd IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM 2022). Fixed some typos in v1
abstract: Link partitioning is a popular approach in network science used for discovering overlapping communities by identifying clusters of strongly connected links. Current link partitioning methods are specifically designed for networks modelled by graphs representing pairwise relationships. Therefore, these methods are incapable of utilizing higher-order information about group interactions in network data which is increasingly available. Simplicial complexes extend the dyadic model of graphs and can model polyadic relationships which are ubiquitous and crucial in many complex social and technological systems. In this paper, we introduce a link partitioning method that leverages higher-order (i.e. triadic and higher) information in simplicial complexes for better community detection. Our method utilizes a novel random walk on links of simplicial complexes defined by the higher-order Laplacian--a generalization of the graph Laplacian that incorporates polyadic relationships of the network. We transform this random walk into a graph-based random walk on a lifted line graph--a dual graph in which links are nodes while nodes and higher-order connections are links--and optimize for the standard notion of modularity. We show that our method is guaranteed to provide interpretable link partitioning results under mild assumptions. We also offer new theoretical results on the spectral properties of simplicial complexes by studying the spectrum of the link random walk. Experiment results on real-world community detection tasks show that our higher-order approach significantly outperforms existing graph-based link partitioning methods.

abstract_zh: 链接分区是网络科学中的一种流行方法，用于通过识别强连接链接的集群来发现重叠社区。当前的链接划分方法是专门为通过表示成对关系的图建模的网络而设计的。因此，这些方法无法利用日益可用的网络数据中有关群体交互的高阶信息。单纯复形扩展了图的二元模型，并且可以对在许多复杂的社会和技术系统中普遍存在且至关重要的多元关系进行建模。在本文中，我们介绍了一种链接划分方法，该方法利用单纯复合体中的高阶（即三元及更高）信息来实现更好的社区检测。我们的方法利用了由高阶拉普拉斯算子定义的单纯复形链接上的新颖随机游走——图拉普拉斯算子的推广，结合了网络的多元关系。我们将这种随机游走转换为提升线图上基于图的随机游走（一种双图，其中链接是节点，而节点和高阶连接是链接），并针对模块化的标准概念进行优化。我们表明，我们的方法保证在温和的假设下提供可解释的链接分区结果。我们还通过研究链接随机游走的谱，提供了关于单纯复形谱特性的新理论结果。现实世界社区检测任务的实验结果表明，我们的高阶方法显着优于现有的基于图的链接分区方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高阶拉普拉斯算子的链式划分方法，用于在单纯复形中发现重叠社区。
AI.motivation: 现有链式划分方法仅适用于图模型，无法利用复杂网络中普遍存在的高阶群体交互信息。
AI.method: 通过定义单纯复形的高阶拉普拉斯算子构建链式随机游走，并将其转化为提升线图上的图随机游走以优化模块度。
AI.result: 理论证明方法在温和假设下可提供可解释结果，实验显示其在现实社区检测任务中显著优于现有图基方法。
AI.conclusion: 高阶方法能有效捕捉群体交互信息，提升复杂网络的社区发现性能。

authors_text: Chandan Singh,John X. Morris,Jyoti Aneja,Alexander M. Rush,Jianfeng Gao
title: Explaining Patterns in Data with Language Models via Interpretable Autoprompting
title_zh: 通过可解释的自动提示用语言模型解释数据模式
comment: The two first authors contributed equally
comments: The two first authors contributed equally
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have displayed an impressive ability to harness natural language to perform complex tasks. In this work, we explore whether we can leverage this learned ability to find and explain patterns in data. Specifically, given a pre-trained LLM and data examples, we introduce interpretable autoprompting (iPrompt), an algorithm that generates a natural-language string explaining the data. iPrompt iteratively alternates between generating explanations with an LLM and reranking them based on their performance when used as a prompt. Experiments on a wide range of datasets, from synthetic mathematics to natural-language understanding, show that iPrompt can yield meaningful insights by accurately finding groundtruth dataset descriptions. Moreover, the prompts produced by iPrompt are simultaneously human-interpretable and highly effective for generalization: on real-world sentiment classification datasets, iPrompt produces prompts that match or even improve upon human-written prompts for GPT-3. Finally, experiments with an fMRI dataset show the potential for iPrompt to aid in scientific discovery. All code for using the methods and data here is made available on Github.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have displayed an impressive ability to harness natural language to perform complex tasks. In this work, we explore whether we can leverage this learned ability to find and explain patterns in data. Specifically, given a pre-trained LLM and data examples, we introduce interpretable autoprompting (iPrompt), an algorithm that generates a natural-language string explaining the data. iPrompt iteratively alternates between generating explanations with an LLM and reranking them based on their performance when used as a prompt. Experiments on a wide range of datasets, from synthetic mathematics to natural-language understanding, show that iPrompt can yield meaningful insights by accurately finding groundtruth dataset descriptions. Moreover, the prompts produced by iPrompt are simultaneously human-interpretable and highly effective for generalization: on real-world sentiment classification datasets, iPrompt produces prompts that match or even improve upon human-written prompts for GPT-3. Finally, experiments with an fMRI dataset show the potential for iPrompt to aid in scientific discovery. All code for using the methods and data here is made available on Github.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在利用自然语言执行复杂任务方面表现出了令人印象深刻的能力。在这项工作中，我们探索是否可以利用这种学习能力来查找和解释数据中的模式。具体来说，给定预先训练的 LLM 和数据示例，我们引入可解释的自动提示 (iPrompt)，这是一种生成解释数据的自然语言字符串的算法。 iPrompt 迭代地交替使用 LLM 生成解释和根据其用作提示时的表现对其进行重新排名。对从综合数学到自然语言理解的各种数据集的实验表明，iPrompt 可以通过准确查找真实数据集描述来产生有意义的见解。此外，iPrompt 生成的提示同时是人类可解释的，并且对于泛化非常有效：在现实世界的情感分类数据集上，iPrompt 生成的提示与人类为 GPT-3 编写的提示相匹配甚至改进。最后，功能磁共振成像数据集的实验显示了 iPrompt 帮助科学发现的潜力。使用此处方法和数据的所有代码均可在 Github 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iPrompt算法，利用大语言模型生成可解释的自然语言提示以发现和解释数据中的模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在复杂任务中表现出色，但缺乏系统性方法利用其能力自动发现数据模式并生成可解释的解释。
AI.method: iPrompt通过迭代交替生成LLM解释和基于性能重排序提示，最终输出同时具备人类可读性和高泛化能力的提示字符串。
AI.result: 在数学、自然语言理解及fMRI数据集上验证有效性，生成的提示在情感分类任务中表现优于或等于人类编写提示。
AI.conclusion: iPrompt为数据模式解释和科学发现提供了有效工具，展示了LLM在自动化可解释性研究中的潜力。

authors_text: Yunlong Song,Kexin Shi,Robert Penicka,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Learning Perception-Aware Agile Flight in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: 在杂乱的环境中学习感知感知敏捷飞行
comment: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Recently, neural control policies have outperformed existing model-based planning-and-control methods for autonomously navigating quadrotors through cluttered environments in minimum time. However, they are not perception aware, a crucial requirement in vision-based navigation due to the camera's limited field of view and the underactuated nature of a quadrotor. We propose a learning-based system that achieves perception-aware, agile flight in cluttered environments. Our method combines imitation learning with reinforcement learning (RL) by leveraging a privileged learning-by-cheating framework. Using RL, we first train a perception-aware teacher policy with full-state information to fly in minimum time through cluttered environments. Then, we use imitation learning to distill its knowledge into a vision-based student policy that only perceives the environment via a camera. Our approach tightly couples perception and control, showing a significant advantage in computation speed (10 times faster) and success rate. We demonstrate the closed-loop control performance using hardware-in-the-loop simulation.
summary: Recently, neural control policies have outperformed existing model-based planning-and-control methods for autonomously navigating quadrotors through cluttered environments in minimum time. However, they are not perception aware, a crucial requirement in vision-based navigation due to the camera's limited field of view and the underactuated nature of a quadrotor. We propose a learning-based system that achieves perception-aware, agile flight in cluttered environments. Our method combines imitation learning with reinforcement learning (RL) by leveraging a privileged learning-by-cheating framework. Using RL, we first train a perception-aware teacher policy with full-state information to fly in minimum time through cluttered environments. Then, we use imitation learning to distill its knowledge into a vision-based student policy that only perceives the environment via a camera. Our approach tightly couples perception and control, showing a significant advantage in computation speed (10 times faster) and success rate. We demonstrate the closed-loop control performance using hardware-in-the-loop simulation.
abstract_zh: 最近，神经控制策略的性能优于现有的基于模型的规划和控制方法，可以在最短的时间内自动导航四旋翼飞机穿过杂乱的环境。然而，它们没有感知意识，这是基于视觉的导航的关键要求，因为相机的视野有限，而且四旋翼飞行器的欠驱动特性。我们提出了一种基于学习的系统，可以在杂乱的环境中实现感知感知、敏捷的飞行。我们的方法通过利用特权学习作弊框架将模仿学习与强化学习（RL）结合起来。使用强化学习，我们首先使用完整状态信息训练感知感知的教师策略，以便在最短的时间内飞过杂乱的环境。然后，我们使用模仿学习将其知识提炼成基于视觉的学生策略，该策略仅通过相机感知环境。我们的方法将感知和控制紧密耦合，在计算速度（快 10 倍）和成功率方面显示出显着的优势。我们使用硬件在环仿真演示了闭环控制性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的系统，实现四旋翼飞行器在复杂环境中的感知敏感和敏捷飞行。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于模型的规划与控制方法在四旋翼飞行器通过复杂环境时表现不佳，且缺乏对视觉感知的敏感性，这在相机视野有限和四旋翼欠驱动特性下尤为重要。
AI.method: 本文结合模仿学习与强化学习（RL），利用特权学习框架，首先通过RL训练一个感知敏感的教师策略，随后通过模仿学习将其知识蒸馏到仅依赖视觉输入的学生策略中。
AI.result: 该方法在计算速度（快10倍）和成功率方面表现出显著优势，并通过硬件在环仿真验证了闭环控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法紧密耦合感知与控制，有效提升了四旋翼飞行器在复杂环境中的敏捷飞行能力。

authors_text: Yasar Majib,Mahmoud Barhamgi,Behzad Momahed Heravi,Sharadha Kariyawasam,Charith Perera
title: Detecting Anomalies within Smart Buildings using Do-It-Yourself Internet of Things
title_zh: 使用 DIY 物联网检测智能建筑内的异常情况
comment: Journal of Ambient Intelligence and Humanized Computing (2022)
comments: Journal of Ambient Intelligence and Humanized Computing (2022)
abstract: Detecting anomalies at the time of happening is vital in environments like buildings and homes to identify potential cyber-attacks. This paper discussed the various mechanisms to detect anomalies as soon as they occur. We shed light on crucial considerations when building machine learning models. We constructed and gathered data from multiple self-build (DIY) IoT devices with different in-situ sensors and found effective ways to find the point, contextual and combine anomalies. We also discussed several challenges and potential solutions when dealing with sensing devices that produce data at different sampling rates and how we need to pre-process them in machine learning models. This paper also looks at the pros and cons of extracting sub-datasets based on environmental conditions.
summary: Detecting anomalies at the time of happening is vital in environments like buildings and homes to identify potential cyber-attacks. This paper discussed the various mechanisms to detect anomalies as soon as they occur. We shed light on crucial considerations when building machine learning models. We constructed and gathered data from multiple self-build (DIY) IoT devices with different in-situ sensors and found effective ways to find the point, contextual and combine anomalies. We also discussed several challenges and potential solutions when dealing with sensing devices that produce data at different sampling rates and how we need to pre-process them in machine learning models. This paper also looks at the pros and cons of extracting sub-datasets based on environmental conditions.
abstract_zh: 在建筑物和家庭等环境中，在发生异常时检测异常对于识别潜在的网络攻击至关重要。本文讨论了在异常发生时立即检测到的各种机制。我们阐明了构建机器学习模型时的关键考虑因素。我们使用不同的现场传感器构建并收集了来自多个自建 (DIY) 物联网设备的数据，并找到了找到要点、上下文和组合异常的有效方法。我们还讨论了处理以不同采样率生成数据的传感设备时的一些挑战和潜在的解决方案，以及我们需要如何在机器学习模型中对它们进行预处理。本文还探讨了根据环境条件提取子数据集的优缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨使用自制物联网设备检测智能建筑中的异常，通过多传感器数据融合与机器学习模型实现点异常、上下文异常及组合异常的识别。
AI.motivation: 建筑环境中实时检测异常对防范网络攻击至关重要，但现有方法依赖高成本专业设备，需探索低成本DIY方案以提高灵活性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 构建多DIY物联网设备采集传感器数据，通过预处理解决异步采样问题，利用机器学习模型检测异常类型，并分析基于环境条件的子数据集提取策略。
AI.result: 验证了DIY设备在异常检测中的有效性，提出数据对齐与子数据集选择方法，证明低成本方案可实现多类型异常识别。
AI.conclusion: DIY物联网为异常检测提供可行路径，但需进一步优化异步数据处理与模型泛化能力，未来可结合边缘计算提升实时性。

authors_text: Anna Nikolaidou,Neil Phillips,Michail-Antisthenis Tsompanas,Andrew Adamatzky
title: Reactive fungal insoles
title_zh: 反应性真菌鞋垫
abstract: Mycelium bound composites are promising materials for a diverse range of applications including wearables and building elements. Their functionality surpasses some of the capabilities of traditionally passive materials, such as synthetic fibres, reconstituted cellulose fibres and natural fibres. Thereby, creating novel propositions including augmented functionality (sensory) and aesthetic (personal fashion). Biomaterials can offer multiple modal sensing capability such as mechanical loading (compressive and tensile) and moisture content. To assess the sensing potential of fungal insoles we undertook laboratory experiments on electrical response of bespoke insoles made from capillary matting colonised with oyster fungi Pleurotus ostreatus to compressive stress which mimics human loading when standing and walking. We have shown changes in electrical activity with compressive loading. The results advance the development of intelligent sensing insoles which are a building block towards more generic reactive fungal wearables. Using FitzhHugh-Nagumo model we numerically illustrated how excitation wave-fronts behave in a mycelium network colonising an insole and shown that it may be possible to discern pressure points from the mycelium electrical activity.
summary: Mycelium bound composites are promising materials for a diverse range of applications including wearables and building elements. Their functionality surpasses some of the capabilities of traditionally passive materials, such as synthetic fibres, reconstituted cellulose fibres and natural fibres. Thereby, creating novel propositions including augmented functionality (sensory) and aesthetic (personal fashion). Biomaterials can offer multiple modal sensing capability such as mechanical loading (compressive and tensile) and moisture content. To assess the sensing potential of fungal insoles we undertook laboratory experiments on electrical response of bespoke insoles made from capillary matting colonised with oyster fungi Pleurotus ostreatus to compressive stress which mimics human loading when standing and walking. We have shown changes in electrical activity with compressive loading. The results advance the development of intelligent sensing insoles which are a building block towards more generic reactive fungal wearables. Using FitzhHugh-Nagumo model we numerically illustrated how excitation wave-fronts behave in a mycelium network colonising an insole and shown that it may be possible to discern pressure points from the mycelium electrical activity.
abstract_zh: 菌丝体结合复合材料是一种有前途的材料，可用于多种应用，包括可穿戴设备和建筑元件。它们的功能超越了传统被动材料的一些功能，例如合成纤维、再生纤维素纤维和天然纤维。从而创造出包括增强功能（感官）和美学（个人时尚）在内的新颖主张。生物材料可以提供多种模式传感功能，例如机械载荷（压缩和拉伸）和水分含量。为了评估真菌鞋垫的传感潜力，我们进行了实验室实验，研究由牡蛎真菌平菇定植的毛细管垫制成的定制鞋垫对压缩应力的电响应，模拟人体站立和行走时的负荷。我们已经展示了电活动随压缩载荷的变化。研究结果推动了智能传感鞋垫的开发，该鞋垫是更通用的反应性真菌可穿戴设备的基石。使用 FitzhHugh-Nagumo 模型，我们以数字方式说明了激发波前在鞋垫上定殖的菌丝体网络中的行为，并表明可以从菌丝体电活动中辨别压力点。

AI.tldr: 本文研发了一种基于菌丝体的智能感应鞋垫，通过检测压缩应力下的电活动变化，探索其在可穿戴设备中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统材料如合成纤维在传感功能上存在局限，而菌丝体复合材料具有多模态传感能力，可为智能穿戴设备提供新型功能与美学价值。
AI.method: 采用毛细管垫接种牡蛎菌（Pleurotus ostreatus）制备定制鞋垫，通过实验室实验测试其在压缩应力下的电响应，并利用FitzhHugh-Nagumo模型模拟菌丝网络中的兴奋波传播行为。
AI.result: 实验表明鞋垫在压缩加载下电活动发生变化，且通过模型验证了菌丝网络可区分压力点，为智能感应鞋垫的开发提供了理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 研究推进了智能感应鞋垫的发展，展示了菌丝体在可穿戴设备中的反应性潜力，为未来通用型菌丝体智能服饰奠定了基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研发了一种基于菌丝体的智能感应鞋垫，通过检测压缩应力下的电活动变化，探索其在可穿戴设备中的应用潜力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统材料如合成纤维在传感功能上存在局限，而菌丝体复合材料具有多模态传感能力，可为智能穿戴设备提供新型功能与美学价值。
ai_content.method: 采用毛细管垫接种牡蛎菌（Pleurotus ostreatus）制备定制鞋垫，通过实验室实验测试其在压缩应力下的电响应，并利用FitzhHugh-Nagumo模型模拟菌丝网络中的兴奋波传播行为。
ai_content.result: 实验表明鞋垫在压缩加载下电活动发生变化，且通过模型验证了菌丝网络可区分压力点，为智能感应鞋垫的开发提供了理论支持。
ai_content.conclusion: 研究推进了智能感应鞋垫的发展，展示了菌丝体在可穿戴设备中的反应性潜力，为未来通用型菌丝体智能服饰奠定了基础。

search_text: Reactive fungal insoles 反应性真菌鞋垫 Mycelium bound composites are promising materials for a diverse range of applications including wearables and building elements. Their functionality surpasses some of the capabilities of traditionally passive materials, such as synthetic fibres, reconstituted cellulose fibres and natural fibres. Thereby, creating novel propositions including augmented functionality (sensory) and aesthetic (personal fashion). Biomaterials can offer multiple modal sensing capability such as mechanical loading (compressive and tensile) and moisture content. To assess the sensing potential of fungal insoles we undertook laboratory experiments on electrical response of bespoke insoles made from capillary matting colonised with oyster fungi Pleurotus ostreatus to compressive stress which mimics human loading when standing and walking. We have shown changes in electrical activity with compressive loading. The results advance the development of intelligent sensing insoles which are a building block towards more generic reactive fungal wearables. Using FitzhHugh-Nagumo model we numerically illustrated how excitation wave-fronts behave in a mycelium network colonising an insole and shown that it may be possible to discern pressure points from the mycelium electrical activity. 菌丝体结合复合材料是一种有前途的材料，可用于多种应用，包括可穿戴设备和建筑元件。它们的功能超越了传统被动材料的一些功能，例如合成纤维、再生纤维素纤维和天然纤维。从而创造出包括增强功能（感官）和美学（个人时尚）在内的新颖主张。生物材料可以提供多种模式传感功能，例如机械载荷（压缩和拉伸）和水分含量。为了评估真菌鞋垫的传感潜力，我们进行了实验室实验，研究由牡蛎真菌平菇定植的毛细管垫制成的定制鞋垫对压缩应力的电响应，模拟人体站立和行走时的负荷。我们已经展示了电活动随压缩载荷的变化。研究结果推动了智能传感鞋垫的开发，该鞋垫是更通用的反应性真菌可穿戴设备的基石。使用 FitzhHugh-Nagumo 模型，我们以数字方式说明了激发波前在鞋垫上定殖的菌丝体网络中的行为，并表明可以从菌丝体电活动中辨别压力点。 本文研发了一种基于菌丝体的智能感应鞋垫，通过检测压缩应力下的电活动变化，探索其在可穿戴设备中的应用潜力。 Anna Nikolaidou,Neil Phillips,Michail-Antisthenis Tsompanas,Andrew Adamatzky cs.ET

authors_text: Chenglin Yang,Siyuan Qiao,Qihang Yu,Xiaoding Yuan,Yukun Zhu,Alan Yuille,Hartwig Adam,Liang-Chieh Chen
title: MOAT: Alternating Mobile Convolution and Attention Brings Strong Vision Models
title_zh: MOAT：交替移动卷积和注意力带来强大的视觉模型
comment: ICLR 2023. arXiv v2: add ImageNet-1K-V2, tiny-MOAT on COCO detection and ADE20K segmentation
comments: ICLR 2023. arXiv v2: add ImageNet-1K-V2, tiny-MOAT on COCO detection and ADE20K segmentation
abstract: This paper presents MOAT, a family of neural networks that build on top of MObile convolution (i.e., inverted residual blocks) and ATtention. Unlike the current works that stack separate mobile convolution and transformer blocks, we effectively merge them into a MOAT block. Starting with a standard Transformer block, we replace its multi-layer perceptron with a mobile convolution block, and further reorder it before the self-attention operation. The mobile convolution block not only enhances the network representation capacity, but also produces better downsampled features. Our conceptually simple MOAT networks are surprisingly effective, achieving 89.1% / 81.5% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K / ImageNet-1K-V2 with ImageNet22K pretraining. Additionally, MOAT can be seamlessly applied to downstream tasks that require large resolution inputs by simply converting the global attention to window attention. Thanks to the mobile convolution that effectively exchanges local information between pixels (and thus cross-windows), MOAT does not need the extra window-shifting mechanism. As a result, on COCO object detection, MOAT achieves 59.2% box AP with 227M model parameters (single-scale inference, and hard NMS), and on ADE20K semantic segmentation, MOAT attains 57.6% mIoU with 496M model parameters (single-scale inference). Finally, the tiny-MOAT family, obtained by simply reducing the channel sizes, also surprisingly outperforms several mobile-specific transformer-based models on ImageNet. The tiny-MOAT family is also benchmarked on downstream tasks, serving as a baseline for the community. We hope our simple yet effective MOAT will inspire more seamless integration of convolution and self-attention. Code is publicly available.
summary: This paper presents MOAT, a family of neural networks that build on top of MObile convolution (i.e., inverted residual blocks) and ATtention. Unlike the current works that stack separate mobile convolution and transformer blocks, we effectively merge them into a MOAT block. Starting with a standard Transformer block, we replace its multi-layer perceptron with a mobile convolution block, and further reorder it before the self-attention operation. The mobile convolution block not only enhances the network representation capacity, but also produces better downsampled features. Our conceptually simple MOAT networks are surprisingly effective, achieving 89.1% / 81.5% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K / ImageNet-1K-V2 with ImageNet22K pretraining. Additionally, MOAT can be seamlessly applied to downstream tasks that require large resolution inputs by simply converting the global attention to window attention. Thanks to the mobile convolution that effectively exchanges local information between pixels (and thus cross-windows), MOAT does not need the extra window-shifting mechanism. As a result, on COCO object detection, MOAT achieves 59.2% box AP with 227M model parameters (single-scale inference, and hard NMS), and on ADE20K semantic segmentation, MOAT attains 57.6% mIoU with 496M model parameters (single-scale inference). Finally, the tiny-MOAT family, obtained by simply reducing the channel sizes, also surprisingly outperforms several mobile-specific transformer-based models on ImageNet. The tiny-MOAT family is also benchmarked on downstream tasks, serving as a baseline for the community. We hope our simple yet effective MOAT will inspire more seamless integration of convolution and self-attention. Code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 MOAT，这是一个建立在 MObile 卷积（即反向残差块）和 ATtention 之上的神经网络家族。与当前堆叠单独的移动卷积和转换器块的工作不同，我们有效地将它们合并到 MOAT 块中。从标准 Transformer 块开始，我们用移动卷积块替换其多层感知器，并在自注意力操作之前进一步对其进行重新排序。移动卷积块不仅增强了网络表示能力，而且产生了更好的下采样特征。我们概念上简单的 MOAT 网络非常有效，在使用 ImageNet22​​K 预训练的 ImageNet-1K / ImageNet-1K-V2 上实现了 89.1% / 81.5% top-1 准确率。此外，通过简单地将全局注意力转换为窗口注意力，MOAT 可以无缝地应用于需要大分辨率输入的下游任务。由于移动卷积可以有效地交换像素之间的局部信息（从而跨窗口），MOAT 不需要额外的窗口移动机制。结果，在 COCO 目标检测上，MOAT 在 227M 模型参数（单尺度推理和硬 NMS）下实现了 59.2% 的 box AP，在 ADE20K 语义分割上，MOAT 在 496M 模型参数（单尺度推理）下实现了 57.6% mIoU。最后，通过简单地减小通道大小而获得的tiny-MOAT 系列也令人惊讶地优于 ImageNet 上的几种基于移动专用 Transformer 的模型。 tiny-MOAT家族还以下游任务为基准，作为社区的基准。我们希望我们简单而有效的 MOAT 能够激发卷积和自注意力的更无缝集成。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOAT模型，通过交替使用移动卷积和注意力机制，构建高效的视觉模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将移动卷积与Transformer模块分开堆叠，效率不足。本文旨在通过融合两者设计更高效的网络结构，提升表征能力和下采样效果。
AI.method: 基于标准Transformer块，用移动卷积替换多层感知机并调整操作顺序，形成MOAT块。通过窗口注意力处理高分辨率输入，无需额外的窗口位移机制。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上达到89.1%准确率，COCO目标检测59.2% box AP，ADE20K分割57.6% mIoU。微型MOAT在ImageNet上超越其他移动端Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: MOAT通过简单设计实现高效性能，为卷积与自注意力的融合提供新思路，并开源代码供社区参考。

authors_text: Xiaomeng Li,Hongyu Ren,Huifeng Yao,Ziwei Liu
title: TripleE: Easy Domain Generalization via Episodic Replay
title_zh: TripleE：通过情景重放轻松进行领域概括
abstract: Learning how to generalize the model to unseen domains is an important area of research. In this paper, we propose TripleE, and the main idea is to encourage the network to focus on training on subsets (learning with replay) and enlarge the data space in learning on subsets. Learning with replay contains two core designs, EReplayB and EReplayD, which conduct the replay schema on batch and dataset, respectively. Through this, the network can focus on learning with subsets instead of visiting the global set at a glance, enlarging the model diversity in ensembling. To enlarge the data space in learning on subsets, we verify that an exhaustive and singular augmentation (ESAug) performs surprisingly well on expanding the data space in subsets during replays. Our model dubbed TripleE is frustratingly easy, based on simple augmentation and ensembling. Without bells and whistles, our TripleE method surpasses prior arts on six domain generalization benchmarks, showing that this approach could serve as a stepping stone for future research in domain generalization.
summary: Learning how to generalize the model to unseen domains is an important area of research. In this paper, we propose TripleE, and the main idea is to encourage the network to focus on training on subsets (learning with replay) and enlarge the data space in learning on subsets. Learning with replay contains two core designs, EReplayB and EReplayD, which conduct the replay schema on batch and dataset, respectively. Through this, the network can focus on learning with subsets instead of visiting the global set at a glance, enlarging the model diversity in ensembling. To enlarge the data space in learning on subsets, we verify that an exhaustive and singular augmentation (ESAug) performs surprisingly well on expanding the data space in subsets during replays. Our model dubbed TripleE is frustratingly easy, based on simple augmentation and ensembling. Without bells and whistles, our TripleE method surpasses prior arts on six domain generalization benchmarks, showing that this approach could serve as a stepping stone for future research in domain generalization.
abstract_zh: 学习如何将模型推广到看不见的领域是一个重要的研究领域。在本文中，我们提出了TripleE，主要思想是鼓励网络专注于子集的训练（通过重播学习）并扩大子集学习的数据空间。重放学习包含两个核心设计，EReplayB 和 EReplayD，分别对批次和数据集进行重放模式。通过这种方式，网络可以专注于子集学习，而不是一目了然地访问全局集，从而扩大了集成中的模型多样性。为了扩大子集学习中的数据空间，我们验证了穷举奇异增强（ESAug）在重播期间扩展子集中的数据空间方面表现得令人惊讶。我们的模型称为 TripleE，基于简单的增强和集成，非常简单。没有花哨的东西，我们的 TripleE 方法在六个领域泛化基准上超越了现有技术，表明该方法可以作为领域泛化未来研究的垫脚石。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TripleE方法，通过情景回放机制实现简单的领域泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在未见过的领域泛化能力不足，需要更有效的训练策略。
AI.method: 设计EReplayB（批量回放）和EReplayD（数据集回放）机制，结合ESAug增强数据空间，通过简单集成实现领域泛化。
AI.result: TripleE在六个领域泛化基准测试中超越现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: TripleE通过简单机制实现高效领域泛化，为未来研究提供新思路。

search_text: TripleE: Easy Domain Generalization via Episodic Replay TripleE：通过情景重放轻松进行领域概括 Learning how to generalize the model to unseen domains is an important area of research. In this paper, we propose TripleE, and the main idea is to encourage the network to focus on training on subsets (learning with replay) and enlarge the data space in learning on subsets. Learning with replay contains two core designs, EReplayB and EReplayD, which conduct the replay schema on batch and dataset, respectively. Through this, the network can focus on learning with subsets instead of visiting the global set at a glance, enlarging the model diversity in ensembling. To enlarge the data space in learning on subsets, we verify that an exhaustive and singular augmentation (ESAug) performs surprisingly well on expanding the data space in subsets during replays. Our model dubbed TripleE is frustratingly easy, based on simple augmentation and ensembling. Without bells and whistles, our TripleE method surpasses prior arts on six domain generalization benchmarks, showing that this approach could serve as a stepping stone for future research in domain generalization. 学习如何将模型推广到看不见的领域是一个重要的研究领域。在本文中，我们提出了TripleE，主要思想是鼓励网络专注于子集的训练（通过重播学习）并扩大子集学习的数据空间。重放学习包含两个核心设计，EReplayB 和 EReplayD，分别对批次和数据集进行重放模式。通过这种方式，网络可以专注于子集学习，而不是一目了然地访问全局集，从而扩大了集成中的模型多样性。为了扩大子集学习中的数据空间，我们验证了穷举奇异增强（ESAug）在重播期间扩展子集中的数据空间方面表现得令人惊讶。我们的模型称为 TripleE，基于简单的增强和集成，非常简单。没有花哨的东西，我们的 TripleE 方法在六个领域泛化基准上超越了现有技术，表明该方法可以作为领域泛化未来研究的垫脚石。 本文提出TripleE方法，通过情景回放机制实现简单的领域泛化。 Xiaomeng Li,Hongyu Ren,Huifeng Yao,Ziwei Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yurui Ming,Yuanyuan Liang
title: Low-Light Image Restoration Based on Retina Model using Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于神经网络视网膜模型的弱光图像恢复
abstract: We report the possibility of using a simple neural network for effortless restoration of low-light images inspired by the retina model, which mimics the neurophysiological principles and dynamics of various types of optical neurons. The proposed neural network model saves the cost of computational overhead in contrast with traditional signal-processing models, and generates results comparable with complicated deep learning models from the subjective perceptual perspective. This work shows that to directly simulate the functionalities of retinal neurons using neural networks not only avoids the manually seeking for the optimal parameters, but also paves the way to build corresponding artificial versions for certain neurobiological organizations.
summary: We report the possibility of using a simple neural network for effortless restoration of low-light images inspired by the retina model, which mimics the neurophysiological principles and dynamics of various types of optical neurons. The proposed neural network model saves the cost of computational overhead in contrast with traditional signal-processing models, and generates results comparable with complicated deep learning models from the subjective perceptual perspective. This work shows that to directly simulate the functionalities of retinal neurons using neural networks not only avoids the manually seeking for the optimal parameters, but also paves the way to build corresponding artificial versions for certain neurobiological organizations.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了受视网膜模型启发，使用简单的神经网络轻松恢复低光图像的可能性，该模型模仿了各种类型光学神经元的神经生理学原理和动力学。与传统的信号处理模型相比，所提出的神经网络模型节省了计算开销的成本，并且从主观感知的角度产生了与复杂的深度学习模型相当的结果。这项工作表明，利用神经网络直接模拟视网膜神经元的功能不仅避免了手动寻找最佳参数，而且为某些神经生物学组织构建相应的人工版本铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视网膜模型的神经网络方法，用于高效恢复低光图像
AI.motivation: 传统图像处理模型计算成本高且需手动调整参数，而复杂深度学习模型虽效果好但可能冗余，因此需要一种更高效且自动化的低光图像恢复方法
AI.method: 设计一个受视网膜神经元生理机制启发的简单神经网络，模拟光感受器的动态过程以恢复低光图像
AI.result: 在主观感知质量上达到与复杂深度学习模型相当的效果，同时显著降低计算资源消耗
AI.conclusion: 直接模拟视网膜神经元功能可避免手动参数优化，为人工神经生物学结构的构建提供新途径

authors_text: Per-Arne Andersen,Morten Goodwin,Ole-Christoffer Granmo
title: CostNet: An End-to-End Framework for Goal-Directed Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: CostNet：目标导向强化学习的端到端框架
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, In Proceedings of the International Conference on Innovative Techniques and Applications of Artificial Intelligence, SGAI2020
comments: 14 pages, 5 figures, In Proceedings of the International Conference on Innovative Techniques and Applications of Artificial Intelligence, SGAI2020
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is a general framework concerned with an agent that seeks to maximize rewards in an environment. The learning typically happens through trial and error using explorative methods, such as epsilon-greedy. There are two approaches, model-based and model-free reinforcement learning, that show concrete results in several disciplines. Model-based RL learns a model of the environment for learning the policy while model-free approaches are fully explorative and exploitative without considering the underlying environment dynamics. Model-free RL works conceptually well in simulated environments, and empirical evidence suggests that trial and error lead to a near-optimal behavior with enough training. On the other hand, model-based RL aims to be sample efficient, and studies show that it requires far less training in the real environment for learning a good policy. A significant challenge with RL is that it relies on a well-defined reward function to work well for complex environments and such a reward function is challenging to define. Goal-Directed RL is an alternative method that learns an intrinsic reward function with emphasis on a few explored trajectories that reveals the path to the goal state. This paper introduces a novel reinforcement learning algorithm for predicting the distance between two states in a Markov Decision Process. The learned distance function works as an intrinsic reward that fuels the agent's learning. Using the distance-metric as a reward, we show that the algorithm performs comparably to model-free RL while having significantly better sample-efficiently in several test environments.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is a general framework concerned with an agent that seeks to maximize rewards in an environment. The learning typically happens through trial and error using explorative methods, such as epsilon-greedy. There are two approaches, model-based and model-free reinforcement learning, that show concrete results in several disciplines. Model-based RL learns a model of the environment for learning the policy while model-free approaches are fully explorative and exploitative without considering the underlying environment dynamics. Model-free RL works conceptually well in simulated environments, and empirical evidence suggests that trial and error lead to a near-optimal behavior with enough training. On the other hand, model-based RL aims to be sample efficient, and studies show that it requires far less training in the real environment for learning a good policy. A significant challenge with RL is that it relies on a well-defined reward function to work well for complex environments and such a reward function is challenging to define. Goal-Directed RL is an alternative method that learns an intrinsic reward function with emphasis on a few explored trajectories that reveals the path to the goal state. This paper introduces a novel reinforcement learning algorithm for predicting the distance between two states in a Markov Decision Process. The learned distance function works as an intrinsic reward that fuels the agent's learning. Using the distance-metric as a reward, we show that the algorithm performs comparably to model-free RL while having significantly better sample-efficiently in several test environments.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）是一个通用框架，涉及寻求在环境中最大化奖励的代理。学习通常是通过使用探索性方法（例如 epsilon-greedy）进行试验和错误来进行的。有两种方法，基于模型的强化学习和无模型的强化学习，在多个学科中显示出了具体的结果。基于模型的强化学习学习环境模型来学习策略，而无模型方法则完全是探索性和利用性的，不考虑潜在的环境动态。从概念上讲，无模型强化学习在模拟环境中运行良好，经验证据表明，经过足够的训练，反复试验会导致接近最优的行为。另一方面，基于模型的强化学习旨在提高样本效率，研究表明，在真实环境中学习良好策略所需的训练要少得多。强化学习的一个重大挑战是，它依赖于明确定义的奖励函数才能在复杂的环境中正常工作，而这样的奖励函数很难定义。目标导向强化学习是一种替代方法，它学习内在奖励函数，重点是一些探索的轨迹，揭示通往目标状态的路径。本文介绍了一种新颖的强化学习算法，用于预测马尔可夫决策过程中两个状态之间的距离。学习距离函数作为一种内在奖励，促进代理的学习。使用距离度量作为奖励，我们表明该算法的性能与无模型强化学习相当，同时在多个测试环境中具有明显更好的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CostNet的端到端强化学习框架，通过学习状态间的距离函数作为内在奖励，解决复杂环境中的目标导向强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖明确的奖励函数，但在复杂环境中定义有效奖励函数极具挑战性。模型基于方法虽样本效率高，但难以适应动态环境，而模型无关方法虽灵活却需大量训练样本。
AI.method: 通过学习马尔可夫决策过程中的状态间距离度量函数，将其作为内在奖励驱动智能体学习，结合目标导向策略优化探索效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在多个测试环境中样本效率显著优于模型无关方法，同时保持与模型无关RL相当的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: CostNet通过距离函数的内在奖励机制，在保证学习效果的同时提升了样本效率，为复杂环境下的强化学习提供了新思路。

search_text: CostNet: An End-to-End Framework for Goal-Directed Reinforcement Learning CostNet：目标导向强化学习的端到端框架 Reinforcement Learning (RL) is a general framework concerned with an agent that seeks to maximize rewards in an environment. The learning typically happens through trial and error using explorative methods, such as epsilon-greedy. On the other hand, model-based RL aims to be sample efficient, and studies show that it requires far less training in the real environment for learning a good policy. A significant challenge with RL is that it relies on a well-defined reward function to work well for complex environments and such a reward function is challenging to define. Goal-Directed RL is an alternative method that learns an intrinsic reward function with emphasis on a few explored trajectories that reveals the path to the goal state. This paper introduces a novel reinforcement learning algorithm for predicting the distance between two states in a Markov Decision Process. The learned distance function works as an intrinsic reward that fuels the agent's learning. authors_text: Tianyi Yu,Pei Lai,Fei Teng
title: Federated Graph-based Networks with Shared Embedding
title_zh: 具有共享嵌入的基于联合图的网络
abstract: Nowadays, user privacy is becoming an issue that cannot be bypassed for system developers, especially for that of web applications where data can be easily transferred through internet. Thankfully, federated learning proposes an innovative method to train models with distributed devices while data are kept in local storage. However, unlike general neural networks, although graph-based networks have achieved great success in classification tasks and advanced recommendation system, its high performance relies on the rich context provided by a graph structure, which is vulnerable when data attributes are incomplete. Therefore, the latter becomes a realistic problem when implementing federated learning for graph-based networks. Knowing that data embedding is a representation in a different space, we propose our Federated Graph-based Networks with Shared Embedding (Feras), which uses shared embedding data to train the network and avoids the direct sharing of original data. A solid theoretical proof of the convergence of Feras is given in this work. Experiments on different datasets (PPI, Flickr, Reddit) are conducted to show the efficiency of Feras for centralized learning. Finally, Feras enables the training of current graph-based models in the federated learning framework for privacy concern.
summary: Nowadays, user privacy is becoming an issue that cannot be bypassed for system developers, especially for that of web applications where data can be easily transferred through internet. Thankfully, federated learning proposes an innovative method to train models with distributed devices while data are kept in local storage. However, unlike general neural networks, although graph-based networks have achieved great success in classification tasks and advanced recommendation system, its high performance relies on the rich context provided by a graph structure, which is vulnerable when data attributes are incomplete. Therefore, the latter becomes a realistic problem when implementing federated learning for graph-based networks. Knowing that data embedding is a representation in a different space, we propose our Federated Graph-based Networks with Shared Embedding (Feras), which uses shared embedding data to train the network and avoids the direct sharing of original data. A solid theoretical proof of the convergence of Feras is given in this work. Experiments on different datasets (PPI, Flickr, Reddit) are conducted to show the efficiency of Feras for centralized learning. Finally, Feras enables the training of current graph-based models in the federated learning framework for privacy concern.
abstract_zh: 如今，用户隐私已经成为系统开发者不可回避的问题，尤其是对于那些可以通过互联网轻松传输数据的Web应用程序。值得庆幸的是，联邦学习提出了一种创新方法，可以使用分布式设备训练模型，同时将数据保存在本地存储中。然而，与一般神经网络不同的是，尽管基于图的网络在分类任务和高级推荐系统方面取得了巨大成功，但其高性能依赖于图结构提供的丰富上下文，当数据属性不完整时，图结构很容易受到攻击。因此，后者成为实现基于图的网络的联邦学习时的现实问题。知道数据嵌入是不同空间中的表示，我们提出了具有共享嵌入的基于联合图的网络（Feras），它使用共享嵌入数据来训练网络并避免直接共享原始数据。这项工作给出了 Feras 收敛性的可靠理论证明。在不同数据集（PPI、Flickr、Reddit）上进行实验，以展示 Feras 集中学习的效率。最后，Feras 能够在联邦学习框架中训练当前基于图的模型，以解决隐私问题。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于联邦学习的图神经网络方法（Feras），通过共享嵌入数据保护隐私并解决图结构数据不完整性问题。
AI.motivation: 用户隐私保护需求与图神经网络在联邦学习中因数据不完整性导致的性能下降问题。
AI.method: 提出Federated Graph-based Networks with Shared Embedding（Feras）方法，利用共享嵌入表示替代原始数据共享，结合理论收敛性证明。
AI.result: 在PPI、Flickr和Reddit数据集上的实验验证了Feras在集中式学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Feras方法成功实现了图神经网络在联邦学习中的隐私保护训练，解决了数据不完整性带来的挑战。

authors_text: Haixiang Sun,Ye Shi,Jingya Wang,Hoang Duong Tuan,H. Vincent Poor,Dacheng Tao
title: Alternating Differentiation for Optimization Layers
title_zh: 优化层的交替微分
abstract: The idea of embedding optimization problems into deep neural networks as optimization layers to encode constraints and inductive priors has taken hold in recent years. Most existing methods focus on implicitly differentiating Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions in a way that requires expensive computations on the Jacobian matrix, which can be slow and memory-intensive. In this paper, we developed a new framework, named Alternating Differentiation (Alt-Diff), that differentiates optimization problems (here, specifically in the form of convex optimization problems with polyhedral constraints) in a fast and recursive way. Alt-Diff decouples the differentiation procedure into a primal update and a dual update in an alternating way. Accordingly, Alt-Diff substantially decreases the dimensions of the Jacobian matrix especially for optimization with large-scale constraints and thus increases the computational speed of implicit differentiation. We show that the gradients obtained by Alt-Diff are consistent with those obtained by differentiating KKT conditions. In addition, we propose to truncate Alt-Diff to further accelerate the computational speed. Under some standard assumptions, we show that the truncation error of gradients is upper bounded by the same order of variables' estimation error. Therefore, Alt-Diff can be truncated to further increase computational speed without sacrificing much accuracy. A series of comprehensive experiments validate the superiority of Alt-Diff.
summary: The idea of embedding optimization problems into deep neural networks as optimization layers to encode constraints and inductive priors has taken hold in recent years. Most existing methods focus on implicitly differentiating Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions in a way that requires expensive computations on the Jacobian matrix, which can be slow and memory-intensive. In this paper, we developed a new framework, named Alternating Differentiation (Alt-Diff), that differentiates optimization problems (here, specifically in the form of convex optimization problems with polyhedral constraints) in a fast and recursive way. Alt-Diff decouples the differentiation procedure into a primal update and a dual update in an alternating way. Accordingly, Alt-Diff substantially decreases the dimensions of the Jacobian matrix especially for optimization with large-scale constraints and thus increases the computational speed of implicit differentiation. We show that the gradients obtained by Alt-Diff are consistent with those obtained by differentiating KKT conditions. In addition, we propose to truncate Alt-Diff to further accelerate the computational speed. Under some standard assumptions, we show that the truncation error of gradients is upper bounded by the same order of variables' estimation error. Therefore, Alt-Diff can be truncated to further increase computational speed without sacrificing much accuracy. A series of comprehensive experiments validate the superiority of Alt-Diff.
abstract_zh: 近年来，将优化问题嵌入深度神经网络作为优化层来编码约束和归纳先验的想法已经流行。大多数现有方法侧重于隐式微分 Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) 条件，其方式需要对雅可比矩阵进行昂贵的计算，这可能很慢并且占用大量内存。在本文中，我们开发了一个名为交替微分（Alt-Diff）的新框架，它以快速递归的方式区分优化问题（这里，特别是具有多面体约束的凸优化问题的形式）。 Alt-Diff 将微分过程解耦为原始更新和交替方式的双重更新。因此，Alt-Diff 显着降低了雅可比矩阵的维数，特别是对于具有大规模约束的优化，从而提高了隐式微分的计算速度。我们表明，通过 Alt-Diff 获得的梯度与通过微分 KKT 条件获得的梯度一致。此外，我们建议截断Alt-Diff以进一步加快计算速度。在一些标准假设下，我们表明梯度的截断误差的上限是同阶变量的估计误差。因此，可以截断 Alt-Diff 以进一步提高计算速度，而不会牺牲太多精度。一系列综合实验验证了Alt-Diff的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Alternating Differentiation (Alt-Diff)的新框架，用于高效求解嵌入深度神经网络中的优化层问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过隐式微分KKT条件实现优化层，但需计算高维雅可比矩阵，导致计算速度慢且内存消耗大。
AI.method: Alt-Diff将优化问题的微分化为交替的原问题更新和对偶问题更新，显著降低雅可比矩阵维度，并通过截断进一步加速计算。
AI.result: 实验验证了Alt-Diff在计算效率上的优势，且截断后的梯度误差与变量估计误差同阶。
AI.conclusion: Alt-Diff为优化层提供了高效且准确的微分方法，在保持精度的同时显著提升计算速度。

authors_text: Yannick Hogewind,Thiago D. Simao,Tal Kachman,Nils Jansen
title: Safe Reinforcement Learning From Pixels Using a Stochastic Latent Representation
title_zh: 使用随机潜在表示从像素进行安全强化学习
abstract: We address the problem of safe reinforcement learning from pixel observations. Inherent challenges in such settings are (1) a trade-off between reward optimization and adhering to safety constraints, (2) partial observability, and (3) high-dimensional observations. We formalize the problem in a constrained, partially observable Markov decision process framework, where an agent obtains distinct reward and safety signals. To address the curse of dimensionality, we employ a novel safety critic using the stochastic latent actor-critic (SLAC) approach. The latent variable model predicts rewards and safety violations, and we use the safety critic to train safe policies. Using well-known benchmark environments, we demonstrate competitive performance over existing approaches with respects to computational requirements, final reward return, and satisfying the safety constraints.
summary: We address the problem of safe reinforcement learning from pixel observations. Inherent challenges in such settings are (1) a trade-off between reward optimization and adhering to safety constraints, (2) partial observability, and (3) high-dimensional observations. We formalize the problem in a constrained, partially observable Markov decision process framework, where an agent obtains distinct reward and safety signals. To address the curse of dimensionality, we employ a novel safety critic using the stochastic latent actor-critic (SLAC) approach. The latent variable model predicts rewards and safety violations, and we use the safety critic to train safe policies. Using well-known benchmark environments, we demonstrate competitive performance over existing approaches with respects to computational requirements, final reward return, and satisfying the safety constraints.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了从像素观察中安全强化学习的问题。这种环境中固有的挑战是（1）奖励优化和遵守安全约束之间的权衡，（2）部分可观察性，以及（3）高维观察。我们在受约束的、部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程框架中将问题形式化，其中代理获得不同的奖励和安全信号。为了解决维数灾难，我们采用了一种新颖的安全批评家，该安全批评家使用随机潜在演员批评家（SLAC）方法。潜变量模型预测奖励和安全违规，我们使用安全批评家来训练安全策略。使用众所周知的基准环境，我们在计算要求、最终奖励回报和满足安全约束方面展示了相对于现有方法的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机潜在表示的安全强化学习方法，解决像素观测下的安全约束与奖励优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以平衡安全约束与奖励优化，同时应对部分可观测性和高维观测的挑战。
AI.method: 采用SLAC框架，通过潜在变量模型预测奖励与安全风险，并利用安全评论家训练安全策略。
AI.result: 在基准环境中表现出竞争力，计算效率高且能有效满足安全约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了安全强化学习中的关键挑战，在多个指标上优于现有技术。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机潜在表示的安全强化学习方法，解决像素观测下的安全约束与奖励优化问题。
motivation: 现有方法难以平衡安全约束与奖励优化，同时应对部分可观测性和高维观测的挑战。
method: 采用SLAC框架，通过潜在变量模型预测奖励与安全风险，并利用安全评论家训练安全策略。
result: 在基准环境中表现出竞争力，计算效率高且能有效满足安全约束。
conclusion: 该方法成功解决了安全强化学习中的关键挑战，在多个指标上优于现有技术。
search_text: Safe Reinforcement Learning From Pixels Using a Stochastic Latent Representation 使用随机潜在表示从像素进行安全强化学习 We address the problem of safe reinforcement learning from pixel observations. Inherent challenges in such settings are (1) a trade-off between reward optimization and adhering to safety constraints, (2) partial observability, and (3) high-dimensional observations. We formalize the problem in a constrained, partially observable Markov decision process framework, where an agent obtains distinct reward and safety signals. To address the curse of dimensionality, we employ a novel safety critic using the stochastic latent actor-critic (SLAC) approach. The latent variable model predicts rewards and safety violations, and we use the safety critic to train safe policies. Using well-known benchmark environments, we demonstrate competitive performance over existing approaches with respects to computational requirements, final reward return, and satisfying the safety constraints. 我们解决了从像素观察中安全强化学习的问题。这种环境中固有的挑战是（1）奖励优化和遵守安全约束之间的权衡，（2）部分可观察性，以及（3）高维观察。我们在受约束的、部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程框架中将问题形式化，其中代理获得不同的奖励和安全信号。为了解决维数灾难，我们采用了一种新颖的安全批评家，该安全批评家使用随机潜在演员批评家（SLAC）方法。潜变量模型预测奖励和安全违规，我们使用安全批评家来训练安全策略。使用众所周知的基准环境，我们在计算要求、最终奖励回报和满足安全约束方面展示了相对于现有方法的竞争性能。 本文提出一种基于随机潜在表示的安全强化学习方法，解决像素观测下的安全约束与奖励优化问题。 Yannick Hogewind,Thiago D. Simao,Tal Kachman,Nils Jansen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Fengdi Che,Xiru Zhu,Doina Precup,David Meger,Gregory Dudek
title: Bayesian Q-learning With Imperfect Expert Demonstrations
title_zh: 不完美专家演示的贝叶斯 Q 学习
abstract: Guided exploration with expert demonstrations improves data efficiency for reinforcement learning, but current algorithms often overuse expert information. We propose a novel algorithm to speed up Q-learning with the help of a limited amount of imperfect expert demonstrations. The algorithm avoids excessive reliance on expert data by relaxing the optimal expert assumption and gradually reducing the usage of uninformative expert data. Experimentally, we evaluate our approach on a sparse-reward chain environment and six more complicated Atari games with delayed rewards. With the proposed methods, we can achieve better results than Deep Q-learning from Demonstrations (Hester et al., 2017) in most environments.
summary: Guided exploration with expert demonstrations improves data efficiency for reinforcement learning, but current algorithms often overuse expert information. We propose a novel algorithm to speed up Q-learning with the help of a limited amount of imperfect expert demonstrations. The algorithm avoids excessive reliance on expert data by relaxing the optimal expert assumption and gradually reducing the usage of uninformative expert data. Experimentally, we evaluate our approach on a sparse-reward chain environment and six more complicated Atari games with delayed rewards. With the proposed methods, we can achieve better results than Deep Q-learning from Demonstrations (Hester et al., 2017) in most environments.
abstract_zh: 专家演示的引导探索提高了强化学习的数据效率，但当前的算法经常过度使用专家信息。我们提出了一种新颖的算法，借助有限数量的不完美专家演示来加速 Q 学习。该算法通过放宽最优专家假设并逐渐减少无信息专家数据的使用来避免对专家数据的过度依赖。实验上，我们在稀疏奖励链环境和六种更复杂的具有延迟奖励的 Atari 游戏上评估了我们的方法。通过所提出的方法，我们可以在大多数环境中获得比演示中的深度 Q 学习（Hester 等人，2017）更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯Q学习算法，通过有限的不完美专家示范提升强化学习的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法过度依赖专家数据导致效率低下，需在减少依赖的同时有效利用有限示范。
AI.method: 放松最优专家假设，采用贝叶斯框架动态调整专家数据权重，逐步剔除不相关信息。
AI.result: 在稀疏奖励链式环境和六个Atari游戏中，表现优于Deep Q-learning from Demonstrations方法。
AI.conclusion: 新算法通过平衡专家数据使用，在复杂环境中实现更高效的学习性能。

authors_text: Ruikang Luo,Yaofeng Song,Liping Huang,Yicheng Zhang,Rong Su
title: STGIN: A Spatial Temporal Graph-Informer Network for Long Sequence Traffic Speed Forecasting
title_zh: STGIN：用于长序列交通速度预测的时空图信息网络
abstract: Accurate long series forecasting of traffic information is critical for the development of intelligent traffic systems. We may benefit from the rapid growth of neural network analysis technology to better understand the underlying functioning patterns of traffic networks as a result of this progress. Due to the fact that traffic data and facility utilization circumstances are sequentially dependent on past and present situations, several related neural network techniques based on temporal dependency extraction models have been developed to solve the problem. The complicated topological road structure, on the other hand, amplifies the effect of spatial interdependence, which cannot be captured by pure temporal extraction approaches. Additionally, the typical Deep Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) topology has a constraint on global information extraction, which is required for comprehensive long-term prediction. This study proposes a new spatial-temporal neural network architecture, called Spatial-Temporal Graph-Informer (STGIN), to handle the long-term traffic parameters forecasting issue by merging the Informer and Graph Attention Network (GAT) layers for spatial and temporal relationships extraction. The attention mechanism potentially guarantees long-term prediction performance without significant information loss from distant inputs. On two real-world traffic datasets with varying horizons, experimental findings validate the long sequence prediction abilities, and further interpretation is provided.
summary: Accurate long series forecasting of traffic information is critical for the development of intelligent traffic systems. We may benefit from the rapid growth of neural network analysis technology to better understand the underlying functioning patterns of traffic networks as a result of this progress. Due to the fact that traffic data and facility utilization circumstances are sequentially dependent on past and present situations, several related neural network techniques based on temporal dependency extraction models have been developed to solve the problem. The complicated topological road structure, on the other hand, amplifies the effect of spatial interdependence, which cannot be captured by pure temporal extraction approaches. Additionally, the typical Deep Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) topology has a constraint on global information extraction, which is required for comprehensive long-term prediction. This study proposes a new spatial-temporal neural network architecture, called Spatial-Temporal Graph-Informer (STGIN), to handle the long-term traffic parameters forecasting issue by merging the Informer and Graph Attention Network (GAT) layers for spatial and temporal relationships extraction. The attention mechanism potentially guarantees long-term prediction performance without significant information loss from distant inputs. On two real-world traffic datasets with varying horizons, experimental findings validate the long sequence prediction abilities, and further interpretation is provided.
abstract_zh: 准确的长序列交通信息预测对于智能交通系统的发展至关重要。我们可能会受益于神经网络分析技术的快速发展，从而更好地理解交通网络的底层功能模式。由于交通数据和设施利用情况依次依赖于过去和现在的情况，因此已经开发了几种基于时间依赖性提取模型的相关神经网络技术来解决该问题。另一方面，复杂的拓扑道路结构放大了空间相互依赖的影响，而这种影响无法通过纯时间提取方法来捕获。此外，典型的深度递归神经网络（RNN）拓扑对全局信息提取有限制，而这是全面的长期预测所必需的。本研究提出了一种新的时空神经网络架构，称为时空图信息者（STGIN），通过合并信息者和图注意网络（GAT）层来提取时空关系来处理长期交通参数预测问题。注意力机制有可能保证长期预测性能，而不会因远程输入而造成重大信息损失。在两个具有不同范围的现实世界交通数据集上，实验结果验证了长序列预测能力，并提供了进一步的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合时空关系的神经网络模型STGIN，用于解决长序列交通速度预测问题。
AI.motivation: 交通数据具有时空依赖性，传统方法难以同时捕捉长期时间依赖和复杂空间关系，且深度循环网络存在全局信息提取限制。
AI.method: 融合Informer和图注意力网络（GAT），通过注意力机制提取时空特征，解决长序列预测中的信息丢失问题。
AI.result: 在两个真实交通数据集上验证了STGIN在不同预测范围内的有效性，表现出优越的长序列预测能力。
AI.conclusion: STGIN通过整合时空特征提取机制，为长期交通参数预测提供了更准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Biwei Huang,Charles Jia Han Low,Feng Xie,Clark Glymour,Kun Zhang
title: Latent Hierarchical Causal Structure Discovery with Rank Constraints
title_zh: 具有等级约束的潜在分层因果结构发现
abstract: Most causal discovery procedures assume that there are no latent confounders in the system, which is often violated in real-world problems. In this paper, we consider a challenging scenario for causal structure identification, where some variables are latent and they form a hierarchical graph structure to generate the measured variables; the children of latent variables may still be latent and only leaf nodes are measured, and moreover, there can be multiple paths between every pair of variables (i.e., it is beyond tree structure). We propose an estimation procedure that can efficiently locate latent variables, determine their cardinalities, and identify the latent hierarchical structure, by leveraging rank deficiency constraints over the measured variables. We show that the proposed algorithm can find the correct Markov equivalence class of the whole graph asymptotically under proper restrictions on the graph structure.
summary: Most causal discovery procedures assume that there are no latent confounders in the system, which is often violated in real-world problems. In this paper, we consider a challenging scenario for causal structure identification, where some variables are latent and they form a hierarchical graph structure to generate the measured variables; the children of latent variables may still be latent and only leaf nodes are measured, and moreover, there can be multiple paths between every pair of variables (i.e., it is beyond tree structure). We propose an estimation procedure that can efficiently locate latent variables, determine their cardinalities, and identify the latent hierarchical structure, by leveraging rank deficiency constraints over the measured variables. We show that the proposed algorithm can find the correct Markov equivalence class of the whole graph asymptotically under proper restrictions on the graph structure.
abstract_zh: 大多数因果发现过程都假设系统中不存在潜在的混杂因素，而这在现实世界的问题中经常被违反。在本文中，我们考虑了因果结构识别的一个具有挑战性的场景，其中一些变量是潜在的，它们形成层次图结构来生成测量变量；潜在变量的子代可能仍然是潜在的，并且仅测量叶节点，而且每对变量之间可以存在多条路径（即，它超出了树结构）。我们提出了一种估计程序，可以通过利用测量变量的排名缺陷约束来有效地定位潜在变量，确定其基数并识别潜在的层次结构。我们证明，在对图结构进行适当限制的情况下，所提出的算法可以渐近地找到整个图的正确马尔可夫等价类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在潜在变量的复杂因果结构中，如何通过秩约束发现分层因果关系。
AI.motivation: 传统因果发现方法假设无潜在混杂因素，但现实场景中潜在变量普遍存在且结构复杂，需处理分层与多路径等挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于观测变量秩不足约束的估计方法，通过分析变量间的线性依赖关系定位潜在变量并重建分层结构。
AI.result: 算法在满足结构限制条件下可渐近正确识别全局图的马尔可夫等价类，实现潜在分层因果结构的高效发现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为存在多层潜在变量和复杂路径依赖的因果推理提供了新思路与有效工具。

tldr: 本文研究在存在潜在变量的复杂因果结构中，如何通过秩约束发现分层因果关系。
motivation: 传统因果发现方法假设无潜在混杂因素，但现实场景中潜在变量普遍存在且结构复杂，需处理分层与多路径等挑战。
method: 提出基于观测变量秩不足约束的估计方法，通过分析变量间的线性依赖关系定位潜在变量并重建分层结构。
result: 算法在满足结构限制条件下可渐近正确识别全局图的马尔可夫等价类，实现潜在分层因果结构的高效发现。
conclusion: 该方法为存在多层潜在变量和复杂路径依赖的因果推理提供了新思路与有效工具。
search_text: Latent Hierarchical Causal Structure Discovery with Rank Constraints 具有等级约束的潜在分层因果结构发现 Most causal discovery procedures assume that there are no latent confounders in the system, which is often violated in real-world problems. In this paper, we consider a challenging scenario for causal structure identification, where some variables are latent and they form a hierarchical graph structure to generate the measured variables; the children of latent variables may still be latent and only leaf nodes are measured, and moreover, there can be multiple paths between every pair of variables (i.e., it is beyond tree structure). We propose an estimation procedure that can efficiently locate latent variables, determine their cardinalities, and identify the latent hierarchical structure, by leveraging rank deficiency constraints over the measured variables. We show that the proposed algorithm can find the correct Markov equivalence class of the whole graph asymptotically under proper restrictions on the graph structure. 大多数因果发现过程都假设系统中不存在潜在的混杂因素，而这在现实世界的问题中经常被违反。在本文中，我们考虑了因果结构识别的一个具有挑战性的场景，其中一些变量是潜在的，它们形成层次图结构来生成测量变量；潜在变量的子代可能仍然是潜在的，并且仅测量叶节点，而且每对变量之间可以存在多条路径（即，它超出了树结构）。我们提出了一种估计程序，可以通过利用测量变量的排名缺陷约束来有效地定位潜在变量，确定其基数并识别潜在的层次结构。我们证明，在对图结构进行适当限制的情况下，所提出的算法可以渐近地找到整个图的正确马尔可夫等价类。 本文研究在存在潜在变量的复杂因果结构中，如何通过秩约束发现分层因果关系。 Biwei Huang,Charles Jia Han Low,Feng Xie,Clark Glymour,Kun Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sanjay Chawla,Preslav Nakov,Ahmed Ali,Wendy Hall,Issa Khalil,Xiaosong Ma,Husrev Taha Sencar,Ingmar Weber,Michael Wooldridge,Ting Yu
title: Ten Years after ImageNet: A 360° Perspective on AI
title_zh: ImageNet 十年后：人工智能 360° 视角
abstract: It is ten years since neural networks made their spectacular comeback. Prompted by this anniversary, we take a holistic perspective on Artificial Intelligence (AI). Supervised Learning for cognitive tasks is effectively solved - provided we have enough high-quality labeled data. However, deep neural network models are not easily interpretable, and thus the debate between blackbox and whitebox modeling has come to the fore. The rise of attention networks, self-supervised learning, generative modeling, and graph neural networks has widened the application space of AI. Deep Learning has also propelled the return of reinforcement learning as a core building block of autonomous decision making systems. The possible harms made possible by new AI technologies have raised socio-technical issues such as transparency, fairness, and accountability. The dominance of AI by Big-Tech who control talent, computing resources, and most importantly, data may lead to an extreme AI divide. Failure to meet high expectations in high profile, and much heralded flagship projects like self-driving vehicles could trigger another AI winter.
summary: It is ten years since neural networks made their spectacular comeback. Prompted by this anniversary, we take a holistic perspective on Artificial Intelligence (AI). Supervised Learning for cognitive tasks is effectively solved - provided we have enough high-quality labeled data. However, deep neural network models are not easily interpretable, and thus the debate between blackbox and whitebox modeling has come to the fore. The rise of attention networks, self-supervised learning, generative modeling, and graph neural networks has widened the application space of AI. Deep Learning has also propelled the return of reinforcement learning as a core building block of autonomous decision making systems. The possible harms made possible by new AI technologies have raised socio-technical issues such as transparency, fairness, and accountability. The dominance of AI by Big-Tech who control talent, computing resources, and most importantly, data may lead to an extreme AI divide. Failure to meet high expectations in high profile, and much heralded flagship projects like self-driving vehicles could trigger another AI winter.
abstract_zh: 神经网络引人注目的卷土重来已有十年了。受此周年纪念的推动，我们对人工智能 (AI) 采取了全面的视角。认知任务的监督学习得到有效解决——只要我们有足够的高质量标记数据。然而，深度神经网络模型不容易解释，因此黑盒和白盒建模之间的争论已经成为焦点。注意力网络、自监督学习、生成模型和图神经网络的兴起拓宽了人工智能的应用空间。深度学习还推动了强化学习作为自主决策系统的核心构建模块的回归。新的人工智能技术可能造成的危害引发了透明度、公平性和问责制等社会技术问题。控制人才、计算资源，最重要的是数据的大型科技公司在人工智能领域的主导地位可能会导致人工智能的极端鸿沟。未能满足高调的高期望以及自动驾驶汽车等备受瞩目的旗舰项目可能会引发另一个人工智能冬天。

AI.tldr: 本文从ImageNet事件十周年出发，全面回顾人工智能的发展历程与现状，探讨其技术进展、挑战及社会影响。
AI.motivation: 在神经网络复兴十周年之际，系统梳理AI领域的发展成就与存在问题，为未来研究提供反思与方向。
AI.method: 通过综述深度学习、自监督学习、生成模型等技术演进，结合社会技术问题分析，采用多维度视角展开讨论。
AI.result: 揭示监督学习的数据依赖性、模型可解释性困境，以及技术垄断导致的AI鸿沟等关键挑战，预警高期待项目失败可能引发的AI寒冬。
AI.conclusion: AI发展需平衡技术创新与社会责任，避免技术垄断加剧不平等，同时需警惕过度承诺导致的信任危机。

authors_text: Shiyu Wang,Xiaojie Guo,Xuanyang Lin,Bo Pan,Yuanqi Du,Yinkai Wang,Yanfang Ye,Ashley Ann Petersen,Austin Leitgeb,Saleh AlKhalifa,Kevin Minbiole,William Wuest,Amarda Shehu,Liang Zhao
title: Multi-objective Deep Data Generation with Correlated Property Control
title_zh: 具有相关属性控制的多目标深度数据生成
comment: This paper has been accepted by NeurIPS 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Developing deep generative models has been an emerging field due to the ability to model and generate complex data for various purposes, such as image synthesis and molecular design. However, the advancement of deep generative models is limited by challenges to generate objects that possess multiple desired properties: 1) the existence of complex correlation among real-world properties is common but hard to identify; 2) controlling individual property enforces an implicit partially control of its correlated properties, which is difficult to model; 3) controlling multiple properties under various manners simultaneously is hard and under-explored. We address these challenges by proposing a novel deep generative framework that recovers semantics and the correlation of properties through disentangled latent vectors. The correlation is handled via an explainable mask pooling layer, and properties are precisely retained by generated objects via the mutual dependence between latent vectors and properties. Our generative model preserves properties of interest while handling correlation and conflicts of properties under a multi-objective optimization framework. The experiments demonstrate our model's superior performance in generating data with desired properties.
summary: Developing deep generative models has been an emerging field due to the ability to model and generate complex data for various purposes, such as image synthesis and molecular design. However, the advancement of deep generative models is limited by challenges to generate objects that possess multiple desired properties: 1) the existence of complex correlation among real-world properties is common but hard to identify; 2) controlling individual property enforces an implicit partially control of its correlated properties, which is difficult to model; 3) controlling multiple properties under various manners simultaneously is hard and under-explored. We address these challenges by proposing a novel deep generative framework that recovers semantics and the correlation of properties through disentangled latent vectors. The correlation is handled via an explainable mask pooling layer, and properties are precisely retained by generated objects via the mutual dependence between latent vectors and properties. Our generative model preserves properties of interest while handling correlation and conflicts of properties under a multi-objective optimization framework. The experiments demonstrate our model's superior performance in generating data with desired properties.
abstract_zh: 由于能够为各种目的（例如图像合成和分子设计）建模和生成复杂数据，开发深度生成模型已成为一个新兴领域。然而，深度生成模型的进步受到生成具有多种所需属性的对象的挑战的限制：1）现实世界属性之间存在复杂的相关性很常见，但难以识别； 2）控制单个属性会强制对其相关属性进行隐式部分控制，这很难建模； 3）以多种方式同时控制多个属性是困难的且尚未得到充分探索。我们通过提出一种新颖的深度生成框架来解决这些挑战，该框架通过解开的潜在向量来恢复语义和属性的相关性。相关性是通过可解释的掩模池层处理的，并且属性通过潜在向量和属性之间的相互依赖由生成的对象精确保留。我们的生成模型保留了感兴趣的属性，同时在多目标优化框架下处理属性的相关性和冲突。实验证明了我们的模型在生成具有所需属性的数据方面具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新型的深度生成框架，用于生成具有多种期望属性且属性间存在复杂相关性的数据。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型在生成具有多种期望属性的数据时面临挑战，如属性间的复杂相关性难以识别、控制单个属性会影响相关属性以及同时控制多个属性的方法尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 该论文通过解耦的潜在向量恢复语义和属性间的相关性，并使用可解释的掩码池化层处理相关性，通过潜在向量与属性之间的相互依赖性保留生成对象的属性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在生成具有期望属性的数据方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在多目标优化框架下能够有效处理属性相关性和冲突，从而生成具有所需属性的数据。

authors_text: Nanyang Ye,Jingbiao Mei,Zhicheng Fang,Yuwen Zhang,Ziqing Zhang,Huaying Wu,Xiaoyao Liang
title: BayesFT: Bayesian Optimization for Fault Tolerant Neural Network Architecture
title_zh: BayesFT：容错神经网络架构的贝叶斯优化
abstract: To deploy deep learning algorithms on resource-limited scenarios, an emerging device-resistive random access memory (ReRAM) has been regarded as promising via analog computing. However, the practicability of ReRAM is primarily limited due to the weight drifting of ReRAM neural networks due to multi-factor reasons, including manufacturing, thermal noises, and etc. In this paper, we propose a novel Bayesian optimization method for fault tolerant neural network architecture (BayesFT). For neural architecture search space design, instead of conducting neural architecture search on the whole feasible neural architecture search space, we first systematically explore the weight drifting tolerance of different neural network components, such as dropout, normalization, number of layers, and activation functions in which dropout is found to be able to improve the neural network robustness to weight drifting. Based on our analysis, we propose an efficient search space by only searching for dropout rates for each layer. Then, we use Bayesian optimization to search for the optimal neural architecture robust to weight drifting. Empirical experiments demonstrate that our algorithmic framework has outperformed the state-of-the-art methods by up to 10 times on various tasks, such as image classification and object detection.
summary: To deploy deep learning algorithms on resource-limited scenarios, an emerging device-resistive random access memory (ReRAM) has been regarded as promising via analog computing. However, the practicability of ReRAM is primarily limited due to the weight drifting of ReRAM neural networks due to multi-factor reasons, including manufacturing, thermal noises, and etc. In this paper, we propose a novel Bayesian optimization method for fault tolerant neural network architecture (BayesFT). For neural architecture search space design, instead of conducting neural architecture search on the whole feasible neural architecture search space, we first systematically explore the weight drifting tolerance of different neural network components, such as dropout, normalization, number of layers, and activation functions in which dropout is found to be able to improve the neural network robustness to weight drifting. Based on our analysis, we propose an efficient search space by only searching for dropout rates for each layer. Then, we use Bayesian optimization to search for the optimal neural architecture robust to weight drifting. Empirical experiments demonstrate that our algorithmic framework has outperformed the state-of-the-art methods by up to 10 times on various tasks, such as image classification and object detection.
abstract_zh: 为了在资源有限的场景中部署深度学习算法，新兴的设备电阻式随机存取存储器（ReRAM）通过模拟计算被认为是有前途的。然而，ReRAM 的实用性主要受到制造、热噪声等多种因素造成的 ReRAM 神经网络权重漂移的限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的容错神经网络架构贝叶斯优化方法（BayesFT）。对于神经架构搜索空间设计，我们不是在整个可行的神经架构搜索空间上进行神经架构搜索，而是首先系统地探索不同神经网络组件的权重漂移容忍度，例如dropout、归一化、层数和激活函数，其中发现dropout能够提高神经网络对权重漂移的鲁棒性。根据我们的分析，我们通过仅搜索每层的丢失率来提出一个有效的搜索空间。然后，我们使用贝叶斯优化来搜索对权重漂移具有鲁棒性的最佳神经架构。实证实验表明，我们的算法框架在图像分类和目标检测等各种任务上的性能比最先进的方法高出 10 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BayesFT方法，通过贝叶斯优化设计容错神经网络架构，解决ReRAM器件权重漂移问题。
AI.motivation: ReRAM在资源受限场景中具有潜力，但其权重漂移问题导致神经网络可靠性不足，现有方法未有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 分析不同网络组件对权重漂移的容忍度，构建以Dropout率为核心的高效搜索空间，并采用贝叶斯优化寻找最优容错架构。
AI.result: 在图像分类和目标检测任务中，算法性能较现有方法提升最高达10倍。
AI.conclusion: BayesFT通过针对性优化Dropout率显著提升网络鲁棒性，为ReRAM神经网络部署提供新思路。

authors_text: Arun Mallya,Ting-Chun Wang,Ming-Yu Liu
title: Implicit Warping for Animation with Image Sets
title_zh: 图像集动画的隐式变形
abstract: We present a new implicit warping framework for image animation using sets of source images through the transfer of the motion of a driving video. A single cross- modal attention layer is used to find correspondences between the source images and the driving image, choose the most appropriate features from different source images, and warp the selected features. This is in contrast to the existing methods that use explicit flow-based warping, which is designed for animation using a single source and does not extend well to multiple sources. The pick-and-choose capability of our framework helps it achieve state-of-the-art results on multiple datasets for image animation using both single and multiple source images. The project website is available at https://deepimagination.cc/implicit warping/
summary: We present a new implicit warping framework for image animation using sets of source images through the transfer of the motion of a driving video. A single cross- modal attention layer is used to find correspondences between the source images and the driving image, choose the most appropriate features from different source images, and warp the selected features. This is in contrast to the existing methods that use explicit flow-based warping, which is designed for animation using a single source and does not extend well to multiple sources. The pick-and-choose capability of our framework helps it achieve state-of-the-art results on multiple datasets for image animation using both single and multiple source images. The project website is available at https://deepimagination.cc/implicit warping/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的隐式变形框架，用于通过传输驾驶视频的运动来使用源图像集的图像动画。使用单个跨模态注意层来查找源图像和驾驶图像之间的对应关系，从不同的源图像中选择最合适的特征，并对所选特征进行扭曲。这与使用显式基于流的变形的现有方法形成对比，后者是为使用单个源的动画而设计的，并且不能很好地扩展到多个源。我们框架的选择功能有助于使用单个和多个源图像在多个数据集上实现图像动画的最先进结果。该项目网站位于 https://deepimagination.cc/implicit warping/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式变形的图像动画框架，通过驱动视频的运动转移实现多源图像集的动画生成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于显式流的变形方法仅适用于单源图像动画，难以扩展到多源图像场景，需更灵活的特征选择机制。
AI.method: 采用跨模态注意力层建立源图像与驱动图像的对应关系，动态选择多源图像的特征并进行隐式变形。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现单源和多源图像动画的最先进效果，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 隐式变形框架通过特征选择机制突破了传统方法的局限，在多源图像动画任务中表现优异。
