authors_text: Peyman Bateni,Leonid Sigal
title: Real-Time Monitoring of User Stress, Heart Rate and Heart Rate Variability on Mobile Devices
title_zh: 在移动设备上实时监测用户压力、心率和心率变异性
abstract: Stress is considered to be the epidemic of the 21st-century. Yet, mobile apps cannot directly evaluate the impact of their content and services on user stress. We introduce the Beam AI SDK to address this issue. Using our SDK, apps can monitor user stress through the selfie camera in real-time. Our technology extracts the user's pulse wave by analyzing subtle color variations across the skin regions of the user's face. The user's pulse wave is then used to determine stress (according to the Baevsky Stress Index), heart rate, and heart rate variability. We evaluate our technology on the UBFC dataset, the MMSE-HR dataset, and Beam AI's internal data. Our technology achieves 99.2%, 97.8% and 98.5% accuracy for heart rate estimation on each benchmark respectively, a nearly twice lower error rate than competing methods. We further demonstrate an average Pearson correlation of 0.801 in determining stress and heart rate variability, thus producing commercially useful readings to derive content decisions in apps. Our SDK is available for use at www.beamhealth.ai.
summary: Stress is considered to be the epidemic of the 21st-century. Yet, mobile apps cannot directly evaluate the impact of their content and services on user stress. We introduce the Beam AI SDK to address this issue. Using our SDK, apps can monitor user stress through the selfie camera in real-time. Our technology extracts the user's pulse wave by analyzing subtle color variations across the skin regions of the user's face. The user's pulse wave is then used to determine stress (according to the Baevsky Stress Index), heart rate, and heart rate variability. We evaluate our technology on the UBFC dataset, the MMSE-HR dataset, and Beam AI's internal data. Our technology achieves 99.2%, 97.8% and 98.5% accuracy for heart rate estimation on each benchmark respectively, a nearly twice lower error rate than competing methods. We further demonstrate an average Pearson correlation of 0.801 in determining stress and heart rate variability, thus producing commercially useful readings to derive content decisions in apps. Our SDK is available for use at www.beamhealth.ai.
abstract_zh: 压力被认为是21世纪的流行病。然而，移动应用程序无法直接评估其内容和服务对用户压力的影响。我们引入 Beam AI SDK 来解决这个问题。使用我们的 SDK，应用程序可以通过自拍相机实时监控用户压力。我们的技术通过分析用户面部皮肤区域的细微颜色变化来提取用户的脉搏波。然后，用户的脉搏波用于确定压力（根据 Baevsky 压力指数）、心率和心率变异性。我们在 UBFC 数据集、MMSE-HR 数据集和 Beam AI 的内部数据上评估我们的技术。我们的技术在每个基准上的心率估计准确度分别为 99.2%、97.8% 和 98.5%，比竞争方法的错误率低近两倍。我们进一步证明了在确定压力和心率变异性方面的平均皮尔逊相关性为 0.801，从而产生商业上有用的读数以得出应用程序中的内容决策。我们的 SDK 可在 www.beamhealth.ai 上使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过移动设备实时监测用户压力、心率和心率变异性（HRV）的技术，利用前置摄像头分析面部肤色变化提取脉搏波信号。
AI.motivation: 现有移动应用无法直接评估其内容和服务对用户压力的影响，需开发可实时监测生理指标的解决方案以优化应用体验。
AI.method: 通过Beam AI SDK分析用户面部皮肤区域的微小颜色变化，提取脉搏波信号，结合Baevsky压力指数计算压力水平、心率及HRV。
AI.result: 在UBFC、MMSE-HR数据集及内部数据上，心率估计准确率达99.2%/97.8%/98.5%，误差率较竞品降低近一半；压力与HRV判定的皮尔逊相关系数达0.801。
AI.conclusion: 该技术可生成商业可用的生理指标数据，助力应用优化内容策略，SDK已开放获取。

The user's pulse wave is then used to determine stress (according to the Baevsky Stress Index), heart rate, and heart rate variability. We evaluate our technology on the UBFC dataset, the MMSE-HR dataset, and Beam AI's internal data. Our technology achieves 99.2%, 97.8% and 98.5% accuracy for heart rate estimation on each benchmark respectively, a nearly twice lower error rate than competing methods. We further demonstrate an average Pearson correlation of 0.801 in determining stress and heart rate variability, thus producing commercially useful readings to derive content decisions in apps. Our SDK is available for use at www.beamhealth.ai. 压力被认为是21世纪的流行病。然而，移动应用程序无法直接评估其内容和服务对用户压力的影响。我们引入 Beam AI SDK 来解决这个问题。使用我们的 SDK，应用程序可以通过自拍相机实时监控用户压力。我们的技术通过分析用户面部皮肤区域的细微颜色变化来提取用户的脉搏波。然后，用户的脉搏波用于确定压力（根据 Baevsky 压力指数）、心率和心率变异性。我们在 UBFC 数据集、MMSE-HR 数据集和 Beam AI 的内部数据上评估我们的技术。我们的技术在每个基准上的心率估计准确度分别为 99.2%、97.8% 和 98.5%，比竞争方法的错误率低近两倍。我们进一步证明了在确定压力和心率变异性方面的平均皮尔逊相关性为 0.801，从而产生商业上有用的读数以得出应用程序中的内容决策。我们的 SDK 可在 www.beamhealth.ai 上使用。 本文提出一种通过移动设备实时监测用户压力、心率和心率变异性（HRV）的技术，利用前置摄像头分析面部肤色变化提取脉搏波信号。 Peyman Bateni,Leonid Sigal cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Bohang Zhang,Du Jiang,Di He,Liwei Wang
title: Rethinking Lipschitz Neural Networks and Certified Robustness: A Boolean Function Perspective
title_zh: 重新思考 Lipschitz 神经网络和认证的鲁棒性：布尔函数的视角
abstract: Designing neural networks with bounded Lipschitz constant is a promising way to obtain certifiably robust classifiers against adversarial examples. However, the relevant progress for the important $\ell_\infty$ perturbation setting is rather limited, and a principled understanding of how to design expressive $\ell_\infty$ Lipschitz networks is still lacking. In this paper, we bridge the gap by studying certified $\ell_\infty$ robustness from a novel perspective of representing Boolean functions. We derive two fundamental impossibility results that hold for any standard Lipschitz network: one for robust classification on finite datasets, and the other for Lipschitz function approximation. These results identify that networks built upon norm-bounded affine layers and Lipschitz activations intrinsically lose expressive power even in the two-dimensional case, and shed light on how recently proposed Lipschitz networks (e.g., GroupSort and $\ell_\infty$-distance nets) bypass these impossibilities by leveraging order statistic functions. Finally, based on these insights, we develop a unified Lipschitz network that generalizes prior works, and design a practical version that can be efficiently trained (making certified robust training free). Extensive experiments show that our approach is scalable, efficient, and consistently yields better certified robustness across multiple datasets and perturbation radii than prior Lipschitz networks. Our code is available at https://github.com/zbh2047/SortNet.
summary: Designing neural networks with bounded Lipschitz constant is a promising way to obtain certifiably robust classifiers against adversarial examples. However, the relevant progress for the important $\ell_\infty$ perturbation setting is rather limited, and a principled understanding of how to design expressive $\ell_\infty$ Lipschitz networks is still lacking. In this paper, we bridge the gap by studying certified $\ell_\infty$ robustness from a novel perspective of representing Boolean functions. We derive two fundamental impossibility results that hold for any standard Lipschitz network: one for robust classification on finite datasets, and the other for Lipschitz function approximation. These results identify that networks built upon norm-bounded affine layers and Lipschitz activations intrinsically lose expressive power even in the two-dimensional case, and shed light on how recently proposed Lipschitz networks (e.g., GroupSort and $\ell_\infty$-distance nets) bypass these impossibilities by leveraging order statistic functions. Finally, based on these insights, we develop a unified Lipschitz network that generalizes prior works, and design a practical version that can be efficiently trained (making certified robust training free). Extensive experiments show that our approach is scalable, efficient, and consistently yields better certified robustness across multiple datasets and perturbation radii than prior Lipschitz networks. Our code is available at https://github.com/zbh2047/SortNet.
abstract_zh: 设计具有有界 Lipschitz 常数的神经网络是一种很有前途的方法，可以针对对抗性示例获得可证明稳健的分类器。然而，重要的$\ell_\infty$扰动设置的相关进展相当有限，并且仍然缺乏对如何设计富有表现力的$\ell_\infty$Lipschitz网络的原则性理解。在本文中，我们从表示布尔函数的新角度研究经过认证的 $\ell_\infty$ 鲁棒性，从而弥补了这一差距。我们得出了两个适用于任何标准 Lipschitz 网络的基本不可能结果：一个用于有限数据集上的鲁棒分类，另一个用于 Lipschitz 函数逼近。这些结果表明，即使在二维情况下，基于范数有界仿射层和 Lipschitz 激活构建的网络本质上也会失去表达能力，并揭示了最近提出的 Lipschitz 网络（例如 GroupSort 和 $\ell_\infty$-距离网络）如何通过利用顺序统计函数绕过这些不可能性。最后，基于这些见解，我们开发了一个统一的 Lipschitz 网络，该网络概括了先前的工作，并设计了一个可以有效训练的实用版本（使经过认证的稳健训练免费）。大量实验表明，我们的方法具有可扩展性、高效性，并且与之前的 Lipschitz 网络相比，在多个数据集和扰动半径上始终能产生更好的经过认证的鲁棒性。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/zbh2047/SortNet。

AI.tldr: 本文从布尔函数视角重新研究利普希茨神经网络的认证鲁棒性，提出统一框架并设计高效可训练的网络结构。
AI.motivation: 现有利普希茨网络在ℓ∞扰动下的鲁棒性研究进展有限，缺乏对表达性网络设计的原则性理解，传统方法存在表达能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过布尔函数表示理论推导两个不可能性结论，揭示标准利普希茨网络的局限性，并基于排序统计量函数设计统一的利普希茨网络框架SortNet。
AI.result: 实验表明SortNet在多个数据集和扰动半径下均优于现有方法，实现可扩展的高效认证鲁棒训练。
AI.conclusion: 从布尔函数视角揭示了利普希茨网络的本质限制，提出的新框架有效解决了表达能力与鲁棒性的矛盾，推动了认证鲁棒性的实际应用。

authors_text: Rong Li,Anh-Quan Cao,Raoul de Charette
title: COARSE3D: Class-Prototypes for Contrastive Learning in Weakly-Supervised 3D Point Cloud Segmentation
title_zh: COARSE3D：弱监督 3D 点云分割中对比学习的类原型
abstract: Annotation of large-scale 3D data is notoriously cumbersome and costly. As an alternative, weakly-supervised learning alleviates such a need by reducing the annotation by several order of magnitudes. We propose COARSE3D, a novel architecture-agnostic contrastive learning strategy for 3D segmentation. Since contrastive learning requires rich and diverse examples as keys and anchors, we leverage a prototype memory bank capturing class-wise global dataset information efficiently into a small number of prototypes acting as keys. An entropy-driven sampling technique then allows us to select good pixels from predictions as anchors. Experiments on three projection-based backbones show we outperform baselines on three challenging real-world outdoor datasets, working with as low as 0.001% annotations.
summary: Annotation of large-scale 3D data is notoriously cumbersome and costly. As an alternative, weakly-supervised learning alleviates such a need by reducing the annotation by several order of magnitudes. We propose COARSE3D, a novel architecture-agnostic contrastive learning strategy for 3D segmentation. Since contrastive learning requires rich and diverse examples as keys and anchors, we leverage a prototype memory bank capturing class-wise global dataset information efficiently into a small number of prototypes acting as keys. An entropy-driven sampling technique then allows us to select good pixels from predictions as anchors. Experiments on three projection-based backbones show we outperform baselines on three challenging real-world outdoor datasets, working with as low as 0.001% annotations.
abstract_zh: 大规模 3D 数据的注释非常麻烦且成本高昂。作为替代方案，弱监督学习通过将注释减少几个数量级来缓解这种需求。我们提出了 COARSE3D，一种新颖的与架构无关的 3D 分割对比学习策略。由于对比学习需要丰富多样的示例作为键和锚，因此我们利用原型内存库将按类别的全局数据集信息有效地捕获到充当键的少量原型中。然后，熵驱动的采样技术允许我们从预测中选择好的像素作为锚点。对三个基于投影的主干网的实验表明，我们在三个具有挑战性的现实世界户外数据集上的表现优于基线，并且使用低至 0.001% 的注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COARSE3D方法，通过对比学习实现弱监督下的3D点云分割，显著减少标注需求。
AI.motivation: 大规模3D数据标注成本高昂，传统弱监督方法难以满足对比学习对多样化样本的需求。
AI.method: 构建类原型内存库作为对比学习的键，结合熵驱动采样策略生成锚点，实现高效训练。
AI.result: 在三个室外数据集上以0.001%标注量超越基线方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: COARSE3D通过原型记忆与动态采样机制，为低标注成本的3D分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Boxiao Pan,Bokui Shen,Davis Rempe,Despoina Paschalidou,Kaichun Mo,Yanchao Yang,Leonidas J. Guibas
title: COPILOT: Human-Environment Collision Prediction and Localization from Egocentric Videos
title_zh: COPILOT：基于自我中心视频的人类环境碰撞预测和定位
abstract: The ability to forecast human-environment collisions from egocentric observations is vital to enable collision avoidance in applications such as VR, AR, and wearable assistive robotics. In this work, we introduce the challenging problem of predicting collisions in diverse environments from multi-view egocentric videos captured from body-mounted cameras. Solving this problem requires a generalizable perception system that can classify which human body joints will collide and estimate a collision region heatmap to localize collisions in the environment. To achieve this, we propose a transformer-based model called COPILOT to perform collision prediction and localization simultaneously, which accumulates information across multi-view inputs through a novel 4D space-time-viewpoint attention mechanism. To train our model and enable future research on this task, we develop a synthetic data generation framework that produces egocentric videos of virtual humans moving and colliding within diverse 3D environments. This framework is then used to establish a large-scale dataset consisting of 8.6M egocentric RGBD frames. Extensive experiments show that COPILOT generalizes to unseen synthetic as well as real-world scenes. We further demonstrate COPILOT outputs are useful for downstream collision avoidance through simple closed-loop control. Please visit our project webpage at https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/copilot.
summary: The ability to forecast human-environment collisions from egocentric observations is vital to enable collision avoidance in applications such as VR, AR, and wearable assistive robotics. In this work, we introduce the challenging problem of predicting collisions in diverse environments from multi-view egocentric videos captured from body-mounted cameras. Solving this problem requires a generalizable perception system that can classify which human body joints will collide and estimate a collision region heatmap to localize collisions in the environment. To achieve this, we propose a transformer-based model called COPILOT to perform collision prediction and localization simultaneously, which accumulates information across multi-view inputs through a novel 4D space-time-viewpoint attention mechanism. To train our model and enable future research on this task, we develop a synthetic data generation framework that produces egocentric videos of virtual humans moving and colliding within diverse 3D environments. This framework is then used to establish a large-scale dataset consisting of 8.6M egocentric RGBD frames. Extensive experiments show that COPILOT generalizes to unseen synthetic as well as real-world scenes. We further demonstrate COPILOT outputs are useful for downstream collision avoidance through simple closed-loop control. Please visit our project webpage at https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/copilot.
abstract_zh: 通过以自我为中心的观察来预测人类与环境碰撞的能力对于在 VR、AR 和可穿戴辅助机器人等应用中避免碰撞至关重要。在这项工作中，我们介绍了从随身摄像机捕获的多视图自我中心视频中预测不同环境中碰撞的挑战性问题。解决这个问题需要一个通用的感知系统，该系统可以对哪些人体关节将发生碰撞进行分类，并估计碰撞区域热图以定位环境中的碰撞。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种名为 COPILOT 的基于 Transformer 的模型，可以同时执行碰撞预测和定位，该模型通过新颖的 4D 时空视点注意机制跨多视图输入积累信息。为了训练我们的模型并支持未来对该任务的研究，我们开发了一个合成数据生成框架，该框架可以生成虚拟人在不同 3D 环境中移动和碰撞的以自我为中心的视频。然后使用该框架建立由 860 万个以自我为中心的 RGBD 帧组成的大规模数据集。大量实验表明，COPILOT 可以推广到看不见的合成场景和现实世界场景。我们进一步证明 COPILOT 输出可通过简单的闭环控制来避免下游碰撞。请访问我们的项目网页：https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/copilot。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COPILOT模型，通过第一视角视频预测和定位人体与环境的碰撞，用于VR、AR及可穿戴机器人等场景的防撞应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在多样化的环境中准确预测人体与环境的碰撞，需开发通用感知系统以实现安全的碰撞规避。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构设计COPILOT模型，结合多视角输入的4D时空视角注意力机制，同时预测碰撞分类及热力图定位，并构建包含860万RGBD帧的合成数据集。
AI.result: COPILOT在未见过的合成及真实场景中均表现良好，其输出可有效支持下游防撞控制任务。
AI.conclusion: COPILOT为碰撞预测与定位提供了通用解决方案，并通过大规模数据集推动相关研究发展。

search_text: COPILOT: Human-Environment Collision Prediction and Localization from Egocentric Videos COPILOT：基于自我中心视频的人类环境碰撞预测和定位 The ability to forecast human-environment collisions from egocentric observations is vital to enable collision avoidance in applications such as VR, AR, and wearable assistive robotics. In this work, we introduce the challenging problem of predicting collisions in diverse environments from multi-view egocentric videos captured from body-mounted cameras. Solving this problem requires a generalizable perception system that can classify which human body joints will collide and estimate a collision region heatmap to localize collisions in the environment. To achieve this, we propose a transformer-based model called COPILOT to perform collision prediction and localization simultaneously, which accumulates information across multi-view inputs through a novel 4D space-time-viewpoint attention mechanism. To train our model and enable future research on this task, we develop a synthetic data generation framework that produces egocentric videos of virtual humans moving and colliding within diverse 3D environments. This framework is then used to establish a large-scale dataset consisting of 8.6M egocentric RGBD frames. Extensive experiments show that COPILOT generalizes to unseen synthetic as well as real-world scenes. We further demonstrate COPILOT outputs are useful for downstream collision avoidance through simple closed-loop control. Please visit our project webpage at https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/copilot. 通过以自我为中心的观察来预测人类与环境碰撞的能力对于在 VR、AR 和可穿戴辅助机器人等应用中避免碰撞至关重要。在这项工作中，我们介绍了从随身摄像机捕获的多视图自我中心视频中预测不同环境中碰撞的挑战性问题。解决这个问题需要一个通用的感知系统，该系统可以对哪些人体关节将发生碰撞进行分类，并估计碰撞区域热图以定位环境中的碰撞。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种名为 COPILOT 的基于 Transformer 的模型，可以同时执行碰撞预测和定位，该模型通过新颖的 4D 时空视点注意机制跨多视图输入积累信息。为了训练我们的模型并支持未来对该任务的研究，我们开发了一个合成数据生成框架，该框架可以生成虚拟人在不同 3D 环境中移动和碰撞的以自我为中心的视频。然后使用该框架建立由 860 万个以自我为中心的 RGBD 帧组成的大规模数据集。大量实验表明，COPILOT 可以推广到看不见的合成场景和现实世界场景。我们进一步证明 COPILOT 输出可通过简单的闭环控制来避免下游碰撞。请访问我们的项目网页：https://sites.google.com/stanford.edu/copilot。 本文提出COPILOT模型，通过第一视角视频预测和定位人体与环境的碰撞，用于VR、AR及可穿戴机器人等场景的防撞应用。 Boxiao Pan,Bokui Shen,Davis Rempe,Despoina Paschalidou,Kaichun Mo,Yanchao Yang,Leonidas J. Guibas cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Krzysztof Lis,Sina Honari,Pascal Fua,Mathieu Salzmann
title: Perspective Aware Road Obstacle Detection
title_zh: 透视感知道路障碍物检测
abstract: While road obstacle detection techniques have become increasingly effective, they typically ignore the fact that, in practice, the apparent size of the obstacles decreases as their distance to the vehicle increases. In this paper, we account for this by computing a scale map encoding the apparent size of a hypothetical object at every image location. We then leverage this perspective map to (i) generate training data by injecting onto the road synthetic objects whose size corresponds to the perspective foreshortening; and (ii) incorporate perspective information in the decoding part of the detection network to guide the obstacle detector. Our results on standard benchmarks show that, together, these two strategies significantly boost the obstacle detection performance, allowing our approach to consistently outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of instance-level obstacle detection.
summary: While road obstacle detection techniques have become increasingly effective, they typically ignore the fact that, in practice, the apparent size of the obstacles decreases as their distance to the vehicle increases. In this paper, we account for this by computing a scale map encoding the apparent size of a hypothetical object at every image location. We then leverage this perspective map to (i) generate training data by injecting onto the road synthetic objects whose size corresponds to the perspective foreshortening; and (ii) incorporate perspective information in the decoding part of the detection network to guide the obstacle detector. Our results on standard benchmarks show that, together, these two strategies significantly boost the obstacle detection performance, allowing our approach to consistently outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of instance-level obstacle detection.
abstract_zh: 虽然道路障碍物检测技术变得越来越有效，但它们通常忽略了这样一个事实：在实践中，障碍物的外观尺寸随着它们与车辆的距离的增加而减小。在本文中，我们通过计算比例图来解释这一点，该比例图对每个图像位置处的假设对象的表观尺寸进行编码。然后，我们利用这个透视图（i）通过将其大小对应于透视缩短的道路合成对象注入来生成训练数据； (ii) 将视角信息纳入检测网络的解码部分以引导障碍物检测器。我们在标准基准上的结果表明，这两种策略一起显着提高了障碍物检测性能，使我们的方法在实例级障碍物检测方面始终优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视角感知的路面障碍物检测方法，通过引入尺度图和视角信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有障碍物检测技术未考虑障碍物视大小随距离变化的特性，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 计算尺度图编码物体视大小，生成符合透视缩短的合成训练数据，并在检测网络解码阶段融入视角信息。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中显著提升障碍物检测性能，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 视角信息的有效利用能显著提升路面障碍物检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Dawid Przyczyna,Konrad Szacilowski,Alessandro Chiolerio,Andrew Adamatzky
title: Electrical frequency discrimination by fungi Pleurotus ostreatus
title_zh: 平菇真菌的电频率歧视
abstract: We stimulate mycelian networks of oyster fungi Pleurotus ostreatus with low frequency sinusoidal electrical signals. We demonstrate that the fungal networks can discriminate between frequencies in a fuzzy or threshold based manner. Details about the mixing of frequencies by the mycelium networks are provided. The results advance the novel field of fungal electronics and pave ground for the design of living, fully recyclable, electron devices.
summary: We stimulate mycelian networks of oyster fungi Pleurotus ostreatus with low frequency sinusoidal electrical signals. We demonstrate that the fungal networks can discriminate between frequencies in a fuzzy or threshold based manner. Details about the mixing of frequencies by the mycelium networks are provided. The results advance the novel field of fungal electronics and pave ground for the design of living, fully recyclable, electron devices.
abstract_zh: 我们用低频正弦电信号刺激牡蛎真菌平菇的菌丝体网络。我们证明真菌网络可以以模糊或基于阈值的方式区分频率。提供了有关菌丝体网络频率混合的详细信息。研究结果推进了真菌电子学的新领域，并为设计有生命的、完全可回收的电子设备奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了通过低频正弦电信号刺激平菇菌丝网络，展示其能够以模糊或阈值方式区分频率。
AI.motivation: 该研究旨在探索真菌在电子学领域的潜力，推动可完全回收的生物电子设备设计。
AI.method: 研究人员使用低频正弦电信号刺激平菇菌丝网络，并观察其对不同频率的反应。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，菌丝网络能够以模糊或阈值方式区分频率，并提供了关于频率混合的细节。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推进了真菌电子学这一新兴领域，为设计可完全回收的生物电子设备奠定了基础。

authors_text: Hui Niu,Siyuan Li,Jian Li
title: MetaTrader: An Reinforcement Learning Approach Integrating Diverse Policies for Portfolio Optimization
title_zh: MetaTrader：一种整合多种策略进行投资组合优化的强化学习方法
abstract: Portfolio management is a fundamental problem in finance. It involves periodic reallocations of assets to maximize the expected returns within an appropriate level of risk exposure. Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been considered a promising approach to solving this problem owing to its strong capability in sequential decision making. However, due to the non-stationary nature of financial markets, applying RL techniques to portfolio optimization remains a challenging problem. Extracting trading knowledge from various expert strategies could be helpful for agents to accommodate the changing markets. In this paper, we propose MetaTrader, a novel two-stage RL-based approach for portfolio management, which learns to integrate diverse trading policies to adapt to various market conditions. In the first stage, MetaTrader incorporates an imitation learning objective into the reinforcement learning framework. Through imitating different expert demonstrations, MetaTrader acquires a set of trading policies with great diversity. In the second stage, MetaTrader learns a meta-policy to recognize the market conditions and decide on the most proper learned policy to follow. We evaluate the proposed approach on three real-world index datasets and compare it to state-of-the-art baselines. The empirical results demonstrate that MetaTrader significantly outperforms those baselines in balancing profits and risks. Furthermore, thorough ablation studies validate the effectiveness of the components in the proposed approach.
summary: Portfolio management is a fundamental problem in finance. It involves periodic reallocations of assets to maximize the expected returns within an appropriate level of risk exposure. Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been considered a promising approach to solving this problem owing to its strong capability in sequential decision making. However, due to the non-stationary nature of financial markets, applying RL techniques to portfolio optimization remains a challenging problem. Extracting trading knowledge from various expert strategies could be helpful for agents to accommodate the changing markets. In this paper, we propose MetaTrader, a novel two-stage RL-based approach for portfolio management, which learns to integrate diverse trading policies to adapt to various market conditions. In the first stage, MetaTrader incorporates an imitation learning objective into the reinforcement learning framework. Through imitating different expert demonstrations, MetaTrader acquires a set of trading policies with great diversity. In the second stage, MetaTrader learns a meta-policy to recognize the market conditions and decide on the most proper learned policy to follow. We evaluate the proposed approach on three real-world index datasets and compare it to state-of-the-art baselines. The empirical results demonstrate that MetaTrader significantly outperforms those baselines in balancing profits and risks. Furthermore, thorough ablation studies validate the effectiveness of the components in the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 投资组合管理是金融领域的一个基本问题。它涉及定期重新配置资产，以在适当的风险暴露水平内最大化预期回报。深度强化学习（RL）因其强大的顺序决策能力而被认为是解决该问题的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于金融市场的非平稳性质，将强化学习技术应用于投资组合优化仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。从各种专家策略中提取交易知识可能有助于代理商适应不断变化的市场。在本文中，我们提出了 MetaTrader，一种基于强化学习的新型两阶段投资组合管理方法，它学习整合不同的交易策略以适应不同的市场条件。在第一阶段，MetaTrader 将模仿学习目标纳入强化学习框架中。通过模仿不同专家的演示，MetaTrader获得了一套千差万别的交易策略。在第二阶段，MetaTrader 学习元策略来识别市场状况并决定遵循最合适的学习策略。我们在三个现实世界索引数据集上评估所提出的方法，并将其与最先进的基线进行比较。实证结果表明，MetaTrader 在平衡利润和风险方面显着优于这些基线。此外，彻底的消融研究验证了所提出方法中各组成部分的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的MetaTrader方法，通过整合多样化交易策略解决投资组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 金融市场的非平稳性使传统强化学习在投资组合优化中效果有限，需通过整合专家策略提升适应性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段通过模仿学习获取多样化交易策略，第二阶段学习元策略以识别市场状态并选择最优策略。
AI.result: 在三个真实指数数据集上显著优于现有基线方法，在收益与风险平衡方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: MetaTrader通过整合多样化策略有效提升了投资组合管理的适应性与收益风险平衡能力。

authors_text: Sikun Lin,Thomas Sprague,Ambuj K Singh
title: Mind Reader: Reconstructing complex images from brain activities
title_zh: 读心术：根据大脑活动重建复杂图像
abstract: Understanding how the brain encodes external stimuli and how these stimuli can be decoded from the measured brain activities are long-standing and challenging questions in neuroscience. In this paper, we focus on reconstructing the complex image stimuli from fMRI (functional magnetic resonance imaging) signals. Unlike previous works that reconstruct images with single objects or simple shapes, our work aims to reconstruct image stimuli that are rich in semantics, closer to everyday scenes, and can reveal more perspectives. However, data scarcity of fMRI datasets is the main obstacle to applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to this problem. We find that incorporating an additional text modality is beneficial for the reconstruction problem compared to directly translating brain signals to images. Therefore, the modalities involved in our method are: (i) voxel-level fMRI signals, (ii) observed images that trigger the brain signals, and (iii) textual description of the images. To further address data scarcity, we leverage an aligned vision-language latent space pre-trained on massive datasets. Instead of training models from scratch to find a latent space shared by the three modalities, we encode fMRI signals into this pre-aligned latent space. Then, conditioned on embeddings in this space, we reconstruct images with a generative model. The reconstructed images from our pipeline balance both naturalness and fidelity: they are photo-realistic and capture the ground truth image contents well.
summary: Understanding how the brain encodes external stimuli and how these stimuli can be decoded from the measured brain activities are long-standing and challenging questions in neuroscience. In this paper, we focus on reconstructing the complex image stimuli from fMRI (functional magnetic resonance imaging) signals. Unlike previous works that reconstruct images with single objects or simple shapes, our work aims to reconstruct image stimuli that are rich in semantics, closer to everyday scenes, and can reveal more perspectives. However, data scarcity of fMRI datasets is the main obstacle to applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to this problem. We find that incorporating an additional text modality is beneficial for the reconstruction problem compared to directly translating brain signals to images. Therefore, the modalities involved in our method are: (i) voxel-level fMRI signals, (ii) observed images that trigger the brain signals, and (iii) textual description of the images. To further address data scarcity, we leverage an aligned vision-language latent space pre-trained on massive datasets. Instead of training models from scratch to find a latent space shared by the three modalities, we encode fMRI signals into this pre-aligned latent space. Then, conditioned on embeddings in this space, we reconstruct images with a generative model. The reconstructed images from our pipeline balance both naturalness and fidelity: they are photo-realistic and capture the ground truth image contents well.
abstract_zh: 了解大脑如何编码外部刺激以及如何从测量的大脑活动中解码这些刺激是神经科学中长期存在且具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们重点关注从 fMRI（功能磁共振成像）信号重建复杂的图像刺激。与之前用单个物体或简单形状重建图像的作品不同，我们的工作旨在重建语义丰富、更接近日常场景、能够揭示更多视角的图像刺激。然而，功能磁共振成像数据集的数据稀缺是将最先进的深度学习模型应用于该问题的主要障碍。我们发现，与直接将大脑信号转换为图像相比，结合额外的文本模式有利于重建问题。因此，我们的方法涉及的模式是：（i）体素级功能磁共振成像信号，（ii）触发大脑信号的观察图像，以及（iii）图像的文本描述。为了进一步解决数据稀缺问题，我们利用在海量数据集上预先训练的对齐视觉语言潜在空间。我们不是从头开始训练模型来找到三种模态共享的潜在空间，而是将 fMRI 信号编码到这个预先对齐的潜在空间中。然后，根据该空间中的嵌入，我们使用生成模型重建图像。我们管道中的重建图像平衡了自然性和保真度：它们非常逼真，并且很好地捕捉了地面真实图像内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从fMRI脑活动信号中重建语义丰富的复杂图像的方法。
AI.motivation: 解决fMRI数据稀缺问题并提升图像语义还原度，突破传统单一物体重建的局限性。
AI.method: 融合fMRI信号、目标图像和文本描述三模态数据，利用预训练视觉-语言潜在空间进行编码与生成重建。
AI.result: 生成的图像兼具真实感与内容保真度，可准确还原目标场景的语义信息。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合与预训练表征学习有效缓解数据稀缺问题，为脑信号解码提供新思路。

authors_text: James C. R. Whittington,Will Dorrell,Surya Ganguli,Timothy E. J. Behrens
title: Disentanglement with Biological Constraints: A Theory of Functional Cell Types
title_zh: 摆脱生物限制：功能细胞类型理论
abstract: Neurons in the brain are often finely tuned for specific task variables. Moreover, such disentangled representations are highly sought after in machine learning. Here we mathematically prove that simple biological constraints on neurons, namely nonnegativity and energy efficiency in both activity and weights, promote such sought after disentangled representations by enforcing neurons to become selective for single factors of task variation. We demonstrate these constraints lead to disentanglement in a variety of tasks and architectures, including variational autoencoders. We also use this theory to explain why the brain partitions its cells into distinct cell types such as grid and object-vector cells, and also explain when the brain instead entangles representations in response to entangled task factors. Overall, this work provides a mathematical understanding of why single neurons in the brain often represent single human-interpretable factors, and steps towards an understanding task structure shapes the structure of brain representation.
summary: Neurons in the brain are often finely tuned for specific task variables. Moreover, such disentangled representations are highly sought after in machine learning. Here we mathematically prove that simple biological constraints on neurons, namely nonnegativity and energy efficiency in both activity and weights, promote such sought after disentangled representations by enforcing neurons to become selective for single factors of task variation. We demonstrate these constraints lead to disentanglement in a variety of tasks and architectures, including variational autoencoders. We also use this theory to explain why the brain partitions its cells into distinct cell types such as grid and object-vector cells, and also explain when the brain instead entangles representations in response to entangled task factors. Overall, this work provides a mathematical understanding of why single neurons in the brain often represent single human-interpretable factors, and steps towards an understanding task structure shapes the structure of brain representation.
abstract_zh: 大脑中的神经元通常针对特定的任务变量进行微调。此外，这种解开的表示在机器学习中受到高度追捧。在这里，我们从数学上证明了对神经元的简单生物约束，即活动和权重的非负性和能量效率，通过强制神经元对任务变化的单一因素具有选择性，促进了这种受追捧的解缠结表示。我们证明这些约束会导致各种任务和架构（包括变分自动编码器）的解缠结。我们还使用这个理论来解释为什么大脑将其细胞划分为不同的细胞类型，例如网格和对象向量细胞，并解释大脑何时会为了响应纠缠的任务因素而纠缠表征。总的来说，这项工作提供了对为什么大脑中的单个神经元通常代表单个人类可解释因素的数学理解，以及理解任务结构的步骤塑造了大脑表征的结构。

AI.tldr: 探讨生物约束如何促进神经元解耦表示，并解释大脑细胞类型划分的理论
AI.motivation: 解释大脑神经元为何能表征单一任务变量，并解决机器学习中解耦表示的难题
AI.method: 通过数学证明生物约束（非负性、能量效率）促进解耦，并在多种任务和架构（如VAE）中验证
AI.result: 证明生物约束导致解耦表示，解释了大脑细胞类型划分及任务因素耦合的条件
AI.conclusion: 揭示了神经元单因素表征的数学原理，并阐明任务结构如何塑造大脑表示结构

motivation: 解释大脑神经元为何能表征单一任务变量，并解决机器学习中解耦表示的难题
method: 通过数学证明生物约束（非负性、能量效率）促进解耦，并在多种任务和架构（如VAE）中验证
result: 证明生物约束导致解耦表示，解释了大脑细胞类型划分及任务因素耦合的条件
conclusion: 揭示了神经元单因素表征的数学原理，并阐明任务结构如何塑造大脑表示结构
search_text: Disentanglement with Biological Constraints: A Theory of Functional Cell Types 摆脱生物限制：功能细胞类型理论 Neurons in the brain are often finely tuned for specific task variables. Moreover, such disentangled representations are highly sought after in machine learning. Here we mathematically prove that simple biological constraints on neurons, namely nonnegativity and energy efficiency in both activity and weights, promote such sought after disentangled representations by enforcing neurons to become selective for single factors of task variation. We demonstrate these constraints lead to disentanglement in a variety of tasks and architectures, including variational autoencoders. We also use this theory to explain why the brain partitions its cells into distinct cell types such as grid and object-vector cells, and also explain when the brain instead entangles representations in response to entangled task factors. Overall, this work provides a mathematical understanding of why single neurons in the brain often represent single human-interpretable factors, and steps towards an understanding task structure shapes the structure of brain representation. 大脑中的神经元通常针对特定的任务变量进行微调。此外，这种解开的表示在机器学习中受到高度追捧。在这里，我们从数学上证明了对神经元的简单生物约束，即活动和权重的非负性和能量效率，通过强制神经元对任务变化的单一因素具有选择性，促进了这种受追捧的解缠结表示。我们证明这些约束会导致各种任务和架构（包括变分自动编码器）的解缠结。我们还使用这个理论来解释为什么大脑将其细胞划分为不同的细胞类型，例如网格和对象向量细胞，并解释大脑何时会为了响应纠缠的任务因素而纠缠表征。总的来说，这项工作提供了对为什么大脑中的单个神经元通常代表单个人类可解释因素的数学理解，以及理解任务结构的步骤塑造了大脑表征的结构。 探讨生物约束如何促进神经元解耦表示，并解释大脑细胞类型划分的理论 James C. R. Whittington,Will Dorrell,Surya Ganguli,Timothy E. J. Behrens q-bio.NC,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Long Le,Yao Li
title: Supervised Parameter Estimation of Neuron Populations from Multiple Firing Events
title_zh: 来自多个放电事件的神经元群的监督参数估计
abstract: The firing dynamics of biological neurons in mathematical models is often determined by the model's parameters, representing the neurons' underlying properties. The parameter estimation problem seeks to recover those parameters of a single neuron or a neuron population from their responses to external stimuli and interactions between themselves. Most common methods for tackling this problem in the literature use some mechanistic models in conjunction with either a simulation-based or solution-based optimization scheme. In this paper, we study an automatic approach of learning the parameters of neuron populations from a training set consisting of pairs of spiking series and parameter labels via supervised learning. Unlike previous work, this automatic learning does not require additional simulations at inference time nor expert knowledge in deriving an analytical solution or in constructing some approximate models. We simulate many neuronal populations with different parameter settings using a stochastic neuron model. Using that data, we train a variety of supervised machine learning models, including convolutional and deep neural networks, random forest, and support vector regression. We then compare their performance against classical approaches including a genetic search, Bayesian sequential estimation, and a random walk approximate model. The supervised models almost always outperform the classical methods in parameter estimation and spike reconstruction errors, and computation expense. Convolutional neural network, in particular, is the best among all models across all metrics. The supervised models can also generalize to out-of-distribution data to a certain extent.
summary: The firing dynamics of biological neurons in mathematical models is often determined by the model's parameters, representing the neurons' underlying properties. The parameter estimation problem seeks to recover those parameters of a single neuron or a neuron population from their responses to external stimuli and interactions between themselves. Most common methods for tackling this problem in the literature use some mechanistic models in conjunction with either a simulation-based or solution-based optimization scheme. In this paper, we study an automatic approach of learning the parameters of neuron populations from a training set consisting of pairs of spiking series and parameter labels via supervised learning. Unlike previous work, this automatic learning does not require additional simulations at inference time nor expert knowledge in deriving an analytical solution or in constructing some approximate models. We simulate many neuronal populations with different parameter settings using a stochastic neuron model. Using that data, we train a variety of supervised machine learning models, including convolutional and deep neural networks, random forest, and support vector regression. We then compare their performance against classical approaches including a genetic search, Bayesian sequential estimation, and a random walk approximate model. The supervised models almost always outperform the classical methods in parameter estimation and spike reconstruction errors, and computation expense. Convolutional neural network, in particular, is the best among all models across all metrics. The supervised models can also generalize to out-of-distribution data to a certain extent.
abstract_zh: 数学模型中生物神经元的放电动力学通常由模型的参数决定，代表神经元的基本属性。参数估计问题旨在从单个神经元或神经元群体对外部刺激的响应以及它们之间的相互作用中恢复这些参数。文献中解决此问题的最常见方法是将一些机械模型与基于模拟或基于解决方案的优化方案结合使用。在本文中，我们研究了一种通过监督学习从由尖峰序列对和参数标签组成的训练集中学习神经元群体参数的自动方法。与以前的工作不同，这种自动学习不需要在推理时进行额外的模拟，也不需要专业知识来推导分析解或构建一些近似模型。我们使用随机神经元模型模拟具有不同参数设置的许多神经元群体。使用这些数据，我们训练各种监督机器学习模型，包括卷积和深度神经网络、随机森林和支持向量回归。然后，我们将它们的性能与经典方法（包括遗传搜索、贝叶斯序列估计和随机游走近似模型）进行比较。监督模型在参数估计和峰值重建误差以及计算费用方面几乎总是优于经典方法。尤其是卷积神经网络，在所有指标上都是所有模型中最好的。监督模型还可以在一定程度上推广到分布外的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督学习的神经元群体参数估计方法，通过训练数据集中的放电序列和参数标签，无需额外模拟或专家知识即可自动学习参数。
AI.motivation: 传统参数估计方法依赖机械模型和仿真优化，存在计算复杂度高、需专家知识等问题，亟需一种自动化的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 使用随机神经元模型生成多组参数数据，训练卷积神经网络、随机森林等监督模型，并与遗传算法、贝叶斯估计等经典方法对比性能。
AI.result: 监督模型在参数估计误差和计算成本上显著优于经典方法，其中卷积神经网络在所有指标上表现最佳，且具备一定分布外数据泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 监督学习方法（尤其是卷积神经网络）可高效准确地估计神经元群体参数，为神经动力学建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiaju Lin,Jie Zhou,Qin Chen
title: Causal Intervention-based Prompt Debiasing for Event Argument Extraction
title_zh: 基于因果干预的事件论证提取的提示去偏
abstract: Prompt-based methods have become increasingly popular among information extraction tasks, especially in low-data scenarios. By formatting a finetune task into a pre-training objective, prompt-based methods resolve the data scarce problem effectively. However, seldom do previous research investigate the discrepancy among different prompt formulating strategies. In this work, we compare two kinds of prompts, name-based prompt and ontology-base prompt, and reveal how ontology-base prompt methods exceed its counterpart in zero-shot event argument extraction (EAE) . Furthermore, we analyse the potential risk in ontology-base prompts via a causal view and propose a debias method by causal intervention. Experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that modified by our debias method, the baseline model becomes both more effective and robust, with significant improvement in the resistance to adversarial attacks.
summary: Prompt-based methods have become increasingly popular among information extraction tasks, especially in low-data scenarios. By formatting a finetune task into a pre-training objective, prompt-based methods resolve the data scarce problem effectively. However, seldom do previous research investigate the discrepancy among different prompt formulating strategies. In this work, we compare two kinds of prompts, name-based prompt and ontology-base prompt, and reveal how ontology-base prompt methods exceed its counterpart in zero-shot event argument extraction (EAE) . Furthermore, we analyse the potential risk in ontology-base prompts via a causal view and propose a debias method by causal intervention. Experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that modified by our debias method, the baseline model becomes both more effective and robust, with significant improvement in the resistance to adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 基于提示的方法在信息提取任务中变得越来越流行，特别是在低数据场景中。通过将微调任务格式化为预训练目标，基于提示的方法有效解决了数据稀缺问题。然而，以往的研究很少调查不同提示制定策略之间的差异。在这项工作中，我们比较了两种提示，基于名称的提示和基于本体的提示，并揭示了基于本体的提示方法如何在零样本事件参数提取（EAE）方面超越其对应方法。此外，我们通过因果视图分析基于本体的提示中的潜在风险，并提出一种通过因果干预的去偏差方法。两个基准的实验表明，通过我们的去偏差方法修改后，基线模型变得更加有效和鲁棒，并且对对抗性攻击的抵抗力显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果干预的提示去偏方法，用于改进事件论元抽取中的零样本学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对不同提示策略差异的系统比较，且本体提示可能引入偏差，影响模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过对比基于名称和本体的提示策略，结合因果分析提出干预去偏方法，优化模型训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，去偏方法显著提升模型在零样本任务中的性能及对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为提升事件论元抽取模型的公平性和鲁棒性提供了有效方法，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Hans-Peter Lehmann,Peter Sanders,Stefan Walzer
title: SicHash -- Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing
title_zh: SicHash——用于完美哈希的小型不规则布谷鸟表
abstract: A Perfect Hash Function (PHF) is a hash function that has no collisions on a given input set. PHFs can be used for space efficient storage of data in an array, or for determining a compact representative of each object in the set. In this paper, we present the PHF construction algorithm SicHash - Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing. At its core, SicHash uses a known technique: It places objects in a cuckoo hash table and then stores the final hash function choice of each object in a retrieval data structure. We combine the idea with irregular cuckoo hashing, where each object has a different number of hash functions. Additionally, we use many small tables that we overload beyond their asymptotic maximum load factor. The most space efficient competitors often use brute force methods to determine the PHFs. SicHash provides a more direct construction algorithm that only rarely needs to recompute parts. Our implementation improves the state of the art in terms of space usage versus construction time for a wide range of configurations. At the same time, it provides very fast queries.
summary: A Perfect Hash Function (PHF) is a hash function that has no collisions on a given input set. PHFs can be used for space efficient storage of data in an array, or for determining a compact representative of each object in the set. In this paper, we present the PHF construction algorithm SicHash - Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing. At its core, SicHash uses a known technique: It places objects in a cuckoo hash table and then stores the final hash function choice of each object in a retrieval data structure. We combine the idea with irregular cuckoo hashing, where each object has a different number of hash functions. Additionally, we use many small tables that we overload beyond their asymptotic maximum load factor. The most space efficient competitors often use brute force methods to determine the PHFs. SicHash provides a more direct construction algorithm that only rarely needs to recompute parts. Our implementation improves the state of the art in terms of space usage versus construction time for a wide range of configurations. At the same time, it provides very fast queries.
abstract_zh: 完美哈希函数 (PHF) 是一种在给定输入集上没有冲突的哈希函数。 PHF 可用于数组中数据的空间高效存储，或用于确定集合中每个对象的紧凑代表。在本文中，我们提出了 PHF 构造算法 SicHash - Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing。 SicHash 的核心使用了一种已知的技术：它将对象放置在布谷鸟哈希表中，然后将每个对象的最终哈希函数选择存储在检索数据结构中。我们将这个想法与不规则布谷鸟哈希结合起来，其中每个对象都有不同数量的哈希函数。此外，我们使用许多小表，这些表的过载超出了它们的渐近最大负载因子。最节省空间的竞争对手经常使用强力方法来确定 PHF。 SicHash 提供了一种更直接的构造算法，很少需要重新计算部分。我们的实施改进了各种配置的空间使用与施工时间方面的最新技术。同时，它提供非常快速的查询。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SicHash的完美哈希函数构建算法，通过不规则的小型 cuckoo 表实现高效存储与快速查询。
AI.motivation: 传统完美哈希函数构建方法空间效率低或构造时间长，需寻找更直接且兼顾空间与时间效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合不规则 cuckoo 哈希（每个对象使用不同哈希函数数量）与小型超载表，通过检索数据结构存储最终哈希选择，减少重构需求。
AI.result: 在多种配置下，SicHash 在空间利用率与构造时间上优于现有方法，同时保持极快的查询速度。
AI.conclusion: SicHash 通过创新的 cuckoo 表设计，实现了完美哈希函数构建的更优空间时间平衡，为实际应用提供高效方案。

search_text: SicHash -- Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing SicHash——用于完美哈希的小型不规则布谷鸟表 A Perfect Hash Function (PHF) is a hash function that has no collisions on a given input set. PHFs can be used for space efficient storage of data in an array, or for determining a compact representative of each object in the set. In this paper, we present the PHF construction algorithm SicHash - Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing. At its core, SicHash uses a known technique: It places objects in a cuckoo hash table and then stores the final hash function choice of each object in a retrieval data structure. We combine the idea with irregular cuckoo hashing, where each object has a different number of hash functions. Additionally, we use many small tables that we overload beyond their asymptotic maximum load factor. The most space efficient competitors often use brute force methods to determine the PHFs. SicHash provides a more direct construction algorithm that only rarely needs to recompute parts. Our implementation improves the state of the art in terms of space usage versus construction time for a wide range of configurations. At the same time, it provides very fast queries. 完美哈希函数 (PHF) 是一种在给定输入集上没有冲突的哈希函数。 PHF 可用于数组中数据的空间高效存储，或用于确定集合中每个对象的紧凑代表。在本文中，我们提出了 PHF 构造算法 SicHash - Small Irregular Cuckoo Tables for Perfect Hashing。 SicHash 的核心使用了一种已知的技术：它将对象放置在布谷鸟哈希表中，然后将每个对象的最终哈希函数选择存储在检索数据结构中。我们将这个想法与不规则布谷鸟哈希结合起来，其中每个对象都有不同数量的哈希函数。此外，我们使用许多小表，这些表的过载超出了它们的渐近最大负载因子。最节省空间的竞争对手经常使用强力方法来确定 PHF。 SicHash 提供了一种更直接的构造算法，很少需要重新计算部分。我们的实施改进了各种配置的空间使用与施工时间方面的最新技术。同时，它提供非常快速的查询。 本文提出了一种名为SicHash的完美哈希函数构建算法，通过不规则的小型 cuckoo 表实现高效存储与快速查询。 Hans-Peter Lehmann,Peter Sanders,Stefan Walzer cs.DS

authors_text: Haomiao Ni,Yihao Liu,Sharon X. Huang,Yuan Xue
title: Cross-identity Video Motion Retargeting with Joint Transformation and Synthesis
title_zh: 具有联合变换和合成的跨身份视频运动重定向
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel dual-branch Transformation-Synthesis network (TS-Net), for video motion retargeting. Given one subject video and one driving video, TS-Net can produce a new plausible video with the subject appearance of the subject video and motion pattern of the driving video. TS-Net consists of a warp-based transformation branch and a warp-free synthesis branch. The novel design of dual branches combines the strengths of deformation-grid-based transformation and warp-free generation for better identity preservation and robustness to occlusion in the synthesized videos. A mask-aware similarity module is further introduced to the transformation branch to reduce computational overhead. Experimental results on face and dance datasets show that TS-Net achieves better performance in video motion retargeting than several state-of-the-art models as well as its single-branch variants. Our code is available at https://github.com/nihaomiao/WACV23_TSNet.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel dual-branch Transformation-Synthesis network (TS-Net), for video motion retargeting. Given one subject video and one driving video, TS-Net can produce a new plausible video with the subject appearance of the subject video and motion pattern of the driving video. TS-Net consists of a warp-based transformation branch and a warp-free synthesis branch. The novel design of dual branches combines the strengths of deformation-grid-based transformation and warp-free generation for better identity preservation and robustness to occlusion in the synthesized videos. A mask-aware similarity module is further introduced to the transformation branch to reduce computational overhead. Experimental results on face and dance datasets show that TS-Net achieves better performance in video motion retargeting than several state-of-the-art models as well as its single-branch variants. Our code is available at https://github.com/nihaomiao/WACV23_TSNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双分支变换合成网络（TS-Net），用于视频运动重定向。给定一个主题视频和一个驾驶视频，TS-Net 可以根据主题视频的主题外观和驾驶视频的运动模式生成一个新的可信视频。 TS-Net 由基于扭曲的变换分支和无扭曲合成分支组成。双分支的新颖设计结合了基于变形网格的变换和无扭曲生成的优点，以更好地保留合成视频中的身份并增强对遮挡的鲁棒性。转换分支中进一步引入了掩模感知相似性模块，以减少计算开销。在面部和舞蹈数据集上的实验结果表明，TS-Net 在视频运动重定向方面比几种最先进的模型及其单分支变体取得了更好的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nihaomiao/WACV23_TSNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双分支网络TS-Net，实现跨身份视频运动重定向，将驱动视频的运动模式迁移至主体视频外观上生成新视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频运动迁移方法在身份保持和遮挡鲁棒性方面存在不足，单一变形或生成策略难以兼顾效果与效率。
AI.method: 设计包含变形网格转换分支与无变形合成分支的双分支网络，结合mask-aware相似性模块优化计算效率，联合优化运动迁移与身份保持。
AI.result: 在面部与舞蹈数据集上优于多个SOTA模型及单分支变体，生成视频在身份保持、运动准确性与遮挡处理上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 双分支架构有效融合变形与生成优势，验证了联合优化策略在跨身份视频运动重定向任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Min Seok Lee,Seok Woo Yang,Sung Won Han
title: GaIA: Graphical Information Gain based Attention Network for Weakly Supervised Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: GaIA：基于图形信息增益的弱监督点云语义分割注意力网络
abstract: While point cloud semantic segmentation is a significant task in 3D scene understanding, this task demands a time-consuming process of fully annotating labels. To address this problem, recent studies adopt a weakly supervised learning approach under the sparse annotation. Different from the existing studies, this study aims to reduce the epistemic uncertainty measured by the entropy for a precise semantic segmentation. We propose the graphical information gain based attention network called GaIA, which alleviates the entropy of each point based on the reliable information. The graphical information gain discriminates the reliable point by employing relative entropy between target point and its neighborhoods. We further introduce anchor-based additive angular margin loss, ArcPoint. The ArcPoint optimizes the unlabeled points containing high entropy towards semantically similar classes of the labeled points on hypersphere space. Experimental results on S3DIS and ScanNet-v2 datasets demonstrate our framework outperforms the existing weakly supervised methods. We have released GaIA at https://github.com/Karel911/GaIA.
summary: While point cloud semantic segmentation is a significant task in 3D scene understanding, this task demands a time-consuming process of fully annotating labels. To address this problem, recent studies adopt a weakly supervised learning approach under the sparse annotation. Different from the existing studies, this study aims to reduce the epistemic uncertainty measured by the entropy for a precise semantic segmentation. We propose the graphical information gain based attention network called GaIA, which alleviates the entropy of each point based on the reliable information. The graphical information gain discriminates the reliable point by employing relative entropy between target point and its neighborhoods. We further introduce anchor-based additive angular margin loss, ArcPoint. The ArcPoint optimizes the unlabeled points containing high entropy towards semantically similar classes of the labeled points on hypersphere space. Experimental results on S3DIS and ScanNet-v2 datasets demonstrate our framework outperforms the existing weakly supervised methods. We have released GaIA at https://github.com/Karel911/GaIA.
abstract_zh: 虽然点云语义分割是 3D 场景理解中的一项重要任务，但该任务需要一个耗时的完全注释标签的过程。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究采用了稀疏注释下的弱监督学习方法。与现有研究不同，本研究旨在减少熵测量的认知不确定性，以实现精确的语义分割。我们提出了基于图形信息增益的注意力网络（GaIA），它根据可靠信息减轻了每个点的熵。图形信息增益通过利用目标点与其邻域之间的相对熵来区分可靠点。我们进一步介绍基于锚点的附加角度边缘损失，ArcPoint。 ArcPoint 将包含高熵的未标记点优化为超球面空间上标记点的语义相似类别。 S3DIS 和 ScanNet-v2 数据集上的实验结果表明我们的框架优于现有的弱监督方法。我们已经在 https://github.com/Karel911/GaIA 上发布了 GaIA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图形信息增益的注意力网络GaIA，用于弱监督点云语义分割，通过减少熵不确定性提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 点云语义分割需要大量标注数据，而现有弱监督方法在稀疏标注下存在熵不确定性导致的分割不准确问题。
AI.method: 设计GaIA网络利用相对熵区分可靠点，并引入ArcPoint损失函数在超球面空间优化未标注点的语义相似性。
AI.result: 在S3DIS和ScanNet-v2数据集上，GaIA框架优于现有弱监督方法，分割效果显著提升。
AI.conclusion: GaIA通过减少熵不确定性并优化未标注点，有效提升了弱监督点云语义分割的性能。

conclusion: GaIA通过减少熵不确定性并优化未标注点，有效提升了弱监督点云语义分割的性能。
search_text: GaIA: Graphical Information Gain based Attention Network for Weakly Supervised Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation GaIA：基于图形信息增益的弱监督点云语义分割注意力网络 While point cloud semantic segmentation is a significant task in 3D scene understanding, this task demands a time-consuming process of fully annotating labels. To address this problem, recent studies adopt a weakly supervised learning approach under the sparse annotation. Different from the existing studies, this study aims to reduce the epistemic uncertainty measured by the entropy for a precise semantic segmentation. We propose the graphical information gain based attention network called GaIA, which alleviates the entropy of each point based on the reliable information. The graphical information gain discriminates the reliable point by employing relative entropy between target point and its neighborhoods. We further introduce anchor-based additive angular margin loss, ArcPoint. The ArcPoint optimizes the unlabeled points containing high entropy towards semantically similar classes of the labeled points on hypersphere space. Experimental results on S3DIS and ScanNet-v2 datasets demonstrate our framework outperforms the existing weakly supervised methods. We have released GaIA at https://github.com/Karel911/GaIA. 虽然点云语义分割是 3D 场景理解中的一项重要任务，但该任务需要一个耗时的完全注释标签的过程。为了解决这个问题，最近的研究采用了稀疏注释下的弱监督学习方法。与现有研究不同，本研究旨在减少熵测量的认知不确定性，以实现精确的语义分割。我们提出了基于图形信息增益的注意力网络（GaIA），它根据可靠信息减轻了每个点的熵。图形信息增益通过利用目标点与其邻域之间的相对熵来区分可靠点。我们进一步介绍基于锚点的附加角度边缘损失，ArcPoint。 ArcPoint 将包含高熵的未标记点优化为超球面空间上标记点的语义相似类别。 S3DIS 和 ScanNet-v2 数据集上的实验结果表明我们的框架优于现有的弱监督方法。我们已经在 https://github.com/Karel911/GaIA 上发布了 GaIA。 本文提出一种基于图形信息增益的注意力网络GaIA，用于弱监督点云语义分割，通过减少熵不确定性提升分割精度。 Min Seok Lee,Seok Woo Yang,Sung Won Han cs.CV

authors_text: Svenja Drücker,Robert Seifried
title: Application of Stable Inversion to Flexible Manipulators Modeled by the ANCF
title_zh: 稳定反演在 ANCF 建模的柔性机械臂中的应用
abstract: Compared to conventional robots, flexible manipulators offer many advantages, such as faster end-effector velocities and less energy consumption. However, their flexible structure can lead to undesired oscillations. Therefore, the applied control strategy should account for these elasticities. A feedforward controller based on an inverse model of the system is an efficient way to improve the performance. However, unstable internal dynamics arise for many common flexible robots and stable inversion must be applied. In this contribution, an approximation of the original stable inversion approach is proposed. The approximation simplifies the problem setup, since the internal dynamics do not need to be derived explicitly for the definition of the boundary conditions. From a practical point of view, this makes the method applicable to more complex systems with many unactuated degrees of freedom. Flexible manipulators modeled by the absolute nodal coordinate formulation (ANCF) are considered as an application example.
summary: Compared to conventional robots, flexible manipulators offer many advantages, such as faster end-effector velocities and less energy consumption. However, their flexible structure can lead to undesired oscillations. Therefore, the applied control strategy should account for these elasticities. A feedforward controller based on an inverse model of the system is an efficient way to improve the performance. However, unstable internal dynamics arise for many common flexible robots and stable inversion must be applied. In this contribution, an approximation of the original stable inversion approach is proposed. The approximation simplifies the problem setup, since the internal dynamics do not need to be derived explicitly for the definition of the boundary conditions. From a practical point of view, this makes the method applicable to more complex systems with many unactuated degrees of freedom. Flexible manipulators modeled by the absolute nodal coordinate formulation (ANCF) are considered as an application example.
abstract_zh: 与传统机器人相比，柔性机械手具有许多优势，例如更快的末端执行器速度和更少的能耗。然而，它们的灵活结构可能会导致不期望的振荡。因此，所应用的控制策略应考虑这些弹性。基于系统逆模型的前馈控制器是提高性能的有效方法。然而，许多常见的柔性机器人会出现不稳定的内部动力学，必须采用稳定的反转。在这篇文章中，提出了原始稳定反演方法的近似。近似简化了问题设置，因为不需要为边界条件的定义显式导出内部动力学。从实践的角度来看，这使得该方法适用于具有许多未驱动自由度的更复杂的系统。以绝对节点坐标公式（ANCF）建模的柔性机械手作为应用示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于绝对节点坐标法（ANCF）建模的柔性机械臂的稳定逆方法近似方案，简化了边界条件设定。
AI.motivation: 柔性机械臂虽具速度快、能耗低等优势，但其柔性结构易引发振荡，传统控制策略难以处理不稳定内部动力学问题。
AI.method: 通过近似原始稳定逆方法，无需显式推导内部动力学即可定义边界条件，提升复杂多自由度系统的适用性。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于ANCF建模的柔性机械臂，验证了其在复杂系统中的有效性与简化性。
AI.conclusion: 此近似方案为处理高自由度柔性机械臂的控制问题提供了更实用的稳定逆方法实现路径。

authors_text: Sarthak Gupta,Patrik Huber
title: Neural Implicit Surface Reconstruction from Noisy Camera Observations
title_zh: 从嘈杂的相机观察中进行神经隐式表面重建
abstract: Representing 3D objects and scenes with neural radiance fields has become very popular over the last years. Recently, surface-based representations have been proposed, that allow to reconstruct 3D objects from simple photographs. However, most current techniques require an accurate camera calibration, i.e. camera parameters corresponding to each image, which is often a difficult task to do in real-life situations. To this end, we propose a method for learning 3D surfaces from noisy camera parameters. We show that we can learn camera parameters together with learning the surface representation, and demonstrate good quality 3D surface reconstruction even with noisy camera observations.
summary: Representing 3D objects and scenes with neural radiance fields has become very popular over the last years. Recently, surface-based representations have been proposed, that allow to reconstruct 3D objects from simple photographs. However, most current techniques require an accurate camera calibration, i.e. camera parameters corresponding to each image, which is often a difficult task to do in real-life situations. To this end, we propose a method for learning 3D surfaces from noisy camera parameters. We show that we can learn camera parameters together with learning the surface representation, and demonstrate good quality 3D surface reconstruction even with noisy camera observations.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，用神经辐射场表示 3D 对象和场景变得非常流行。最近，基于表面的表示被提出，它允许从简单的照片重建 3D 对象。然而，大多数当前技术需要精确的相机校准，即与每个图像相对应的相机参数，这在现实生活中通常是一项艰巨的任务。为此，我们提出了一种从嘈杂的相机参数中学习 3D 表面的方法。我们表明，我们可以在学习表面表示的同时学习相机参数，并且即使在相机观察有噪声的情况下也能展示高质量的 3D 表面重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从噪声相机参数中学习3D隐式表面重建的方法，无需精确相机校准。
AI.motivation: 现有表面重建方法依赖精确相机校准，而实际场景中获取准确参数困难，需开发鲁棒性更强的重建技术。
AI.method: 联合优化神经网络，同步学习表面表示与噪声相机参数，通过隐式函数建模物体表面。
AI.result: 在噪声相机观测下实现高质量3D表面重建，实验验证优于传统依赖精确校准的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了噪声相机参数下的重建问题，为实际应用提供了更灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Maksim Zhdanov,Lisa Randolph,Thomas Kluge,Motoaki Nakatsutsumi,Christian Gutt,Marina Ganeva,Nico Hoffmann
title: Amortized Bayesian Inference of GISAXS Data with Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 具有归一化流的 GISAXS 数据的摊销贝叶斯推理
abstract: Grazing-Incidence Small-Angle X-ray Scattering (GISAXS) is a modern imaging technique used in material research to study nanoscale materials. Reconstruction of the parameters of an imaged object imposes an ill-posed inverse problem that is further complicated when only an in-plane GISAXS signal is available. Traditionally used inference algorithms such as Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) rely on computationally expensive scattering simulation software, rendering analysis highly time-consuming. We propose a simulation-based framework that combines variational auto-encoders and normalizing flows to estimate the posterior distribution of object parameters given its GISAXS data. We apply the inference pipeline to experimental data and demonstrate that our method reduces the inference cost by orders of magnitude while producing consistent results with ABC.
summary: Grazing-Incidence Small-Angle X-ray Scattering (GISAXS) is a modern imaging technique used in material research to study nanoscale materials. Reconstruction of the parameters of an imaged object imposes an ill-posed inverse problem that is further complicated when only an in-plane GISAXS signal is available. Traditionally used inference algorithms such as Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) rely on computationally expensive scattering simulation software, rendering analysis highly time-consuming. We propose a simulation-based framework that combines variational auto-encoders and normalizing flows to estimate the posterior distribution of object parameters given its GISAXS data. We apply the inference pipeline to experimental data and demonstrate that our method reduces the inference cost by orders of magnitude while producing consistent results with ABC.
abstract_zh: 掠入射小角 X 射线散射 (GISAXS) 是一种现代成像技术，用于材料研究中以研究纳米级材料。重建成像对象的参数会带来不适定的逆问题，当只有面内 GISAXS 信号可用时，该问题会变得更加复杂。传统使用的推理算法（例如近似贝叶斯计算 (ABC)）依赖于计算成本昂贵的散射模拟软件，导致分析非常耗时。我们提出了一种基于模拟的框架，该框架结合了变分自动编码器和归一化流，以估计给定 GISAXS 数据的对象参数的后验分布。我们将推理管道应用于实验数据，并证明我们的方法将推理成本降低了几个数量级，同时产生与 ABC 一致的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合变分自编码器与归一化流的框架，用于解决GISAXS数据参数重建中的高计算成本问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GISAXS数据分析依赖计算昂贵的近似贝叶斯计算（ABC）方法，导致分析效率低下，亟需更高效的推断框架。
AI.method: 构建基于变分自编码器和归一化流的模拟框架，通过学习数据分布实现参数后验估计，替代传统散射模拟。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法较ABC减少多个数量级的计算成本，且结果保持一致性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法显著提升GISAXS数据分析效率，为纳米材料研究提供可扩展的参数推断工具。

search_text: Amortized Bayesian Inference of GISAXS Data with Normalizing Flows 具有归一化流的 GISAXS 数据的摊销贝叶斯推理 Grazing-Incidence Small-Angle X-ray Scattering (GISAXS) is a modern imaging technique used in material research to study nanoscale materials. Reconstruction of the parameters of an imaged object imposes an ill-posed inverse problem that is further complicated when only an in-plane GISAXS signal is available. Traditionally used inference algorithms such as Approximate Bayesian Computation (ABC) rely on computationally expensive scattering simulation software, rendering analysis highly time-consuming. We propose a simulation-based framework that combines variational auto-encoders and normalizing flows to estimate the posterior distribution of object parameters given its GISAXS data. We apply the inference pipeline to experimental data and demonstrate that our method reduces the inference cost by orders of magnitude while producing consistent results with ABC. 掠入射小角 X 射线散射 (GISAXS) 是一种现代成像技术，用于材料研究中以研究纳米级材料。重建成像对象的参数会带来不适定的逆问题，当只有面内 GISAXS 信号可用时，该问题会变得更加复杂。传统使用的推理算法（例如近似贝叶斯计算 (ABC)）依赖于计算成本昂贵的散射模拟软件，导致分析非常耗时。我们提出了一种基于模拟的框架，该框架结合了变分自动编码器和归一化流，以估计给定 GISAXS 数据的对象参数的后验分布。我们将推理管道应用于实验数据，并证明我们的方法将推理成本降低了几个数量级，同时产生与 ABC 一致的结果。 本文提出一种结合变分自编码器与归一化流的框架，用于解决GISAXS数据参数重建中的高计算成本问题。 Maksim Zhdanov,Lisa Randolph,Thomas Kluge,Motoaki Nakatsutsumi,Christian Gutt,Marina Ganeva,Nico Hoffmann cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Edoardo Cetin,Benjamin Chamberlain,Michael Bronstein,Jonathan J Hunt
title: Hyperbolic Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 双曲深度强化学习
abstract: We propose a new class of deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms that model latent representations in hyperbolic space. Sequential decision-making requires reasoning about the possible future consequences of current behavior. Consequently, capturing the relationship between key evolving features for a given task is conducive to recovering effective policies. To this end, hyperbolic geometry provides deep RL models with a natural basis to precisely encode this inherently hierarchical information. However, applying existing methodologies from the hyperbolic deep learning literature leads to fatal optimization instabilities due to the non-stationarity and variance characterizing RL gradient estimators. Hence, we design a new general method that counteracts such optimization challenges and enables stable end-to-end learning with deep hyperbolic representations. We empirically validate our framework by applying it to popular on-policy and off-policy RL algorithms on the Procgen and Atari 100K benchmarks, attaining near universal performance and generalization benefits. Given its natural fit, we hope future RL research will consider hyperbolic representations as a standard tool.
summary: We propose a new class of deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms that model latent representations in hyperbolic space. Sequential decision-making requires reasoning about the possible future consequences of current behavior. Consequently, capturing the relationship between key evolving features for a given task is conducive to recovering effective policies. To this end, hyperbolic geometry provides deep RL models with a natural basis to precisely encode this inherently hierarchical information. However, applying existing methodologies from the hyperbolic deep learning literature leads to fatal optimization instabilities due to the non-stationarity and variance characterizing RL gradient estimators. Hence, we design a new general method that counteracts such optimization challenges and enables stable end-to-end learning with deep hyperbolic representations. We empirically validate our framework by applying it to popular on-policy and off-policy RL algorithms on the Procgen and Atari 100K benchmarks, attaining near universal performance and generalization benefits. Given its natural fit, we hope future RL research will consider hyperbolic representations as a standard tool.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一类新的深度强化学习（RL）算法，用于对双曲空间中的潜在表示进行建模。顺序决策需要对当前行为未来可能产生的后果进行推理。因此，捕获给定任务的关键演变特征之间的关系有利于恢复有效的策略。为此，双曲几何为深度强化学习模型提供了精确编码这种固有分层信息的自然基础。然而，由于 RL 梯度估计器的非平稳性和方差特征，应用双曲深度学习文献中的现有方法会导致致命的优化不稳定性。因此，我们设计了一种新的通用方法来应对此类优化挑战，并通过深度双曲表示实现稳定的端到端学习。我们通过将我们的框架应用于 Procgen 和 Atari 100K 基准上流行的在策略和离策略 RL 算法来实证验证我们的框架，获得接近普遍的性能和泛化优势。鉴于其自然的适应性，我们希望未来的强化学习研究能够将双曲表示视为标准工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的深度强化学习算法，通过在双曲空间中建模潜在表示来解决顺序决策问题，并设计新方法应对优化不稳定挑战。
AI.motivation: 顺序决策需要处理层次化信息，而双曲几何能自然编码此类结构，但现有方法因强化学习梯度估计的非平稳性和方差导致优化不稳定。
AI.method: 设计了一种通用方法以稳定双曲深度强化学习的端到端训练过程，结合超双曲空间表示与优化改进技术。
AI.result: 在Procgen和Atari 100K基准测试中验证了框架有效性，实现接近通用性能和泛化优势。
AI.conclusion: 双曲表示为强化学习提供了自然适配方案，未来研究应将其作为标准工具进行探索。

authors_text: André O. Françani
title: Analysis of the performance of U-Net neural networks for the segmentation of living cells
title_zh: U-Net神经网络用于活细胞分割的性能分析
abstract: The automated analysis of microscopy images is a challenge in the context of single-cell tracking and quantification. This work has as goals the study of the performance of deep learning for segmenting microscopy images and the improvement of the previously available pipeline for tracking single cells. Deep learning techniques, mainly convolutional neural networks, have been applied to cell segmentation problems and have shown high accuracy and fast performance. To perform the image segmentation, an analysis of hyperparameters was done in order to implement a convolutional neural network with U-Net architecture. Furthermore, different models were built in order to optimize the size of the network and the number of learnable parameters. The trained network is then used in the pipeline that localizes the traps in a microfluidic device, performs the image segmentation on trap images, and evaluates the fluorescence intensity and the area of single cells over time. The tracking of the cells during an experiment is performed by image processing algorithms, such as centroid estimation and watershed. Finally, with all improvements in the neural network to segment single cells and in the pipeline, quasi-real-time image analysis was enabled, where 6.20GB of data was processed in 4 minutes.
summary: The automated analysis of microscopy images is a challenge in the context of single-cell tracking and quantification. This work has as goals the study of the performance of deep learning for segmenting microscopy images and the improvement of the previously available pipeline for tracking single cells. Deep learning techniques, mainly convolutional neural networks, have been applied to cell segmentation problems and have shown high accuracy and fast performance. To perform the image segmentation, an analysis of hyperparameters was done in order to implement a convolutional neural network with U-Net architecture. Furthermore, different models were built in order to optimize the size of the network and the number of learnable parameters. The trained network is then used in the pipeline that localizes the traps in a microfluidic device, performs the image segmentation on trap images, and evaluates the fluorescence intensity and the area of single cells over time. The tracking of the cells during an experiment is performed by image processing algorithms, such as centroid estimation and watershed. Finally, with all improvements in the neural network to segment single cells and in the pipeline, quasi-real-time image analysis was enabled, where 6.20GB of data was processed in 4 minutes.
abstract_zh: 显微图像的自动分析是单细胞跟踪和定量背景下的一个挑战。这项工作的目标是研究深度学习在分割显微图像方面的性能，以及改进以前用于跟踪单细胞的管道。深度学习技术，主要是卷积神经网络，已应用于细胞分割问题，并表现出高精度和快速的性能。为了执行图像分割，我们对超参数进行了分析，以实现具有 U-Net 架构的卷积神经网络。此外，还建立了不同的模型以优化网络的规模和可学习参数的数量。然后在管道中使用经过训练的网络来定位微流体装置中的陷阱，对陷阱图像执行图像分割，并评估随时间变化的荧光强度和单细胞面积。实验过程中细胞的跟踪是通过图像处理算法执行的，例如质心估计和分水岭。最后，通过神经网络分割单细胞和管道中的所有改进，实现了准实时图像分析，在 4 分钟内处理了 6.20GB 的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了U-Net神经网络在活细胞分割中的性能，并优化了单细胞追踪的处理流程。
AI.motivation: 显微图像的自动化分析在单细胞追踪和量化中具有挑战性，需改进现有分割和追踪方法以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 通过分析超参数并优化网络结构，构建基于U-Net的卷积神经网络模型，并集成到微流控设备的图像处理流程中。
AI.result: 成功实现准实时图像分析，处理6.20GB数据仅需4分钟，提升了分割精度和处理速度。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的U-Net模型和处理流程显著提高了单细胞分割与追踪的效率，为生物实验提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Ge Li,Zeqi Jin,Michael Volpp,Fabian Otto,Rudolf Lioutikov,Gerhard Neumann
title: ProDMPs: A Unified Perspective on Dynamic and Probabilistic Movement Primitives
title_zh: ProDMP：动态和概率运动原语的统一视角
abstract: Movement Primitives (MPs) are a well-known concept to represent and generate modular trajectories. MPs can be broadly categorized into two types: (a) dynamics-based approaches that generate smooth trajectories from any initial state, e. g., Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs), and (b) probabilistic approaches that capture higher-order statistics of the motion, e. g., Probabilistic Movement Primitives (ProMPs). To date, however, there is no method that unifies both, i. e. that can generate smooth trajectories from an arbitrary initial state while capturing higher-order statistics. In this paper, we introduce a unified perspective of both approaches by solving the ODE underlying the DMPs. We convert expensive online numerical integration of DMPs into basis functions that can be computed offline. These basis functions can be used to represent trajectories or trajectory distributions similar to ProMPs while maintaining all the properties of dynamical systems. Since we inherit the properties of both methodologies, we call our proposed model Probabilistic Dynamic Movement Primitives (ProDMPs). Additionally, we embed ProDMPs in deep neural network architecture and propose a new cost function for efficient end-to-end learning of higher-order trajectory statistics. To this end, we leverage Bayesian Aggregation for non-linear iterative conditioning on sensory inputs. Our proposed model achieves smooth trajectory generation, goal-attractor convergence, correlation analysis, non-linear conditioning, and online re-planing in one framework.
summary: Movement Primitives (MPs) are a well-known concept to represent and generate modular trajectories. MPs can be broadly categorized into two types: (a) dynamics-based approaches that generate smooth trajectories from any initial state, e. g., Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs), and (b) probabilistic approaches that capture higher-order statistics of the motion, e. g., Probabilistic Movement Primitives (ProMPs). To date, however, there is no method that unifies both, i. e. that can generate smooth trajectories from an arbitrary initial state while capturing higher-order statistics. In this paper, we introduce a unified perspective of both approaches by solving the ODE underlying the DMPs. We convert expensive online numerical integration of DMPs into basis functions that can be computed offline. These basis functions can be used to represent trajectories or trajectory distributions similar to ProMPs while maintaining all the properties of dynamical systems. Since we inherit the properties of both methodologies, we call our proposed model Probabilistic Dynamic Movement Primitives (ProDMPs). Additionally, we embed ProDMPs in deep neural network architecture and propose a new cost function for efficient end-to-end learning of higher-order trajectory statistics. To this end, we leverage Bayesian Aggregation for non-linear iterative conditioning on sensory inputs. Our proposed model achieves smooth trajectory generation, goal-attractor convergence, correlation analysis, non-linear conditioning, and online re-planing in one framework.
abstract_zh: 运动基元 (MP) 是表示和生成模块化轨迹的众所周知的概念。 MP 可以大致分为两种类型：（a）基于动力学的方法，可以从任何初始状态生成平滑的轨迹，例如。 g.，动态运动原语（DMP），以及（b）捕获运动高阶统计数据的概率方法，例如。 g.，概率运动原语（ProMP）。然而，迄今为止，还没有统一两者的方法，即。 e.它可以从任意初始状态生成平滑轨迹，同时捕获高阶统计数据。在本文中，我们通过求解 DMP 底层的 ODE 引入了两种方法的统一视角。我们将昂贵的 DMP 在线数值积分转换为可以离线计算的基函数。这些基函数可用于表示类似于 ProMP 的轨迹或轨迹分布，同时保持动力系统的所有属性。由于我们继承了这两种方法的属性，因此我们将我们提出的模型称为概率动态运动原语（ProDMP）。此外，我们将 ProDMP 嵌入深度神经网络架构中，并提出了一种新的成本函数，用于高阶轨迹统计的高效端到端学习。为此，我们利用贝叶斯聚合对感官输入进行非线性迭代调节。我们提出的模型在一个框架中实现了平滑轨迹生成、目标吸引子收敛、相关分析、非线性调节和在线重新规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一动态和概率运动原语的新方法ProDMPs，解决现有方法无法同时生成平滑轨迹和捕捉高阶统计信息的不足。
AI.motivation: 动态运动原语（DMPs）和概率运动原语（ProMPs）分别存在生成平滑轨迹和捕捉高阶统计信息的局限，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 通过求解DMPs的微分方程，将在线数值积分转化为离线基函数，结合ProMPs的统计特性，并嵌入深度神经网络架构，引入贝叶斯聚合实现非线性条件处理。
AI.result: 实现平滑轨迹生成、目标吸引子收敛、相关分析、非线性条件控制及在线重规划，且能高效学习高阶轨迹统计信息。
AI.conclusion: ProDMPs统一了动态与概率方法的优势，提升了运动原语在复杂任务中的灵活性和适用性。

search_text: ProDMPs: A Unified Perspective on Dynamic and Probabilistic Movement Primitives ProDMP：动态和概率运动原语的统一视角 Movement Primitives (MPs) are a well-known concept to represent and generate modular trajectories. MPs can be broadly categorized into two types: (a) dynamics-based approaches that generate smooth trajectories from any initial state, e. g., Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs), and (b) probabilistic approaches that capture higher-order statistics of the motion, e. g., Probabilistic Movement Primitives (ProMPs). To date, however, there is no method that unifies both, i. e. that can generate smooth trajectories from an arbitrary initial state while capturing higher-order statistics. In this paper, we introduce a unified perspective of both approaches by solving the ODE underlying the DMPs. We convert expensive online numerical integration of DMPs into basis functions that can be computed offline. These basis functions can be used to represent trajectories or trajectory distributions similar to ProMPs while maintaining all the properties of dynamical systems. Since we inherit the properties of both methodologies, we call our proposed model Probabilistic Dynamic Movement Primitives (ProDMPs). Additionally, we embed ProDMPs in deep neural network architecture and propose a new cost function for efficient end-to-end learning of higher-order trajectory statistics. To this end, we leverage Bayesian Aggregation for non-linear iterative conditioning on sensory inputs. Our proposed model achieves smooth trajectory generation, goal-attractor convergence, correlation analysis, non-linear conditioning, and online re-planing in one framework. 运动基元 (MP) 是表示和生成模块化轨迹的众所周知的概念。 MP 可以大致分为两种类型：（a）基于动力学的方法，可以从任何初始状态生成平滑的轨迹，例如。 g.，动态运动原语（DMP），以及（b）捕获运动高阶统计数据的概率方法，例如。 g.，概率运动原语（ProMP）。然而，迄今为止，还没有统一两者的方法，即。 e.它可以从任意初始状态生成平滑轨迹，同时捕获高阶统计数据。在本文中，我们通过求解 DMP 底层的 ODE 引入了两种方法的统一视角。我们将昂贵的 DMP 在线数值积分转换为可以离线计算的基函数。这些基函数可用于表示类似于 ProMP 的轨迹或轨迹分布，同时保持动力系统的所有属性。由于我们继承了这两种方法的属性，因此我们将我们提出的模型称为概率动态运动原语（ProDMP）。此外，我们将 ProDMP 嵌入深度神经网络架构中，并提出了一种新的成本函数，用于高阶轨迹统计的高效端到端学习。为此，我们利用贝叶斯聚合对感官输入进行非线性迭代调节。我们提出的模型在一个框架中实现了平滑轨迹生成、目标吸引子收敛、相关分析、非线性调节和在线重新规划。 本文提出一种统一动态和概率运动原语的新方法ProDMPs，解决现有方法无法同时生成平滑轨迹和捕捉高阶统计信息的不足。 Ge Li,Zeqi Jin,Michael Volpp,Fabian Otto,Rudolf Lioutikov,Gerhard Neumann cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: U. Otamendi,I. Azpiroz,M. Quartulli,I. Olaizola
title: Integrating pre-processing pipelines in ODC based framework
title_zh: 将预处理管道集成到基于 ODC 的框架中
comment: 4 pages, 5 figures, IGARSS 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
comments: 4 pages, 5 figures, IGARSS 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
abstract: Using on-demand processing pipelines to generate virtual geospatial products is beneficial to optimizing resource management and decreasing processing requirements and data storage space. Additionally, pre-processed products improve data quality for data-driven analytical algorithms, such as machine learning or deep learning models. This paper proposes a method to integrate virtual products based on integrating open-source processing pipelines. In order to validate and evaluate the functioning of this approach, we have integrated it into a geo-imagery management framework based on Open Data Cube (ODC). To validate the methodology, we have performed three experiments developing on-demand processing pipelines using multi-sensor remote sensing data, for instance, Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2. These pipelines are integrated using open-source processing frameworks.
summary: Using on-demand processing pipelines to generate virtual geospatial products is beneficial to optimizing resource management and decreasing processing requirements and data storage space. Additionally, pre-processed products improve data quality for data-driven analytical algorithms, such as machine learning or deep learning models. This paper proposes a method to integrate virtual products based on integrating open-source processing pipelines. In order to validate and evaluate the functioning of this approach, we have integrated it into a geo-imagery management framework based on Open Data Cube (ODC). To validate the methodology, we have performed three experiments developing on-demand processing pipelines using multi-sensor remote sensing data, for instance, Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2. These pipelines are integrated using open-source processing frameworks.
abstract_zh: 使用按需处理管道生成虚拟地理空间产品有利于优化资源管理、降低处理要求和数据存储空间。此外，预处理产品还可以提高数据驱动的分析算法（例如机器学习或深度学习模型）的数据质量。本文提出了一种基于集成开源处理管道的虚拟产品集成方法。为了验证和评估该方法的功能，我们将其集成到基于开放数据立方体（ODC）的地理图像管理框架中。为了验证该方法，我们进行了三个实验，使用多传感器遥感数据（例如 Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2）开发按需处理管道。这些管道使用开源处理框架进行集成。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于开源处理流程的虚拟产品集成方法，用于优化地理空间数据处理和存储。
AI.motivation: 通过预处理提升数据质量，优化资源管理，减少存储需求，从而支持机器学习等分析算法。
AI.method: 将开源处理框架整合到ODC中，开发按需处理流程，并利用多传感器数据进行实验验证。
AI.result: 通过三个实验验证了方法在多传感器数据中的有效性，证明了其可行性和优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效集成预处理流程，提升数据质量，优化资源，为遥感数据管理提供可行方案。
