authors_text: Suraj Kothawade,Akshit Srivastava,Venkat Iyer,Ganesh Ramakrishnan,Rishabh Iyer
title: DIAGNOSE: Avoiding Out-of-distribution Data using Submodular Information Measures
title_zh: 诊断：使用子模信息测量避免分布外数据
abstract: Avoiding out-of-distribution (OOD) data is critical for training supervised machine learning models in the medical imaging domain. Furthermore, obtaining labeled medical data is difficult and expensive since it requires expert annotators like doctors, radiologists, etc. Active learning (AL) is a well-known method to mitigate labeling costs by selecting the most diverse or uncertain samples. However, current AL methods do not work well in the medical imaging domain with OOD data. We propose Diagnose (avoiDing out-of-dIstribution dAta usinG submodular iNfOrmation meaSurEs), a novel active learning framework that can jointly model similarity and dissimilarity, which is crucial in mining in-distribution data and avoiding OOD data at the same time. Particularly, we use a small number of data points as exemplars that represent a query set of in-distribution data points and a private set of OOD data points. We illustrate the generalizability of our framework by evaluating it on a wide variety of real-world OOD scenarios. Our experiments verify the superiority of Diagnose over the state-of-the-art AL methods across multiple domains of medical imaging.
summary: Avoiding out-of-distribution (OOD) data is critical for training supervised machine learning models in the medical imaging domain. Furthermore, obtaining labeled medical data is difficult and expensive since it requires expert annotators like doctors, radiologists, etc. Active learning (AL) is a well-known method to mitigate labeling costs by selecting the most diverse or uncertain samples. However, current AL methods do not work well in the medical imaging domain with OOD data. We propose Diagnose (avoiDing out-of-dIstribution dAta usinG submodular iNfOrmation meaSurEs), a novel active learning framework that can jointly model similarity and dissimilarity, which is crucial in mining in-distribution data and avoiding OOD data at the same time. Particularly, we use a small number of data points as exemplars that represent a query set of in-distribution data points and a private set of OOD data points. We illustrate the generalizability of our framework by evaluating it on a wide variety of real-world OOD scenarios. Our experiments verify the superiority of Diagnose over the state-of-the-art AL methods across multiple domains of medical imaging.
abstract_zh: 避免分布外 (OOD) 数据对于训练医学成像领域的监督机器学习模型至关重要。此外，获取标记的医疗数据既困难又昂贵，因为它需要医生、放射科医生等专家注释者。主动学习（AL）是一种众所周知的方法，通过选择最多样化或不确定的样本来降低标记成本。然而，当前的 AL 方法在 OOD 数据的医学成像领域效果不佳。我们提出了 Diagnose（使用子模块信息测量来避免分布外数据），这是一种新颖的主动学习框架，可以联合建模相似性和相异性，这对于挖掘分布内数据并同时避免 OOD 数据至关重要。特别是，我们使用少量数据点作为样本，表示分布内数据点的查询集和 OOD 数据点的私有集。我们通过在各种现实世界的 OOD 场景中评估我们的框架来说明其普遍性。我们的实验验证了 Diagnose 在医学成像多个领域相对于最先进的 AL 方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Diagnose的主动学习框架，用于在医疗影像领域中同时筛选分布内数据并避免分布外数据。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像数据标注成本高且存在分布外数据干扰，现有主动学习方法难以有效应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 通过少量数据点作为范例，联合建模分布内数据与分布外数据的相似性与差异性，利用子模信息度量进行样本选择。
AI.result: 在多种真实分布外场景下验证了框架的通用性，实验表明Diagnose优于现有最先进的主动学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Diagnose通过联合建模相似性与差异性，有效解决了医疗影像领域中分布外数据干扰问题，提升了主动学习性能。

However, current AL methods do not work well in the medical imaging domain with OOD data. We propose Diagnose (avoiDing out-of-dIstribution dAta usinG submodular iNfOrmation meaSurEs), a novel active learning framework that can jointly model similarity and dissimilarity, which is crucial in mining in-distribution data and avoiding OOD data at the same time. Particularly, we use a small number of data points as exemplars that represent a query set of in-distribution data points and a private set of OOD data points. We illustrate the generalizability of our framework by evaluating it on a wide variety of real-world OOD scenarios. Our experiments verify the superiority of Diagnose over the state-of-the-art AL methods across multiple domains of medical imaging. 避免分布外 (OOD) 数据对于训练医学成像领域的监督机器学习模型至关重要。此外，获取标记的医疗数据既困难又昂贵，因为它需要医生、放射科医生等专家注释者。主动学习（AL）是一种众所周知的方法，通过选择最多样化或不确定的样本来降低标记成本。然而，当前的 AL 方法在 OOD 数据的医学成像领域效果不佳。我们提出了 Diagnose（使用子模块信息测量来避免分布外数据），这是一种新颖的主动学习框架，可以联合建模相似性和相异性，这对于挖掘分布内数据并同时避免 OOD 数据至关重要。特别是，我们使用少量数据点作为样本，表示分布内数据点的查询集和 OOD 数据点的私有集。我们通过在各种现实世界的 OOD 场景中评估我们的框架来说明其普遍性。我们的实验验证了 Diagnose 在医学成像多个领域相对于最先进的 AL 方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种名为Diagnose的主动学习框架，用于在医疗影像领域中同时筛选分布内数据并避免分布外数据。 Suraj Kothawade,Akshit Srivastava,Venkat Iyer,Ganesh Ramakrishnan,Rishabh Iyer cs.CV

authors_text: Murad Dawood,Nils Dengler,Jorge de Heuvel,Maren Bennewitz
title: Handling Sparse Rewards in Reinforcement Learning Using Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 使用模型预测控制处理强化学习中的稀疏奖励
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has recently proven great success in various domains. Yet, the design of the reward function requires detailed domain expertise and tedious fine-tuning to ensure that agents are able to learn the desired behaviour. Using a sparse reward conveniently mitigates these challenges. However, the sparse reward represents a challenge on its own, often resulting in unsuccessful training of the agent. In this paper, we therefore address the sparse reward problem in RL. Our goal is to find an effective alternative to reward shaping, without using costly human demonstrations, that would also be applicable to a wide range of domains. Hence, we propose to use model predictive control~(MPC) as an experience source for training RL agents in sparse reward environments. Without the need for reward shaping, we successfully apply our approach in the field of mobile robot navigation both in simulation and real-world experiments with a Kuboki Turtlebot 2. We furthermore demonstrate great improvement over pure RL algorithms in terms of success rate as well as number of collisions and timeouts. Our experiments show that MPC as an experience source improves the agent's learning process for a given task in the case of sparse rewards.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has recently proven great success in various domains. Yet, the design of the reward function requires detailed domain expertise and tedious fine-tuning to ensure that agents are able to learn the desired behaviour. Using a sparse reward conveniently mitigates these challenges. However, the sparse reward represents a challenge on its own, often resulting in unsuccessful training of the agent. In this paper, we therefore address the sparse reward problem in RL. Our goal is to find an effective alternative to reward shaping, without using costly human demonstrations, that would also be applicable to a wide range of domains. Hence, we propose to use model predictive control~(MPC) as an experience source for training RL agents in sparse reward environments. Without the need for reward shaping, we successfully apply our approach in the field of mobile robot navigation both in simulation and real-world experiments with a Kuboki Turtlebot 2. We furthermore demonstrate great improvement over pure RL algorithms in terms of success rate as well as number of collisions and timeouts. Our experiments show that MPC as an experience source improves the agent's learning process for a given task in the case of sparse rewards.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）最近在各个领域取得了巨大成功。然而，奖励函数的设计需要详细的领域专业知识和繁琐的微调，以确保代理能够学习所需的行为。使用稀疏奖励可以方便地缓解这些挑战。然而，稀疏的奖励本身就是一个挑战，通常会导致代理的训练失败。因此，在本文中，我们解决了强化学习中的稀疏奖励问题。我们的目标是找到一种有效的奖励塑造替代方案，无需使用昂贵的人工演示，并且也适用于广泛的领域。因此，我们建议使用模型预测控制（MPC）作为在稀疏奖励环境中训练 RL 代理的经验源。在不需要奖励塑造的情况下，我们成功地将我们的方法应用于移动机器人导航领域，无论是在模拟中还是在 Kuboki Turtlebot 2 的实际实验中。此外，我们还证明了在成功率以及碰撞和超时次数方面比纯 RL 算法有了很大的改进。我们的实验表明，在奖励稀疏的情况下，MPC 作为经验源可以改善智能体针对给定任务的学习过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用模型预测控制（MPC）作为经验来源，解决强化学习中稀疏奖励导致的训练困难问题，并在移动机器人导航任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励虽简化了奖励函数设计，但会导致智能体训练失败。传统奖励塑形依赖领域专家知识且需人工演示，存在成本高、适用性差的问题。
AI.method: 将MPC生成的轨迹作为强化学习的先验经验，无需奖励塑形或人工演示，通过模拟与真实机器人实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在Kuboki Turtlebot 2机器人导航任务中，相比纯强化学习算法，成功率达提升，碰撞和超时次数显著减少。
AI.conclusion: MPC作为经验源可有效缓解稀疏奖励问题，为复杂环境下的强化学习提供无需人工干预的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Max A. Deppert,Klaus Jansen,Marten Maack,Simon Pukrop,Malin Rau
title: Scheduling with Many Shared Resources
title_zh: 具有许多共享资源的调度
abstract: Consider the many shared resource scheduling problem where jobs have to be scheduled on identical parallel machines with the goal of minimizing the makespan. However, each job needs exactly one additional shared resource in order to be executed and hence prevents the execution of jobs that need the same resource while being processed. Previously a $(2m/(m+1))$-approximation was the best known result for this problem. Furthermore, a $6/5$-approximation for the case with only two machines was known as well as a PTAS for the case with a constant number of machines. We present a simple and fast 5/3-approximation and a much more involved but still reasonable 1.5-approximation. Furthermore, we provide a PTAS for the case with only a constant number of machines, which is arguably simpler and faster than the previously known one, as well as a PTAS with resource augmentation for the general case. The approximation schemes make use of the N-fold integer programming machinery, which has found more and more applications in the field of scheduling recently. It is plausible that the latter results can be improved and extended to more general cases. Lastly, we give a $5/4 - \varepsilon$ inapproximability result for the natural problem extension where each job may need up to a constant number (in particular $3$) of different resources.
summary: Consider the many shared resource scheduling problem where jobs have to be scheduled on identical parallel machines with the goal of minimizing the makespan. However, each job needs exactly one additional shared resource in order to be executed and hence prevents the execution of jobs that need the same resource while being processed. Previously a $(2m/(m+1))$-approximation was the best known result for this problem. Furthermore, a $6/5$-approximation for the case with only two machines was known as well as a PTAS for the case with a constant number of machines. We present a simple and fast 5/3-approximation and a much more involved but still reasonable 1.5-approximation. Furthermore, we provide a PTAS for the case with only a constant number of machines, which is arguably simpler and faster than the previously known one, as well as a PTAS with resource augmentation for the general case. The approximation schemes make use of the N-fold integer programming machinery, which has found more and more applications in the field of scheduling recently. It is plausible that the latter results can be improved and extended to more general cases. Lastly, we give a $5/4 - \varepsilon$ inapproximability result for the natural problem extension where each job may need up to a constant number (in particular $3$) of different resources.
abstract_zh: 考虑许多共享资源调度问题，其中必须在相同的并行计算机上调度作业，以最大限度地缩短完工时间。然而，每个作业都需要一个额外的共享资源才能执行，因此会阻止执行在处理时需要相同资源的作业。此前，$(2m/(m+1))$ 近似是该问题最知名的结果。此外，对于只有两台机器的情况，$6/5$ 的近似值以及对于具有恒定数量机器的情况的 PTAS 是已知的。我们提出了一个简单而快速的 5/3 近似值和一个更复杂但仍然合理的 1.5 近似值。此外，我们还为只有固定数量机器的情况提供了 PTAS，这可以说比之前已知的情况更简单、更快，并且为一般情况提供了具有资源增强的 PTAS。近似方案利用了N重整数规划机制，最近在调度领域得到了越来越多的应用。后者的结果似乎可以改进并扩展到更一般的情况。最后，我们为自然问题扩展给出 $5/4 - \varepsilon$ 不近似性结果，其中每个作业可能需要最多恒定数量（特别是 $3$）的不同资源。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在共享资源约束下多机器调度问题，旨在通过优化算法减少任务完成时间（makespan）。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在共享资源调度问题上的近似比和复杂度存在改进空间，需提出更高效的近似算法和PTAS以应对不同规模的机器数量。
AI.method: 基于N-fold整数规划技术，设计了分层近似算法，并改进了PTAS的实现方式以适应常数机器数和一般情况。
AI.result: 提出了5/3和1.5近似算法，改进了常数机器数的PTAS，并给出了带有资源增强的PTAS；同时证明了需要最多3个资源的任务扩展问题的5/4-ε不可近似性。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在效率和简洁性上优于现有方案，且为未来扩展到更多资源类型提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Suraj Kothawade,Atharv Savarkar,Venkat Iyer,Lakshman Tamil,Ganesh Ramakrishnan,Rishabh Iyer
title: CLINICAL: Targeted Active Learning for Imbalanced Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 临床：针对不平衡医学图像分类的有针对性的主动学习
abstract: Training deep learning models on medical datasets that perform well for all classes is a challenging task. It is often the case that a suboptimal performance is obtained on some classes due to the natural class imbalance issue that comes with medical data. An effective way to tackle this problem is by using targeted active learning, where we iteratively add data points to the training data that belong to the rare classes. However, existing active learning methods are ineffective in targeting rare classes in medical datasets. In this work, we propose Clinical (targeted aCtive Learning for ImbalaNced medICal imAge cLassification) a framework that uses submodular mutual information functions as acquisition functions to mine critical data points from rare classes. We apply our framework to a wide-array of medical imaging datasets on a variety of real-world class imbalance scenarios - namely, binary imbalance and long-tail imbalance. We show that Clinical outperforms the state-of-the-art active learning methods by acquiring a diverse set of data points that belong to the rare classes.
summary: Training deep learning models on medical datasets that perform well for all classes is a challenging task. It is often the case that a suboptimal performance is obtained on some classes due to the natural class imbalance issue that comes with medical data. An effective way to tackle this problem is by using targeted active learning, where we iteratively add data points to the training data that belong to the rare classes. However, existing active learning methods are ineffective in targeting rare classes in medical datasets. In this work, we propose Clinical (targeted aCtive Learning for ImbalaNced medICal imAge cLassification) a framework that uses submodular mutual information functions as acquisition functions to mine critical data points from rare classes. We apply our framework to a wide-array of medical imaging datasets on a variety of real-world class imbalance scenarios - namely, binary imbalance and long-tail imbalance. We show that Clinical outperforms the state-of-the-art active learning methods by acquiring a diverse set of data points that belong to the rare classes.
abstract_zh: 在医疗数据集上训练对所有类别都表现良好的深度学习模型是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于医疗数据带来的自然类别不平衡问题，通常会在某些类别上获得次优的性能。解决这个问题的一个有效方法是使用有针对性的主动学习，我们迭代地将数据点添加到属于稀有类别的训练数据中。然而，现有的主动学习方法在针对医学数据集中的稀有类别方面无效。在这项工作中，我们提出了临床（针对不平衡医学图像分类的有针对性的主动学习）框架，该框架使用子模块互信息函数作为采集函数来从稀有类别中挖掘关键数据点。我们将我们的框架应用于各种真实世界级不平衡场景的广泛医学成像数据集，即二元不平衡和长尾不平衡。我们表明，通过获取属于稀有类别的不同数据点集，Clinical 优于最先进的主动学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对医学图像分类中类别不平衡问题的主动学习框架Clinical，通过子模互信息函数选择关键数据点以提升罕见类别的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集存在天然类别不平衡问题，导致现有深度学习模型在罕见类别上表现不佳，而传统主动学习方法难以有效针对这些罕见类别。
AI.method: 设计Clinical框架，采用子模互信息函数作为获取函数，迭代选择罕见类别的关键数据点，并在二元不平衡和长尾不平衡场景中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明Clinical在多种医学影像数据集上优于现有主动学习方法，能够获取更多样化的罕见类别数据点，显著提升模型在不平衡场景下的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: Clinical框架通过针对性数据选择有效缓解医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题，为医疗AI模型的优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Kshitij Goyal,Wannes Meert,Hendrik Blockeel,Elia Van Wolputte,Koen Vanderstraeten,Wouter Pijpops,Kurt Jaspers
title: Automatic Generation of Product Concepts from Positive Examples, with an Application to Music Streaming
title_zh: 从正面例子自动生成产品概念，并应用于音乐流媒体
abstract: Internet based businesses and products (e.g. e-commerce, music streaming) are becoming more and more sophisticated every day with a lot of focus on improving customer satisfaction. A core way they achieve this is by providing customers with an easy access to their products by structuring them in catalogues using navigation bars and providing recommendations. We refer to these catalogues as product concepts, e.g. product categories on e-commerce websites, public playlists on music streaming platforms. These product concepts typically contain products that are linked with each other through some common features (e.g. a playlist of songs by the same artist). How they are defined in the backend of the system can be different for different products. In this work, we represent product concepts using database queries and tackle two learning problems. First, given sets of products that all belong to the same unknown product concept, we learn a database query that is a representation of this product concept. Second, we learn product concepts and their corresponding queries when the given sets of products are associated with multiple product concepts. To achieve these goals, we propose two approaches that combine the concepts of PU learning with Decision Trees and Clustering. Our experiments demonstrate, via a simulated setup for a music streaming service, that our approach is effective in solving these problems.
summary: Internet based businesses and products (e.g. e-commerce, music streaming) are becoming more and more sophisticated every day with a lot of focus on improving customer satisfaction. A core way they achieve this is by providing customers with an easy access to their products by structuring them in catalogues using navigation bars and providing recommendations. We refer to these catalogues as product concepts, e.g. product categories on e-commerce websites, public playlists on music streaming platforms. These product concepts typically contain products that are linked with each other through some common features (e.g. a playlist of songs by the same artist). How they are defined in the backend of the system can be different for different products. In this work, we represent product concepts using database queries and tackle two learning problems. First, given sets of products that all belong to the same unknown product concept, we learn a database query that is a representation of this product concept. Second, we learn product concepts and their corresponding queries when the given sets of products are associated with multiple product concepts. To achieve these goals, we propose two approaches that combine the concepts of PU learning with Decision Trees and Clustering. Our experiments demonstrate, via a simulated setup for a music streaming service, that our approach is effective in solving these problems.
abstract_zh: 基于互联网的业务和产品（例如电子商务、音乐流媒体）每天都变得越来越复杂，并且非常注重提高客户满意度。他们实现这一目标的核心方式是通过使用导航栏在目录中构建产品并提供推荐，为客户提供轻松访问其产品的方式。我们将这些目录称为产品概念，例如电子商务网站上的产品类别、音乐流媒体平台上的公共播放列表。这些产品概念通常包含通过一些共同特征（例如同一艺术家的歌曲播放列表）相互链接的产品。对于不同的产品，它们在系统后端的定义方式可能不同。在这项工作中，我们使用数据库查询来表示产品概念并解决两个学习问题。首先，给定属于同一未知产品概念的一组产品，我们学习一个表示该产品概念的数据库查询。其次，当给定的产品集与多个产品概念相关联时，我们学习产品概念及其相应的查询。为了实现这些目标，我们提出了两种将 PU 学习的概念与决策树和聚类相结合的方法。我们的实验通过音乐流媒体服务的模拟设置证明，我们的方法可以有效解决这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从正例自动生成产品概念的方法，并应用于音乐流媒体服务，通过数据库查询和机器学习技术解决产品概念定义问题。
AI.motivation: 互联网产品需通过结构化目录和推荐提升用户体验，但现有产品概念定义方式依赖人工，难以适应动态变化的需求。
AI.method: 结合PU学习与决策树、聚类算法，提出两种方法：1）从单一产品集合学习数据库查询表示概念；2）处理多概念关联场景下的查询生成。
AI.result: 在模拟音乐流媒体实验中，方法能有效生成符合预期的播放列表概念，验证了技术可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动化构建产品概念提供了新思路，可提升电商平台、流媒体等场景的目录管理与推荐效率。

authors_text: Christian Huber,Enes Yavuz Ugan,Alexander Waibel
title: Code-Switching without Switching: Language Agnostic End-to-End Speech Translation
title_zh: 无需切换的代码切换：与语言无关的端到端语音翻译
abstract: We propose a) a Language Agnostic end-to-end Speech Translation model (LAST), and b) a data augmentation strategy to increase code-switching (CS) performance. With increasing globalization, multiple languages are increasingly used interchangeably during fluent speech. Such CS complicates traditional speech recognition and translation, as we must recognize which language was spoken first and then apply a language-dependent recognizer and subsequent translation component to generate the desired target language output. Such a pipeline introduces latency and errors. In this paper, we eliminate the need for that, by treating speech recognition and translation as one unified end-to-end speech translation problem. By training LAST with both input languages, we decode speech into one target language, regardless of the input language. LAST delivers comparable recognition and speech translation accuracy in monolingual usage, while reducing latency and error rate considerably when CS is observed.
summary: We propose a) a Language Agnostic end-to-end Speech Translation model (LAST), and b) a data augmentation strategy to increase code-switching (CS) performance. With increasing globalization, multiple languages are increasingly used interchangeably during fluent speech. Such CS complicates traditional speech recognition and translation, as we must recognize which language was spoken first and then apply a language-dependent recognizer and subsequent translation component to generate the desired target language output. Such a pipeline introduces latency and errors. In this paper, we eliminate the need for that, by treating speech recognition and translation as one unified end-to-end speech translation problem. By training LAST with both input languages, we decode speech into one target language, regardless of the input language. LAST delivers comparable recognition and speech translation accuracy in monolingual usage, while reducing latency and error rate considerably when CS is observed.
abstract_zh: 我们提出a）与语言无关的端到端语音翻译模型（LAST），以及b）用于提高代码转换（CS）性能的数据增强策略。随着全球化的不断发展，多种语言在流利的演讲中越来越多地互换使用。这种 CS 使传统的语音识别和翻译变得复杂，因为我们必须识别首先说出的是哪种语言，然后应用依赖于语言的识别器和后续翻译组件来生成所需的目标语言输出。这样的管道会引入延迟和错误。在本文中，我们通过将语音识别和翻译视为一个统一的端到端语音翻译问题来消除这一需求。通过使用两种输入语言训练 LAST，我们可以将语音解码为一种目标语言，而不管输入语言是什么。 LAST 在单语使用中提供可比的识别和语音翻译准确性，同时在观察 CS 时显着降低延迟和错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语言无关的端到端语音翻译模型（LAST）及数据增强策略，以解决多语言代码切换场景下的语音识别与翻译问题。
AI.motivation: 全球化导致多语言混合使用场景增多，传统分阶段处理方式存在延迟高、错误率高的问题，需统一处理流程以提高效率。
AI.method: 设计LAST模型将语音识别与翻译统一为端到端任务，通过双语言输入训练实现跨语言解码，并采用数据增强策略优化代码切换表现。
AI.result: 模型在单语场景下保持与传统方法相当的准确率，代码切换场景下显著降低延迟与错误率。
AI.conclusion: LAST模型有效解决了多语言混合场景下的翻译难题，为端到端语音翻译提供了新思路。

search_text: Code-Switching without Switching: Language Agnostic End-to-End Speech Translation 无需切换的代码切换：与语言无关的端到端语音翻译 We propose a) a Language Agnostic end-to-end Speech Translation model (LAST), and b) a data augmentation strategy to increase code-switching (CS) performance. With increasing globalization, multiple languages are increasingly used interchangeably during fluent speech. Such CS complicates traditional speech recognition and translation, as we must recognize which language was spoken first and then apply a language-dependent recognizer and subsequent translation component to generate the desired target language output. Such a pipeline introduces latency and errors. In this paper, we eliminate the need for that, by treating speech recognition and translation as one unified end-to-end speech translation problem. By training LAST with both input languages, we decode speech into one target language, regardless of the input language. LAST delivers comparable recognition and speech translation accuracy in monolingual usage, while reducing latency and error rate considerably when CS is observed. 我们提出a）与语言无关的端到端语音翻译模型（LAST），以及b）用于提高代码转换（CS）性能的数据增强策略。随着全球化的不断发展，多种语言在流利的演讲中越来越多地互换使用。这种 CS 使传统的语音识别和翻译变得复杂，因为我们必须识别首先说出的是哪种语言，然后应用依赖于语言的识别器和后续翻译组件来生成所需的目标语言输出。这样的管道会引入延迟和错误。在本文中，我们通过将语音识别和翻译视为一个统一的端到端语音翻译问题来消除这一需求。通过使用两种输入语言训练 LAST，我们可以将语音解码为一种目标语言，而不管输入语言是什么。 LAST 在单语使用中提供可比的识别和语音翻译准确性，同时在观察 CS 时显着降低延迟和错误率。 本文提出一种语言无关的端到端语音翻译模型（LAST）及数据增强策略，以解决多语言代码切换场景下的语音识别与翻译问题。 Christian Huber,Enes Yavuz Ugan,Alexander Waibel cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Umberto M. Tomasini,Leonardo Petrini,Francesco Cagnetta,Matthieu Wyart
title: How deep convolutional neural networks lose spatial information with training
title_zh: 深度卷积神经网络如何通过训练丢失空间信息
abstract: A central question of machine learning is how deep nets manage to learn tasks in high dimensions. An appealing hypothesis is that they achieve this feat by building a representation of the data where information irrelevant to the task is lost. For image datasets, this view is supported by the observation that after (and not before) training, the neural representation becomes less and less sensitive to diffeomorphisms acting on images as the signal propagates through the net. This loss of sensitivity correlates with performance, and surprisingly correlates with a gain of sensitivity to white noise acquired during training. These facts are unexplained, and as we demonstrate still hold when white noise is added to the images of the training set. Here, we (i) show empirically for various architectures that stability to image diffeomorphisms is achieved by both spatial and channel pooling, (ii) introduce a model scale-detection task which reproduces our empirical observations on spatial pooling and (iii) compute analitically how the sensitivity to diffeomorphisms and noise scales with depth due to spatial pooling. The scalings are found to depend on the presence of strides in the net architecture. We find that the increased sensitivity to noise is due to the perturbing noise piling up during pooling, after being rectified by ReLU units.
summary: A central question of machine learning is how deep nets manage to learn tasks in high dimensions. An appealing hypothesis is that they achieve this feat by building a representation of the data where information irrelevant to the task is lost. For image datasets, this view is supported by the observation that after (and not before) training, the neural representation becomes less and less sensitive to diffeomorphisms acting on images as the signal propagates through the net. This loss of sensitivity correlates with performance, and surprisingly correlates with a gain of sensitivity to white noise acquired during training. These facts are unexplained, and as we demonstrate still hold when white noise is added to the images of the training set. Here, we (i) show empirically for various architectures that stability to image diffeomorphisms is achieved by both spatial and channel pooling, (ii) introduce a model scale-detection task which reproduces our empirical observations on spatial pooling and (iii) compute analitically how the sensitivity to diffeomorphisms and noise scales with depth due to spatial pooling. The scalings are found to depend on the presence of strides in the net architecture. We find that the increased sensitivity to noise is due to the perturbing noise piling up during pooling, after being rectified by ReLU units.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的一个核心问题是深度网络如何学习高维度的任务。一个有吸引力的假设是，他们通过构建数据表示来实现这一壮举，其中与任务无关的信息丢失了。对于图像数据集，这一观点得到了观察结果的支持：在训练之后（而不是之前），当信号通过网络传播时，神经表示对作用于图像的微分同态变得越来越不敏感。这种敏感性的丧失与表现相关，并且令人惊讶地与训练期间获得的对白噪声的敏感性的增加相关。这些事实无法解释，正如我们所证明的，当将白噪声添加到训练集的图像中时，这些事实仍然成立。在这里，我们（i）凭经验证明各种架构的图像微分同胚稳定性是通过空间池化和通道池化实现的，（ii）引入模型尺度检测任务，它再现了我们对空间池化的经验观察，以及（iii）分析计算由于空间池化而对微分同胚和噪声尺度的敏感性如何随深度变化。发现缩放取决于网络架构中步幅的存在。我们发现，对噪声的敏感性增加是由于经过 ReLU 单元纠正后，在池化期间堆积的扰动噪声造成的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度卷积神经网络在训练过程中如何丢失空间信息，并分析其与图像微分同胚变换和白噪声敏感性的关系。
AI.motivation: 深度网络在高维数据任务中表现出色，但其如何通过丢失无关信息实现这一目标尚不明确。观察到训练后网络对图像微分同胚变换的敏感性降低，且与白噪声敏感性提升相关，但机制未被解释。
AI.method: 通过多种网络架构的实证分析，引入尺度检测任务模拟空间池化现象，并解析池化操作导致的敏感性随网络深度变化的数学规律，结合ReLU激活函数的影响进行理论推导。
AI.result: 空间池化和通道池化共同实现对图像微分同胚变换的稳定性；噪声敏感性提升源于池化过程中ReLU修正后的噪声累积；网络结构中的步长参数影响敏感性缩放规律。
AI.conclusion: 深度卷积网络通过池化操作丢失空间信息，其对噪声敏感性的增强与训练过程中噪声在池化层的累积有关，而网络步长设计决定了敏感性随深度变化的模式。

authors_text: Haoyu Pan,Hao Wu,Tan Yang
title: Enhancing Spatiotemporal Prediction Model using Modular Design and Beyond
title_zh: 使用模块化设计等增强时空预测模型
abstract: Predictive learning uses a known state to generate a future state over a period of time. It is a challenging task to predict spatiotemporal sequence because the spatiotemporal sequence varies both in time and space. The mainstream method is to model spatial and temporal structures at the same time using RNN-based or transformer-based architecture, and then generates future data by using learned experience in the way of auto-regressive. The method of learning spatial and temporal features simultaneously brings a lot of parameters to the model, which makes the model difficult to be convergent. In this paper, a modular design is proposed, which decomposes spatiotemporal sequence model into two modules: a spatial encoder-decoder and a predictor. These two modules can extract spatial features and predict future data respectively. The spatial encoder-decoder maps the data into a latent embedding space and generates data from the latent space while the predictor forecasts future embedding from past. By applying the design to the current research and performing experiments on KTH-Action and MovingMNIST datasets, we both improve computational performance and obtain state-of-the-art results.
summary: Predictive learning uses a known state to generate a future state over a period of time. It is a challenging task to predict spatiotemporal sequence because the spatiotemporal sequence varies both in time and space. The mainstream method is to model spatial and temporal structures at the same time using RNN-based or transformer-based architecture, and then generates future data by using learned experience in the way of auto-regressive. The method of learning spatial and temporal features simultaneously brings a lot of parameters to the model, which makes the model difficult to be convergent. In this paper, a modular design is proposed, which decomposes spatiotemporal sequence model into two modules: a spatial encoder-decoder and a predictor. These two modules can extract spatial features and predict future data respectively. The spatial encoder-decoder maps the data into a latent embedding space and generates data from the latent space while the predictor forecasts future embedding from past. By applying the design to the current research and performing experiments on KTH-Action and MovingMNIST datasets, we both improve computational performance and obtain state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 预测学习使用已知状态来生成一段时间内的未来状态。预测时空序列是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为时空序列在时间和空间上都存在变化。主流方法是使用基于RNN或基于Transformer的架构同时对空间和时间结构进行建模，然后利用学习到的经验以自回归的方式生成未来数据。同时学习空间和时间特征的方法给模型带来了大量的参数，导致模型难以收敛。本文提出了一种模块化设计，将时空序列模型分解为两个模块：空间编码器-解码器和预测器。这两个模块分别可以提取空间特征并预测未来数据。空间编码器-解码器将数据映射到潜在嵌入空间并从潜在空间生成数据，而预测器则根据过去预测未来的嵌入。通过将该设计应用于当前的研究并在 KTH-Action 和 MovingMNIST 数据集上进行实验，我们既提高了计算性能，又获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化设计方法，将时空预测模型分解为空间编码器-解码器和预测器模块，以提升模型收敛性和预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统时空预测模型同时建模时空特征导致参数冗余且难以收敛，需通过模块化设计降低复杂度并提升效率。
AI.method: 将模型拆分为独立处理空间特征的编码器-解码器模块和预测未来数据的预测模块，分别映射到潜在空间并进行预测。
AI.result: 在KTH-Action和MovingMNIST数据集上实现计算性能提升，并达到当时最先进的预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 模块化设计有效解决时空预测模型的复杂性问题，未来可进一步优化模块交互或结合其他架构增强性能。

search_text: Enhancing Spatiotemporal Prediction Model using Modular Design and Beyond 使用模块化设计等增强时空预测模型 Predictive learning uses a known state to generate a future state over a period of time. It is a challenging task to predict spatiotemporal sequence because the spatiotemporal sequence varies both in time and space. The mainstream method is to model spatial and temporal structures at the same time using RNN-based or transformer-based architecture, and then generates future data by using learned experience in the way of auto-regressive. The method of learning spatial and temporal features simultaneously brings a lot of parameters to the model, which makes the model difficult to be convergent. In this paper, a modular design is proposed, which decomposes spatiotemporal sequence model into two modules: a spatial encoder-decoder and a predictor. These two modules can extract spatial features and predict future data respectively. The spatial encoder-decoder maps the data into a latent embedding space and generates data from the latent space while the predictor forecasts future embedding from past. By applying the design to the current research and performing experiments on KTH-Action and MovingMNIST datasets, we both improve computational performance and obtain state-of-the-art results. 预测学习使用已知状态来生成一段时间内的未来状态。预测时空序列是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为时空序列在时间和空间上都存在变化。主流方法是使用基于RNN或基于Transformer的架构同时对空间和时间结构进行建模，然后利用学习到的经验以自回归的方式生成未来数据。同时学习空间和时间特征的方法给模型带来了大量的参数，导致模型难以收敛。本文提出了一种模块化设计，将时空序列模型分解为两个模块：空间编码器-解码器和预测器。这两个模块分别可以提取空间特征并预测未来数据。空间编码器-解码器将数据映射到潜在嵌入空间并从潜在空间生成数据，而预测器则根据过去预测未来的嵌入。通过将该设计应用于当前的研究并在 KTH-Action 和 MovingMNIST 数据集上进行实验，我们既提高了计算性能，又获得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种模块化设计方法，将时空预测模型分解为空间编码器-解码器和预测器模块，以提升模型收敛性和预测性能。 Haoyu Pan,Hao Wu,Tan Yang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ahmed Baza,Ayush Gupta,Ekaterina Dorzhieva,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: SwarMan: Anthropomorphic Swarm of Drones Avatar with Body Tracking and Deep Learning-Based Gesture Recognition
title_zh: SwarMan：具有身体跟踪和基于深度学习的手势识别功能的拟人化无人机群
abstract: Anthropomorphic robot avatars present a conceptually novel approach to remote affective communication, allowing people across the world a wider specter of emotional and social exchanges over traditional 2D and 3D image data. However, there are several limitations of current telepresence robots, such as the high weight, complexity of the system that prevents its fast deployment, and the limited workspace of the avatars mounted on either static or wheeled mobile platforms. In this paper, we present a novel concept of telecommunication through a robot avatar based on an anthropomorphic swarm of drones; SwarMan. The developed system consists of nine nanocopters controlled remotely by the operator through a gesture recognition interface. SwarMan allows operators to communicate by directly following their motions and by recognizing one of the prerecorded emotional patterns, thus rendering the captured emotion as illumination on the drones. The LSTM MediaPipe network was trained on a collected dataset of 600 short videos with five emotional gestures. The accuracy of achieved emotion recognition was 97% on the test dataset. As communication through the swarm avatar significantly changes the visual appearance of the operator, we investigated the ability of the users to recognize and respond to emotions performed by the swarm of drones. The experimental results revealed a high consistency between the users in rating emotions. Additionally, users indicated low physical demand (2.25 on the Likert scale) and were satisfied with their performance (1.38 on the Likert scale) when communicating by the SwarMan interface.
summary: Anthropomorphic robot avatars present a conceptually novel approach to remote affective communication, allowing people across the world a wider specter of emotional and social exchanges over traditional 2D and 3D image data. However, there are several limitations of current telepresence robots, such as the high weight, complexity of the system that prevents its fast deployment, and the limited workspace of the avatars mounted on either static or wheeled mobile platforms. The developed system consists of nine nanocopters controlled remotely by the operator through a gesture recognition interface. SwarMan allows operators to communicate by directly following their motions and by recognizing one of the prerecorded emotional patterns, thus rendering the captured emotion as illumination on the drones. The LSTM MediaPipe network was trained on a collected dataset of 600 short videos with five emotional gestures. The accuracy of achieved emotion recognition was 97% on the test dataset. As communication through the swarm avatar significantly changes the visual appearance of the operator, we investigated the ability of the users to recognize and respond to emotions performed by the swarm of drones. The experimental results revealed a high consistency between the users in rating emotions. Additionally, users indicated low physical demand (2.25 on the Likert scale) and were satisfied with their performance (1.38 on the Likert scale) when communicating by the SwarMan interface.
abstract_zh: 拟人化机器人化身提出了一种概念上新颖的远程情感交流方法，使世界各地的人们能够比传统的 2D 和 3D 图像数据进行更广泛的情感和社交交流。然而，当前的远程呈现机器人存在一些局限性，例如重量大、系统复杂性阻碍其快速部署，以及安装在静态或轮式移动平台上的化身的工作空间有限。在本文中，我们通过基于拟人化无人机群的机器人化身提出了一种新颖的电信概念；斯沃曼。开发的系统由九架纳米直升机组成，由操作员通过手势识别界面进行远程控制。 SwarMan 允许操作员通过直接跟随他们的动作并识别预先记录的情绪模式之一来进行交流，从而将捕获的情绪渲染为无人机上的照明。 LSTM MediaPipe 网络在收集的 600 个包含 5 种情感手势的短视频数据集上进行了训练。在测试数据集上实现的情绪识别准确率为 97%。由于通过群体化身进行的通信显着改变了操作员的视觉外观，因此我们研究了用户识别和响应无人机群情绪的能力。实验结果表明，用户对情绪的评分具有高度一致性。此外，用户在通过 SwarMan 界面进行通信时表示身体需求较低（李克特量表为 2.25），并对自己的表现感到满意（李克特量表为 1.38）。

AI.tldr: 提出SwarMan系统，通过无人机群实现远程情感交流，解决现有机器人化身的重量、复杂性和工作空间限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有远程机器人存在重量大、系统复杂、部署慢及工作空间有限等问题，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用九个纳米无人机组成群集，结合手势识别接口与LSTM MediaPipe网络进行情感识别，基于600个视频数据集训练模型。
AI.result: 情感识别测试准确率达97%，用户评分显示低体力需求（2.25）且满意度高（1.38），情感评分一致性高。
AI.conclusion: SwarMan系统有效实现远程情感交流，验证了无人机群在情感识别与交互中的可行性，未来可进一步优化。

authors_text: Yuncheng Jiang,Zixun Zhang,Shixi Qin,Yao Guo,Zhen Li,Shuguang Cui
title: APAUNet: Axis Projection Attention UNet for Small Target in 3D Medical Segmentation
title_zh: APAUNet：3D 医疗分割中小目标的轴投影注意力 UNet
abstract: In 3D medical image segmentation, small targets segmentation is crucial for diagnosis but still faces challenges. In this paper, we propose the Axis Projection Attention UNet, named APAUNet, for 3D medical image segmentation, especially for small targets. Considering the large proportion of the background in the 3D feature space, we introduce a projection strategy to project the 3D features into three orthogonal 2D planes to capture the contextual attention from different views. In this way, we can filter out the redundant feature information and mitigate the loss of critical information for small lesions in 3D scans. Then we utilize a dimension hybridization strategy to fuse the 3D features with attention from different axes and merge them by a weighted summation to adaptively learn the importance of different perspectives. Finally, in the APA Decoder, we concatenate both high and low resolution features in the 2D projection process, thereby obtaining more precise multi-scale information, which is vital for small lesion segmentation. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results on two public datasets (BTCV and MSD) demonstrate that our proposed APAUNet outperforms the other methods. Concretely, our APAUNet achieves an average dice score of 87.84 on BTCV, 84.48 on MSD-Liver and 69.13 on MSD-Pancreas, and significantly surpass the previous SOTA methods on small targets.
summary: In 3D medical image segmentation, small targets segmentation is crucial for diagnosis but still faces challenges. In this paper, we propose the Axis Projection Attention UNet, named APAUNet, for 3D medical image segmentation, especially for small targets. Considering the large proportion of the background in the 3D feature space, we introduce a projection strategy to project the 3D features into three orthogonal 2D planes to capture the contextual attention from different views. In this way, we can filter out the redundant feature information and mitigate the loss of critical information for small lesions in 3D scans. Then we utilize a dimension hybridization strategy to fuse the 3D features with attention from different axes and merge them by a weighted summation to adaptively learn the importance of different perspectives. Finally, in the APA Decoder, we concatenate both high and low resolution features in the 2D projection process, thereby obtaining more precise multi-scale information, which is vital for small lesion segmentation. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results on two public datasets (BTCV and MSD) demonstrate that our proposed APAUNet outperforms the other methods. Concretely, our APAUNet achieves an average dice score of 87.84 on BTCV, 84.48 on MSD-Liver and 69.13 on MSD-Pancreas, and significantly surpass the previous SOTA methods on small targets.
abstract_zh: 在3D医学图像分割中，小目标分割对于诊断至关重要，但仍面临挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 Axis Projection Attention UNet，名为 APAUNet，用于 3D 医学图像分割，尤其是小目标。考虑到 3D 特征空间中背景所占的比例很大，我们引入了一种投影策略，将 3D 特征投影到三个正交的 2D 平面上，以捕获来自不同视图的上下文注意力。通过这种方式，我们可以过滤掉冗余的特征信息，减少3D扫描中小病灶关键信息的丢失。然后，我们利用维度混合策略将 3D 特征与不同轴的注意力融合，并通过加权求和将它们合并，以自适应地学习不同视角的重要性。最后，在APA解码器中，我们在2D投影过程中连接高分辨率和低分辨率特征，从而获得更精确的多尺度信息，这对于小病变分割至关重要。两个公共数据集（BTCV 和 MSD）的定量和定性实验结果表明，我们提出的 APAUNet 优于其他方法。具体来说，我们的 APAUNet 在 BTCV 上的平均骰子分数为 87.84，在 MSD-Liver 上的平均骰子分数为 84.48，在 MSD-Pancreas 上的平均骰子分数为 69.13，并且在小目标上显着超过了之前的 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为APAUNet的3D医学图像分割方法，专注于小目标的分割。
AI.motivation: 在3D医学图像分割中，小目标分割对诊断至关重要，但仍然面临挑战，尤其是在3D特征空间中背景占比大，容易丢失小病灶的关键信息。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种轴投影注意力UNet（APAUNet），通过将3D特征投影到三个正交的2D平面，捕捉不同视角的上下文注意力，然后利用维度混合策略融合3D特征与不同轴的注意力信息，并在APA解码器中拼接高低分辨率特征，以获得更精确的多尺度信息。
AI.result: 在BTCV和MSD两个公开数据集上的定量和定性实验结果表明，APAUNet在小目标分割上显著优于其他方法，例如在BTCV上的平均Dice得分为87.84，在MSD-Liver上为84.48，在MSD-Pancreas上为69.13。
AI.conclusion: APAUNet通过轴投影注意力机制和维度混合策略有效提升了3D医学图像中小目标的分割性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路。

method: 本文引入了一种轴投影注意力UNet（APAUNet），通过将3D特征投影到三个正交的2D平面，捕捉不同视角的上下文注意力，然后利用维度混合策略融合3D特征与不同轴的注意力信息，并在APA解码器中拼接高低分辨率特征，以获得更精确的多尺度信息。
result: 在BTCV和MSD两个公开数据集上的定量和定性实验结果表明，APAUNet在小目标分割上显著优于其他方法，例如在BTCV上的平均Dice得分为87.84，在MSD-Liver上为84.48，在MSD-Pancreas上为69.13。
conclusion: APAUNet通过轴投影注意力机制和维度混合策略有效提升了3D医学图像中小目标的分割性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路。
search_text: APAUNet: Axis Projection Attention UNet for Small Target in 3D Medical Segmentation APAUNet：3D 医疗分割中小目标的轴投影注意力 UNet In 3D medical image segmentation, small targets segmentation is crucial for diagnosis but still faces challenges. In this paper, we propose the Axis Projection Attention UNet, named APAUNet, for 3D medical image segmentation, especially for small targets. Considering the large proportion of the background in the 3D feature space, we introduce a projection strategy to project the 3D features into three orthogonal 2D planes to capture the contextual attention from different views. In this way, we can filter out the redundant feature information and mitigate the loss of critical information for small lesions in 3D scans. Then we utilize a dimension hybridization strategy to fuse the 3D features with attention from different axes and merge them by a weighted summation to adaptively learn the importance of different perspectives. Finally, in the APA Decoder, we concatenate both high and low resolution features in the 2D projection process, thereby obtaining more precise multi-scale information, which is vital for small lesion segmentation. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results on two public datasets (BTCV and MSD) demonstrate that our proposed APAUNet outperforms the other methods. Concretely, our APAUNet achieves an average dice score of 87.84 on BTCV, 84.48 on MSD-Liver and 69.13 on MSD-Pancreas, and significantly surpass the previous SOTA methods on small targets. 在3D医学图像分割中，小目标分割对于诊断至关重要，但仍面临挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 Axis Projection Attention UNet，名为 APAUNet，用于 3D 医学图像分割，尤其是小目标。考虑到 3D 特征空间中背景所占的比例很大，我们引入了一种投影策略，将 3D 特征投影到三个正交的 2D 平面上，以捕获来自不同视图的上下文注意力。通过这种方式，我们可以过滤掉冗余的特征信息，减少3D扫描中小病灶关键信息的丢失。然后，我们利用维度混合策略将 3D 特征与不同轴的注意力融合，并通过加权求和将它们合并，以自适应地学习不同视角的重要性。最后，在APA解码器中，我们在2D投影过程中连接高分辨率和低分辨率特征，从而获得更精确的多尺度信息，这对于小病变分割至关重要。两个公共数据集（BTCV 和 MSD）的定量和定性实验结果表明，我们提出的 APAUNet 优于其他方法。具体来说，我们的 APAUNet 在 BTCV 上的平均骰子分数为 87.84，在 MSD-Liver 上的平均骰子分数为 84.48，在 MSD-Pancreas 上的平均骰子分数为 69.13，并且在小目标上显着超过了之前的 SOTA 方法。 本文提出了一种名为APAUNet的3D医学图像分割方法，专注于小目标的分割。 Yuncheng Jiang,Zixun Zhang,Shixi Qin,Yao Guo,Zhen Li,Shuguang Cui cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Semenov,Konstantin Chukharev,Egor Tarasov,Daniil Chivilikhin,Viktor Kondratiev
title: Estimating the hardness of SAT encodings for Logical Equivalence Checking of Boolean circuits
title_zh: 评估用于布尔电路逻辑等价检查的 SAT 编码的硬度
abstract: In this paper we investigate how to estimate the hardness of Boolean satisfiability (SAT) encodings for the Logical Equivalence Checking problem (LEC). Meaningful estimates of hardness are important in cases when a conventional SAT solver cannot solve a SAT instance in a reasonable time. We show that the hardness of SAT encodings for LEC instances can be estimated \textit{w.r.t.} some SAT partitioning. We also demonstrate the dependence of the accuracy of the resulting estimates on the probabilistic characteristics of a specially defined random variable associated with the considered partitioning. The paper proposes several methods for constructing partitionings, which, when used in practice, allow one to estimate the hardness of SAT encodings for LEC with good accuracy. In the experimental part we propose a class of scalable LEC tests that give extremely complex instances with a relatively small input size $n$ of the considered circuits. For example, for $n = 40$, none of the state-of-the-art SAT solvers can cope with the considered tests in a reasonable time. However, these tests can be solved in parallel using the proposed partitioning methods.
summary: In this paper we investigate how to estimate the hardness of Boolean satisfiability (SAT) encodings for the Logical Equivalence Checking problem (LEC). Meaningful estimates of hardness are important in cases when a conventional SAT solver cannot solve a SAT instance in a reasonable time. We show that the hardness of SAT encodings for LEC instances can be estimated \textit{w.r.t.} some SAT partitioning. We also demonstrate the dependence of the accuracy of the resulting estimates on the probabilistic characteristics of a specially defined random variable associated with the considered partitioning. The paper proposes several methods for constructing partitionings, which, when used in practice, allow one to estimate the hardness of SAT encodings for LEC with good accuracy. In the experimental part we propose a class of scalable LEC tests that give extremely complex instances with a relatively small input size $n$ of the considered circuits. For example, for $n = 40$, none of the state-of-the-art SAT solvers can cope with the considered tests in a reasonable time. However, these tests can be solved in parallel using the proposed partitioning methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究如何估计逻辑等价检查问题（LEC）的布尔可满足性（SAT）编码的硬度。当传统 SAT 求解器无法在合理的时间内求解 SAT 实例时，有意义的硬度估计非常重要。我们表明，LEC 实例的 SAT 编码的硬度可以通过一些 SAT 分区来估计。我们还证明了结果估计的准确性对与所考虑的划分相关的专门定义的随机变量的概率特征的依赖性。本文提出了几种构建分区的方法，在实践中使用这些方法时，人们可以非常准确地估计 LEC 的 SAT 编码的硬度。在实验部分，我们提出了一类可扩展的 LEC 测试，该测试给出了极其复杂的实例，所考虑的电路的输入大小 $n$ 相对较小。例如，对于 $n = 40$，最先进的 SAT 求解器都无法在合理的时间内应对所考虑的测试。然而，这些测试可以使用所提出的划分方法并行解决。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过SAT划分方法估计布尔电路逻辑等价性检查（LEC）中SAT编码的难度。
AI.motivation: 传统SAT求解器在处理某些复杂LEC实例时效率低下，需通过准确估计SAT编码难度以优化求解策略。
AI.method: 基于SAT划分理论，结合随机变量的概率特性，提出多种划分方法并设计可扩展的LEC测试集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，当电路输入规模n=40时，现有求解器无法在合理时间内处理测试实例，但通过划分方法可实现并行求解。
AI.conclusion: 提出的划分方法能有效估计LEC问题的SAT编码难度，为复杂实例的并行求解提供可行方案。

authors_text: Zhijing Jin,Sydney Levine,Fernando Gonzalez,Ojasv Kamal,Maarten Sap,Mrinmaya Sachan,Rada Mihalcea,Josh Tenenbaum,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: When to Make Exceptions: Exploring Language Models as Accounts of Human Moral Judgment
title_zh: 何时例外：探索语言模型作为人类道德判断的解释
abstract: AI systems are becoming increasingly intertwined with human life. In order to effectively collaborate with humans and ensure safety, AI systems need to be able to understand, interpret and predict human moral judgments and decisions. Human moral judgments are often guided by rules, but not always. A central challenge for AI safety is capturing the flexibility of the human moral mind -- the ability to determine when a rule should be broken, especially in novel or unusual situations. In this paper, we present a novel challenge set consisting of rule-breaking question answering (RBQA) of cases that involve potentially permissible rule-breaking -- inspired by recent moral psychology studies. Using a state-of-the-art large language model (LLM) as a basis, we propose a novel moral chain of thought (MORALCOT) prompting strategy that combines the strengths of LLMs with theories of moral reasoning developed in cognitive science to predict human moral judgments. MORALCOT outperforms seven existing LLMs by 6.2% F1, suggesting that modeling human reasoning might be necessary to capture the flexibility of the human moral mind. We also conduct a detailed error analysis to suggest directions for future work to improve AI safety using RBQA. Our data is open-sourced at https://huggingface.co/datasets/feradauto/MoralExceptQA and code at https://github.com/feradauto/MoralCoT
summary: AI systems are becoming increasingly intertwined with human life. In order to effectively collaborate with humans and ensure safety, AI systems need to be able to understand, interpret and predict human moral judgments and decisions. Human moral judgments are often guided by rules, but not always. A central challenge for AI safety is capturing the flexibility of the human moral mind -- the ability to determine when a rule should be broken, especially in novel or unusual situations. In this paper, we present a novel challenge set consisting of rule-breaking question answering (RBQA) of cases that involve potentially permissible rule-breaking -- inspired by recent moral psychology studies. Using a state-of-the-art large language model (LLM) as a basis, we propose a novel moral chain of thought (MORALCOT) prompting strategy that combines the strengths of LLMs with theories of moral reasoning developed in cognitive science to predict human moral judgments. MORALCOT outperforms seven existing LLMs by 6.2% F1, suggesting that modeling human reasoning might be necessary to capture the flexibility of the human moral mind. We also conduct a detailed error analysis to suggest directions for future work to improve AI safety using RBQA. Our data is open-sourced at https://huggingface.co/datasets/feradauto/MoralExceptQA and code at https://github.com/feradauto/MoralCoT
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统与人类生活的联系日益紧密。为了有效地与人类协作并确保安全，人工智能系统需要能够理解、解释和预测人类的道德判断和决策。人类的道德判断常常受到规则的指导，但并非总是如此。人工智能安全的一个核心挑战是捕捉人类道德思维的灵活性——确定何时应该打破规则的能力，尤其是在新奇或不寻常的情况下。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的挑战集，其中包括涉及潜在允许的违规行为的案例的违规问答（RBQA）——受到最近道德心理学研究的启发。以最先进的大语言模型（LLM）为基础，我们提出了一种新颖的道德思想链（MORALCOT）提示策略，将法学硕士的优势与认知科学中发展的道德推理理论相结合，以预测人类道德判断。 MORALCOT 比现有的 7 个法学硕士的 F1 成绩高出 6.2%，这表明可能有必要对人类推理进行建模，以捕捉人类道德思维的灵活性。我们还进行了详细的错误分析，为未来使用 RBQA 提高人工智能安全性的工作方向提出建议。我们的数据在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/feradauto/MoralExceptQA 上开源，代码在 https://github.com/feradauto/MoralCoT 上

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的道德推理方法MORALCOT，通过结合大语言模型与认知科学理论，解决AI在复杂情境下预测人类道德判断的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着AI深度融入人类生活，需使其理解人类道德判断的灵活性，尤其在规则例外情境中，以确保安全协作。
AI.method: 构建基于道德心理学的规则例外问答数据集（RBQA），设计融合认知科学理论的MORALCOT提示策略，增强模型对道德推理的模拟能力。
AI.result: MORALCOT在F1指标上超越七种现有LLM 6.2%，验证了模拟人类推理对捕捉道德灵活性的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 建模人类道德推理是提升AI安全性的关键，RBQA数据集与MORALCOT方法为未来研究提供了基础框架。

Our data is open-sourced at https://huggingface.co/datasets/feradauto/MoralExceptQA and code at https://github.com/feradauto/MoralCoT 人工智能系统与人类生活的联系日益紧密。为了有效地与人类协作并确保安全，人工智能系统需要能够理解、解释和预测人类的道德判断和决策。人类的道德判断常常受到规则的指导，但并非总是如此。人工智能安全的一个核心挑战是捕捉人类道德思维的灵活性——确定何时应该打破规则的能力，尤其是在新奇或不寻常的情况下。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的挑战集，其中包括涉及潜在允许的违规行为的案例的违规问答（RBQA）——受到最近道德心理学研究的启发。以最先进的大语言模型（LLM）为基础，我们提出了一种新颖的道德思想链（MORALCOT）提示策略，将法学硕士的优势与认知科学中发展的道德推理理论相结合，以预测人类道德判断。 MORALCOT 比现有的 7 个法学硕士的 F1 成绩高出 6.2%，这表明可能有必要对人类推理进行建模，以捕捉人类道德思维的灵活性。我们还进行了详细的错误分析，为未来使用 RBQA 提高人工智能安全性的工作方向提出建议。我们的数据在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/feradauto/MoralExceptQA 上开源，代码在 https://github.com/feradauto/MoralCoT 上 本文提出了一种新的道德推理方法MORALCOT，通过结合大语言模型与认知科学理论，解决AI在复杂情境下预测人类道德判断的挑战。 Zhijing Jin,Sydney Levine,Fernando Gonzalez,Ojasv Kamal,Maarten Sap,Mrinmaya Sachan,Rada Mihalcea,Josh Tenenbaum,Bernhard Schölkopf cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Kunal Chowdhury
title: Designing a parallel suffix sort
title_zh: 设计并行后缀排序
abstract: Suffix sort plays a critical role in various computational algorithms including genomics as well as in frequently used day to day software applications. The sorting algorithm becomes tricky when we have lot of repeated characters in the string for a given radix. Various innovative implementations are available in this area e.g., Manber Myers. We present here an analysis that uses a concept around generalized polynomial factorization to sort these suffixes. The initial generation of these substring specific polynomial can be efficiently done using parallel threads and shared memory. The set of distinct factors and their order are known beforehand, and this helps us to sort the polynomials (equivalent of strings) accordingly.
summary: Suffix sort plays a critical role in various computational algorithms including genomics as well as in frequently used day to day software applications. The sorting algorithm becomes tricky when we have lot of repeated characters in the string for a given radix. Various innovative implementations are available in this area e.g., Manber Myers. We present here an analysis that uses a concept around generalized polynomial factorization to sort these suffixes. The initial generation of these substring specific polynomial can be efficiently done using parallel threads and shared memory. The set of distinct factors and their order are known beforehand, and this helps us to sort the polynomials (equivalent of strings) accordingly.
abstract_zh: 后缀排序在包括基因组学在内的各种计算算法以及频繁使用的日常软件应用程序中发挥着至关重要的作用。当给定基数的字符串中有大量重复字符时，排序算法变得很棘手。该领域有各种创新的实施方案，例如 Manber Myers。我们在这里提出一种分析，使用广义多项式分解的概念来对这些后缀进行排序。这些子串特定多项式的初始生成可以使用并行线程和共享内存有效地完成。不同因子的集合及其顺序是预先已知的，这有助于我们相应地对多项式（相当于字符串）进行排序。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于广义多项式因式分解的并行后缀排序算法，通过并行线程和共享内存优化处理重复字符的排序效率。
AI.motivation: 传统后缀排序算法在处理大量重复字符时效率低下，现有方法如Manber Myers难以满足大规模数据需求，需探索更高效的并行化方案。
AI.method: 利用广义多项式因式分解将子字符串转换为多项式，通过并行线程生成多项式并基于预知的因子顺序进行排序。
AI.result: 实现了针对重复字符字符串的高效并行后缀排序，验证了多项式因式分解方法在排序性能上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过并行化和多项式分解有效解决了重复字符排序难题，为相关算法提供了新的优化方向。

authors_text: U. Otamendi,I. Azpiroz,M. Quartulli,I. Olaizola,F. J. Perez,D. Alda,X. Garitano
title: Geo-imagery management and statistical processing in a regional context using Open Data Cube
title_zh: 使用开放数据立方体在区域范围内进行地理图像管理和统计处理
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, Published in 2021 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium IGARSS
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures, Published in 2021 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium IGARSS
abstract: We propose a methodology to manage and process remote sensing and geo-imagery data for non-expert users. The proposed system provides automated data ingestion and manipulation capability for analytical data-driven purposes. In this paper, we describe the technological basis of the proposed method in addition to describing the tool architecture, the inherent data flow, and its operation in a specific use case to provide statistical summaries of Sentinel-2 regions of interest corresponding to the cultivation of polygonal areas located in the Basque Country (ES).
summary: We propose a methodology to manage and process remote sensing and geo-imagery data for non-expert users. The proposed system provides automated data ingestion and manipulation capability for analytical data-driven purposes. In this paper, we describe the technological basis of the proposed method in addition to describing the tool architecture, the inherent data flow, and its operation in a specific use case to provide statistical summaries of Sentinel-2 regions of interest corresponding to the cultivation of polygonal areas located in the Basque Country (ES).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种为非专家用户管理和处理遥感和地理图像数据的方法。所提出的系统为分析数据驱动的目的提供自动数据摄取和操作能力。在本文中，我们除了描述工具架构、固有数据流及其在特定用例中的操作之外，还描述了所提出方法的技术基础，以提供与巴斯克地区（ES）多边形区域种植相对应的 Sentinel-2 感兴趣区域的统计摘要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Open Data Cube的地理影像管理与统计处理方法，旨在为非专业用户提供自动化数据处理能力，并通过巴斯克地区的Sentinel-2数据案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 遥感数据处理技术门槛高，传统方法难以满足非专业用户对区域地理数据的快速分析需求，需开发简化工具以提升数据应用效率。
AI.method: 构建基于Open Data Cube的系统架构，实现数据自动摄入与处理流程，设计数据流并结合Sentinel-2影像对巴斯克地区耕地区域进行统计分析。
AI.result: 成功生成巴斯克地区多边形耕地区域的统计摘要，验证了系统在自动化处理地理影像数据及生成区域统计信息方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为区域地理数据处理提供了自动化解决方案，降低了使用门槛，可推广至其他类似场景的遥感数据分析需求。

authors_text: Hoda Fares,Margherita Ronchini,Milad Zamani,Hooman Farkhani,Farshad Moradi
title: In the realm of hybrid Brain: Human Brain and AI
title_zh: 混合大脑领域：人脑和人工智能
abstract: With the recent developments in neuroscience and engineering, it is now possible to record brain signals and decode them. Also, a growing number of stimulation methods have emerged to modulate and influence brain activity. Current brain-computer interface (BCI) technology is mainly on therapeutic outcomes, it already demonstrated its efficiency as assistive and rehabilitative technology for patients with severe motor impairments. Recently, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technologies have been used to decode brain signals. Beyond this progress, combining AI with advanced BCIs in the form of implantable neurotechnologies grants new possibilities for the diagnosis, prediction, and treatment of neurological and psychiatric disorders. In this context, we envision the development of closed loop, intelligent, low-power, and miniaturized neural interfaces that will use brain inspired AI techniques with neuromorphic hardware to process the data from the brain. This will be referred to as Brain Inspired Brain Computer Interfaces (BI-BCIs). Such neural interfaces would offer access to deeper brain regions and better understanding for brain's functions and working mechanism, which improves BCIs operative stability and system's efficiency. On one hand, brain inspired AI algorithms represented by spiking neural networks (SNNs) would be used to interpret the multimodal neural signals in the BCI system. On the other hand, due to the ability of SNNs to capture rich dynamics of biological neurons and to represent and integrate different information dimensions such as time, frequency, and phase, it would be used to model and encode complex information processing in the brain and to provide feedback to the users. This paper provides an overview of the different methods to interface with the brain, presents future applications and discusses the merger of AI and BCIs.
summary: With the recent developments in neuroscience and engineering, it is now possible to record brain signals and decode them. Also, a growing number of stimulation methods have emerged to modulate and influence brain activity. Current brain-computer interface (BCI) technology is mainly on therapeutic outcomes, it already demonstrated its efficiency as assistive and rehabilitative technology for patients with severe motor impairments. Recently, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technologies have been used to decode brain signals. Beyond this progress, combining AI with advanced BCIs in the form of implantable neurotechnologies grants new possibilities for the diagnosis, prediction, and treatment of neurological and psychiatric disorders. In this context, we envision the development of closed loop, intelligent, low-power, and miniaturized neural interfaces that will use brain inspired AI techniques with neuromorphic hardware to process the data from the brain. This will be referred to as Brain Inspired Brain Computer Interfaces (BI-BCIs). Such neural interfaces would offer access to deeper brain regions and better understanding for brain's functions and working mechanism, which improves BCIs operative stability and system's efficiency. On one hand, brain inspired AI algorithms represented by spiking neural networks (SNNs) would be used to interpret the multimodal neural signals in the BCI system. On the other hand, due to the ability of SNNs to capture rich dynamics of biological neurons and to represent and integrate different information dimensions such as time, frequency, and phase, it would be used to model and encode complex information processing in the brain and to provide feedback to the users. This paper provides an overview of the different methods to interface with the brain, presents future applications and discusses the merger of AI and BCIs.
abstract_zh: 随着神经科学和工程学的最新发展，现在可以记录大脑信号并对其进行解码。此外，越来越多的刺激方法已经出现来调节和影响大脑活动。目前的脑机接口（BCI）技术主要注重治疗效果，它已经证明了其作为严重运动障碍患者的辅助和康复技术的有效性。最近，人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）技术已被用来解码大脑信号。除此之外，以植入式神经技术的形式将人工智能与先进的脑机接口相结合，为神经和精神疾病的诊断、预测和治疗提供了新的可能性。在这种背景下，我们设想开发闭环、智能、低功耗和小型化的神经接口，该接口将使用受大脑启发的人工智能技术和神经形态硬件来处理来自大脑的数据。这将被称为类脑启发脑机接口（BI-BCIs）。这种神经接口将提供对更深层大脑区域的访问，更好地了解大脑的功能和工作机制，从而提高脑机接口的运行稳定性和系统效率。一方面，以尖峰神经网络（SNN）为代表的受大脑启发的人工智能算法将用于解释 BCI 系统中的多模态神经信号。另一方面，由于SNN能够捕获生物神经元的丰富动态，并能够表示和整合不同的信息维度（例如时间、频率和相位），因此它将用于对大脑中复杂的信息处理进行建模和编码，并向用户提供反馈。本文概述了与大脑交互的不同方法，介绍了未来的应用，并讨论了人工智能和脑机接口的合并。

AI.tldr: 探讨将人工智能与脑机接口结合，开发新型闭环、智能、低功耗的神经接口技术
AI.motivation: 提升BCI在诊断和治疗神经精神疾病中的效率，通过AI技术实现更精准的脑信号处理与反馈
AI.method: 采用脉冲神经网络（SNNs）和类脑硬件处理多模态神经信号，构建闭环反馈系统
AI.result: 概述了多种脑机接口技术，讨论了AI与BCI融合的潜在应用及技术挑战
AI.conclusion: 融合AI与BCI将推动神经接口技术发展，提升对脑功能的理解及临床应用效率

ai_content.tldr: 探讨将人工智能与脑机接口结合，开发新型闭环、智能、低功耗的神经接口技术
ai_content.motivation: 提升BCI在诊断和治疗神经精神疾病中的效率，通过AI技术实现更精准的脑信号处理与反馈
ai_content.method: 采用脉冲神经网络（SNNs）和类脑硬件处理多模态神经信号，构建闭环反馈系统

search_text: In the realm of hybrid Brain: Human Brain and AI 混合大脑领域：人脑和人工智能 With the recent developments in neuroscience and engineering, it is now possible to record brain signals and decode them. Also, a growing number of stimulation methods have emerged to modulate and influence brain activity. Current brain-computer interface (BCI) technology is mainly on therapeutic outcomes, it already demonstrated its efficiency as assistive and rehabilitative technology for patients with severe motor impairments. Recently, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) technologies have been used to decode brain signals. Beyond this progress, combining AI with advanced BCIs in the form of implantable neurotechnologies grants new possibilities for the diagnosis, prediction, and treatment of neurological and psychiatric disorders. In this context, we envision the development of closed loop, intelligent, low-power, and miniaturized neural interfaces that will use brain inspired AI techniques with neuromorphic hardware to process the data from the brain. This will be referred to as Brain Inspired Brain Computer Interfaces (BI-BCIs). Such neural interfaces would offer access to deeper brain regions and better understanding for brain's functions and working mechanism, which improves BCIs operative stability and system's efficiency. On one hand, brain inspired AI algorithms represented by spiking neural networks (SNNs) would be used to interpret the multimodal neural signals in the BCI system. On the other hand, due to the ability of SNNs to capture rich dynamics of biological neurons and to represent and integrate different information dimensions such as time, frequency, and phase, it would be used to model and encode complex information processing in the brain and to provide feedback to the users. This paper provides an overview of the different methods to interface with the brain, presents future applications and discusses the merger of AI and BCIs. 随着神经科学和工程学的最新发展，现在可以记录大脑信号并对其进行解码。此外，越来越多的刺激方法已经出现来调节和影响大脑活动。目前的脑机接口（BCI）技术主要注重治疗效果，它已经证明了其作为严重运动障碍患者的辅助和康复技术的有效性。最近，人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）技术已被用来解码大脑信号。除此之外，以植入式神经技术的形式将人工智能与先进的脑机接口相结合，为神经和精神疾病的诊断、预测和治疗提供了新的可能性。在这种背景下，我们设想开发闭环、智能、低功耗和小型化的神经接口，该接口将使用受大脑启发的人工智能技术和神经形态硬件来处理来自大脑的数据。这将被称为类脑启发脑机接口（BI-BCIs）。这种神经接口将提供对更深层大脑区域的访问，更好地了解大脑的功能和工作机制，从而提高脑机接口的运行稳定性和系统效率。一方面，以尖峰神经网络（SNN）为代表的受大脑启发的人工智能算法将用于解释 BCI 系统中的多模态神经信号。另一方面，由于SNN能够捕获生物神经元的丰富动态，并能够表示和整合不同的信息维度（例如时间、频率和相位），因此它将用于对大脑中复杂的信息处理进行建模和编码，并向用户提供反馈。本文概述了与大脑交互的不同方法，介绍了未来的应用，并讨论了人工智能和脑机接口的合并。 探讨将人工智能与脑机接口结合，开发新型闭环、智能、低功耗的神经接口技术 Hoda Fares,Margherita Ronchini,Milad Zamani,Hooman Farkhani,Farshad Moradi eess.SY,cs.NE

authors_text: Nicky Zimmerman,Tiziano Guadagnino,Xieyuanli Chen,Jens Behley,Cyrill Stachniss
title: Long-Term Localization using Semantic Cues in Floor Plan Maps
title_zh: 使用平面图中的语义提示进行长期定位
abstract: Lifelong localization in a given map is an essential capability for autonomous service robots. In this paper, we consider the task of long-term localization in a changing indoor environment given sparse CAD floor plans. The commonly used pre-built maps from the robot sensors may increase the cost and time of deployment. Furthermore, their detailed nature requires that they are updated when significant changes occur. We address the difficulty of localization when the correspondence between the map and the observations is low due to the sparsity of the CAD map and the changing environment. To overcome both challenges, we propose to exploit semantic cues that are commonly present in human-oriented spaces. These semantic cues can be detected using RGB cameras by utilizing object detection, and are matched against an easy-to-update, abstract semantic map. The semantic information is integrated into a Monte Carlo localization framework using a particle filter that operates on 2D LiDAR scans and camera data. We provide a long-term localization solution and a semantic map format, for environments that undergo changes to their interior structure and detailed geometric maps are not available. We evaluate our localization framework on multiple challenging indoor scenarios in an office environment, taken weeks apart. The experiments suggest that our approach is robust to structural changes and can run on an onboard computer. We released the open source implementation of our approach written in C++ together with a ROS wrapper.

abstract_zh: 在给定地图中的终身定位是自主服务机器人的一项基本能力。在本文中，我们考虑在给定稀疏 CAD 平面图的情况下，在不断变化的室内环境中进行长期定位的任务。机器人传感器常用的预构建地图可能会增加部署成本和时间。此外，它们的详细性质要求在发生重大变化时进行更新。我们解决了由于 CAD 地图的稀疏性和不断变化的环境而导致地图与观测值之间的对应性较低时定位的困难。为了克服这两个挑战，我们建议利用以人为本的空间中常见的语义线索。这些语义线索可以利用 RGB 相机利用对象检测来检测，并与易于更新的抽象语义图进行匹配。使用对 2D LiDAR 扫描和相机数据进行操作的粒子滤波器，将语义信息集成到蒙特卡罗定位框架中。我们为内部结构发生变化且无法提供详细几何地图的环境提供长期定位解决方案和语义地图格式。我们在办公环境中的多个具有挑战性的室内场景中评估了我们的本地化框架，这些场景相隔数周。实验表明，我们的方法对结构变化具有鲁棒性，并且可以在机载计算机上运行。我们发布了用 C++ 编写的方法的开源实现以及 ROS 包装器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义线索的长期定位方法，用于在室内环境变化且缺乏详细几何地图的情况下，利用稀疏CAD平面图实现自主服务机器人的长期定位。
AI.motivation: 传统预构建地图成本高且需频繁更新，而稀疏CAD地图与动态环境间的低对应关系导致定位困难，亟需一种鲁棒的长期定位方案。
AI.method: 通过RGB相机检测语义线索（如物体检测），构建易更新的抽象语义地图，并将其与基于2D LiDAR和相机数据的粒子滤波器结合，集成至蒙特卡洛定位框架中。
AI.result: 在多场景办公环境中验证了方法对结构变化的鲁棒性，且可在嵌入式计算机上运行，同时开源了C++实现及ROS接口。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义信息有效解决了动态环境下的长期定位问题，为无详细几何地图场景提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: T. F. Tiotto,A. S. Goossens,A. E. Dima,C. Yakopcic,T. Banerjee,J. P. Borst,N. A. Taatgen
title: A Compact Model of Interface-Type Memristors Linking Physical and Device Properties
title_zh: 连接物理和器件特性的接口型忆阻器的紧凑模型
comment: 14 pages, 2 pages of Supplementary Data, 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: 14 pages, 2 pages of Supplementary Data, 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Memristors are an electronic device whose resistance depends on the voltage history that has been applied to its two terminals. Despite its clear advantage as a computational element, a suitable transport model is lacking for the special class of interface-based memristors. Here, we adapt the widely-used Yakopcic compact model by including transport equations relevant to interface-type memristors. This model is able to reproduce the qualitative behaviour measured upon Nb-doped SrTiO$_3$ memristive devices. Our analysis demonstrates a direct correlation between the devices' characteristic parameters and those of our model. The model can clearly identify the charge transport mechanism in different resistive states thus facilitating evaluation of the relevant parameters pertaining to resistive switching in interface-based memristors. One clear application of our study is its ability to inform the design and fabrication of related memristive devices.
summary: Memristors are an electronic device whose resistance depends on the voltage history that has been applied to its two terminals. Despite its clear advantage as a computational element, a suitable transport model is lacking for the special class of interface-based memristors. Here, we adapt the widely-used Yakopcic compact model by including transport equations relevant to interface-type memristors. This model is able to reproduce the qualitative behaviour measured upon Nb-doped SrTiO$_3$ memristive devices. Our analysis demonstrates a direct correlation between the devices' characteristic parameters and those of our model. The model can clearly identify the charge transport mechanism in different resistive states thus facilitating evaluation of the relevant parameters pertaining to resistive switching in interface-based memristors. One clear application of our study is its ability to inform the design and fabrication of related memristive devices.
abstract_zh: 忆阻器是一种电子器件，其电阻取决于施加到其两个端子的电压历史。尽管其作为计算元件具有明显的优势，但对于特殊类型的基于接口的忆阻器缺乏合适的传输模型。在这里，我们通过包含与界面型忆阻器相关的传输方程来适应广泛使用的 Yakopcic 紧凑模型。该模型能够重现在 Nb 掺杂 SrTiO$_3$ 忆阻器件上测量的定性行为。我们的分析表明设备的特征参数与我们模型的特征参数之间存在直接相关性。该模型可以清楚地识别不同电阻状态下的电荷传输机制，从而有助于评估基于界面的忆阻器中与电阻切换相关的参数。我们的研究的一个明显应用是它能够为相关忆阻设备的设计和制造提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种连接物理特性和器件特性的界面型忆阻器紧凑模型。
AI.motivation: 界面型忆阻器缺乏合适的传输模型，限制了其作为计算元件的应用。
AI.method: 通过改进广泛应用的Yakopcic模型，纳入界面型忆阻器相关的传输方程，并在Nb掺杂SrTiO3忆阻器上验证模型。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了器件的特性行为，揭示了器件参数与模型参数的直接关联，并能识别不同电阻状态下的电荷传输机制。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为界面型忆阻器的设计与制造提供了理论依据，有助于评估电阻切换相关参数。

Our analysis demonstrates a direct correlation between the devices' characteristic parameters and those of our model. The model can clearly identify the charge transport mechanism in different resistive states thus facilitating evaluation of the relevant parameters pertaining to resistive switching in interface-based memristors. One clear application of our study is its ability to inform the design and fabrication of related memristive devices. 忆阻器是一种电子器件，其电阻取决于施加到其两个端子的电压历史。尽管其作为计算元件具有明显的优势，但对于特殊类型的基于接口的忆阻器缺乏合适的传输模型。在这里，我们通过包含与界面型忆阻器相关的传输方程来适应广泛使用的 Yakopcic 紧凑模型。该模型能够重现在 Nb 掺杂 SrTiO$_3$ 忆阻器件上测量的定性行为。我们的分析表明设备的特征参数与我们模型的特征参数之间存在直接相关性。该模型可以清楚地识别不同电阻状态下的电荷传输机制，从而有助于评估基于界面的忆阻器中与电阻切换相关的参数。我们的研究的一个明显应用是它能够为相关忆阻设备的设计和制造提供信息。 本文提出了一种连接物理特性和器件特性的界面型忆阻器紧凑模型。 T. F. Tiotto,A. S. Goossens,A. E. Dima,C. Yakopcic,T. Banerjee,J. P. Borst,N. A. Taatgen cs.ET,cs.AI,cs.NE,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Tenglong Ao,Qingzhe Gao,Yuke Lou,Baoquan Chen,Libin Liu
title: Rhythmic Gesticulator: Rhythm-Aware Co-Speech Gesture Synthesis with Hierarchical Neural Embeddings
title_zh: 节奏手势器：具有分层神经嵌入的节奏感知协同语音手势合成
abstract: Automatic synthesis of realistic co-speech gestures is an increasingly important yet challenging task in artificial embodied agent creation. Previous systems mainly focus on generating gestures in an end-to-end manner, which leads to difficulties in mining the clear rhythm and semantics due to the complex yet subtle harmony between speech and gestures. We present a novel co-speech gesture synthesis method that achieves convincing results both on the rhythm and semantics. For the rhythm, our system contains a robust rhythm-based segmentation pipeline to ensure the temporal coherence between the vocalization and gestures explicitly. For the gesture semantics, we devise a mechanism to effectively disentangle both low- and high-level neural embeddings of speech and motion based on linguistic theory. The high-level embedding corresponds to semantics, while the low-level embedding relates to subtle variations. Lastly, we build correspondence between the hierarchical embeddings of the speech and the motion, resulting in rhythm- and semantics-aware gesture synthesis. Evaluations with existing objective metrics, a newly proposed rhythmic metric, and human feedback show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art systems by a clear margin.
summary: Automatic synthesis of realistic co-speech gestures is an increasingly important yet challenging task in artificial embodied agent creation. Previous systems mainly focus on generating gestures in an end-to-end manner, which leads to difficulties in mining the clear rhythm and semantics due to the complex yet subtle harmony between speech and gestures. We present a novel co-speech gesture synthesis method that achieves convincing results both on the rhythm and semantics. For the rhythm, our system contains a robust rhythm-based segmentation pipeline to ensure the temporal coherence between the vocalization and gestures explicitly. For the gesture semantics, we devise a mechanism to effectively disentangle both low- and high-level neural embeddings of speech and motion based on linguistic theory. The high-level embedding corresponds to semantics, while the low-level embedding relates to subtle variations. Lastly, we build correspondence between the hierarchical embeddings of the speech and the motion, resulting in rhythm- and semantics-aware gesture synthesis. Evaluations with existing objective metrics, a newly proposed rhythmic metric, and human feedback show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art systems by a clear margin.
abstract_zh: 在人工具体代理创建中，自动合成真实的协同语音手势是一项日益重要但具有挑战性的任务。以前的系统主要侧重于以端到端的方式生成手势，由于语音和手势之间复杂而微妙的和谐，导致挖掘清晰的节奏和语义变得困难。我们提出了一种新颖的协同语音手势合成方法，该方法在节奏和语义上都取得了令人信服的结果。对于节奏，我们的系统包含一个强大的基于节奏的分割管道，以明确地确保发声和手势之间的时间连贯性。对于手势语义，我们设计了一种基于语言理论的机制，可以有效地解开语音和运动的低级和高级神经嵌入。高级嵌入对应于语义，而低级嵌入涉及微妙的变化。最后，我们在语音和动作的分层嵌入之间建立对应关系，从而产生节奏和语义感知的手势合成。对现有客观指标、新提出的节奏指标和人类反馈的评估表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的系统。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于分层神经嵌入的节奏感知共说话姿合成方法，以生成在节奏和语义上都真实的协同语音手势。
AI.motivation: 传统端到端生成方法难以明确分离语音与手势的节奏和语义关联，导致生成结果缺乏自然和谐性。
AI.method: 构建节奏分割管道确保时序一致性，设计分层嵌入机制分离语音/动作的高低层次语义与细微变化，并建立跨模态嵌入对应关系。
AI.result: 在客观指标、新节奏度量标准及人类评估中均显著优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦节奏与语义的分层表征，实现了更自然的协同语音手势生成，为具身智能体研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Sally Khaidem,Mansi Sharma
title: A Novel Light Field Coding Scheme Based on Deep Belief Network & Weighted Binary Images for Additive Layered Displays
title_zh: 一种基于深度置信网络和加权二值图像的新型光场编码方案，用于附加分层显示
comment: The paper is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: The paper is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: Light-field displays create an immersive experience by providing binocular depth sensation and motion parallax. Stacking light attenuating layers is one approach to implement a light field display with a broader depth of field, wide viewing angles and high resolution. Due to the transparent holographic optical element (HOE) layers, additive layered displays can be integrated into augmented reality (AR) wearables to overlay virtual objects onto the real world, creating a seamless mixed reality (XR) experience. This paper proposes a novel framework for light field representation and coding that utilizes Deep Belief Network (DBN) and weighted binary images suitable for additive layered displays. The weighted binary representation of layers makes the framework more flexible for adaptive bitrate encoding. The framework effectively captures intrinsic redundancies in the light field data, and thus provides a scalable solution for light field coding suitable for XR display applications. The latent code is encoded by H.265 codec generating a rate-scalable bit-stream. We achieve adaptive bitrate decoding by varying the number of weighted binary images and the H.265 quantization parameter, while maintaining an optimal reconstruction quality. The framework is tested on real and synthetic benchmark datasets, and the results validate the rate-scalable property of the proposed scheme.
summary: Light-field displays create an immersive experience by providing binocular depth sensation and motion parallax. The framework effectively captures intrinsic redundancies in the light field data, and thus provides a scalable solution for light field coding suitable for XR display applications. The latent code is encoded by H.265 codec generating a rate-scalable bit-stream. We achieve adaptive bitrate decoding by varying the number of weighted binary images and the H.265 quantization parameter, while maintaining an optimal reconstruction quality. The framework is tested on real and synthetic benchmark datasets, and the results validate the rate-scalable property of the proposed scheme.
abstract_zh: 光场显示器通过提供双眼深度感和运动视差来创造身临其境的体验。堆叠光衰减层是实现具有更宽景深、宽视角和高分辨率的光场显示器的一种方法。由于透明的全息光学元件 (HOE) 层，附加分层显示器可以集成到增强现实 (AR) 可穿戴设备中，将虚拟对象叠加到现实世界上，从而创建无缝的混合现实 (XR) 体验。本文提出了一种新颖的光场表示和编码框架，该框架利用深度置信网络（DBN）和适合附加分层显示的加权二值图像。层的加权二进制表示使框架对于自适应比特率编码更加灵活。该框架有效地捕获了光场数据中的固有冗余，从而为适合 XR 显示应用的光场编码提供了可扩展的解决方案。潜在代码由 H.265 编解码器编码，生成速率可扩展的比特流。我们通过改变加权二值图像的数量和 H.265 量化参数来实现自适应比特率解码，同时保持最佳的重建质量。该框架在真实和合成的基准数据集上进行了测试，结果验证了所提出方案的速率可扩展特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度信念网络（DBN）和加权二值图像的新型光场编码方案，适用于叠加式分层显示，以实现可扩展的光场编码。
AI.motivation: 现有的光场显示技术在深度场、视场角和分辨率方面存在局限，且难以适应增强现实（AR）设备对动态比特率和高质量重建的需求。
AI.method: 结合深度信念网络提取光场数据潜在特征，利用加权二值图像表示分层结构，并通过H.265编码生成可扩展比特流，通过调整二值图像数量和量化参数实现自适应比特率解码。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的实验验证了该方案的比特率可扩展性，能够在保持重建质量的前提下灵活适应不同传输带宽需求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效捕捉了光场数据的内在冗余，为XR显示应用提供了高效、可扩展的光场编码解决方案。
