authors_text: Zican Zha,Hao Tang,Yunlian Sun,Jinhui Tang
title: Boosting Few-shot Fine-grained Recognition with Background Suppression and Foreground Alignment
title_zh: 通过背景抑制和前景对齐增强小样本细粒度识别
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT) 2023
abstract: Few-shot fine-grained recognition (FS-FGR) aims to recognize novel fine-grained categories with the help of limited available samples. Undoubtedly, this task inherits the main challenges from both few-shot learning and fine-grained recognition. First, the lack of labeled samples makes the learned model easy to overfit. Second, it also suffers from high intra-class variance and low inter-class differences in the datasets. To address this challenging task, we propose a two-stage background suppression and foreground alignment framework, which is composed of a background activation suppression (BAS) module, a foreground object alignment (FOA) module, and a local-to-local (L2L) similarity metric. Specifically, the BAS is introduced to generate a foreground mask for localization to weaken background disturbance and enhance dominative foreground objects. The FOA then reconstructs the feature map of each support sample according to its correction to the query ones, which addresses the problem of misalignment between support-query image pairs. To enable the proposed method to have the ability to capture subtle differences in confused samples, we present a novel L2L similarity metric to further measure the local similarity between a pair of aligned spatial features in the embedding space. What's more, considering that background interference brings poor robustness, we infer the pairwise similarity of feature maps using both the raw image and the refined image. Extensive experiments conducted on multiple popular fine-grained benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing state of the art by a large margin. The source codes are available at: https://github.com/CSer-Tang-hao/BSFA-FSFG.
summary: Few-shot fine-grained recognition (FS-FGR) aims to recognize novel fine-grained categories with the help of limited available samples. Undoubtedly, this task inherits the main challenges from both few-shot learning and fine-grained recognition. First, the lack of labeled samples makes the learned model easy to overfit. Second, it also suffers from high intra-class variance and low inter-class differences in the datasets. To address this challenging task, we propose a two-stage background suppression and foreground alignment framework, which is composed of a background activation suppression (BAS) module, a foreground object alignment (FOA) module, and a local-to-local (L2L) similarity metric. Specifically, the BAS is introduced to generate a foreground mask for localization to weaken background disturbance and enhance dominative foreground objects. The FOA then reconstructs the feature map of each support sample according to its correction to the query ones, which addresses the problem of misalignment between support-query image pairs. To enable the proposed method to have the ability to capture subtle differences in confused samples, we present a novel L2L similarity metric to further measure the local similarity between a pair of aligned spatial features in the embedding space. What's more, considering that background interference brings poor robustness, we infer the pairwise similarity of feature maps using both the raw image and the refined image. Extensive experiments conducted on multiple popular fine-grained benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing state of the art by a large margin. The source codes are available at: https://github.com/CSer-Tang-hao/BSFA-FSFG.
abstract_zh: 少镜头细粒度识别（FS-FGR）旨在借助有限的可用样本识别新的细粒度类别。毫无疑问，这项任务继承了小样本学习和细粒度识别的主要挑战。首先，缺乏标记样本使得学习到的模型容易过拟合。其次，它还遭受数据集中类内方差高和类间差异低的问题。为了解决这一具有挑战性的任务，我们提出了一个两阶段的背景抑制和前景对齐框架，该框架由背景激活抑制（BAS）模块、前景对象对齐（FOA）模块和局部到局部（L2L）相似度度量组成。具体来说，引入BAS来生成用于定位的前景掩模，以减弱背景干扰并增强主要前景物体。然后，FOA 根据对查询样本的校正来重建每个支持样本的特征图，这解决了支持-查询图像对之间的错位问题。为了使所提出的方法能够捕获混淆样本中的细微差异，我们提出了一种新颖的 L2L 相似性度量，以进一步测量嵌入空间中一对对齐的空​​间特征之间的局部相似性。此外，考虑到背景干扰带来的鲁棒性较差，我们使用原始图像和精炼图像来推断特征图的成对相似性。对多个流行的细粒度基准进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法大大优于现有的技术水平。源代码位于：https://github.com/CSer-Tang-hao/BSFA-FSFG。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种两阶段框架，通过背景抑制和前景对齐来提升少样本细粒度识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 少样本细粒度识别面临样本不足、类内方差大和类间差异小的挑战，现有方法在背景干扰和特征对齐方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计了背景激活抑制模块（BAS）生成前景掩码以削弱背景干扰，并通过前景对象对齐模块（FOA）修正支持样本与查询样本的特征图对齐。引入局部到局部（L2L）相似度度量，结合原始图像与优化后的图像计算特征图相似性。
AI.result: 在多个细粒度基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过背景抑制与前景对齐的联合优化，有效提升了少样本细粒度识别的鲁棒性和准确性。

Specifically, the BAS is introduced to generate a foreground mask for localization to weaken background disturbance and enhance dominative foreground objects. The FOA then reconstructs the feature map of each support sample according to its correction to the query ones, which addresses the problem of misalignment between support-query image pairs. To enable the proposed method to have the ability to capture subtle differences in confused samples, we present a novel L2L similarity metric to further measure the local similarity between a pair of aligned spatial features in the embedding space. What's more, considering that background interference brings poor robustness, we infer the pairwise similarity of feature maps using both the raw image and the refined image. Extensive experiments conducted on multiple popular fine-grained benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing state of the art by a large margin. authors_text: Hejun Huang,Zuguo Chen,Chaoyang Chen,Ming Lu,Ying Zou
title: Complementary consistency semi-supervised learning for 3D left atrial image segmentation
title_zh: 3D 左心房图像分割的互补一致性半监督学习
abstract: A network based on complementary consistency training, called CC-Net, has been proposed for semi-supervised left atrium image segmentation. CC-Net efficiently utilizes unlabeled data from the perspective of complementary information to address the problem of limited ability of existing semi-supervised segmentation algorithms to extract information from unlabeled data. The complementary symmetric structure of CC-Net includes a main model and two auxiliary models. The complementary model inter-perturbations between the main and auxiliary models force consistency to form complementary consistency. The complementary information obtained by the two auxiliary models helps the main model to effectively focus on ambiguous areas, while enforcing consistency between the models is advantageous in obtaining decision boundaries with low uncertainty. CC-Net has been validated on two public datasets. In the case of specific proportions of labeled data, compared with current advanced algorithms, CC-Net has the best semi-supervised segmentation performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Cuthbert-Huang/CC-Net.
summary: A network based on complementary consistency training, called CC-Net, has been proposed for semi-supervised left atrium image segmentation. CC-Net efficiently utilizes unlabeled data from the perspective of complementary information to address the problem of limited ability of existing semi-supervised segmentation algorithms to extract information from unlabeled data. The complementary symmetric structure of CC-Net includes a main model and two auxiliary models. The complementary model inter-perturbations between the main and auxiliary models force consistency to form complementary consistency. The complementary information obtained by the two auxiliary models helps the main model to effectively focus on ambiguous areas, while enforcing consistency between the models is advantageous in obtaining decision boundaries with low uncertainty. CC-Net has been validated on two public datasets. In the case of specific proportions of labeled data, compared with current advanced algorithms, CC-Net has the best semi-supervised segmentation performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Cuthbert-Huang/CC-Net.
abstract_zh: 一种基于互补一致性训练的网络（称为 CC-Net）已被提出用于半监督左心房图像分割。 CC-Net从互补信息的角度有效利用未标记数据，解决现有半监督分割算法从未标记数据中提取信息能力有限的问题。 CC-Net的互补对称结构包括一个主模型和两个辅助模型。主、辅模型之间互补模型的相互扰动迫使一致性形成互补一致性。两个辅助模型获得的互补信息有助于主模型有效地关注模​​糊区域，同时增强模型之间的一致性有利于获得低不确定性的决策边界。 CC-Net 已在两个公共数据集上得到验证。在标记数据特定比例的情况下，与当前先进算法相比，CC-Net具有最佳的半监督分割性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Cuthbert-Huang/CC-Net 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于互补一致性训练的半监督学习网络CC-Net，用于3D左心房图像分割。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督分割算法在利用未标记数据时存在能力不足的问题，需通过互补信息提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计包含主模型和两个辅助模型的互补对称结构，通过模型间互扰强制一致性，利用辅助模型的互补信息聚焦模糊区域并优化决策边界。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上验证，特定标注数据比例下优于当前先进算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CC-Net通过互补一致性机制有效利用未标记数据，在半监督左心房分割任务中达到最优性能。

authors_text: Yasuhiro Yao,Ryoichi Ishikawa,Shingo Ando,Kana Kurata,Naoki Ito,Jun Shimamura,Takeshi Oishi
title: Non-learning Stereo-aided Depth Completion under Mis-projection via Selective Stereo Matching
title_zh: 通过选择性立体匹配实现误投影下的非学习立体辅助深度补全
abstract: We propose a non-learning depth completion method for a sparse depth map captured using a light detection and ranging (LiDAR) sensor guided by a pair of stereo images. Generally, conventional stereo-aided depth completion methods have two limiations. (i) They assume the given sparse depth map is accurately aligned to the input image, whereas the alignment is difficult to achieve in practice. (ii) They have limited accuracy in the long range because the depth is estimated by pixel disparity. To solve the abovementioned limitations, we propose selective stereo matching (SSM) that searches the most appropriate depth value for each image pixel from its neighborly projected LiDAR points based on an energy minimization framework. This depth selection approach can handle any type of mis-projection. Moreover, SSM has an advantage in terms of long-range depth accuracy because it directly uses the LiDAR measurement rather than the depth acquired from the stereo. SSM is a discrete process; thus, we apply variational smoothing with binary anisotropic diffusion tensor (B-ADT) to generate a continuous depth map while preserving depth discontinuity across object boundaries. Experimentally, compared with the previous state-of-the-art stereo-aided depth completion, the proposed method reduced the mean absolute error (MAE) of the depth estimation to 0.65 times and demonstrated approximately twice more accurate estimation in the long range. Moreover, under various LiDAR-camera calibration errors, the proposed method reduced the depth estimation MAE to 0.34-0.93 times from previous depth completion methods.
summary: We propose a non-learning depth completion method for a sparse depth map captured using a light detection and ranging (LiDAR) sensor guided by a pair of stereo images. Generally, conventional stereo-aided depth completion methods have two limiations. (i) They assume the given sparse depth map is accurately aligned to the input image, whereas the alignment is difficult to achieve in practice. (ii) They have limited accuracy in the long range because the depth is estimated by pixel disparity. To solve the abovementioned limitations, we propose selective stereo matching (SSM) that searches the most appropriate depth value for each image pixel from its neighborly projected LiDAR points based on an energy minimization framework. This depth selection approach can handle any type of mis-projection. Moreover, SSM has an advantage in terms of long-range depth accuracy because it directly uses the LiDAR measurement rather than the depth acquired from the stereo. SSM is a discrete process; thus, we apply variational smoothing with binary anisotropic diffusion tensor (B-ADT) to generate a continuous depth map while preserving depth discontinuity across object boundaries. Experimentally, compared with the previous state-of-the-art stereo-aided depth completion, the proposed method reduced the mean absolute error (MAE) of the depth estimation to 0.65 times and demonstrated approximately twice more accurate estimation in the long range. Moreover, under various LiDAR-camera calibration errors, the proposed method reduced the depth estimation MAE to 0.34-0.93 times from previous depth completion methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种非学习深度补全方法，用于使用由一对立体图像引导的光检测和测距（LiDAR）传感器捕获的稀疏深度图。一般来说，传统的立体辅助深度完成方法有两个局限性。 （i）他们假设给定的稀疏深度图与输入图像精确对齐，但实际上很难实现对齐。 （ii）它们在长距离内的精度有限，因为深度是通过像素视差估计的。为了解决上述限制，我们提出选择性立体匹配（SSM），基于能量最小化框架，从其相邻投影的激光雷达点中搜索每个图像像素最合适的深度值。这种深度选择方法可以处理任何类型的错误投影。此外，SSM在远距离深度精度方面具有优势，因为它直接使用LiDAR测量而不是从立体获取的深度。 SSM是一个离散过程；因此，我们应用二元各向异性扩散张量 (B-ADT) 的变分平滑来生成连续的深度图，同时保留跨对象边界的深度不连续性。实验上，与之前最先进的立体辅助深度补全相比，所提出的方法将深度估计的平均绝对误差（MAE）降低到了0.65倍，并且在远距离估计精度提高了大约两倍。此外，在各种LiDAR相机校准误差下，所提出的方法将深度估计MAE比之前的深度完成方法降低到0.34-0.93倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非学习的立体视觉辅助深度补全方法，通过选择性立体匹配解决稀疏LiDAR深度图与图像对齐困难及远距离精度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统立体视觉辅助深度补全方法存在两方面局限：深度图与图像难以精确对齐，且依赖视差估计导致远距离精度不足。
AI.method: 提出选择性立体匹配（SSM）方法，在能量最小化框架下从邻近LiDAR点中选择最佳深度值，并结合二值各向异性扩散张量（B-ADT）进行变分平滑以生成连续深度图。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法将深度估计的平均绝对误差（MAE）降低至先前方法的0.65倍，在远距离精度提升约2倍；在不同LiDAR-相机标定误差下，MAE进一步降低至0.34-0.93倍。
AI.conclusion: SSM通过直接利用LiDAR测量值和鲁棒的深度选择机制，在处理投影误差及提升远距离精度方面优于现有方法，具有较高的标定鲁棒性。

search_text: Non-learning Stereo-aided Depth Completion under Mis-projection via Selective Stereo Matching 通过选择性立体匹配实现误投影下的非学习立体辅助深度补全 We propose a non-learning depth completion method for a sparse depth map captured using a light detection and ranging (LiDAR) sensor guided by a pair of stereo images. Generally, conventional stereo-aided depth completion methods have two limiations. (i) They assume the given sparse depth map is accurately aligned to the input image, whereas the alignment is difficult to achieve in practice. (ii) They have limited accuracy in the long range because the depth is estimated by pixel disparity. To solve the abovementioned limitations, we propose selective stereo matching (SSM) that searches the most appropriate depth value for each image pixel from its neighborly projected LiDAR points based on an energy minimization framework. This depth selection approach can handle any type of mis-projection. Moreover, SSM has an advantage in terms of long-range depth accuracy because it directly uses the LiDAR measurement rather than the depth acquired from the stereo. SSM is a discrete process; thus, we apply variational smoothing with binary anisotropic diffusion tensor (B-ADT) to generate a continuous depth map while preserving depth discontinuity across object boundaries. Experimentally, compared with the previous state-of-the-art stereo-aided depth completion, the proposed method reduced the mean absolute error (MAE) of the depth estimation to 0.65 times and demonstrated approximately twice more accurate estimation in the long range. Moreover, under various LiDAR-camera calibration errors, the proposed method reduced the depth estimation MAE to 0.34-0.93 times from previous depth completion methods. 我们提出了一种非学习深度补全方法，用于使用由一对立体图像引导的光检测和测距（LiDAR）传感器捕获的稀疏深度图。一般来说，传统的立体辅助深度完成方法有两个局限性。 （i）他们假设给定的稀疏深度图与输入图像精确对齐，但实际上很难实现对齐。 （ii）它们在长距离内的精度有限，因为深度是通过像素视差估计的。为了解决上述限制，我们提出选择性立体匹配（SSM），基于能量最小化框架，从其相邻投影的激光雷达点中搜索每个图像像素最合适的深度值。这种深度选择方法可以处理任何类型的错误投影。此外，SSM在远距离深度精度方面具有优势，因为它直接使用LiDAR测量而不是从立体获取的深度。 SSM是一个离散过程；因此，我们应用二元各向异性扩散张量 (B-ADT) 的变分平滑来生成连续的深度图，同时保留跨对象边界的深度不连续性。实验上，与之前最先进的立体辅助深度补全相比，所提出的方法将深度估计的平均绝对误差（MAE）降低到了0.65倍，并且在远距离估计精度提高了大约两倍。此外，在各种LiDAR相机校准误差下，所提出的方法将深度估计MAE比之前的深度完成方法降低到0.34-0.93倍。 本文提出一种非学习的立体视觉辅助深度补全方法，通过选择性立体匹配解决稀疏LiDAR深度图与图像对齐困难及远距离精度不足的问题。 Yasuhiro Yao,Ryoichi Ishikawa,Shingo Ando,Kana Kurata,Naoki Ito,Jun Shimamura,Takeshi Oishi cs.CV

authors_text: Kangchen Lv,Mingrui Yu,Yifan Pu,Xin Jiang,Gao Huang,Xiang Li
title: Learning to Estimate 3-D States of Deformable Linear Objects from Single-Frame Occluded Point Clouds
title_zh: 学习从单帧遮挡点云估计可变形线性物体的 3D 状态
comment: Accepted by International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: Accepted by International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Accurately and robustly estimating the state of deformable linear objects (DLOs), such as ropes and wires, is crucial for DLO manipulation and other applications. However, it remains a challenging open issue due to the high dimensionality of the state space, frequent occlusions, and noises. This paper focuses on learning to robustly estimate the states of DLOs from single-frame point clouds in the presence of occlusions using a data-driven method. We propose a novel two-branch network architecture to exploit global and local information of input point cloud respectively and design a fusion module to effectively leverage the advantages of both methods. Simulation and real-world experimental results demonstrate that our method can generate globally smooth and locally precise DLO state estimation results even with heavily occluded point clouds, which can be directly applied to real-world robotic manipulation of DLOs in 3-D space.
summary: Accurately and robustly estimating the state of deformable linear objects (DLOs), such as ropes and wires, is crucial for DLO manipulation and other applications. However, it remains a challenging open issue due to the high dimensionality of the state space, frequent occlusions, and noises. This paper focuses on learning to robustly estimate the states of DLOs from single-frame point clouds in the presence of occlusions using a data-driven method. We propose a novel two-branch network architecture to exploit global and local information of input point cloud respectively and design a fusion module to effectively leverage the advantages of both methods. Simulation and real-world experimental results demonstrate that our method can generate globally smooth and locally precise DLO state estimation results even with heavily occluded point clouds, which can be directly applied to real-world robotic manipulation of DLOs in 3-D space.
abstract_zh: 准确而稳健地估计可变形线性物体 (DLO)（例如绳索和电线）的状态对于 DLO 操作和其他应用至关重要。然而，由于状态空间的高维性、频繁的遮挡和噪声，它仍然是一个具有挑战性的开放问题。本文重点学习使用数据驱动方法在存在遮挡的情况下从单帧点云稳健地估计 DLO 的状态。我们提出了一种新颖的双分支网络架构，分别利用输入点云的全局和局部信息，并设计一个融合模块以有效地利用两种方法的优点。仿真和现实世界的实验结果表明，即使在点云严重遮挡的情况下，我们的方法也可以生成全局平滑和局部精确的 DLO 状态估计结果，这可以直接应用于 3D 空间中 DLO 的现实机器人操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单帧遮挡点云中学习估计可变形线性物体（DLO）三维状态的方法。
AI.motivation: 可变形线性物体（如绳索、电线）的状态估计在机器人操作中至关重要，但因状态空间高维、频繁遮挡和噪声导致估计困难。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络架构分别提取点云的全局和局部信息，并通过融合模块整合两者优势。
AI.result: 仿真和真实实验表明，该方法能在严重遮挡下生成全局平滑且局部精确的DLO状态估计结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实际三维空间中DLO的机器人操作提供了直接可用的解决方案。

authors_text: Jiale Zhang,Yulun Zhang,Jinjin Gu,Yongbing Zhang,Linghe Kong,Xin Yuan
title: Accurate Image Restoration with Attention Retractable Transformer
title_zh: Attention伸缩变压器精准图像恢复
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2023. Code and models are available at https://github.com/gladzhang/ART
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2023. Code and models are available at https://github.com/gladzhang/ART
abstract: Recently, Transformer-based image restoration networks have achieved promising improvements over convolutional neural networks due to parameter-independent global interactions. To lower computational cost, existing works generally limit self-attention computation within non-overlapping windows. However, each group of tokens are always from a dense area of the image. This is considered as a dense attention strategy since the interactions of tokens are restrained in dense regions. Obviously, this strategy could result in restricted receptive fields. To address this issue, we propose Attention Retractable Transformer (ART) for image restoration, which presents both dense and sparse attention modules in the network. The sparse attention module allows tokens from sparse areas to interact and thus provides a wider receptive field. Furthermore, the alternating application of dense and sparse attention modules greatly enhances representation ability of Transformer while providing retractable attention on the input image.We conduct extensive experiments on image super-resolution, denoising, and JPEG compression artifact reduction tasks. Experimental results validate that our proposed ART outperforms state-of-the-art methods on various benchmark datasets both quantitatively and visually. We also provide code and models at https://github.com/gladzhang/ART.
summary: Recently, Transformer-based image restoration networks have achieved promising improvements over convolutional neural networks due to parameter-independent global interactions. To lower computational cost, existing works generally limit self-attention computation within non-overlapping windows. However, each group of tokens are always from a dense area of the image. This is considered as a dense attention strategy since the interactions of tokens are restrained in dense regions. Obviously, this strategy could result in restricted receptive fields. To address this issue, we propose Attention Retractable Transformer (ART) for image restoration, which presents both dense and sparse attention modules in the network. The sparse attention module allows tokens from sparse areas to interact and thus provides a wider receptive field. Furthermore, the alternating application of dense and sparse attention modules greatly enhances representation ability of Transformer while providing retractable attention on the input image.We conduct extensive experiments on image super-resolution, denoising, and JPEG compression artifact reduction tasks. Experimental results validate that our proposed ART outperforms state-of-the-art methods on various benchmark datasets both quantitatively and visually. We also provide code and models at https://github.com/gladzhang/ART.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于参数无关的全局交互，基于 Transformer 的图像恢复网络相对于卷积神经网络取得了有希望的改进。为了降低计算成本，现有的工作通常限制非重叠窗口内的自注意力计算。然而，每组标记始终来自图像的密集区域。这被认为是一种密集注意力策略，因为令牌的相互作用在密集区域受到限制。显然，这种策略可能会导致接受域受限。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了用于图像恢复的注意力可伸缩变压器（ART），它在网络中呈现了密集和稀疏注意力模块。稀疏注意力模块允许来自稀疏区域的令牌进行交互，从而提供更广泛的感受野。此外，密集和稀疏注意力模块的交替应用极大地增强了 Transformer 的表示能力，同时为输入图像提供可伸缩的注意力。我们对图像超分辨率、去噪和 JPEG 压缩伪影减少任务进行了广泛的实验。实验结果验证了我们提出的 ART 在各种基准数据集上无论在数量上还是在视觉上都优于最先进的方法。我们还在 https://github.com/gladzhang/ART 提供代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Attention Retractable Transformer (ART)的新型Transformer架构，用于改进图像修复任务中的注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的图像修复方法通过非重叠窗口限制自注意力计算，导致感受野受限，无法有效捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计了融合密集注意力模块和稀疏注意力模块的ART网络，通过交替应用两种模块，在保持计算效率的同时扩展感受野并增强特征表示能力。
AI.result: 在图像超分辨率、去噪和JPEG压缩伪影去除任务中，ART在多个基准数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，且提供了代码和预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: ART通过结合密集与稀疏注意力机制，有效提升了Transformer在图像修复任务中的性能，为后续研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Accurate Image Restoration with Attention Retractable Transformer Attention伸缩变压器精准图像恢复 Recently, Transformer-based image restoration networks have achieved promising improvements over convolutional neural networks due to parameter-independent global interactions. To lower computational cost, existing works generally limit self-attention computation within non-overlapping windows. However, each group of tokens are always from a dense area of the image. This is considered as a dense attention strategy since the interactions of tokens are restrained in dense regions. Obviously, this strategy could result in restricted receptive fields. To address this issue, we propose Attention Retractable Transformer (ART) for image restoration, which presents both dense and sparse attention modules in the network. The sparse attention module allows tokens from sparse areas to interact and thus provides a wider receptive field. Furthermore, the alternating application of dense and sparse attention modules greatly enhances representation ability of Transformer while providing retractable attention on the input image.We conduct extensive experiments on image super-resolution, denoising, and JPEG compression artifact reduction tasks. Experimental results validate that our proposed ART outperforms state-of-the-art methods on various benchmark datasets both quantitatively and visually. We also provide code and models at https://github.com/gladzhang/ART. 最近，由于参数无关的全局交互，基于 Transformer 的图像恢复网络相对于卷积神经网络取得了有希望的改进。为了降低计算成本，现有的工作通常限制非重叠窗口内的自注意力计算。然而，每组标记始终来自图像的密集区域。这被认为是一种密集注意力策略，因为令牌的相互作用在密集区域受到限制。显然，这种策略可能会导致接受域受限。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了用于图像恢复的注意力可伸缩变压器（ART），它在网络中呈现了密集和稀疏注意力模块。稀疏注意力模块允许来自稀疏区域的令牌进行交互，从而提供更广泛的感受野。此外，密集和稀疏注意力模块的交替应用极大地增强了 Transformer 的表示能力，同时为输入图像提供可伸缩的注意力。我们对图像超分辨率、去噪和 JPEG 压缩伪影减少任务进行了广泛的实验。实验结果验证了我们提出的 ART 在各种基准数据集上无论在数量上还是在视觉上都优于最先进的方法。我们还在 https://github.com/gladzhang/ART 提供代码和模型。 本文提出了一种名为Attention Retractable Transformer (ART)的新型Transformer架构，用于改进图像修复任务中的注意力机制。 Jiale Zhang,Yulun Zhang,Jinjin Gu,Yongbing Zhang,Linghe Kong,Xin Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Kalle Kujanpää,Amin Babadi,Yi Zhao,Juho Kannala,Alexander Ilin,Joni Pajarinen
title: Continuous Monte Carlo Graph Search
title_zh: 连续蒙特卡罗图搜索
abstract: Online planning is crucial for high performance in many complex sequential decision-making tasks. Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) employs a principled mechanism for trading off exploration for exploitation for efficient online planning, and it outperforms comparison methods in many discrete decision-making domains such as Go, Chess, and Shogi. Subsequently, extensions of MCTS to continuous domains have been developed. However, the inherent high branching factor and the resulting explosion of the search tree size are limiting the existing methods. To address this problem, we propose Continuous Monte Carlo Graph Search (CMCGS), an extension of MCTS to online planning in environments with continuous state and action spaces. CMCGS takes advantage of the insight that, during planning, sharing the same action policy between several states can yield high performance. To implement this idea, at each time step, CMCGS clusters similar states into a limited number of stochastic action bandit nodes, which produce a layered directed graph instead of an MCTS search tree. Experimental evaluation shows that CMCGS outperforms comparable planning methods in several complex continuous DeepMind Control Suite benchmarks and 2D navigation and exploration tasks with limited sample budgets. Furthermore, CMCGS can be scaled up through parallelization, and it outperforms the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM) in continuous control with learned dynamics models.
summary: Online planning is crucial for high performance in many complex sequential decision-making tasks. Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) employs a principled mechanism for trading off exploration for exploitation for efficient online planning, and it outperforms comparison methods in many discrete decision-making domains such as Go, Chess, and Shogi. Subsequently, extensions of MCTS to continuous domains have been developed. However, the inherent high branching factor and the resulting explosion of the search tree size are limiting the existing methods. To address this problem, we propose Continuous Monte Carlo Graph Search (CMCGS), an extension of MCTS to online planning in environments with continuous state and action spaces. CMCGS takes advantage of the insight that, during planning, sharing the same action policy between several states can yield high performance. To implement this idea, at each time step, CMCGS clusters similar states into a limited number of stochastic action bandit nodes, which produce a layered directed graph instead of an MCTS search tree. Experimental evaluation shows that CMCGS outperforms comparable planning methods in several complex continuous DeepMind Control Suite benchmarks and 2D navigation and exploration tasks with limited sample budgets. Furthermore, CMCGS can be scaled up through parallelization, and it outperforms the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM) in continuous control with learned dynamics models.
abstract_zh: 在线规划对于许多复杂的顺序决策任务的高性能至关重要。蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS) 采用一种原则性机制来权衡探索与利用，以实现高效的在线规划，并且它在许多离散决策领域（例如围棋、国际象棋和将棋）中优于比较方法。随后，MCTS 向连续域的扩展被开发出来。然而，固有的高分支因子和由此导致的搜索树大小的爆炸限制了现有的方法。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了连续蒙特卡罗图搜索（CMCGS），它是 MCTS 的扩展，用于在具有连续状态和动作空间的环境中进行在线规划。 CMCGS 充分利用了这样的见解：在规划过程中，在多个州之间共享相同的行动政策可以产生较高的绩效。为了实现这个想法，在每个时间步，CMCGS 将相似的状态聚集到有限数量的随机动作强盗节点中，从而生成分层有向图而不是 MCTS 搜索树。实验评估表明，在几个复杂的连续 DeepMind Control Suite 基准测试以及样本预算有限的 2D 导航和探索任务中，CMCGS 的性能优于同类规划方法。此外，CMCGS 可以通过并行化进行扩展，并且在使用学习的动力学模型进行连续控制方面优于交叉熵方法（CEM）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为连续蒙特卡洛图搜索（CMCGS）的方法，用于在连续状态和动作空间的环境中进行高效在线规划。
AI.motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在离散决策领域表现优异，但在连续域中因分支因子高和搜索树爆炸而受限，亟需改进方法。
AI.method: 通过将相似状态聚类为有限的随机动作老虎机节点，构建分层有向图结构，共享动作策略以减少搜索空间。
AI.result: CMCGS在DeepMind控制套件和2D导航任务中优于现有方法，且可通过并行化扩展，在有限样本预算下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CMCGS有效解决了连续域在线规划的挑战，为复杂连续控制任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Lunyiu Nie,Jiuding Sun,Yanlin Wang,Lun Du,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Jidong Zhai
title: Unveiling the Black Box of PLMs with Semantic Anchors: Towards Interpretable Neural Semantic Parsing
title_zh: 揭开带有语义锚的 PLM 黑匣子：迈向可解释的神经语义解析
abstract: The recent prevalence of pretrained language models (PLMs) has dramatically shifted the paradigm of semantic parsing, where the mapping from natural language utterances to structured logical forms is now formulated as a Seq2Seq task. Despite the promising performance, previous PLM-based approaches often suffer from hallucination problems due to their negligence of the structural information contained in the sentence, which essentially constitutes the key semantics of the logical forms. Furthermore, most works treat PLM as a black box in which the generation process of the target logical form is hidden beneath the decoder modules, which greatly hinders the model's intrinsic interpretability. To address these two issues, we propose to incorporate the current PLMs with a hierarchical decoder network. By taking the first-principle structures as the semantic anchors, we propose two novel intermediate supervision tasks, namely Semantic Anchor Extraction and Semantic Anchor Alignment, for training the hierarchical decoders and probing the model intermediate representations in a self-adaptive manner alongside the fine-tuning process. We conduct intensive experiments on several semantic parsing benchmarks and demonstrate that our approach can consistently outperform the baselines. More importantly, by analyzing the intermediate representations of the hierarchical decoders, our approach also makes a huge step toward the intrinsic interpretability of PLMs in the domain of semantic parsing.
summary: The recent prevalence of pretrained language models (PLMs) has dramatically shifted the paradigm of semantic parsing, where the mapping from natural language utterances to structured logical forms is now formulated as a Seq2Seq task. Despite the promising performance, previous PLM-based approaches often suffer from hallucination problems due to their negligence of the structural information contained in the sentence, which essentially constitutes the key semantics of the logical forms. Furthermore, most works treat PLM as a black box in which the generation process of the target logical form is hidden beneath the decoder modules, which greatly hinders the model's intrinsic interpretability. To address these two issues, we propose to incorporate the current PLMs with a hierarchical decoder network. By taking the first-principle structures as the semantic anchors, we propose two novel intermediate supervision tasks, namely Semantic Anchor Extraction and Semantic Anchor Alignment, for training the hierarchical decoders and probing the model intermediate representations in a self-adaptive manner alongside the fine-tuning process. We conduct intensive experiments on several semantic parsing benchmarks and demonstrate that our approach can consistently outperform the baselines. More importantly, by analyzing the intermediate representations of the hierarchical decoders, our approach also makes a huge step toward the intrinsic interpretability of PLMs in the domain of semantic parsing.
abstract_zh: 最近预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的流行极大地改变了语义解析的范式，其中从自然语言话语到结构化逻辑形式的映射现在被表述为 Seq2Seq 任务。尽管性能良好，但以前基于 PLM 的方法经常会出现幻觉问题，因为它们忽视了句子中包含的结构信息，而句子本质上构成了逻辑形式的关键语义。此外，大多数工作将PLM视为一个黑匣子，其中目标逻辑形式的生成过程隐藏在解码器模块之下，这极大地阻碍了模型的内在可解释性。为了解决这两个问题，我们建议将当前的 PLM 与分层解码器网络结合起来。通过以第一原理结构作为语义锚，我们提出了两个新颖的中间监督任务，即语义锚提取和语义锚对齐，用于训练分层解码器并在微调过程中以自适应方式探测模型中间表示。我们对几个语义解析基准进行了深入的实验，并证明我们的方法可以始终优于基线。更重要的是，通过分析分层解码器的中间表示，我们的方法也在语义解析领域朝着 PLM 的内在可解释性迈出了一大步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入语义锚点机制，提升预训练语言模型（PLM）在语义解析任务中的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于PLM的语义解析方法因忽视句子结构信息导致幻觉问题，且将PLM视为黑箱阻碍了模型内在可解释性。
AI.method: 设计分层解码网络，结合语义锚点提出两种中间监督任务：语义锚点提取与对齐，通过自适应方式训练解码器并分析中间表示。
AI.result: 在多个语义解析基准测试中持续优于基线方法，且通过中间表示分析显著提升了PLM的内在可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为PLM在语义解析领域的可解释性研究提供了重要进展。

method: 设计分层解码网络，结合语义锚点提出两种中间监督任务：语义锚点提取与对齐，通过自适应方式训练解码器并分析中间表示。
result: 在多个语义解析基准测试中持续优于基线方法，且通过中间表示分析显著提升了PLM的内在可解释性。
conclusion: 该方法为PLM在语义解析领域的可解释性研究提供了重要进展。
search_text: Unveiling the Black Box of PLMs with Semantic Anchors: Towards Interpretable Neural Semantic Parsing 揭开带有语义锚的 PLM 黑匣子：迈向可解释的神经语义解析 The recent prevalence of pretrained language models (PLMs) has dramatically shifted the paradigm of semantic parsing, where the mapping from natural language utterances to structured logical forms is now formulated as a Seq2Seq task. Despite the promising performance, previous PLM-based approaches often suffer from hallucination problems due to their negligence of the structural information contained in the sentence, which essentially constitutes the key semantics of the logical forms. Furthermore, most works treat PLM as a black box in which the generation process of the target logical form is hidden beneath the decoder modules, which greatly hinders the model's intrinsic interpretability. To address these two issues, we propose to incorporate the current PLMs with a hierarchical decoder network. By taking the first-principle structures as the semantic anchors, we propose two novel intermediate supervision tasks, namely Semantic Anchor Extraction and Semantic Anchor Alignment, for training the hierarchical decoders and probing the model intermediate representations in a self-adaptive manner alongside the fine-tuning process. We conduct intensive experiments on several semantic parsing benchmarks and demonstrate that our approach can consistently outperform the baselines. More importantly, by analyzing the intermediate representations of the hierarchical decoders, our approach also makes a huge step toward the intrinsic interpretability of PLMs in the domain of semantic parsing. 最近预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的流行极大地改变了语义解析的范式，其中从自然语言话语到结构化逻辑形式的映射现在被表述为 Seq2Seq 任务。尽管性能良好，但以前基于 PLM 的方法经常会出现幻觉问题，因为它们忽视了句子中包含的结构信息，而句子本质上构成了逻辑形式的关键语义。此外，大多数工作将PLM视为一个黑匣子，其中目标逻辑形式的生成过程隐藏在解码器模块之下，这极大地阻碍了模型的内在可解释性。为了解决这两个问题，我们建议将当前的 PLM 与分层解码器网络结合起来。通过以第一原理结构作为语义锚，我们提出了两个新颖的中间监督任务，即语义锚提取和语义锚对齐，用于训练分层解码器并在微调过程中以自适应方式探测模型中间表示。我们对几个语义解析基准进行了深入的实验，并证明我们的方法可以始终优于基线。更重要的是，通过分析分层解码器的中间表示，我们的方法也在语义解析领域朝着 PLM 的内在可解释性迈出了一大步。 本文提出通过引入语义锚点机制，提升预训练语言模型（PLM）在语义解析任务中的可解释性。 Lunyiu Nie,Jiuding Sun,Yanlin Wang,Lun Du,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Jidong Zhai cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Sebastian Wallkotter,Mohamed Chetouani,Ginevra Castellano
title: SLOT-V: Supervised Learning of Observer Models for Legible Robot Motion Planning in Manipulation
title_zh: SLOT-V：观察者模型的监督学习，用于操作中清晰的机器人运动规划
comment: ef:2022 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
comments: ef:2022 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
abstract: We present SLOT-V, a novel supervised learning framework that learns observer models (human preferences) from robot motion trajectories in a legibility context. Legibility measures how easily a (human) observer can infer the robot's goal from a robot motion trajectory. When generating such trajectories, existing planners often rely on an observer model that estimates the quality of trajectory candidates. These observer models are frequently hand-crafted or, occasionally, learned from demonstrations. Here, we propose to learn them in a supervised manner using the same data format that is frequently used during the evaluation of aforementioned approaches. We then demonstrate the generality of SLOT-V using a Franka Emika in a simulated manipulation environment. For this, we show that it can learn to closely predict various hand-crafted observer models, i.e., that SLOT-V's hypothesis space encompasses existing handcrafted models. Next, we showcase SLOT-V's ability to generalize by showing that a trained model continues to perform well in environments with unseen goal configurations and/or goal counts. Finally, we benchmark SLOT-V's sample efficiency (and performance) against an existing IRL approach and show that SLOT-V learns better observer models with less data. Combined, these results suggest that SLOT-V can learn viable observer models. Better observer models imply more legible trajectories, which may - in turn - lead to better and more transparent human-robot interaction.
summary: We present SLOT-V, a novel supervised learning framework that learns observer models (human preferences) from robot motion trajectories in a legibility context. Legibility measures how easily a (human) observer can infer the robot's goal from a robot motion trajectory. When generating such trajectories, existing planners often rely on an observer model that estimates the quality of trajectory candidates. These observer models are frequently hand-crafted or, occasionally, learned from demonstrations. Here, we propose to learn them in a supervised manner using the same data format that is frequently used during the evaluation of aforementioned approaches. We then demonstrate the generality of SLOT-V using a Franka Emika in a simulated manipulation environment. For this, we show that it can learn to closely predict various hand-crafted observer models, i.e., that SLOT-V's hypothesis space encompasses existing handcrafted models. Next, we showcase SLOT-V's ability to generalize by showing that a trained model continues to perform well in environments with unseen goal configurations and/or goal counts. Finally, we benchmark SLOT-V's sample efficiency (and performance) against an existing IRL approach and show that SLOT-V learns better observer models with less data. Combined, these results suggest that SLOT-V can learn viable observer models. Better observer models imply more legible trajectories, which may - in turn - lead to better and more transparent human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SLOT-V，这是一种新颖的监督学习框架，可以在易读的环境中从机器人运动轨迹中学习观察者模型（人类偏好）。易读性衡量（人类）观察者从机器人运动轨迹推断机器人目标的难易程度。在生成此类轨迹时，现有的规划器通常依赖于估计轨迹候选质量的观察者模型。这些观察者模型通常是手工制作的，或者偶尔是从演示中学习的。在这里，我们建议使用在评估上述方法期间经常使用的相同数据格式以监督方式学习它们。然后，我们在模拟操纵环境中使用 Franka Emika 演示了 SLOT-V 的通用性。为此，我们证明它可以学习密切预测各种手工制作的观察者模型，即 SLOT-V 的假设空间包含现有的手工制作的模型。接下来，我们通过展示经过训练的模型在具有未见的目标配置和/或目标计数的环境中继续表现良好来展示 SLOT-V 的泛化能力。最后，我们将 SLOT-V 的样本效率（和性能）与现有的 IRL 方法进行基准测试，并表明 SLOT-V 用更少的数据学习更好的观察者模型。综合起来，这些结果表明 SLOT-V 可以学习可行的观察者模型。更好的观察者模型意味着更清晰的轨迹，这反过来可能会带来更好、更透明的人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLOT-V框架，通过监督学习从机器人运动轨迹中学习观察者模型，以提升机械臂操作中的运动轨迹可读性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹规划器依赖手工设计或演示学习的观察者模型，难以准确捕捉人类对轨迹可读性的偏好，限制了人机交互的透明性。
AI.method: 采用监督学习方法，利用评估数据格式训练观察者模型，并在模拟环境中验证其泛化能力，通过对比逆强化学习方法证明其样本效率优势。
AI.result: SLOT-V能准确预测多种手工模型，在未见过的目标配置中保持性能，且比IRL方法用更少数据学习到更优观察者模型。
AI.conclusion: SLOT-V有效学习了可读性观察者模型，为生成更透明、易理解的机器人轨迹提供了新方法，促进人机协作效率提升。

authors_text: Hongbin Lin,Bin Li,Yunhui Liu,Kwok Wai Samuel Au
title: Open-source High-precision Autonomous Suturing Framework With Visual Guidance
title_zh: 具有视觉引导的开源高精度自主缝合框架
comment: ef:IROS 2022 Workshop on "A Panacea Or An Alchemy? Benefits And Risks Of Robot Learning In Medical Applications"
comments: ef:IROS 2022 Workshop on "A Panacea Or An Alchemy? Benefits And Risks Of Robot Learning In Medical Applications"
abstract: Autonomous surgery has attracted increasing attention for revolutionizing robotic patient care, yet remains a distant and challenging goal. In this paper, we propose an image-based framework for high-precision autonomous suturing operation. We first build an algebraic geometric algorithm to achieve accurate needle pose estimation, then design the corresponding keypoint-based calibration network for joint-offset compensation, and further plan and control suture trajectory. Our solution ranked first among all competitors in the AccelNet Surgical Robotics Challenge. Videos and codes can be found in https://sites.google.com/view/accel-2022-cuhk.
summary: Autonomous surgery has attracted increasing attention for revolutionizing robotic patient care, yet remains a distant and challenging goal. In this paper, we propose an image-based framework for high-precision autonomous suturing operation. We first build an algebraic geometric algorithm to achieve accurate needle pose estimation, then design the corresponding keypoint-based calibration network for joint-offset compensation, and further plan and control suture trajectory. Our solution ranked first among all competitors in the AccelNet Surgical Robotics Challenge. Videos and codes can be found in https://sites.google.com/view/accel-2022-cuhk.
abstract_zh: 自主手术彻底改变机器人患者护理已引起越来越多的关注，但仍然是一个遥远且具有挑战性的目标。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图像的高精度自主缝合操作框架。我们首先构建代数几何算法来实现精确的针位姿估计，然后设计相应的基于关键点的校准网络以进行关节偏移补偿，并进一步规划和控制缝合轨迹。我们的解决方案在 AccelNet 手术机器人挑战赛的所有参赛者中排名第一。视频和代码可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/accel-2022-cuhk 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉引导的开源高精度自主缝合框架，实现手术机器人精准缝合操作。
AI.motivation: 自主手术虽具革命性潜力，但精准缝合仍是技术难点，现有方案存在定位误差和轨迹控制不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建代数几何算法实现针尖位姿估计，设计关键点校准网络补偿机械误差，并规划控制缝合轨迹。
AI.result: 该框架在AccelNet手术机器人挑战赛中排名第一，开源代码与演示视频已发布。
AI.conclusion: 提出的视觉引导框架有效提升了自主缝合精度，为手术机器人发展提供了可行技术路径。

authors_text: Anurag Ghosh,Srinivasan Iyengar,Stephen Lee,Anuj Rathore,Venkat N Padmanabhan
title: Streaming Video Analytics On The Edge With Asynchronous Cloud Support
title_zh: 具有异步云支持的边缘流视频分析
abstract: Emerging Internet of Things (IoT) and mobile computing applications are expected to support latency-sensitive deep neural network (DNN) workloads. To realize this vision, the Internet is evolving towards an edge-computing architecture, where computing infrastructure is located closer to the end device to help achieve low latency. However, edge computing may have limited resources compared to cloud environments and thus, cannot run large DNN models that often have high accuracy. In this work, we develop REACT, a framework that leverages cloud resources to execute large DNN models with higher accuracy to improve the accuracy of models running on edge devices. To do so, we propose a novel edge-cloud fusion algorithm that fuses edge and cloud predictions, achieving low latency and high accuracy. We extensively evaluate our approach and show that our approach can significantly improve the accuracy compared to baseline approaches. We focus specifically on object detection in videos (applicable in many video analytics scenarios) and show that the fused edge-cloud predictions can outperform the accuracy of edge-only and cloud-only scenarios by as much as 50%. We also show that REACT can achieve good performance across tradeoff points by choosing a wide range of system parameters to satisfy use-case specific constraints, such as limited network bandwidth or GPU cycles.
summary: Emerging Internet of Things (IoT) and mobile computing applications are expected to support latency-sensitive deep neural network (DNN) workloads. To realize this vision, the Internet is evolving towards an edge-computing architecture, where computing infrastructure is located closer to the end device to help achieve low latency. However, edge computing may have limited resources compared to cloud environments and thus, cannot run large DNN models that often have high accuracy. In this work, we develop REACT, a framework that leverages cloud resources to execute large DNN models with higher accuracy to improve the accuracy of models running on edge devices. To do so, we propose a novel edge-cloud fusion algorithm that fuses edge and cloud predictions, achieving low latency and high accuracy. We extensively evaluate our approach and show that our approach can significantly improve the accuracy compared to baseline approaches. We focus specifically on object detection in videos (applicable in many video analytics scenarios) and show that the fused edge-cloud predictions can outperform the accuracy of edge-only and cloud-only scenarios by as much as 50%. We also show that REACT can achieve good performance across tradeoff points by choosing a wide range of system parameters to satisfy use-case specific constraints, such as limited network bandwidth or GPU cycles.
abstract_zh: 新兴的物联网 (IoT) 和移动计算应用预计将支持延迟敏感的深度神经网络 (DNN) 工作负载。为了实现这一愿景，互联网正在向边缘计算架构发展，其中计算基础设施更靠近终端设备，以帮助实现低延迟。然而，与云环境相比，边缘计算的资源可能有限，因此无法运行通常具有高精度的大型 DNN 模型。在这项工作中，我们开发了 REACT，这是一个利用云资源以更高精度执行大型 DNN 模型的框架，以提高在边​​缘设备上运行的模型的准确性。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的边缘-云融合算法，该算法融合边缘和云预测，实现低延迟和高精度。我们广泛评估了我们的方法，并表明与基线方法相比，我们的方法可以显着提高准确性。我们特别关注视频中的对象检测（适用于许多视频分析场景），并表明融合的边缘-云预测可以比仅边缘和仅云场景的准确性高出多达 50%。我们还表明，通过选择广泛的系统参数来满足用例特定的约束（例如有限的网络带宽或 GPU 周期），REACT 可以在权衡点上实现良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REACT框架，通过边缘设备与云端异步协作实现视频流分析，解决边缘计算资源受限与云端延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备资源有限无法运行高精度大模型，而纯云端方案存在延迟问题，需平衡精度与实时性。
AI.method: 设计边缘-云端预测融合算法，通过异步传输与智能融合策略，在保证低延迟的同时提升检测精度。
AI.result: 在视频目标检测任务中，融合方案较边缘/云端单独方案精度提升最高达50%，且可适配带宽与算力约束。
AI.conclusion: REACT框架有效实现了边缘与云端计算资源的协同优化，为实时视频分析提供了高精度低延迟的解决方案。

authors_text: Rui Yuan,Simon S. Du,Robert M. Gower,Alessandro Lazaric,Lin Xiao
title: Linear Convergence of Natural Policy Gradient Methods with Log-Linear Policies
title_zh: 自然策略梯度方法与对数线性策略的线性收敛
comment: This version adds a table of comparison for the literature review. The paper is published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: This version adds a table of comparison for the literature review. The paper is published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: We consider infinite-horizon discounted Markov decision processes and study the convergence rates of the natural policy gradient (NPG) and the Q-NPG methods with the log-linear policy class. Using the compatible function approximation framework, both methods with log-linear policies can be written as inexact versions of the policy mirror descent (PMD) method. We show that both methods attain linear convergence rates and $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^2)$ sample complexities using a simple, non-adaptive geometrically increasing step size, without resorting to entropy or other strongly convex regularization. Lastly, as a byproduct, we obtain sublinear convergence rates for both methods with arbitrary constant step size.
summary: We consider infinite-horizon discounted Markov decision processes and study the convergence rates of the natural policy gradient (NPG) and the Q-NPG methods with the log-linear policy class. Using the compatible function approximation framework, both methods with log-linear policies can be written as inexact versions of the policy mirror descent (PMD) method. We show that both methods attain linear convergence rates and $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^2)$ sample complexities using a simple, non-adaptive geometrically increasing step size, without resorting to entropy or other strongly convex regularization. Lastly, as a byproduct, we obtain sublinear convergence rates for both methods with arbitrary constant step size.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑无限范围的贴现马尔可夫决策过程，并研究自然策略梯度（NPG）和具有对数线性策略类的 Q-NPG 方法的收敛速度。使用兼容的函数逼近框架，两种具有对数线性策略的方法都可以编写为策略镜像下降（PMD）方法的不精确版本。我们表明，这两种方法都使用简单的、非自适应的几何增加步长来实现线性收敛速度和 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^2)$ 样本复杂性，而无需求助于熵或其他强凸正则化。最后，作为副产品，我们获得了两种具有任意恒定步长的方法的次线性收敛率。

AI.tldr: 分析自然策略梯度（NPG）和Q-NPG方法在对数线性策略下的线性收敛性
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖熵正则化，而本文旨在无需此类正则化的情况下分析收敛性
AI.method: 利用兼容函数逼近框架，将NPG和Q-NPG方法表示为策略镜像下降（PMD）的近似形式
AI.result: 证明两种方法在几何递增步长下达到线性收敛率，样本复杂度为O(1/ε²)，且常数步长下有次线性收敛
AI.conclusion: 无需强凸正则化即可实现线性收敛，扩展了PMD方法的应用范围

ai_content.result: 证明两种方法在几何递增步长下达到线性收敛率，样本复杂度为O(1/ε²)，且常数步长下有次线性收敛
ai_content.conclusion: 无需强凸正则化即可实现线性收敛，扩展了PMD方法的应用范围

authors_text: Hongbin Lin,Qian Gao,Xiangyu Chu,Qi Dou,Anton Deguet,Peter Kazanzides,K. W. Samuel Au
title: Learning Deep Nets for Gravitational Dynamics with Unknown Disturbance through Physical Knowledge Distillation: Initial Feasibility Study
title_zh: 通过物理知识蒸馏学习具有未知扰动的重力动力学深度网络：初步可行性研究
comment: ef:IEEE ROBOTICS AND AUTOMATION LETTERS, VOL. 6, NO. 2, APRIL 2021
comments: ef:IEEE ROBOTICS AND AUTOMATION LETTERS, VOL. 6, NO. 2, APRIL 2021
abstract: Learning high-performance deep neural networks for dynamic modeling of high Degree-Of-Freedom (DOF) robots remains challenging due to the sampling complexity. Typical unknown system disturbance caused by unmodeled dynamics (such as internal compliance, cables) further exacerbates the problem. In this paper, a novel framework characterized by both high data efficiency and disturbance-adapting capability is proposed to address the problem of modeling gravitational dynamics using deep nets in feedforward gravity compensation control for high-DOF master manipulators with unknown disturbance. In particular, Feedforward Deep Neural Networks (FDNNs) are learned from both prior knowledge of an existing analytical model and observation of the robot system by Knowledge Distillation (KD). Through extensive experiments in high-DOF master manipulators with significant disturbance, we show that our method surpasses a standard Learning-from-Scratch (LfS) approach in terms of data efficiency and disturbance adaptation. Our initial feasibility study has demonstrated the potential of outperforming the analytical teacher model as the training data increases.
summary: Learning high-performance deep neural networks for dynamic modeling of high Degree-Of-Freedom (DOF) robots remains challenging due to the sampling complexity. Typical unknown system disturbance caused by unmodeled dynamics (such as internal compliance, cables) further exacerbates the problem. In this paper, a novel framework characterized by both high data efficiency and disturbance-adapting capability is proposed to address the problem of modeling gravitational dynamics using deep nets in feedforward gravity compensation control for high-DOF master manipulators with unknown disturbance. In particular, Feedforward Deep Neural Networks (FDNNs) are learned from both prior knowledge of an existing analytical model and observation of the robot system by Knowledge Distillation (KD). Through extensive experiments in high-DOF master manipulators with significant disturbance, we show that our method surpasses a standard Learning-from-Scratch (LfS) approach in terms of data efficiency and disturbance adaptation. Our initial feasibility study has demonstrated the potential of outperforming the analytical teacher model as the training data increases.
abstract_zh: 由于采样复杂性，学习用于高自由度 (DOF) 机器人动态建模的高性能深度神经网络仍然具有挑战性。由未建模的动态（例如内部顺应性、电缆）引起的典型未知系统扰动进一步加剧了该问题。本文提出了一种具有高数据效率和干扰适应能力的新型框架，以解决在未知干扰的高自由度主机械臂的前馈重力补偿控制中使用深层网络进行重力动力学建模的问题。特别是，前馈深度神经网络（FDNN）是从现有分析模型的先验知识和通过知识蒸馏（KD）对机器人系统的观察中学习的。通过在具有显着干扰的高自由度主机械臂上进行大量实验，我们表明我们的方法在数据效率和干扰适应方面超越了标准的从头学习（LfS）方法。我们最初的可行性研究表明，随着训练数据的增加，其表现优于分析型教师模型的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理知识蒸馏的深度网络学习框架，用于解决高自由度机械臂在未知扰动下的重力动力学建模问题。
AI.motivation: 高自由度机器人动力学建模面临采样复杂度高和未建模扰动（如内部柔顺性、电缆等）的挑战，传统方法在数据效率和扰动适应性上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过知识蒸馏（KD）结合先验解析模型与系统观测数据，训练前馈深度神经网络（FDNN），实现对未知扰动的自适应建模。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在数据效率和扰动适应性上优于从零学习（LfS）方法，且随着训练数据增加，性能可超越解析教师模型。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏结合物理先验知识为高自由度机器人动态建模提供了有效途径，展示了应对未知扰动的潜力。

motivation: 高自由度机器人动力学建模面临采样复杂度高和未建模扰动（如内部柔顺性、电缆等）的挑战，传统方法在数据效率和扰动适应性上存在不足。
method: 通过知识蒸馏（KD）结合先验解析模型与系统观测数据，训练前馈深度神经网络（FDNN），实现对未知扰动的自适应建模。
result: 实验表明，该方法在数据效率和扰动适应性上优于从零学习（LfS）方法，且随着训练数据增加，性能可超越解析教师模型。
conclusion: 知识蒸馏结合物理先验知识为高自由度机器人动态建模提供了有效途径，展示了应对未知扰动的潜力。
search_text: Learning Deep Nets for Gravitational Dynamics with Unknown Disturbance through Physical Knowledge Distillation: Initial Feasibility Study 通过物理知识蒸馏学习具有未知扰动的重力动力学深度网络：初步可行性研究 Learning high-performance deep neural networks for dynamic modeling of high Degree-Of-Freedom (DOF) robots remains challenging due to the sampling complexity. Typical unknown system disturbance caused by unmodeled dynamics (such as internal compliance, cables) further exacerbates the problem. In this paper, a novel framework characterized by both high data efficiency and disturbance-adapting capability is proposed to address the problem of modeling gravitational dynamics using deep nets in feedforward gravity compensation control for high-DOF master manipulators with unknown disturbance. In particular, Feedforward Deep Neural Networks (FDNNs) are learned from both prior knowledge of an existing analytical model and observation of the robot system by Knowledge Distillation (KD). Through extensive experiments in high-DOF master manipulators with significant disturbance, we show that our method surpasses a standard Learning-from-Scratch (LfS) approach in terms of data efficiency and disturbance adaptation. Our initial feasibility study has demonstrated the potential of outperforming the analytical teacher model as the training data increases. 由于采样复杂性，学习用于高自由度 (DOF) 机器人动态建模的高性能深度神经网络仍然具有挑战性。由未建模的动态（例如内部顺应性、电缆）引起的典型未知系统扰动进一步加剧了该问题。本文提出了一种具有高数据效率和干扰适应能力的新型框架，以解决在未知干扰的高自由度主机械臂的前馈重力补偿控制中使用深层网络进行重力动力学建模的问题。特别是，前馈深度神经网络（FDNN）是从现有分析模型的先验知识和通过知识蒸馏（KD）对机器人系统的观察中学习的。通过在具有显着干扰的高自由度主机械臂上进行大量实验，我们表明我们的方法在数据效率和干扰适应方面超越了标准的从头学习（LfS）方法。我们最初的可行性研究表明，随着训练数据的增加，其表现优于分析型教师模型的潜力。 本文提出一种基于物理知识蒸馏的深度网络学习框架，用于解决高自由度机械臂在未知扰动下的重力动力学建模问题。 Hongbin Lin,Qian Gao,Xiangyu Chu,Qi Dou,Anton Deguet,Peter Kazanzides,K. W. Samuel Au cs.RO

authors_text: Yikai Wang,TengQi Ye,Lele Cao,Wenbing Huang,Fuchun Sun,Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao
title: Bridged Transformer for Vision and Point Cloud 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于视觉和点云 3D 对象检测的桥接变压器
abstract: 3D object detection is a crucial research topic in computer vision, which usually uses 3D point clouds as input in conventional setups. Recently, there is a trend of leveraging multiple sources of input data, such as complementing the 3D point cloud with 2D images that often have richer color and fewer noises. However, due to the heterogeneous geometrics of the 2D and 3D representations, it prevents us from applying off-the-shelf neural networks to achieve multimodal fusion. To that end, we propose Bridged Transformer (BrT), an end-to-end architecture for 3D object detection. BrT is simple and effective, which learns to identify 3D and 2D object bounding boxes from both points and image patches. A key element of BrT lies in the utilization of object queries for bridging 3D and 2D spaces, which unifies different sources of data representations in Transformer. We adopt a form of feature aggregation realized by point-to-patch projections which further strengthen the correlations between images and points. Moreover, BrT works seamlessly for fusing the point cloud with multi-view images. We experimentally show that BrT surpasses state-of-the-art methods on SUN RGB-D and ScanNetV2 datasets.
summary: 3D object detection is a crucial research topic in computer vision, which usually uses 3D point clouds as input in conventional setups. Recently, there is a trend of leveraging multiple sources of input data, such as complementing the 3D point cloud with 2D images that often have richer color and fewer noises. However, due to the heterogeneous geometrics of the 2D and 3D representations, it prevents us from applying off-the-shelf neural networks to achieve multimodal fusion. To that end, we propose Bridged Transformer (BrT), an end-to-end architecture for 3D object detection. BrT is simple and effective, which learns to identify 3D and 2D object bounding boxes from both points and image patches. A key element of BrT lies in the utilization of object queries for bridging 3D and 2D spaces, which unifies different sources of data representations in Transformer. We adopt a form of feature aggregation realized by point-to-patch projections which further strengthen the correlations between images and points. Moreover, BrT works seamlessly for fusing the point cloud with multi-view images. We experimentally show that BrT surpasses state-of-the-art methods on SUN RGB-D and ScanNetV2 datasets.
abstract_zh: 3D 对象检测是计算机视觉中的一个重要研究课题，通常使用 3D 点云作为传统设置中的输入。最近，出现了利用多个输入数据源的趋势，例如用通常具有更丰富的颜色和更少噪声的 2D 图像来补充 3D 点云。然而，由于 2D 和 3D 表示的几何异构性，它阻止我们应用现成的神经网络来实现多模态融合。为此，我们提出了 Bridged Transformer (BrT)，这是一种用于 3D 对象检测的端到端架构。 BrT 简单而有效，它学习从点和图像块中识别 3D 和 2D 对象边界框。 BrT 的一个关键要素在于利用对象查询来桥接 3D 和 2D 空间，这统一了 Transformer 中不同数据表示源。我们采用一种通过点到块投影实现的特征聚合形式，进一步加强了图像和点之间的相关性。此外，BrT 可无缝融合点云与多视图图像。我们通过实验证明 BrT 在 SUN RGB-D 和 ScanNetV2 数据集上超越了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bridged Transformer (BrT)的端到端架构，用于结合2D图像和3D点云进行3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 传统3D目标检测依赖单一的3D点云输入，而2D图像包含更丰富的颜色信息且噪声较少。然而，2D与3D表示的异构几何特性阻碍了现有神经网络的多模态融合。
AI.method: BrT通过对象查询机制统一3D与2D空间表示，并采用点到图像块投影的特征聚合方法，增强图像与点云间的关联性，实现多视角图像与点云的无缝融合。
AI.result: 实验表明，BrT在SUN RGB-D和ScanNetV2数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: BrT通过创新的跨模态特征融合机制，有效解决了2D图像与3D点云的异构性问题，为多模态3D目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Thanh Vu,Yanqi Zhou,Chunfeng Wen,Yueqi Li,Jan-Michael Frahm
title: Toward Edge-Efficient Dense Predictions with Synergistic Multi-Task Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 通过协同多任务神经架构搜索实现边缘高效的密集预测
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel and scalable solution to address the challenges of developing efficient dense predictions on edge platforms. Our first key insight is that MultiTask Learning (MTL) and hardware-aware Neural Architecture Search (NAS) can work in synergy to greatly benefit on-device Dense Predictions (DP). Empirical results reveal that the joint learning of the two paradigms is surprisingly effective at improving DP accuracy, achieving superior performance over both the transfer learning of single-task NAS and prior state-of-the-art approaches in MTL, all with just 1/10th of the computation. To the best of our knowledge, our framework, named EDNAS, is the first to successfully leverage the synergistic relationship of NAS and MTL for DP. Our second key insight is that the standard depth training for multi-task DP can cause significant instability and noise to MTL evaluation. Instead, we propose JAReD, an improved, easy-to-adopt Joint Absolute-Relative Depth loss, that reduces up to 88% of the undesired noise while simultaneously boosting accuracy. We conduct extensive evaluations on standard datasets, benchmark against strong baselines and state-of-the-art approaches, as well as provide an analysis of the discovered optimal architectures.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel and scalable solution to address the challenges of developing efficient dense predictions on edge platforms. Our first key insight is that MultiTask Learning (MTL) and hardware-aware Neural Architecture Search (NAS) can work in synergy to greatly benefit on-device Dense Predictions (DP). Empirical results reveal that the joint learning of the two paradigms is surprisingly effective at improving DP accuracy, achieving superior performance over both the transfer learning of single-task NAS and prior state-of-the-art approaches in MTL, all with just 1/10th of the computation. To the best of our knowledge, our framework, named EDNAS, is the first to successfully leverage the synergistic relationship of NAS and MTL for DP. Our second key insight is that the standard depth training for multi-task DP can cause significant instability and noise to MTL evaluation. Instead, we propose JAReD, an improved, easy-to-adopt Joint Absolute-Relative Depth loss, that reduces up to 88% of the undesired noise while simultaneously boosting accuracy. We conduct extensive evaluations on standard datasets, benchmark against strong baselines and state-of-the-art approaches, as well as provide an analysis of the discovered optimal architectures.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且可扩展的解决方案，以解决在边缘平台上开发高效密集预测的挑战。我们的第一个关键见解是，多任务学习 (MTL) 和硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 可以协同工作，从而极大地有益于设备上的密集预测 (DP)。实证结果表明，两种范式的联合学习在提高 DP 准确性方面出人意料地有效，与单任务 NAS 的迁移学习和 MTL 中现有最先进的方法相比，实现了卓越的性能，而所有这些都只需 1/10 的计算量。据我们所知，我们的框架（名为 EDNAS）是第一个成功利用 NAS 和 MTL 的协同关系进行 DP 的框架。我们的第二个关键见解是，多任务 DP 的标准深度训练可能会给 MTL 评估带来显着的不稳定和噪音。相反，我们提出了 JAReD，这是一种改进的、易于采用的联合绝对相对深度损失，可减少高达 88% 的不需要的噪声，同时提高准确性。我们对标准数据集进行广泛的评估，针对强大的基线和最先进的方法进行基准测试，并对发现的最佳架构进行分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多任务学习（MTL）和硬件感知神经架构搜索（NAS）的协同框架EDNAS，以在边缘设备上实现高效的密集预测。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备计算资源有限，传统密集预测方法计算量大且效率低，现有方法难以兼顾准确性与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计EDNAS框架，联合优化MTL与NAS；提出JAReD损失函数，通过联合绝对-相对深度损失减少噪声并提升精度。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上，EDNAS以仅为其他方法1/10的计算量实现更优性能，JAReD减少88%噪声并提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: EDNAS首次有效结合NAS与MTL，为边缘设备密集预测提供了高效且稳定的解决方案。

Our second key insight is that the standard depth training for multi-task DP can cause significant instability and noise to MTL evaluation. Instead, we propose JAReD, an improved, easy-to-adopt Joint Absolute-Relative Depth loss, that reduces up to 88% of the undesired noise while simultaneously boosting accuracy. We conduct extensive evaluations on standard datasets, benchmark against strong baselines and state-of-the-art approaches, as well as provide an analysis of the discovered optimal architectures. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且可扩展的解决方案，以解决在边缘平台上开发高效密集预测的挑战。我们的第一个关键见解是，多任务学习 (MTL) 和硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 可以协同工作，从而极大地有益于设备上的密集预测 (DP)。实证结果表明，两种范式的联合学习在提高 DP 准确性方面出人意料地有效，与单任务 NAS 的迁移学习和 MTL 中现有最先进的方法相比，实现了卓越的性能，而所有这些都只需 1/10 的计算量。据我们所知，我们的框架（名为 EDNAS）是第一个成功利用 NAS 和 MTL 的协同关系进行 DP 的框架。我们的第二个关键见解是，多任务 DP 的标准深度训练可能会给 MTL 评估带来显着的不稳定和噪音。相反，我们提出了 JAReD，这是一种改进的、易于采用的联合绝对相对深度损失，可减少高达 88% 的不需要的噪声，同时提高准确性。我们对标准数据集进行广泛的评估，针对强大的基线和最先进的方法进行基准测试，并对发现的最佳架构进行分析。 本文提出了一种结合多任务学习（MTL）和硬件感知神经架构搜索（NAS）的协同框架EDNAS，以在边缘设备上实现高效的密集预测。 Thanh Vu,Yanqi Zhou,Chunfeng Wen,Yueqi Li,Jan-Michael Frahm cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Willie Neiswanger,Lantao Yu,Shengjia Zhao,Chenlin Meng,Stefano Ermon
title: Generalizing Bayesian Optimization with Decision-theoretic Entropies
title_zh: 用决策理论熵推广贝叶斯优化
comment: Appears in Proceedings of the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Appears in Proceedings of the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular method for efficiently inferring optima of an expensive black-box function via a sequence of queries. Existing information-theoretic BO procedures aim to make queries that most reduce the uncertainty about optima, where the uncertainty is captured by Shannon entropy. However, an optimal measure of uncertainty would, ideally, factor in how we intend to use the inferred quantity in some downstream procedure. In this paper, we instead consider a generalization of Shannon entropy from work in statistical decision theory (DeGroot 1962, Rao 1984), which contains a broad class of uncertainty measures parameterized by a problem-specific loss function corresponding to a downstream task. We first show that special cases of this entropy lead to popular acquisition functions used in BO procedures such as knowledge gradient, expected improvement, and entropy search. We then show how alternative choices for the loss yield a flexible family of acquisition functions that can be customized for use in novel optimization settings. Additionally, we develop gradient-based methods to efficiently optimize our proposed family of acquisition functions, and demonstrate strong empirical performance on a diverse set of sequential decision making tasks, including variants of top-$k$ optimization, multi-level set estimation, and sequence search.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular method for efficiently inferring optima of an expensive black-box function via a sequence of queries. Existing information-theoretic BO procedures aim to make queries that most reduce the uncertainty about optima, where the uncertainty is captured by Shannon entropy. However, an optimal measure of uncertainty would, ideally, factor in how we intend to use the inferred quantity in some downstream procedure. In this paper, we instead consider a generalization of Shannon entropy from work in statistical decision theory (DeGroot 1962, Rao 1984), which contains a broad class of uncertainty measures parameterized by a problem-specific loss function corresponding to a downstream task. We first show that special cases of this entropy lead to popular acquisition functions used in BO procedures such as knowledge gradient, expected improvement, and entropy search. We then show how alternative choices for the loss yield a flexible family of acquisition functions that can be customized for use in novel optimization settings. Additionally, we develop gradient-based methods to efficiently optimize our proposed family of acquisition functions, and demonstrate strong empirical performance on a diverse set of sequential decision making tasks, including variants of top-$k$ optimization, multi-level set estimation, and sequence search.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是一种流行的方法，可通过一系列查询有效推断昂贵的黑盒函数的最优值。现有的信息论 BO 程序旨在进行最大限度地减少最优不确定性的查询，其中不确定性由香农熵捕获。然而，理想情况下，不确定性的最佳度量将考虑我们打算如何在某些下游程序中使用推断的数量。在本文中，我们考虑统计决策理论中香农熵的推广（DeGroot 1962，Rao 1984），其中包含一类广泛的不确定性度量，由与下游任务相对应的特定问题损失函数参数化。我们首先表明，这种熵的特殊情况导致了 BO 过程中使用的流行获取函数，例如知识梯度、预期改进和熵搜索。然后，我们展示了损失的替代选择如何产生灵活的采集函数系列，这些函数可以定制用于新颖的优化设置。此外，我们开发了基于梯度的方法来有效地优化我们提出的采集函数系列，并在一系列不同的顺序决策任务上展示出强大的经验性能，包括 top-$k$ 优化的变体、多级集估计和序列搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入决策论熵的概念，推广了贝叶斯优化方法，以更灵活地适应下游任务的需求。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化依赖香农熵衡量不确定性，但未考虑下游任务的具体需求，导致优化策略不够灵活。
AI.method: 基于统计决策理论中的损失函数参数化熵，提出通用不确定性度量框架，并开发梯度优化方法实现新型获取函数。
AI.result: 在Top-k优化、多级集估计等任务中验证了方法有效性，表现出优于传统方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合任务特定损失函数，为贝叶斯优化提供了更通用且灵活的理论基础与实践工具。

authors_text: Ray Chen Zheng,Kaizhe Hu,Zhecheng Yuan,Boyuan Chen,Huazhe Xu
title: Extraneousness-Aware Imitation Learning
title_zh: 无关性感知模仿学习
abstract: Visual imitation learning provides an effective framework to learn skills from demonstrations. However, the quality of the provided demonstrations usually significantly affects the ability of an agent to acquire desired skills. Therefore, the standard visual imitation learning assumes near-optimal demonstrations, which are expensive or sometimes prohibitive to collect. Previous works propose to learn from noisy demonstrations; however, the noise is usually assumed to follow a context-independent distribution such as a uniform or gaussian distribution. In this paper, we consider another crucial yet underexplored setting -- imitation learning with task-irrelevant yet locally consistent segments in the demonstrations (e.g., wiping sweat while cutting potatoes in a cooking tutorial). We argue that such noise is common in real world data and term them "extraneous" segments. To tackle this problem, we introduce Extraneousness-Aware Imitation Learning (EIL), a self-supervised approach that learns visuomotor policies from third-person demonstrations with extraneous subsequences. EIL learns action-conditioned observation embeddings in a self-supervised manner and retrieves task-relevant observations across visual demonstrations while excluding the extraneous ones. Experimental results show that EIL outperforms strong baselines and achieves comparable policies to those trained with perfect demonstration on both simulated and real-world robot control tasks. The project page can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/eil-website.
summary: Visual imitation learning provides an effective framework to learn skills from demonstrations. However, the quality of the provided demonstrations usually significantly affects the ability of an agent to acquire desired skills. Therefore, the standard visual imitation learning assumes near-optimal demonstrations, which are expensive or sometimes prohibitive to collect. Previous works propose to learn from noisy demonstrations; however, the noise is usually assumed to follow a context-independent distribution such as a uniform or gaussian distribution. In this paper, we consider another crucial yet underexplored setting -- imitation learning with task-irrelevant yet locally consistent segments in the demonstrations (e.g., wiping sweat while cutting potatoes in a cooking tutorial). We argue that such noise is common in real world data and term them "extraneous" segments. To tackle this problem, we introduce Extraneousness-Aware Imitation Learning (EIL), a self-supervised approach that learns visuomotor policies from third-person demonstrations with extraneous subsequences. EIL learns action-conditioned observation embeddings in a self-supervised manner and retrieves task-relevant observations across visual demonstrations while excluding the extraneous ones. Experimental results show that EIL outperforms strong baselines and achieves comparable policies to those trained with perfect demonstration on both simulated and real-world robot control tasks. The project page can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/eil-website.
abstract_zh: 视觉模仿学习提供了一个从演示中学习技能的有效框架。然而，所提供演示的质量通常会显着影响代理获得所需技能的能力。因此，标准的视觉模仿学习假设接近最佳的演示，而这种演示的成本很高，有时甚至难以收集。以前的作品建议从嘈杂的示威中学习；然而，通常假设噪声遵循与上下文无关的分布，例如均匀分布或高斯分布。在本文中，我们考虑了另一个关键但尚未充分探索的设置——在演示中使用与任务无关但局部一致的部分进行模仿学习（例如，在烹饪教程中切土豆时擦汗）。我们认为这种噪音在现实世界的数据中很常见，并将它们称为“无关”片段。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了外部感知模仿学习（EIL），这是一种自我监督的方法，可以从具有无关序列的第三人称演示中学习视觉运动策略。 EIL 以自我监督的方式学习动作条件观察嵌入，并在视觉演示中检索与任务相关的观察结果，同时排除无关的观察结果。实验结果表明，EIL 的性能优于强大的基线，并实现了与在模拟和现实世界机器人控制任务上经过完美演示的训练者相当的策略。该项目页面可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/eil-website 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EIL的自监督方法，用于从包含任务无关但局部一致片段（如烹饪教程中擦汗动作）的视觉演示中学习视觉运动策略。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法假设演示数据接近最优或噪声独立分布，但现实数据中常存在任务无关却局部连贯的冗余片段（extraneous segments），这些片段未被充分研究且影响学习效果。
AI.method: EIL通过自监督学习获得动作条件化的观察嵌入，从第三人称演示中检索任务相关观察并排除冗余片段，无需人工标注或先验噪声模型。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人控制任务中，EIL优于强基线方法，其策略性能可与完美演示训练结果相媲美。
AI.conclusion: EIL通过关注任务相关观察有效处理冗余片段，在现实场景的视觉模仿学习中展现出显著优势。

authors_text: Yunsung Lee,Gyuseong Lee,Kwangrok Ryoo,Hyojun Go,Jihye Park,Seungryong Kim
title: Towards Flexible Inductive Bias via Progressive Reparameterization Scheduling
title_zh: 通过渐进式重新参数化调度实现灵活的归纳偏差
comment: Accepted at VIPriors ECCVW 2022, camera-ready version
comments: Accepted at VIPriors ECCVW 2022, camera-ready version
abstract: There are two de facto standard architectures in recent computer vision: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs). Strong inductive biases of convolutions help the model learn sample effectively, but such strong biases also limit the upper bound of CNNs when sufficient data are available. On the contrary, ViT is inferior to CNNs for small data but superior for sufficient data. Recent approaches attempt to combine the strengths of these two architectures. However, we show these approaches overlook that the optimal inductive bias also changes according to the target data scale changes by comparing various models' accuracy on subsets of sampled ImageNet at different ratios. In addition, through Fourier analysis of feature maps, the model's response patterns according to signal frequency changes, we observe which inductive bias is advantageous for each data scale. The more convolution-like inductive bias is included in the model, the smaller the data scale is required where the ViT-like model outperforms the ResNet performance. To obtain a model with flexible inductive bias on the data scale, we show reparameterization can interpolate inductive bias between convolution and self-attention. By adjusting the number of epochs the model stays in the convolution, we show that reparameterization from convolution to self-attention interpolates the Fourier analysis pattern between CNNs and ViTs. Adapting these findings, we propose Progressive Reparameterization Scheduling (PRS), in which reparameterization adjusts the required amount of convolution-like or self-attention-like inductive bias per layer. For small-scale datasets, our PRS performs reparameterization from convolution to self-attention linearly faster at the late stage layer. PRS outperformed previous studies on the small-scale dataset, e.g., CIFAR-100.

Strong inductive biases of convolutions help the model learn sample effectively, but such strong biases also limit the upper bound of CNNs when sufficient data are available. On the contrary, ViT is inferior to CNNs for small data but superior for sufficient data. Recent approaches attempt to combine the strengths of these two architectures. However, we show these approaches overlook that the optimal inductive bias also changes according to the target data scale changes by comparing various models' accuracy on subsets of sampled ImageNet at different ratios. In addition, through Fourier analysis of feature maps, the model's response patterns according to signal frequency changes, we observe which inductive bias is advantageous for each data scale. The more convolution-like inductive bias is included in the model, the smaller the data scale is required where the ViT-like model outperforms the ResNet performance. To obtain a model with flexible inductive bias on the data scale, we show reparameterization can interpolate inductive bias between convolution and self-attention. By adjusting the number of epochs the model stays in the convolution, we show that reparameterization from convolution to self-attention interpolates the Fourier analysis pattern between CNNs and ViTs. Adapting these findings, we propose Progressive Reparameterization Scheduling (PRS), in which reparameterization adjusts the required amount of convolution-like or self-attention-like inductive bias per layer. For small-scale datasets, our PRS performs reparameterization from convolution to self-attention linearly faster at the late stage layer. PRS outperformed previous studies on the small-scale dataset, e.g., CIFAR-100.
abstract_zh: 最近的计算机视觉有两种事实上的标准架构：卷积神经网络（CNN）和视觉变换器（ViT）。卷积的强归纳偏差有助于模型有效地学习样本，但当有足够的数据可用时，这种强偏差也会限制 CNN 的上限。相反，对于小数据，ViT 不如 CNN，但对于足够的数据则优于 CNN。最近的方法试图结合这两种架构的优势。然而，通过比较各种模型在不同比例的采样 ImageNet 子集上的准确性，我们发现这些方法忽略了最佳归纳偏差也会根据目标数据规模的变化而变化。此外，通过特征图的傅里叶分析，模型根据信号频率变化的响应模式，我们观察哪种归纳偏差对于每个数据尺度​​是有利的。模型中包含的类卷积归纳偏差越多，类 ViT 模型优于 ResNet 性能的情况下所需的数据规模就越小。为了获得在数据规模上具有灵活归纳偏差的模型，我们证明重新参数化可以在卷积和自注意力之间插入归纳偏差。通过调整模型在卷积中停留的纪元数，我们表明从卷积到自注意力的重新参数化可以在 CNN 和 ViT 之间插入傅立叶分析模式。根据这些发现，我们提出了渐进式重新参数化调度（PRS），其中重新参数化调整每层所需的类似卷积或类似自注意力的归纳偏差量。对于小规模数据集，我们的 PRS 在后期层以更快的速度线性地执行从卷积到自注意力的重新参数化。 PRS 优于之前在小规模数据集（例如 CIFAR-100）上的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为渐进重参数化调度（PRS）的方法，通过动态调整卷积和自注意力的归纳偏置比例，使模型能够根据数据规模灵活适应。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在融合CNN和ViT优势时未考虑归纳偏置应随数据规模变化，导致小数据集性能不足，而PRS通过分析频域特征和数据规模关系解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过傅里叶分析确定不同数据规模下最优归纳偏置，利用重参数化技术在卷积和自注意力间插值，并设计渐进调度策略调整各层偏置比例。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100等小规模数据集上，PRS相比现有方法取得更优性能，验证了动态调整归纳偏置的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PRS通过灵活调整模型归纳偏置，有效解决了传统架构在数据规模变化时的性能瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Esha Shandilya,Mingming Fan
title: Understanding Older Adults' Perceptions and Challenges in Using AI-enabled Everyday Technologies
title_zh: 了解老年人在使用人工智能日常技术时的看法和挑战
comment: The Tenth International Symposium of Chinese CHI (Chinese CHI 2022)
comments: The Tenth International Symposium of Chinese CHI (Chinese CHI 2022)
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled everyday technologies could help address age-related challenges like physical impairments and cognitive decline. While recent research studied older adults' experiences with specific AI-enabled products (e.g., conversational agents and assistive robots), it remains unknown how older adults perceive and experience current AI-enabled everyday technologies in general, which could impact their adoption of future AI-enabled products. We conducted a survey study (N=41) and semi-structured interviews (N=15) with older adults to understand their experiences and perceptions of AI. We found that older adults were enthusiastic about learning and using AI-enabled products, but they lacked learning avenues. Additionally, they worried when AI-enabled products outwitted their expectations, intruded on their privacy, or impacted their decision-making skills. Therefore, they held mixed views towards AI-enabled products such as AI, an aid, or an adversary. We conclude with design recommendations that make older adults feel inclusive, secure, and in control of their interactions with AI-enabled products.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled everyday technologies could help address age-related challenges like physical impairments and cognitive decline. While recent research studied older adults' experiences with specific AI-enabled products (e.g., conversational agents and assistive robots), it remains unknown how older adults perceive and experience current AI-enabled everyday technologies in general, which could impact their adoption of future AI-enabled products. We conducted a survey study (N=41) and semi-structured interviews (N=15) with older adults to understand their experiences and perceptions of AI. We found that older adults were enthusiastic about learning and using AI-enabled products, but they lacked learning avenues. Additionally, they worried when AI-enabled products outwitted their expectations, intruded on their privacy, or impacted their decision-making skills. Therefore, they held mixed views towards AI-enabled products such as AI, an aid, or an adversary. We conclude with design recommendations that make older adults feel inclusive, secure, and in control of their interactions with AI-enabled products.
abstract_zh: 支持人工智能 (AI) 的日常技术可以帮助解决与年龄相关的挑战，例如身体损伤和认知能力下降。虽然最近的研究研究了老年人对特定人工智能产品（例如对话代理和辅助机器人）的体验，但目前仍不清楚老年人如何看待和体验当前人工智能日常技术，这可能会影响他们对未来人工智能产品的采用。我们对老年人进行了一项调查研究 (N=41) 和半结构化访谈 (N=15)，以了解他们对人工智能的体验和看法。我们发现，老年人热衷于学习和使用人工智能产品，但他们缺乏学习途径。此外，他们担心人工智能产品超出他们的预期、侵犯他们的隐私或影响他们的决策技能。因此，他们对人工智能产品（例如人工智能、援助或对手）持有不同的看法。最后，我们提出了一些设计建议，让老年人感到包容、安全，并能够控制他们与人工智能产品的互动。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在探讨老年人对人工智能赋能日常技术的感知与使用挑战，以指导未来产品设计。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦特定AI产品，缺乏对老年人整体AI技术认知与接受度的系统研究，可能影响未来技术采纳。
AI.method: 通过问卷调查（41人）与半结构化访谈（15人）收集数据，分析老年人对AI技术的体验与态度。
AI.result: 老年人对AI技术持积极态度但存在顾虑，包括隐私侵犯、决策能力影响及学习资源不足，对其认知呈现矛盾性。
AI.conclusion: 提出设计建议，强调需提升技术包容性、安全性及用户控制感，以促进老年人对AI技术的接纳。
